Name: GE Vernova
Description:
GE Vernova is a purpose-built energy technology company on a mission to electrify to thrive and decarbonize the world.

It is made up of three businesses -- Power, Wind, and Electrification -- with focus on accelerating the path to more reliable, affordable, and sustainable energy, while helping our customers power economies and deliver the electricity that is vital to health, safety, security, and improved quality of life.

The world needs more energy, smarter energy. With energy demand expected to grow by more than 50% in the next 20 years, we are continuously innovating to meet the moment…like we have for the past 130 years. The Energy of Change and relentless optimism are what drive us – it’s about never giving up and seeing what’s possible so that we deliver the energy technologies the world needs right now and for generations to come.

GE Vernova’s attitude and edge is embedded in its name. We retain our treasured legacy, “GE,” as an enduring and hard-earned badge of quality and ingenuity. “Ver” / “verde” signal Earth’s verdant and lush ecosystems. “Nova,” from the Latin “novus,” nods to a new, innovative era of lower carbon energy that GE Vernova will help deliver.

Together, we have the energy to change the world.

Name: EDF
Description: Our raison d'être is to build a net zero energy future with electricity and innovative solutions and services, to help save the planet and drive wellbeing and economic development.

Name: Iberdrola
Description:
With more than 180 years of history, Iberdrola is today a global energy leader, the leading wind power producer and one of the largest electricity companies in the world in terms of stock market capitalisation.

We have been committed to clean energy for more than 20 years with the objective of exceeding 52,000 MW of renewable capacity by 2025. 

The group supplies energy to nearly 100 million people in dozens of countries, has more than 600,000 shareholders, a workforce of more than 42,300 employees.

We are leading the energy transition to a sustainable model through our investments in renewables, smart grids, large-scale energy storage and digital transformation to deliver the most advanced products and services to our customers.

Find out more in 'Life at Iberdrola'

Name: Statkraft
Description:
Statkraft is a leading company in hydropower internationally and Europe’s largest generator of renewable energy. The Group produces hydropower, wind power, solar power, gas-fired power and supplies district heating. Statkraft is a global company in energy market operations. 
Statkraft has 7000 employees in more than 20 countries.

Name: Alstom Power
Description:
This channel is no longer active.
Alstom Power was acquired by GE Vernova's Power businesses in November 2015.

Name: ENGIE Chile
Description:
ENGIE develops its businesses (power, natural gas, energy services) around a model based on responsible growth to take on the major challenges of energy’s transition to a low-carbon economy: access to sustainable energy, climate-change mitigation and adaptation and the rational use of resources.

The Group provides individuals, cities and businesses with highly efficient and innovative solutions largely based on its expertise in four key sectors: renewable energy, energy efficiency, liquefied natural gas and digital technology.

ENGIE employs 154,950 people worldwide and achieved revenues of €69.9 billion in 2015. The Group is listed on the Paris and Brussels stock exchanges (ENGI) and is represented in the main international indices: CAC 40, BEL 20, DJ Euro Stoxx 50, Euronext 100, FTSE Eurotop 100, MSCI Europe, DJSI World, DJSI Europe and Euronext Vigeo (Eurozone 120, Europe 120 and France 20).

In Chile, ENGIE employs 2,800 people and its present in the following actitivies: centralized and decentralized power generation, energy services, LNG regasification and gas distribution and transport.

Name: EDP Brasil
Description:
Com mais de 20 anos de atuação no Brasil, a EDP é uma das maiores empresas privadas do setor elétrico a operar em toda a cadeia de valor. A Companhia, que tem mais de 10 mil colaboradores diretos e terceirizados, atua em Transmissão, Comercialização e Soluções em Energia, e possui 15 unidades de geração hidrelétrica e uma termelétrica. Em Distribuição, atende cerca de 3,4 milhões de clientes em São Paulo e no Espírito Santo. Recentemente, adquiriu participação na CELESC, em Santa Catarina. 

No Brasil, é referência em áreas como Inovação, Governança e Sustentabilidade, estando há 12 anos consecutivos no Índice de Sustentabilidade Empresarial (ISE) da B3. Em nível global, a EDP está presente em 16 países de quatro continentes e é uma líder mundial no mercado de energias renováveis.

Name: Naturgy
Description: Naturgy es un grupo multinacional del sector energético con más de 180 años de historia. Nuestra visión de futuro establece las bases para continuar creando valor a través de la transición energética, apostando por las energías renovables, desarrollando el gas renovable gracias a la posición de liderazgo en el mercado del gas natural convencional, e impulsando la eficiencia energética y la economía circular.

Name: Jubaili Bros
Description:
Jubaili Bros is a global leader in providing data-enabled conventional and renewable off-grid power solutions. With a workforce of over 1500 highly trained employees, we have been serving our worldwide customer base for more than 46 years, catering to various markets and applications across residential, commercial, industrial, telecommunication, healthcare, data centers, and utility sectors.

Operating in 11 countries out of 30 service support offices and 3 manufacturing plants across Africa and the Middle East, Jubaili Bros has established a strong presence and brand recognition in the off-grid power industry. Over the years, we have successfully delivered more than 20 GW in power solutions worldwide, with an annual delivery capacity of over 1.5 GW per year. With more than 10,000 end clients and partners globally, our team’s commitment is to always deliver on our promise to our respected customer base.

Name: The Hub Power Company Limited (HUBCO)
Description: The Hub Power Company Limited (HUBCO)

Name: ENGIE Perú
Description:
Private company owner and operator of power plants in Peru, representing 20% of national capacity.

ENGIE's purpose is to accelerate the transition to a carbon neutral economy by offering low-carbon electricity generation and renewable energies. In 2021, ENGIE Energía Perú was recognized, for the fourth consecutive year, as the company with the best corporate reputation in the energy sector and among the 50 best companies in Peru.

Name: Colbun S.A
Description:
We’re a Chilean company with 39 years of experience, blending expertise, innovation, and a strong commitment to our customers and stakeholders.
Our purpose is to transform energy in harmony with the planet, helping our clients turn their projects and dreams into reality.
We’re dedicated to leading a responsible energy transition by generating reliable, clean, and competitive energy, and by offering innovative solutions across Chile and Peru.
With over 5,000 MW of installed capacity and a robust portfolio of renewable energy projects, we’re focused on shaping a sustainable future.

Name: Generac
Description:
Generac is the total energy solutions company powering a smarter world. We help free people to use energy on their own terms by giving them access to reliable energy that is also cleaner, more efficient and better managed.

We do this by making homes a sanctuary where people have reliable power so they can safely and comfortably work, learn and entertain. Around the world, our commercial and industrial solutions are trusted to power and support businesses and critical infrastructure to protect against the challenges of an aging power grid, increasingly severe weather and escalating energy demands and rising rates. 

As an industry pioneer, we are relentlessly focused on the future of energy management. We’re ushering in a new era of energy solutions where we are exploring new technologies, delivering connected solutions and protecting against increasing energy costs for consumers and commercial users.

Name: Invenergy
Description:
Invenergy is accelerating cleaner, more reliable, affordable energy. Invenergy and its affiliated companies develop, build, own, and operate large-scale renewable and other clean energy generation, transmission and storage facilities in the Americas, Europe, and Asia. Headquartered in Chicago, Invenergy has regional development offices in the United States, Canada, Mexico, Spain, Japan, Poland, and Scotland. 

Invenergy and its affiliated companies have successfully developed more than 33,000 megawatts of projects in operation, construction or contracted, including wind, solar, transmission infrastructure, natural gas power generation, and advanced energy storage projects.

Name: Eletrobras Furnas
Description: Perfil desativado. Acompanhe nossos conteúdos em @Eletrobras

Name: Iberdrola México
Description:
Impulsamos el cambio hacia un futuro sostenible de la mano de las y los mexicanos. 
Generamos energía renovable para la industria.
Location: Lomas de Chapultepec , Ciudad de México

Name: PLN Indonesia Power
Description:
PT PLN Indonesia Power, known as PLN-IP, is a sub-holding company of PT PLN (Persero) holding which is conducting electric power generation and other supporting businesses. PLN-IP is the largest provider of power generation supplying above 20 GW capacity in Indonesia. In the Southeast Asia region, PLN-IP is the largest company managing power generation O&M and asset management. PLN-IP continually provide energy service solutions and support other related businesses to comply electricity demand as well.

Vision:
"To Be the A Leading and Sustainable Power Generation Company in Southeast Asia"

Mission:
"Providing Reliable, Efficient, Innovative and Beyond Customer Expectation of Energy Solution Business, Towards Affordable Clean Energy"

Motto:
"Energy of Things"

Products & expertise provided by PLN-IP:
- Power Generation Operation & Maintenance (O&M)
- Maintenance Repair & Overhaul (MRO)
- Operational Development Program
- Renewable Energy Solution (Geothermal, Hydro Power, Solar PV, etc)
- Primary Energy & Port Management
- Digitalization Set Up
- Project Management

Subsdiaries & affiliated companies with PLN-IP:
- PT PLN Indonesia Power Renewables (IPRen) - Business of Renewable Energy
- PT PLN Indonesia Power Services (IPS) - O&M Services
- PT PLN Indonesia Geothermal - Business of Geothermal Energy
- PT Artha Daya Coalindo (ADC) - Coal Supply Procurement
- PT Perta Daya Gas (PDG) - Gas Supply Provider
- PT Prima Layanan Niaga Suku Cadang (PLNSC) - Spare Parts Supply Chain & Procurement
- PT Rajamandala Electric Power (REP) - Rajamandala Hydro Power Plant 1 x 47 MW
- PT Indo Raya Tenaga (IRT) - Suralaya 9-10 Steam Power Plant 2 x 1000 MW
- PT GCL Indotenaga (GCL) - Kalbar-1 Steam Power Plant 2 x 100 MW
- PT Indo Ridltama Power (IRP) - Muara Jawa Steam Power Plant 2 x 27,5 MW
- PT Indo Pusaka Berau (IPB) - Lati Berau Steam Power Plant 3 x 7 MW

Name: SPIC Brasil
Description:
Somos um dos maiores grupos geradores de energia do mundo. Mas, somos mais do que isso: nossa energia vem da soma. É o que nos move pelo Brasil desde 2017, trabalhando por um desenvolvimento mais acessível e sustentável para todos. Nossos negócios totalizam mais de 187 GW de potência instalada no mundo, e estamos presentes em quase 50 países. Somos movidos pela energia humana de mais de 130 mil colaboradores, que somam experiências para transformar o planeta.

Iniciamos nossa atuação no Brasil com a aquisição do controle da Usina Hidrelétrica de São Simão (UHESS), em São Simão/GO, em 2017. Também operamos dois parques eólicos em Mataraca/PB, e somos acionistas da usina termoelétrica GNA 1, em São João da Barra/RJ, totalizando 3.106 MW de potência instalada no país e milhões de lares abastecidos.

Investimos em energia segura e limpa para trazer um novo olhar sobre o setor energético brasileiro, levando a energia do crescimento para cada lugar onde estamos - e para todos que se relacionam com a gente: comunidades, mercado e stakeholders.

Somos elétricos, cuidadosos, consistentes e conectados. Acreditamos que, somando cuidado, organização e paixão, todo mundo vai mais longe. Para nós, isso é potência.

Name: YPF LUZ
Description: Somos una empresa formada por un equipo apasionado y comprometido con la visión de generar una nueva energía para los argentinos; una energía más sustentable, confiable y eficiente. Nuestro objetivo es contribuir al desarrollo energético del país , optimizando sus recursos naturales. Garantizamos soluciones energéticas competitivas, con foco en energías renovables y en generación de energía térmica eficiente y confiable, y con tecnología de primer nivel, para acompañar a nuestros clientes en su transición energética. Ponemos foco en desarrollar y fortalecer a nuestra gente como elemento diferenciador.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: MAPNA Group
Description:
We provide solutions for growing global demand for energy, mobility and water through cost-effective, energy-efficient and environment-friendly technologies.
Our products and services are inclusive: from conventional thermal power plants to renewable farms, water and power co-generation utilities, onshore and offshore oil and gas projects, rail transportation, and investment.

Name: NACHTIGAL HYDRO POWER COMPANY
Description:
Nachtigal Hydro Power Company (NHPC), est une SA de droit camerounais créée le 7 juillet 2016 par l'Etat du Cameroun, #Africa 50 #EDF,  #IFC et Stoa. 
Elle a pour mission la conception, le financement, la construction de l'aménagement hydroélectrique de Nachtigal et de la ligne de transport d'évacuation d'énergie. Elle s'est également vue confiée par l'état, l'exploitation de l'aménagement hydroélectrique pendant 35 ans.
Le projet Nachtigal est un atout majeur pour résorber 30% du déficit énergétique au Cameroun.
Le siège social de Nachtigal est situé à la Nouvelle Route Bastos à Yaoundé.

Name: Delta Energia
Description:
O Grupo Delta Energia iniciou as atividades como comercializadora de energia em 2001 e ao longo dos anos investiu na diversificação do portfólio de atuação, operando em diversas frentes do setor energético e atendendo desde o varejo até grandes consumidores.

Sua estratégia de crescimento foi pautada na constante política de reinvestimentos, onde todas as aquisições foram realizadas com recursos próprios, o que contribuiu para seu  desenvolvimento sustentável e a diversificação dos negócios da companhia.

Estando sempre à frente das tendências, consolidou-se como um dos maiores players do mercado.

Com a ambiciosa missão de inovar um dos setores mais importantes do país, o Grupo Delta Energia atua ativamente para oferecer soluções transformadoras, impactando diretamente a economia e a vida de milhares de pessoas.

Name: EDF power solutions Brasil
Description:
A EDF power solutions é uma empresa global de energia que desenvolve, constrói e opera usinas de geração de energia renovável e de baixo carbono, bem como soluções flexíveis de geração de transmissão de eletricidade.   

Como um dos principais atores na transição energética em todo o mundo, implementamos, dentro da EDF, projetos competitivos, responsáveis e geradores de valor. Em mais de 25 países, nossas equipes se comprometem diariamente com os stakeholders locais, unindo sua expertise e capacidade de inovação no combate às mudanças climáticas.  

Oferecemos uma ampla gama de tecnologias para produzir eletricidade de baixo carbono, aumentar a flexibilidade do sistema de energia, reduzir a pegada de carbono de nossos clientes e desenvolver redes para enfrentar os desafios da transição energética. 

No Brasil, estamos presente em seis estados brasileiros com ativos de energia solar, eólica, hídrica e térmica, que somam 2,7 GW de capacidade. Além da geração de energia, a companhia também atua na área de transmissão e oferece serviços de O&M. 

A EDF power solutions é comprometida com a construção de um setor energético mais eficiente e por isso investe em inovação, tecnologia e sustentabilidade. Nossos valores – respeito, responsabilidade e solidariedade – norteiam cada uma de nossas decisões e buscamos promover um ambiente colaborativo e transparente com colaboradores, comunidades, parceiros e clientes.

Name: AES Andes
Description:
Somos una filial de AES Corporation, empresa global de energía con operaciones en 14 países.
Tenemos presencia en Argentina, Chile y Colombia.

Name: Geothermal Development Company
Description: The Geothermal Development Company Limited (GDC) is a 100% government-owned State Corporation operating under the Ministry of Energy and Petroleum. It was created as a special purpose company to accelerate the development of geothermal resources in Kenya. Our core activities include exploration, drilling, assessing and development of geothermal resources for power generation and other alternative uses.

Name: Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa
Description:
Somos uma empresa proeminente na produção de energia hidroeléctrica e contribuímos orgulhosamente para o desenvolvimento do País. HCB expande o potencial energético da Barragem de Cahora Bassa através de uma gestão por excelência, eficiência operacional e uma rigorosa aplicação dos princípios de sustentabilidade e responsabilidade social

We are Mozambique’s pre-eminent hydropower generation company and are a proud contributor to the country’s development. HCB extends the electricity potential of the Cahora Bassa dam through excellence management efficient operations and the rigorous application of the principles of sustainability and social responsibility.

Name: Vedanta Limited - Power
Description: Vedanta Group is one of the largest private sector power producers with ~12 GW capacity, spreading across 10 states, playing a pivotal role in driving India’s progress.

Name: GENNEIA
Description: Genneia is the leading company in the provision of sustainable energy solutions in Argentina, holding 19% of the total installed capacity, achieving 21% of wind energy generation and 12% of solar. With the commissioning of the Tocota III Solar Park, it reached 1,004 MW of renewable energy, consolidating its leadership in the clean energy sector and marking this achievement as an unprecedented milestone in the country. With its wind farms Rawson, Trelew, Madryn, Chubut Norte, Villalonga, Pomona, and Vientos de Necochea, the company has a capacity of 784 MW in wind energy; and it is currently advancing in the construction of the La Elbita Wind Farm in Tandil, which will have 36 state-of-the-art wind turbines with a capacity of 162 MW and is expected to become operational by the end of 2024. Additionally, the company is progressing with the construction of the solar park in Malargüe, with a capacity of 90 MW, and is starting the construction of the Anchoris solar park, with a capacity of 180 MW. Genneia has 220 MW of installed capacity in its operational solar parks, distributed across three parks totaling 520,000 solar panels.

Name: Reliance Power Limited
Description:
Reliance Power Limited (RPower) is a part of the Reliance Group, one of the leading business houses in India. 

RPower is a leading power generation company and has developed and constructed a large portfolio of power generation projects in India. It also operates one of the largest coal mines in India in terms of volume handled. 

RPower projects are diverse in geographic location, fuel source and off take. It has consistently implemented projects ahead of schedule. RPower strongly believes in clean green power and our projects are/will be using technologies with minimum environment impact. 

RPower is an equal opportunity provider and is focused towards nation building, contributing towards economic growth and improving lives of the local community. 

Our mission is to provide reliable and economical power 24x7.

Reliance Power is Proud to be felicitated for remarkable performance in the Power Sector at 'The Economic Times Power Focus Summit - 2017'

Name: CPFL Soluções
Description:
Somos uma empresa que integra todas as soluções de energia que o seu negócio precisa. 

Para isso, criamos soluções que entregam valor, competitividade e sustentabilidade para as companhias. Estudamos a fundo o seu negócio e a forma que ele consome energia, encontrando a opção certa para gerar economia e melhoria de desempenho. 
Afinal, onde tem energia, tem um jeito melhor de usar, gerar e comercializar. 

Somos a CPFL Soluções. Para qual caminho você quer ir? 
Vamos juntos! 

Fale conosco pelos nossos Canais de Atendimento:

4004-2735 - para capitais e regiões metropolitanas
0800-270-2735 - para as demais regiões do Brasil
Ou se preferir pelo e-mail: faleconosco@cpflsolucoes.com.br

Name: ENGIE México
Description:
Durante 26 años, ENGIE ha suministrado energía segura y asequible para el desarrollo y bienestar de México y los mexicanos.

ENGIE ha impulsado el desarrollo de la industria, el comercio y los hogares del País mediante la Distribución y el Transporte de Gas Natural, la operación de Plantas de Generación Eléctrica y vapor de Bajas Emisiones de C02  y de Plantas Solares y Eólicas que suministran energía 100% limpia y renovable para la red eléctrica de México. El portafolio de ENGIE en México también incluye comercialización de gas y electricidad para la industria en todo el territorio nacional.

A lo largo de más de dos décadas de presencia en el País, ENGIE ha promovido el acceso a energía asequible y segura para el desarrollo y bienestar de México:
•	20,000 empleos (directos e indirectos).
•	+2.5 millones de mexicanos beneficiados con nuestras soluciones energéticas.
•	$3,420 millones de dólares invertidos en infraestructura energética.
•	+$1,000 millones de dólares de inversión desde 2019.
•	$18.1 millones de dólares en inversiones sociales.
•	384 iniciativas comunitarias.
•	+142 comunidades beneficiadas con programas sociales.
•	17 años como Empresa Socialmente Responsable.

Con 26 años de presencia en el país en ENGIE hemos logrado:
•	Ser el primer comprador privado de gas natural en México.
•	Segundo distribuidor de gas natural en México.
•	1 GW de generación de energía renovable.
•	+1,900 industrias reciben nuestro servicio.
•	+670,000 clientes residenciales.
•	+150 municipios con servicio de distribución de Gas Natural.

ENGIE México ha estado incrementado y diversificando su negocio que inició con el servicio de distribución de gas natural hace 25 años. ENGIE está presente en 10 zonas geográficas con distribución de gas natural, tres gasoductos, dos plantas de cogeneración, 2 parques eólicos y 6 parques solares, los cuales generarán más de 925 MW de energía limpia a la red nacional.

Name: EDF Renewables Brasil
Description:
Em atividade no país desde 2015, a EDF Renewables Brasil soma mais de 1,8 GW em projetos viabilizados de energia eólica e solar e mais de R$ 8 bilhões investidos no país. O Respeito, a Responsabilidade, a Solidariedade, a Agilidade, a Paixão e a Cooperação norteiam o desenvolvimento, a construção e a operação de projetos de energia renovável com segurança e responsabilidade socioambiental.

Atualmente, a EDF Renewables Brasil concentra os seus projetos eólicos no Nordeste e solar no Sudeste. A companhia oferece soluções em fornecimento de energia renovável e armazenamento de energia, atuando no Mercado Livre, e possibilita que seus clientes alcancem objetivos energéticos de forma sustentável.

A EDF Renewables é subsidiária do Grupo EDF, um dos maiores geradores de energia elétrica do mundo e referência em crescimento com baixas emissões de carbono. A empresa é um agente-chave na transição energética e tem como propósito construir um futuro neutro em CO2 que seja capaz de conciliar a preservação do planeta, o bem-estar e o desenvolvimento.

Name: PGE Polska Grupa Energetyczna
Description:
PGE Group is the largest vertically integrated electric utility in Poland in terms of revenues, installed capacity and electricity generation volume.

PGE operates on a whole value chain from generation through electricity distribution and supply to end customers. PGE has a unique generation portfolio. Our fleet is highly diversified and the youngest in Poland.

The parent company of PGE Capital Group is PGE Polska Grupa Energetyczna S.A.

Within the Capital Group, the integration of activities of the particular segments is the responsibility of the following companies: PGE Polska Grupa Energetyczna S.A., PGE Górnictwo i Energetyka Konwencjonalna S.A., PGE Energia Odnawialna S.A., PGE Dystrybucja S.A. and PGE Obrót S.A.

PGE Group currently organizes its activities in five main business segments:
- Conventional Generation
- Renewable Energy
- Wholesale Trading
- Distribution
- Supply.

Name: Mainspring Energy
Description: Mainspring is a power generator manufacturer redefining how local power is delivered to capacity constrained companies and communities. No other primary power solution can match the flexibility, affordability, and low emissions of a Mainspring Linear Generator. Mainspring customers across key industries — utilities, data centers, enterprise, and industrial — are taking control of their energy futures.

Name: Akenerji
Description:
Akenerji is the first power generation company founded as an auto-producer group in Turkey. One of the Turkish power sector’s biggest players, Akenerji is an integrated power company operating in wholesale energy trade in addition to power generation, with over 28 years of experience in the sector.

The partnership between Akkök and the Czech power company ČEZ Group evolved into an equal-part strategic joint venture in Akenerji, with an agreement signed in October 2008.

Since 2005, Akenerji has concentrated on generation investments based on renewable power resources, to attain resource diversity in generation. It reaches renewable power resource based generation capacity of 388 MW in total by means of hydroelectric plants and wind plants, entering operation gradually. The Erzin Natural Gas Combined Cycle Power Plant -which started operations in 2014- alone has the capacity to meet 1.5 % of Turkey’s power need. Akenerji’s total installed capacity is now reached 1,224 MW.

Wholesale Energy Trade

While managing potential risks proactively, Akenerji develops its products with the aim of using its assets and opportunities in the most efficient way. Leading the change and development in the sector, Akenerji not only productizes its own generation capacity but also other producers’ energy and injects liquidity into the retail market. Akenerji maintains its entire operations in this area in line with the principle of making the most of each unit of energy generated.

Sustainability and Environment Friendly Generation

Akenerji provides its customers, who wish to eradicate their carbon footprint arising from electricity consumption and other causes, the emission reduction certifications approved by international institutions, obtained via renewable power investments.

Name: ČEZ
Description:
Skupina ČEZ je silný energetický koncern působící v řadě zemí střední a jihovýchodní Evropy a Turecku, který je centrálně řízen z České republiky. Hlavní předmět podnikání koncernu tvoří výroba, distribuce, obchod a prodej v oblasti elektřiny a tepla, obchod a prodej v oblasti zemního plynu a těžba uhlí. Ve své strategii Skupina ČEZ reaguje na nové trendy v energetice. Vstupuje do nových oblastí podnikání a nabízí zákazníkům inovativní produkty a služby šité na míru jejich potřebám.

Skupina zaměstnává více než 28 tisíc zaměstnanců a je vnímána jako prestižní a vyhledávaný zaměstnavatel, který nadstandardně pečuje o své zaměstnance. Zájemcům o zaměstnání nabízí zázemí silné české společnosti a práci, která má smysl – práci, na kterou spoléhají miliony lidí v každodenním životě a bez které by ostatním chyběla energie. Více o kariéře u nás najdete na: https://www.kdejinde.cz/

Při svém podnikání se Skupina ČEZ současně řídí přísnými etickými standardy zahrnujícími i odpovědné chování ke svým zaměstnancům, společnosti a životnímu prostředí. Jednou z dlouhodobých významných priorit Skupiny ČEZ je firemní dárcovství, které je zastřešováno Nadací ČEZ.

Name: SB Energy
Description:
Part of SoftBank Group, SB Energy is made up of energy industry veterans with a reputation for delivering critical infrastructure projects at scale.

SBE provides reliable, affordable, and secure energy and digital infrastructure at scale to support America’s growing energy demands. We combine strong execution with expertise in project development, power marketing, engineering, finance, supply chain, and asset management.

Name: CNR (Compagnie Nationale du Rhône)
Description:
CNR est le 1er producteur français d’électricité d’origine 100 % renouvelable (eau, vent, soleil) et le concessionnaire à vocation multiple du Rhône de la frontière suisse à la mer Méditerranée : production d’hydroélectricité, déploiement de la navigation et de zones portuaires, irrigation et autres usages agricoles.
 
Société Anonyme d’Intérêt Général, CNR se singularise par son modèle industriel articulé autour du développement des territoires et par son système unique de partage avec ses parties prenantes de la valeur créée localement.
 
A la pointe de ses métiers qu’elle fait évoluer en permanence grâce à une démarche d’innovation active, CNR propose ses services en gestion et valorisation des énergies intermittentes et son expertise en ingénierie à des tiers en France et à l’international. Elle travaille par ailleurs sur l’intelligence des réseaux, développe la mobilité électrique à travers un corridor rhodanien et explore en partenariat des solutions à hydrogène. 
 
CNR est une entreprise au capital majoritairement public (collectivités locales, Caisse des Dépôts). Son actionnaire industriel de référence est le groupe Engie.

Name: Norte Energia
Description:
Norte Energia, empresa empreendedora da Usina Belo Monte, a maior hidrelétrica 100% brasileira.

Em operação desde abril de 2016, Belo Monte conta com 24 Unidades Geradoras (UGs), totalizando 11.233,1 MW de capacidade instalada. São 18 UGs de 611,11 MW na Casa de Força Principal (11.000 MW) e outras seis de 38,85 MW na Casa de Força Complementar (233,1 MW).

Name: GNA - Gás Natural Açu
Description:
A GNA - Gás Natural Açu - é uma joint venture formada pela Prumo Logística, bp, Siemens e SPIC Brasil dedicada ao desenvolvimento, implantação e operação de projetos estruturantes e sustentáveis de energia e gás.

Somos o maior parque termelétrico a gás natural da América Latina, localizado no  Porto do Açu, um dos principais complexos portuários do Brasil, que oferece uma série de soluções logísticas para o mercado de óleo e gás brasileiro.

O projeto, em sua fase atual, compreende a implantação de duas usinas termelétricas movidas a gás natural (GNA I e GNA II), com capacidade de gerar 3 GW de energia firme para o Brasil.  Juntas, as duas térmicas irão gerar energia suficiente para atender cerca de 14 milhões de residências. Além disso, o projeto contempla a implantação de um terminal de regaseificação de GNL de 21 MM m³/d.   

Em uma segunda fase, a GNA planeja expandir o seu parque termelétrico, além de criar as condições de contorno necessárias para atração e monetização do gás doméstico offshore.

A GNA está fortemente comprometida com a Sustentabilidade. Todas as ações da empresa são pautadas na ética, responsabilidade socioambiental, segurança e no desenvolvimento local.  

Com geração de empregos, dinamização da economia e seguindo altos padrões internacionais de sustentabilidade, a GNA contribui para a expansão do mercado de gás e energia e para o desenvolvimento econômico não só da região Norte Fluminense, mas do Estado do Rio de Janeiro e de todo o País.

Name: Central Puerto
Description:
En Central Puerto desarrollamos inversiones orientadas al mercado energético nacional e internacional.

Actualmente contamos con una matriz energética diversificada a través de 14 centrales en todo el país (energía térmica, eólica, hidroeléctrica y solar) que juntas representan una potencia instalada de 6.703 MW y una generación de anual del orden de 21.394 GWH (equivalente al 20,13% de la generación del sector privado). Esto nos posiciona como uno de los principales grupos privados de generación eléctrica en nuestro país.
 
Generamos energía en forma eficiente, contribuyendo al abastecimiento de la demanda con calidad, maximizando el valor para la compañía y para la sociedad en su conjunto, en forma sustentable y en armonía con el medio ambiente.

A su vez, somos el mayor accionista privado de la sociedad Central Vuelta de Obligado S.A. Y en paralelo, contamos con participación en Termoeléctrica José de San Martín S.A., Termoeléctrica Manuel Belgrano S.A., además de compañías de distribución y transporte de gas tales como DGCE (Ecogas), DGCU y TGM.
Location: Ciudad de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Santo Antônio Energia
Description:
A Santo Antônio Energia é a empresa responsável pela implantação e operação da Hidrelétrica Santo Antônio, localizada no rio Madeira, a sete quilômetros de Porto Velho, Rondônia. A hidrelétrica começou a gerar energia em 30 de março de 2012, nove meses antes do cronograma original.  

Atualmente, a Hidrelétrica Santo Antônio encontra-se na geração plena, com todas as 50 turbinas em operação comercial e potência instalada de 3.568 Megawatts, energia suficiente para o consumo de mais de 45 milhões de brasileiros. 

Parte da energia produzida pela Hidrelétrica Santo Antônio percorre cerca de 2.400 km por meio do “Linhão do Madeira” – uma das maiores linhas de transmissão de corrente contínua do mundo, saindo de Porto Velho até a cidade de Araraquara, no interior de São Paulo. De lá, a energia é distribuída para diversos estados brasileiros por meio do SIN – Sistema Interligado Nacional.

Das 50 turbinas da hidrelétrica, seis produzem energia com exclusividade para o sistema regional Rondônia – Acre, abastecendo até 40% do consumo dos dois estados por meio de uma linha específica de transmissão em 230 Kv.

Name: ELECTROPERU S.A.
Description: ELECTROPERU S.A. es una empresa Estatal de derecho privado que tiene como objetivo dedicarse a las actividades propias de la generación de energía eléctrica, con el fin de asegurar el abastecimiento oportuno, suficiente, garantizado y económico de la demanda de energía, de acuerdo a lo dispuesto en la legislación vigente.

Name: Karpowership
Description:
At Karpowership, we believe electricity is a human right and our mission is energy equity – today and the day after. With global installed capacity of 15,000 MW, Karpowership delivers sustainable energy security and assists countries in their energy transition paths at scale. 

Between solar power plants, namesake floating power plants fleet Powerships, floating LNG infrastructure and more, Karpowership is one of the leading industry names to facilitate the global clean and efficient energy transition today. We are powered by 3,000 employees with corporate offices in Dubai, Amsterdam, Jakarta and Istanbul. 

Our operational global footprint expands across four continents, including operations in Brazil, Dominican Republic, New Caledonia, Mozambique and Ghana, providing local energy from 10% to 100%.

For energy equity, today and the day after.

Name: JIRAU ENERGIA
Description:
A Jirau Energia é a maior usina hidrelétrica do mundo em quantidade de turbinas e a 4ª maior geradora de energia elétrica do país.

Há 12 anos gerando energia renovável de forma sustentável na Amazônia.

O compromisso da Jirau Energia é fornecer energia limpa e renovável, minimizando o impacto ambiental e promovendo a preservação do meio ambiente. A empresa consolidou sua posição ao alcançar o melhor índice de disponibilidade entre as hidrelétricas de grande porte do país, otimizando o aproveitamento das águas do Rio Madeira. 

Com uma capacidade impressionante de 3.750 MW, suficiente para atender mais de 40 milhões de pessoas, a UHE Jirau é um dos maiores empreendimentos de infraestrutura na Amazônia e no mundo. Equipada com 50 turbinas tipo bulbo, é a maior do mundo em quantidade de turbinas, apresentando as mais potentes em geração unitária, com 75 MW.

Guiada por valores como ética, trabalho em equipe, integridade, comprometimento e austeridade, a Jirau Energia opera dentro dos princípios de desenvolvimento sustentável, valorização dos recursos humanos e conservação dos recursos naturais e histórico-culturais.

Em 2023, a empresa celebrou uma década de operação comercial, atingindo a marca significativa de mais de 130 milhões de MWh de energia gerada. Essa conquista, registrada no Mecanismo de Desenvolvimento Limpo da ONU, contribuiu para a redução anual de seis milhões de toneladas de carbono, fortalecendo o desenvolvimento sustentável na região Amazônica.

A Jirau Energia é uma Sociedade de Propósito Específico (SPE), contando com acionistas de peso, como ENGIE (40%), Eletrobras Eletrosul (20%), Eletrobras Chesf (20%) e Mizha Participações S.A. (20%), subsidiária da Mitsui & CO., LTD.

A trajetória da empresa começou em 2008, quando venceu o Leilão 005/2008 promovido pelo Governo Federal, obtendo a outorga para a implantação e operação da Usina Hidrelétrica Jirau no Rio Madeira (Porto Velho, RO) e a exploração do seu potencial energético pelo prazo de 35 anos.

Name: ACIE
Description:
ACIE (Asociación de Comercializadores Independientes de Energía) fundada en 1999 con el propósito de representar los intereses de los comercializadores independientes de energía eléctrica, amplía su actividad en enero de 2012 incluyendo gas natural. Actualmente, ACIE es la principal asociación de comercializadores independientes de energía eléctrica y gas natural.

La finalidad de la Asociación es la defensa y promoción de los intereses de las empresas comercializadoras de energía eléctrica y gas natural asociadas en el marco de un mercado liberalizado, promoviendo la competencia en los segmentos mayorista y minorista de energía eléctrica y gas natural, así como la igualdad de oportunidades en el acceso a la actividad de comercialización.

ACIE es miembro del Consejo Consultivo de Electricidad (CCE) y de Hidrocarburos (CCH) de la CNMC como representante de los comercializadores. A través de dichos Consejos Consultivos participa activamente mediante aportaciones de todos los socios a las propuestas de modificación normativa. También es parte integrante del Comité de Agente del Mercado Eléctrico y Gasista (CAM).

Name: ERSİS ENERJİ
Description:
Ersis Enerji 2007 yılında endüstriyel ve güç üretim tesislerine yönelik danışmanlık hizmetleri, proje geliştirme ve yönetimi, fizibilite çalışmaları konularında mühendislik hizmetleri vermek amacıyla kurulmuştur. 2014 yılından itibaren başta Güneş Enerji Santralleri (GES) yapımı, Biyokütle/Biyogaz enerji santralleri olmak üzere konvansiyonel ve diğer yenilenebilir enerji sektörlerinde danışmanlık ve mühendislik hizmetleri, biyokütle yakıt hazırlama ve tedariği konularında alanlarında uzman kişilerle piyasada daha aktif bir rol almaya başlamıştır.
Ersis Enerji, Türkiye'de özellikle son yıllarda artan Güneş enerjisi pazarında Güneş Enerji Santrallerinin anahtar teslim- kurulum (EPC-Engineering, Procurement & Construction) hizmetlerinin yanı sıra, proje geliştirme ve yönetimi, detay mühendislik ve fizibilite çalışmaları, güncel mevzuatların uygulanabilirliğinin takibi ve önlisans/lisans işlemlerinin yürütülmesini yapmaktadır.

Türkiye’de ve Dünya'da artan enerji talepleri karşısında Erisis Enerji olarak, çözüm ortaklarına sürdürülebilir ve verimli enerjiyi uygun maaliyetlerle ulaştırmayı ve bunu yaparken ve uluslararası standartlar ve kalitede sunmayı hedeflemektedir.

Name: COCOON Cooperative Cyber Protection for Modern Power Grids
Description:
COCOON’s goal is to deliver a practical cyber-physical systems solution for converged Electrical Power and Energy System (EPES) by bridging secure networked systems research and innovation with power systems engineering. Via an inter-disciplinary approach COCOON will address requirements of the EU ACER NCCS and the SGAM framework. The outcomes will benefit: 
(i) Energy communities interacting with a DSO. 
(ii) EU Regional Security Centres (RSC) interacting with multiple TSOs. 
(iii) DSO substations.
(iv) DRES aggregators interacting with a DSO.

The project will develop the COCOON Programmable Node (CPN) that will adhere to a programmable data plane (PDP) paradigm and thus accelerate data processing, forwarding and control functionalities. This approach will provide a bottom-up practical solution for supporting a range of computationally intensive cyber protection applications to be used by EPES operators in the aforementioned scenarios through the COCOON Toolset.

Our Partners:

University of Cyprus (UCY) - Project Coordinator
Aristotle University of Thessaloniki (AUTH)
Universidad de Sevilla (USE)
Delft University of Technology (TUD)
Ingelectus Innovative Electrical Solutions SL (ING)
Southeast Electricity Network Coordination Centre (SEL)
European Network for Cyber Security cooperatief (ENCS)
Enexis Personeel B.V. (ENE)
Cuerva Energia (CUE)
Hellenic Distribution Network Operator (HEDNO)
I&K Electrical Engineering Systems (IKE)
University of Glasgow (UGLA)

COCOON is funded by Horizon Europe under the grant agreement No 101120221

Name: NEXT STEP ENERGY
Description:
NEXT STEP ENERGY (NSE) est une aventure entrepreneuriale issue de l’alliance d’un acteur majeur de la production d’énergie renouvelable français (TENERGIE) et du pionnier et leader des transactions dans les énergies renouvelables depuis 1977 (ENVINERGY).

Cette entreprise française développe des solutions innovantes de stockage propre d'énergie via des Stations de Transfert d'Energie par Pompage (STEP) permettant de stocker l'excédent d'électricité, notamment issu des énergies renouvelables, pour le restituer lors des pics de demande. 

Avec un impact environnemental réduit, une durée de vie supérieure à 100 ans et un savoir-faire industriel français, nos STEP territoriales contribuent à la transition énergétique tout en soutenant le développement local. 

Aujourd'hui, NSE c'est : 
- 250 sites étudiés
- 30 sites retenus pour une puissance de 120-150 MW 
- 0,5 milliard d’euros d’investissement prévus à horizon 5 ans
- des partenariats signés ou en cours de signature avec d’autres acteurs du monde de l’hydroélectricité.

NSE s’est structurée pour piloter toutes les phases de développement, de construction et d’exploitation d’un projet STEP avec des compétences dans le domaine des turbines, des pompes, et du développement territorial.

L'entreprise a également créé un Comité Scientifique composé d’experts de renommée internationale dans le domaine de l’hydroélectricité et des turbines-pompes pour l'accompagner dans le choix et le développement des technologies les plus appropriées pour répondre aux besoins en flexibilité du réseau électrique.

Notre devise : Stockez l'énergie proprement avec l'eau, pour la restituer quand vous en avez le plus besoin.

Name: ASSIST Certeza en cumplimiento.
Description:
ASSIST es una empresa especializada en dar cumplimiento a la regulación federal, estatal y municipal de la cadena de valor del sector energético.

A través de nuestros servicios y productos ofrecemos soluciones enfocadas en incrementar la cultura de seguridad en las organizaciones, alcanzando el desarrollo sostenible de sus negocios.

En ASSIST somos conscientes del momento disruptivo que vivió el sector energético entre 2014 y 2015 con la Reforma Energética, específicamente conocemos la carga regulatoria que se le ha trasladado a la industria.
Por lo anterior, tenemos una MISIÓN muy clara: ser el brazo operativo y administrativo que le garantice al sector energético el cumplimiento técnico y legal de sus obligaciones, haciendo más eficientes sus operaciones, a través de instrumentos de transferencia de carga regulatoria.
Asimismo, en ASSIST estamos comprometidos con la continuidad de las operaciones del sector, por lo que actuamos con el objetivo de alcanzar nuestra VISIÓN: ser la organización que lleve al sector energético en México a ser sostenible, agregando valor a la sociedad, apoyados en el cumplimiento regulatorio.

Mucho del éxito de ASSIST se basa en la estrecha colaboración con empresas hermanas. En Sonora nos coordinamos con SAGANOR, para dar atención a nuestro mayor cliente comercial, y con ENJUCALE, quien ha sido la encargada de acreditarse y autorizarse para dictaminar diversos aspectos normativos.

En ASSIST trabajamos de la mano con nuestros clientes, ganándonos su confianza a través de la calidad de nuestros servicios y productos, facilitando asistencia 24/7 los 365 días del año.

Name: MAD Energy
Description:
MAD Energy (MAD) is an energy infrastructure developer and operator building the cleanest and most practical energy solutions available today, while enabling energy technologies of the future. Our mission is to generate clean, abundant, and affordable energy for the world. Founded in February of 2020 by world-class energy experts, considerable investment has since been made into operational scale, project development, and asset deployment.

THESIS

Global capital is re-organizing to drive the transition to less pollutive energy systems. Meanwhile, market participants need more energy than ever with no end to demand growth in sight. Large scale, low cost, clean energy solutions are required to address the supply shortfalls of today, while next generation energy systems will be required to fuel the growth of tomorrow.

EXECUTION

MAD is building an energy ecosystem strategically designed to satisfy these emerging market needs:

Phase 1 - Capital is being deployed into large scale clean energy projects with low technical risk. These projects, international in scope and opportunity set, are utilizing technology and infrastructure that has minimal operational and functional risk due to decades of iteration and refinement. These large-scale capital deployments will be secured by long-term offtake contracts with world class credit.

Phase 2 - Commercialization of innovative clean energy technologies from internal research and development. These technologies stand to significantly alter dynamics related to environmental impact, pricing, and access throughout the global energy value chain.

Ready to join the movement? Go to https://madenergy.com and join us as we take you to the future!

Don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/MADevolutionV

Name: Strategic Power Systems, Inc.
Description:
Strategic Power Systems, Inc. (SPS) is a global energy and information technology company.  We are experts in the field of data collection, validation, analysis, and benchmarking of power plant performance across the various technologies.  Central to all of our products & services is the ORAP database, a comprehensive resource for current and historical RAM performance data.  ORAP represents a significant cross section of turbine related equipment (both thermal, wind, and Solar PV) from a variety of OEMs, operating in various duty cycles and applications.  

SPS can be counted on to be a third-party, unbiased source of information providing key performance metrics or (KPIs), following industry standards, to power plant owners, operators, Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) and other industry stakeholders.  In addition to our traditional benchmarking and analytics service, we can provide customers with automated data collection applications, detailed critical parts life tracking, as well as Reliability Engineering expertise when analyzing ORAP data for custom studies and reports.  ORAP Data Fusion, our newest service offering, provides game-changing machine learning techniques (developed with the support of a DOE National Laboratory, that allow power plant Asset Managers the ability to PREDICT and PREPARE for the adverse behavior of physical systems, components, materials, and designs, while providing sufficient time and guidance for cost effective corrective action.

Name: Thermal Power Plant #4 JSC / Дулааны IY цахилгаан станц ТӨХК
Description:
The foundation of Thermal power plant No.4 was laid in 1979. The first unit was put into operation in 1983 and commissioned the project capacity of 380 MW in 1987. As a result of expansion, the capacity was increased by 160 MW from 1988 to 1990, by each 20 MW in 2007 and 2009, by 120 MW from 2012 to 2014 and current operating capacity is 700 MW of electricity and 1373 GCal of heat generation in total.

“Thermal power plant No.4” JSC is the largest power plant in Mongolian energy sector which generates over 67.8 percent of electricity for central region and 60.3 percent of heat for consumption of the Ulaanbaatar city.

The plant consists of 74 buildings and facilities located 3-20 km away from the plant such as ash pond, water supply pump station, service building, administration building, laboratory and test center which are occupying 66,7 hectares.

“Thermal power plant No.4” has become a state share holding company in August, 2001 and the Ministry of Fuel and Energy, the State Property Committee and the Ministry of Finance owns 41, 39 and 20 percent of total stock respectively.

Our company consists of 6 operational sections, 1 mechanical section, 3 technical departments including Production, Maintenance and R&D Department, 3 non-technical departments such as Human resource & Administration, Control and Sales & Marketing Department, 4 departments including Procurement, Economic, Financial and Social department and other units such as Auto service, hospital and cafeteria.

The total number of employees was 1469 at the end of fiscal year 2015 and from this 295 employees are engineers and technical staff.

Name: Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal
Description:
Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal is in the early stages of development with the goal of providing up to 7-15MW of clean, geothermal electricity in Northeastern BC.  Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal is poised to be British Columbia's first geothermal electricity facility and amongst the first in Canada. The site will host a binary system using an Organic Rankine Cycle power plant given the low-grade geothermal resource. 

 
Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal is 100% Fort Nelson First Nation community-owned through our economic development corporation, Deh Tai LP. This project aligns with the Province of BC's and Government of Canada's climate targets to achieve net-zero. Fort Nelson's electricity grid is currently 100% reliant on fossil fuels—this geothermal project is an essential keystone in Northeastern BC's energy transition.

 
There has been a significant economic downturn in the region due to a dwindling gas and forestry industry. There is a cascading system of opportunities in utilizing the excess heat from the system. This emerging renewable energy industry in Canada brings stable long-term jobs to the Northern Rockies by establishing the region as a geothermal hub.

Southwestern Power Administration was established in 1943 by the Secretary of the Interior as a Federal Agency that today operates within the Department of Energy under the authority of Section 5 of the Flood Control Act of 1944. Name: Caterpillar Energy Solutions, S.A.
Description:
Caterpillar Energy Solutions S.A. es la subsidiaria española de Caterpillar Energy Solutions GmbH. Compañía fundada en 1871, en la actualidad está especialmente dedicada a la producción de motores a gas altamente eficientes y respetuosos con el medio ambiente. Nuestros motores MWM se utilizan en todos los campos de la industria en las más diversas aplicaciones, desde plantas de cogeneración, instalaciones de continuidad, módulos integrados en contenedor, hasta instalaciones de emergencia.
Caterpillar Energy Solutions GmbH es hoy en día una compañía multinacional consolidada con presencia mundial en los cinco continentes que establece nuevos estándares en los ámbitos de control de emisiones, eficiencia del combustible y rendimiento, sin tener que hacer concesiones en lo que respecta a la fiabilidad y la robustez de los motores de gas. Los motores MWM son capaces de funcionar con un gran número de combustibles gaseosos (p.e., gas natural, biogás, biogás de depuradora, gas de vertedero, propano, hidrógeno y otros gases especiales), ofreciendo una gran flexibilidad de operación, a la vez que presentan un rendimiento y una eficiencia altamente elevadas.
En Caterpillar Energy Solutions, S.A. sabemos que no existe una única solución estándar para las instalaciones de cogeneración. Por este motivo, nuestros ingenieros desarrollan, junto con los clientes, un concepto de instalación que responde exactamente a las necesidades energéticas de su proyecto específico y en el cual todos los componentes están adaptados a la aplicación y a los estándares regulatorios exigidos localmente. Por lo tanto, cada motor de gas y cada instalación o planta de cogeneración representa un paquete totalmente personalizado y verificado en fábrica para la generación de electricidad con la garantía completa de la marca MWM.

Name: Nature Enerji
Description:
SÜRDÜRÜLEBİLİR BİR YAŞAM ENERJİ İSTER!
Nature Enerji olarak biz, kurulduğumuz günden bugüne gezegenimiz dünyaya ve sınırlı kaynaklarına sorumluluk bilinciyle enerji üretiyoruz.

İnsana saygıyla…
Gezegenimizin karşı karşıya olduğu iklim krizi ile mücadele bilinci ile gelecek nesillere tertemiz, sürdürülebilir bir dünya bırakmak için her geçen gün portföyümüzü dünya dostu projelerle genişletiyoruz.

Gezegene sorumlulukla…
Yaşadığımız dünyaya karşı kendimizi sorumlu hissediyoruz ve alternatif yakıt olarak hidrojen üretimi gibi karbon ayak izini azaltacak projeler üzerinde çalışıyoruz.

Dünya dostu üretimle…
Yenilenebilir enerji üretimi konusunda yatırımımızı artırıyoruz.
Örneğin; Bugün Afyonkarahisar ilinin Bolvadin ilçesinde 12MWe gücünde biyokütle tesisimizle dünya dostu enerji üretiyoruz.

Hedefimiz; Sıfır atık felsefesiyle üretim bandımızı işletmek ve gezegenimizin yaşam enerjisinin korunmasına katkıda bulunmak….

Gezegenimize ve enerji kaynaklarına sonsuz bir saygı, duyarlılık ve sorumlulukla.

Name: H2O Power
Description:
H2O Power is investor owned and has operated Hydro Electric Generation in Ontario since 2007. Our Canadian sites include 8 hydroelectric generating stations, 2 control dams and 130km of transmission lines in Northern Ontario. We operate 140.5 MW of generating capacity, with annual energy production of over 835GWh, making us the third largest provider of hydroelectric power in Ontario. All of our Canadian generating stations are operated remotely from our Oshawa Control Center in Oshawa, Ontario, Canada.

H2O Power also owns and operates two run-of-river hydroelectric facilities in Pennsylvania, Allegheny 8 (13.6 MW) and Allegheny 9 (17.9 MW). The two projects comprise 31.5 MW of baseload nameplate capacity located on the Allegheny River. The Allegheny 8 & 9 facilities together generate approximately 200 GWh of clean electricity annually.

Name: Valencia Waste Management
Description: Valencia Waste Management is committed to becoming a strategic leader in the landfill and energy sector.

Name: Braden-Europe B.V.
Description:
Braden Europe B.V. designs, manufactures and supplies air intake and exhaust for gas turbine applications for all major OEM’s. Especially diverter dampers are the key components made by Braden-Europe B.V. 
Diverters, exhaust stacks and diffusers have been supplied for gas turbine power plants all over the world. 
The latest development is the complete design of Air Intake systems consisting of filter house & inlet duct design for highest efficiency.

Name: CE Power Solutions Limited
Description:
CE Power Solutions Limited is a part of the Clean energy Group, based in the United Kingdom (UK). We are one of Nigeria’s top providers of Gas to Power Independent Power Producers (IPPs). Our main aim is to supply quality power without compromising the environment. Natural Gas is the way to go when it comes to choosing the ebay green power alternative, and we wanted to ensure this green power lived up to its potential. Since our inception in Nigeria, CE Power is known for its quality power, continuous supply, dependable distribution, and excellent client support.

CE Power mainly focuses on setting up IPPs for your business. CE Power had 2 Technical Partners - Power Gas Global Investment Nigeria Limited (Powergas) and Gentec Energy Nigeria Limited (Gentec EPC), providing Fuel CNG/LNG and Gas Gensets respectively. We have also partnered with Soventix Hybrid Nigeria Limited (Soventix) to provide Solar Power Solutions. Together, we aim to provide holistic, green, clean, safe, and quality power for all types of entities, though we focus on manufacturing and industries.

CE Power is a top choice amongst businesses in Nigeria for their cost-effective and reliable solutions that also comply with regulations. With our license to supply power to Anchor customers and surrounding off-takers, by setting up just one plant we can service many. We work closely with various power distribution companies with full transparency adhering to various regulations and quality checks, ensuring smooth power supply for you.

Product range, which are designed and produced with the worldwide quality understanding and ISO 9001 rules, varies from Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) Systems, Voltage Regulators, Rectifiers to DC Power Supply, Battery Chargers, Invertors, Rack Cabinets.
The Research & Development team, experienced engineers and technicians, back up products to meet the customers’ needs and integrating advanced technologies. Our latest product IGBT Rectifier, DSP controlled power supply, Blue Line, is the highest technology UPS draws attention from all over the world.
Germen has been providing the best energy solutions which are UPS, Solar systems, Generator and service to its customers by its regional branches, marketing and technical support network.
Mission
As a high technology producer, GERMEN ELECTRONICS gives necessary importance to Research and Development in order to grow and meet the future advanced technologies. Having amateur spirit and professional approach, GERMEN provides quality products to protect customers’ hardware devices.
Vision

Being a worldwide quality understanding designer and producer, GERMEN intends to keep the highest technology in order to reach a broader customer base, sales and after-sales services to be an International Brand by providing the highest level of customer satisfaction.

Name: Indeck Energy Services, Inc.
Description: Indeck Energy Services, Inc. was established in 1985 as an Independent Power Producer and developer of cogeneration plants. Indeck is one of the leading developers, owners and operators of energy facilities and independent power projects in North America. Indeck is privately held and incorporated in Illinois, with its headquarters located in the suburbs of Chicago. Indeck owns, has owned, or has developed over 4,000 MW of electric generation assets, and currently owns and operates 350 MW across six electric power generation facilities in various U.S. markets.

Name: UNES ENERJİ İŞLETME VE BAKIM A.Ş.
Description:
UNES is a UNIT INTERNATIONAL company that provides high quality operation and maintenance (O&M) services for electrical energy generation to Yeni Elektrik Üretim A.Ş CCGT which started its production activities in 2013 and provides electrical energy to Turkey’s national grid, especially to settlements and industrial facilities around Istanbul.

UNES,with its professional employees and high experience, has adopted the vision to be preferred brand in human and environment oriented energy production and to be among the leading operation and maintenance service companies in the region for the energy production industries. 

UNES is responsible for the operation and maintenance activities of Yeni Elektrik Üretim A.Ş CCGT located in Çerkeşli , Dilovası, Kocaeli province with a total capacity of 865 MW.

In addition to provide Operation and Maintenance (O&M) services to Combined Cycle Power Plants for long term electric energy generation, UNES’ services include upgrades to plant equipment and minor/major upgrades affecting the efficiency of the power plant.

UNES, with its competent personnel, is committed to ensure that the operation and maintenance activities of Yeni Elektrik Üretim A.Ş power plant are carried out safely and in accordance with high standards.

In addition to all, UNES is certified by the accredited organizations about ISO 9001-14001-45001-50001 for power plant operations and maintenance.

Somos un grupo empresarial colombiano con sede en Medellín y operación administrativa en Bogotá D.C., dedicado a la generación y comercialización de energía eléctrica.

Con una capacidad instalada superior a 270 MW, integramos fuentes renovables y activos estratégicos de respaldo que garantizan seguridad y confiabilidad energética para Colombia.

Participamos activamente en el Mercado de Energía Mayorista (MEM), estructuramos contratos de suministro y PPAs de largo plazo, y representamos plantas de generación eléctrica con altos estándares técnicos, regulatorios y financieros.

También desarrollamos una línea de negocio enfocada en la comercialización y estructuración de proyectos de gas natural, fortaleciendo nuestro papel en el crecimiento y diversificación del mercado energético colombiano.

Además, contamos con experiencia en infraestructura portuaria a través de la operación de la Sociedad Portuaria Puerto Caribe S.A., en Cartagena, una de las zonas industriales y logísticas más estratégicas del país y del Caribe colombiano.

Contacto: info@nitrogc.com | www.nitrogc.com | Medellín, Colombia

Name: Viking Vessel Services, LLC

Viking Vessel Services has developed and engineered our patent-pending Tuff Tube product line that forever eliminates open-root butt welds in HRSG and boiler tube repairs and welding. Our Tuff Tube Transition (TTT) is a new technology product that provides a far superior tube-to-header connection,  while significantly reducing downtime. Our Tuff Tube Purgeless Sleeve (TTPS) eliminates butt welds, purging and RT in tube-to-tube connections. Check us out!

www.tufftubetransition.com

Name: Rahavard Energy co. رهاورد انرژی
Description:
Rahavard Energy Raya co. (P.J.S) was founded in Tehran, Iran in 2016 with the aim of working in the area of Energy Management and Engineering Services. This includes projects in the industry fields of electricity, oil, gas, petrochemical, etc.
Rahavard Energy started its activities as a subsidiary of E-Man Serve co, which is the first & biggest EPC company in the field of “Turbine Inlet Air Cooling” systems in Iran.
From beginning of 2017, all the activities in this field was awarded to Rahavard Energy co, which is founded by Top managers of Eman’s Energy Division.
Rahavard Energy Mainly focused on Turbine Inlet Air Cooling technologies, called TIAC systems. Media Evaporative & High-pressure Foging system are the two main technologies being offered by Rahavard.
Recently Rahavard added the Turbine inlet air Chilling technology with zero water usage to its services by help of its well-known European Partner.
As the cooling systems need treated water for operation, Rahavard offers water treatment systems to the customers. This include Reverse osmosis (R.O) or Demin plants.

Co.

Name: Advanced Power
Description:
Advanced Power is a privately owned company that develops, owns, and manages modern power generation and related infrastructure projects throughout Europe and North America.

We have a clear vision for cleaner energy, and we seek better ways to a cleaner future. Always. We’re a leader in the movement for more efficient and more sustainable energy. Through our expertise in development, financial structuring and asset management, we’re advancing toward our fundamental goal of rapidly reducing global emissions.

We’ve produced more than 37 million megawatt-hours of clean energy, avoided more than 41 million metric tons of CO2 emissions, supplied power to more than 2.6 million homes, and raised over $5 billion in equity and debt capital.

Name: PiLDER
Description:
PİLDER – Türkiye'nin Pil ve Batarya Ekosistemini Güçlendiren Platform

PİLDER (Pil ve Batarya Üreticileri ve Tedarikçileri Derneği), 2022 yılında yedi öncü firmanın bir araya gelmesiyle kurulmuş olup, Türkiye'nin pil ve batarya tedarik zincirini güçlendirmek ve yakın bölgelere yönelik enerji üretim ihtiyaçlarına çözüm sunmak amacıyla faaliyet göstermektedir.

 PİLDER’in Amaçları:
1 Türkiye’de pil ve batarya sektörünün gelişimini desteklemek, atık yönetimi ve ekolojik dengenin korunması konularında çalışmalar yürütmek.
2 Yerel üretimin payını artırarak, tasarımdan nihai ürüne kadar tüm süreçlerde sektörel iş birliğini teşvik etmek.
3 Üyelerimizin uluslararası pazarda daha rekabetçi hale gelmesini sağlamak.
4 Üyeler arasında işbirliği projeleri oluşturmak ve sektörün kolektif gücünü artırmak.
5 Üyeleri artan yetenekleri ve işbirlikleri sayesinde tercih edilen firmalar haline getirmek.
6 Bölgesel rekabet avantajı oluşturarak, Avrupa Birliği enerji ağının önemli tedarikçilerinden biri haline gelmek.
7 Ar-Ge, inovasyon ve girişimcilik kültürünü teşvik ederek, Türkiye'nin ekonomik ve endüstriyel kalkınmasına katkıda bulunmak.

PİLDER, bu amaçlar doğrultusunda yürüttüğü etkinlikler, projeler ve iş birlikleriyle, sektörün gelişimine yön vermeye ve Türkiye’nin batarya ekosistemini daha güçlü bir konuma taşımaya devam etmektedir.

Name: NIGELEC
Description:
La Société Nigérienne d’Electricité (NIGELEC) a été créée le 07 Septembre 1968 suite à l’éclatement de la Société Africaine d’Electricité (SAFELEC), elle-même remplaçante de  la société « Energie AOF » créée en 1951. Son siège social était basé à Dakar au Sénégal. Suite aux indépendances dans les années 1960, les Etats de l’Afrique parviennent par la suite à  modifier sa dénomination sociale pour la renommer à Société Africaine d’Electricité (SAFELEC).
La NIGELEC est une société anonyme d'économie mixte qui a pour objet la production, le transport et la distribution de l'énergie électrique au Niger.

Name: Empresa de Generación Huallaga S.A.
Description:
Nos encargamos de la operación y mantenimiento de la Central Hidroeléctrica Chaglla. Somos parte de China Three Gorges (CTG), líder mundial en energía limpia.

La Central Hidroeléctrica Chaglla se encuentra en la margen izquierda del río Huallaga, entre los distritos de Chaglla y San Pablo de Pillao, provincias de Pachitea y Huánuco, en la región de Huánuco. Es la tercera más grande del país con una potencia instalada de 456 MW, que nos permite suministrar hasta el 7% del total de energía que se consume en el territorio peruano a través del Sistema Eléctrico Interconectado Nacional (SEIN). 

Contribuimos con la reducción de un millón 800 mil toneladas de emisiones de CO2 por año, pues incorporamos a la matriz energética nacional fuentes de energía renovable y limpia.

Name: SMART GRID ENERGY
Description:
Smart Grid Energy est une jeune entreprise de l'énergie, dynamique, innovante et à très forte croissance. Fondée en 2011, elle est depuis 2016 une filiale de Vinci Energies, et elle poursuit son développement sur le marché français. 

Smart Grid Energy a développé un savoir-faire unique en matière d'optimisation des actifs de production, de stockage et d'effacement de consommation électriques, basé à la fois sur une expertise des métiers et des mécanismes du marché de l'énergie, ainsi que sur les nouvelles technologies de l'information. Depuis son centre de dispatching basé à Capbreton, Smart Grid Energy pilote en temps réel - 24h/24 et 365 jours/an - plus de 2000 MW d'actifs électriques dont elle assure la gestion opérationnelle et l'optimisation quotidienne.

Smart Grid Energy est aujourd'hui leader sur le marché français. Son équipe - composée de 25 personnes issues du monde de l'énergie, de l'industrie et/ou des systèmes de l'information joue un rôle clé pour la compétitivité des industriels ainsi que pour l'efficacité du système électrique.

En 2023, Smart Grid Energy a réalisé un chiffre d’affaires de 256 M€.

Para todo tipo de industria, hoteles, hospitales, centros comerciales, parques industriales y demás cargas eléctricas. Proyectos aislados de la red eléctrica, proyectos con biogás para rellenos sanitarios, plantas de tratamiento de aguas residuales.

Name: Ignitis Group Polska
Description:

Spółka jest spółką zależną Ignitis UAB - największego dostawcy energii na Litwie. Ignitis Polska Sp. z o.o. jest częścią państwowej Grupy Ignitis.

Name: Electricity Generating Authority of Thailand
Description: Be Thailand main organization to secure the power reliability and enhance competitiveness of the nation through innovation for Thai happiness

Name: Depco Power Systems
Description:
In operation since 1991, Depco Power Systems provides quality new and used generators, generator sets, engines, marine transmissions, power switches and diesel engine parts. We guarantee the quality of our inventory and have over 19 years in outstanding customer satisfaction. 

Depco can help with decommissioning of data centers, pump stations, rigs and other facilities.  

Our proximity to the Houston Ship Channel provides us the ability to ship any size generator to any location. Contact us today to see how we can become your emergency power solution.

Name: Bnewable
Description:
Bnewable is a pioneering, Belgian renewable energy company based in the Brussels area, Belgium. 

The company is committed to supporting its customers in their energy transition journey, by investing, developing, and operating sustainable and decentralised energy sources at the client site. 

Leveraging cutting-edge AI technologies, Bnewable is committed to revolutionising the energy landscape by developing and implementing innovative energy storage projects and solutions. With a strong pipeline of BESS (batteries) and RES projects, the company is driving the transformation towards a fully sustainable power system.

Name: EREN TRANSFORMER
Description: Ankara da bulunan fabrikamızda 12000m^2 kapalı alanda , 5000m^2 açık alanda dağıtım , güç ve kuru tip trafoların imalatını yamaktayız. 1kv dan 154 kv ya farklı gerilimlerde 10kva 63 mva gücü aralığında trafolar Türkak akrediteli test laboratuvarımızda güvenle testleri yapılmaktadır. 4 kıtada 45 ülkeye ihracat yaparak performansını her geçen gün arttırmaktadır. Name: Alterna énergie
Description:
Fournir de l’énergie, c’est notre métier depuis… des lustres 

Alterna, c’est 50 entreprises locales d’énergie réunies pour vous servir. Celles-ci bénéficient de plus de 90 ans d’expériences.

ruraux. Et oui, rien que ça.

Nous accompagnons les professionnels dans la transition énergétique de leur entreprise. Et avec nos 330 sites à travers la
France, nos fermes de production sont au plus près de vos besoins.

Un service client basé à Poitiers, une expérience historique sur toute la chaine de l'énergie ainsi que des offres et services
sur-mesure : ne la cherchez pas plus loin, choisissez l’énergie du coin.

Name: Erona Enerji
Description:
‘ Erona Enerji 2017 yılında şahıs şirketi olarak kurulmuş olup, 2019 yılında daha güçlü adımlarla ticari hayatına devam edebilmesi için anonim şirkete evrilmiştir. Şirket, kurumsal olarak ilk adımlarını atsa da, üzerine kurulduğu deneyim 12 yılı aşkın sürede elde edilen 100’lerce MW GES ve RES tecrübesini muhteviyatında bulundurmaktadır. ‘
