Although the company takes its first steps institutionally, it has 100s MW of GES and WPP experience, which has been completed succesfully  over last 12 years. ‘

Name: Criterion Energy Partners
Description: Criterion Energy Partners (CEP) is an independent exploration and production company focused on developing decentralized direct geothermal energy projects to help commercial and industrial consumers reduce their emissions and improve their operating efficiency by providing clean, reliable, always on energy using heat from the Earth.

Name: Nova Clean Energy
Description:
The energy transition is accelerating, broadening, and deepening. But bottlenecks remain. High-quality development projects, advanced by management teams with the experience and capital necessary to deliver investable infrastructure at scale remain a scarce resource in many global markets.

Nova Clean Energy and its parent company Bluestar Energy Capital are focused on addressing this scarcity. Through a combination of establishing our own regional development platforms as well as controlling investments in existing platforms, our mission is to be one of the largest investors of project development capital globally.

Owned by a management team with an extensive global track record in wind, solar, and storage, we bring both institutional scale and an owner’s attention to detail to managing project and market risk.


We are patient, creative, and invest at the scale needed to drive the energy transition.

Name: Blue Diamond & Net Zero Equipment
Description: From compact site generators to multi‑megawatt, custom‑engineered power systems, we deliver the equipment and expertise to keep construction, mining, and infrastructure projects running without compromise.

Name: Volkswind France
Description:
Volkswind est l’un des principaux acteurs de l’énergie éolienne en France, avec plus de 1000 MW déjà mis en service.

Filiale du fournisseur d’énergie AXPO, Volkswind est régulièrement numéro 1 des appels d’offres tarifaires portant sur l’éolien terrestre en France.

Avec plusieurs centaines de MW en développement et de nombreux parcs en cours de réalisation, Volkswind s’appuie sur un actif important et de très belles perspectives de croissance. 

L’entreprise se différencie par un management basé sur la confiance, l’autonomie mais également la convivialité et le goût du collectif. 

Volkswind compte 6 bureaux et plus de 100 collaborateurs réparties sur toute la France : Amiens, Benet, Limoges, Montpellier, Paris et Tours.

Name: Clarke Energy - USA
Description:
Clarke Energy USA, a Rehlko Company, delivers advanced energy solutions that support resilience, efficiency, and sustainability across critical sectors.

We specialize in:

 Gas-to-Power and CHP for Data Centers
Providing reliable, low-carbon baseload power and heat recovery systems that enhance uptime and energy efficiency for mission-critical infrastructure.

 Gas Peaking Stations
Flexible, fast-response power generation to support grid stability and meet peak demand—ideal for utilities and large energy users navigating the energy transition.

 CHP for Industrial Applications
Customized combined heat and power systems that reduce energy costs, improve operational efficiency, and lower emissions for manufacturing, processing, and heavy industry.

 Biogas Upgrading for Renewable Natural Gas (RNG)
Transforming waste into value by upgrading biogas into pipeline-quality RNG—supporting decarbonization goals and circular economy initiatives.

As part of the global Clarke Energy group, we combine deep technical expertise with local delivery and support, helping our customers meet their energy, environmental, and commercial objectives.

Name: Seisa
Description: Una empresa de Grupo Gentor.

Name: Groupe Eurowatt
Description:
PRODUCTEUR INDÉPENDANT D’ÉNERGIE RENOUVELABLE
Producteur indépendant d’énergie renouvelable
Pionnier de l'éolien terrestre depuis près de 30 ans, Eurowatt a bâti sa réputation sur un savoir-faire reconnu dans la production d'électricité renouvelable. Aujourd'hui, nous tournons une nouvelle page de notre histoire en rejoignant la marque Virya Energy, marquant ainsi une étape décisive dans notre développement.
 INDEPENDENT PRODUCER OF RENEWABLE ENERGY
A pioneer in onshore wind power for almost 30 years, Eurowatt has built its reputation on recognized expertise in the production of renewable electricity. Today, we are turning a new page in our history by joining the Virya Energy brand, marking a decisive step in our development.

Name: EnfraGen, LLC
Description:
EnfraGen is a developer, owner, and operator of energy transition assets with a specialized focus on grid stability solutions and smaller-scale, distributed renewable energy power plants, such as run-of-river hydro and solar power plants both of which support the process of transition towards lower carbon emission electric grids.

Our senior management team has extensive experience in the development and operation of power plants in Latin America and other emerging markets.  
Each of our divisions is staffed with qualified personnel, allowing for a fully integrated and scalable approach to administration, operations, maintenance, development and construction activities across the platform.

EnfraGen is jointly controlled by Glenfarne Group, LLC, and global private markets investment manager Partners Group, on behalf of its clients. It has operational and in-construction assets across its subsidiaries totaling over 2.1GW of installed capacity. The company, including its affiliates and subsidiaries, is supported by a team of approximately 480 professionals. EnfraGen maintains offices and assets in Chile, Colombia, Panama, Costa Rica, and the United States.

Name: Empresa Brasileira de Participações em Energia Nuclear e Binacional S.A. - ENBPar
Description:
A Empresa Brasileira de Participações em Energia Nuclear e Binacional Sociedade Anônima - ENBPar, empresa pública, de capital fechado e vinculada ao Ministério de Minas e Energia, é uma sociedade por ações regida por seu estatuto, especialmente, pela Lei nº 14 .182, de 12 de julho de 2021, pela Lei nº 13.303, de 30 de junho de 2016, Lei nº 6.404 de 15 de dezembro de 1976, pelo Decreto nº 8.945, de 27 de dezembro de 2016 e demais disposições legais aplicáveis.

Foi ativada em 4 de janeiro de 2022 e tem como principais objetos:

a)    Manter sob controle da União a operação das Usinas Nucleares, que são valores estratégicos para o País;

b)    Manter a União com a titularidade do capital social e da aquisição dos serviços de eletricidade da Itaipu Binacional, atendendo a ordem jurídica do Tratado celebrado entre Brasil e a República do Paraguai; e

c)    Gerir e administrar os Programas de Governo que atendem as políticas públicas do setor elétrico brasileiro.

É uma “holding” para comercialização de energia elétrica, englobando a parte brasileira de Itaipu Binacional, e tem a Eletronuclear como empresa controlada.

Os produtos gerados pela Holding ENBPar são oriundos de Energia Limpa, produzidas por fontes sem emissão – hídrica e nuclear.

Name: AP Executive Search
Description:
AP Executive Search, founded in Spain, leads the international recruitment of technical and leadership profiles in the renewables sector with local presence in UK, Germany, Denmark, Romania, Greece, France, Italy, Poland, USA (Texas), Colombia and Mexico. It maintains the essence of a boutique 100% dedicated to the renewable energy sector and like all its clients, AP Executive Search is firmly committed to the energy transition. 

It currently provides its services for wind, solar, gas and bios, storage (BESS), hydrogen and electric mobility projects. 

AP Executive Search stands out for its disruptive methodology, unique and proven to be the most effective in the sector. This methodology is based on building loyalty within its network of close contacts, selecting technically the best professionals, searching directly with personalised criteria for each need and offering them job opportunities that may be of real interest for them. Its objective is to create personal relationships that allow their contacts to share good feeling and values, as AP Executive Search team does with both Candidates and Clients. 

AP Executive Search team members include engineers and headhunters with native staff and culture in the countries it operates. The Board is composed of former General Managers of Siemens Gamesa and Iberdrola, who are members of prestigious international industry associations and are professors at universities where they teach renewable energy and offshore wind subjects.

Name: GNPower Kauswagan Ltd. Co.
Description:
GNPower Kauswagan Ltd. Co.'s (“GNPK” or the “Company”) vision is to be the leading power producer providing reliable and sustainable energy in the Philippines. We are committed to raising the quality of life for the community and to helping boost the economic development of the nation by proving efficient and reliable energy services for our customers while protecting the people and the environment. 
One of our key objectives is to produce energy by our people:
1.	With effective leadership focuses on sustainable goals and developing people to innovate and improve.
2.	Promoting a safe working environment through the active engagement of dedicated and competent employees.
To achieve our objective it may be required for periods of time to contract the services of experienced professionals to assist in the development and coaching of the local workforce and leaders on site. 
We are committed to the development and improvement of our society and the communities we serve and in which we operate and live.

Description:
MORILLO es una pyme familiar y española, que con más de 50 años de historia se encuentra en su mejor momento para dar un perfecto servicio a sus necesidades.

En la actualidad contamos con bases operativas en casi todo el territorio nacional, siguiendo una política de máxima proximidad a nuestros clientes.

Name: Gradient Geothermal
Description: Gradient Geothermal is revolutionizing the energy landscape by harnessing geothermal heat from existing oil and gas wells to generate emissions-free power. We specialize in innovative geothermal solutions that align with a sustainable, low-carbon future. By integrating advanced technology and industry expertise, we empower clients to maximize the value of their thermal resources while reducing their environmental footprint.

Name: Ascot Industrial srl
Description:
ASCOT is an Italian manufacturing group operating internationally in the power energy sector mainly focused on the production of diesel generating sets, hybrid technologies & power plants, designed in accordance to customer’s specifications at varying climatic conditions. Originally established in 1986, ASCOT has since expanded its presence in over 60 countries throughout Europe, Africa, Middle East, Asia, and Americas.

The “Ascot brand” is associated worldwide with high quality and tailor-made generating sets, special power solutions and hybrid technologies. Ascot strives to maintain the highest standards of quality, manufacturing all products in Italy using 100% European components, manpower and standards.

Ascot’s success is proved by the presence of more than 34.000 installations all over the world. This shows that the market is looking for reliable and superior equipment, and that the tendency is to have high quality long-life products that can guarantee continuity of service without interruptions. 

A network of agents, partners and service centers, is ready to support customers or potential buyers in solving their needs with professionalism and dedication focused on customer care. 

TAILOR MADE PRODUCTION 
Ascot’s standard products can be easily customized by Italian highly skilled engineers with great expertise gained through 40 years of experience in the energy sector developing cost/effective real solutions satisfying customer's needs.

Name: FGN Power Company
Description: Empowering Nigeria's future: Working in collaboration with Siemens Energy to  address infrastructural gaps by investing in end-to-end solutions that will deliver reliable, incremental energy to Nigeria’s industrial clusters, commercial hubs, SMEs, and households with 25GW of electricity.

Name: AEC - Advanced Energy Consulting
Description:
En Advanced Energy Consulting somos una consultora independiente especializada en la gestión del riesgo asociado a la compra y venta de energía, ayudando a nuestros clientes a optimizar el €/MWh y a mantener controlado su coste y presupuesto energético.

Nuestro enfoque es claro: trabajamos sobre la compra de energía, no sobre la reducción del consumo. El objetivo es conseguir que las empresas paguen menos por cada MWh, apoyándonos en análisis de mercado, planificación estratégica y negociación experta.

Para ello, acompañamos a nuestros clientes en:

 Estrategias personalizadas de gestión de energía, adaptadas al perfil de riesgo y necesidades de cada empresa.
 Seguimiento constante de los mercados energéticos (electricidad y gas), aportando visibilidad y oportunidades de compra.
 Negociación de contratos de suministro y representación, asegurando condiciones competitivas y transparentes.
 Asesoramiento en cambios regulatorios, anticipando impactos y facilitando la toma de decisiones.
 Formación en mercados energéticos, para que los equipos internos comprendan cómo y cuándo actuar.

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer una consultoría totalmente objetiva, basada en datos, análisis y experiencia, para convertir la energía en una ventaja competitiva para cada cliente.

Name: Sistel Energia Confiável
Description:
Somos dedicados a impactar positivamente as pessoas gerando diariamente o que é essencial para a vida, a energia. Acreditamos que através da energia confiável, promovemos desenvolvimento, conexão, conhecimento, emoção, segurança, movimento, qualidade de vida.

Priorizamos a busca por soluções personalizadas com nossos produtos e serviços, através de um time altamente qualificado para atender qualquer necessidade em energia elétrica.

Convidamos você a conhecer melhor a razão de existirmos e como reimaginamos continuamente formas de transformar a vida através da energia.

Visite nosso site e entre em contato com a gente:

sistelenergiaconfiavel.com.br

Name: ResInvest Energy Polska
Description:
ResInvest Energy Polska powstała w 2025 roku i jej działalność skupia się głównie na energetyce, obejmując m.in. wytwarzanie energii elektrycznej i ciepła czy zarządzanie produktami ubocznymi spalania. W skład RE Polska wchodzą dwie elektrownie kogeneracyjne zlokalizowane w Chorzowie i Skawinie. Ich łączna moc elektryczna wynosi 568 MWe oraz 1088 MWt mocy cieplnej.

RE Polska wnosi znaczący wkład w lokalną infrastrukturę energetyczną w Polsce zapewniając stabilne i bezpieczne dostawy ciepła dla aglomeracji krakowskiej i śląskiej.

RE Polska jest częścią ResInvest Group, będącej prywatną firmą handlowo-inwestycyjną, która zabezpiecza globalne dostawy dla dużych europejskich i azjatyckich firm energetycznych. Specjalizuje się w towarach masowych, takich jak paliwa stałe, biomasa, produkty rolne, rudy czy metale. Grupa jest aktywna w 16 krajach na całym świecie.

www.resinvest.eu

Name: emPoderadas
Description:
Bienvenidos a emPoderadas! 

Somos una red de mujeres apasionadas y empoderadas que trabajamos en el sector de la energía en Colombia.  Nuestra misión es inspirar, conectar y empoderar a más mujeres para que lideren y transformen el panorama energético de nuestro país.

Aquí encontrarás contenido inspirador, historias de éxito, eventos y oportunidades para crecer y destacarte en la industria energética!  Únete a nuestra comunidad y juntas iluminaremos el futuro!

Name: SOWEC

Name: Agil Energy
Description:
A Agil Energy é uma empresa especializada em serviços de energia nos segmentos de geração, distribuição e transmissão.

Atuamos na construção e manutenção de usinas fotovoltaicas para Geração Distribuída e Centralizada e manutenção de subestações de energia de BT, MT, AT e EAT, transformadores e sistemas de potência.
Nosso time é composto por profissionais com experiência de mais de 20 anos na área da Engenharia Elétrica no segmento de Energia.
Nosso foco principal é atender nossos clientes de forma ágil com eficiência, preços competitivos, priorizando a qualidade, garantia e segurança.
Por atendermos os players de melhor referência no mercado, nossa atuação é pautada no cumprimento das melhores práticas e estamos alinhados com os processos mais qualificados de gestão. 
Temos certificações ISO 9001, 14001 e 45001 o que nos torna uma empresa responsável no cumprimento de normas rígidas de qualidade, meio ambiente, saúde ocupacional e segurança no trabalho.

Name: PT Shenhua Guohua Pembangkitan Jawa Bali
Description:
A joint venture company between China Shenhua Energy Co. Ltd and PT Nusantara Power Renewables (subsidiary of PT PLN Nusantara Power) were establish for IPP Project Assignment #PLTUJawa7 (2 x 1,050 MW);
The first Coal-Fired Steam Power Plant with largest installed capacity per Unit (1,050 MW) in Indonesia using Ultra Super Critical (USC) Technology

Name: AKA Energy Systems
Description:
AKA Energy Systems (Aspin Kemp & Associates Inc.), established in 1996, is an energy systems provider delivering innovative solutions worldwide. AKA designs, manufactures, and supports power and propulsion assets for marine, Offshore O&G, and land-based industries - Offering a full spectrum of integrated products and services including systems integration, new product development, engineering, manufacturing, testing, installation, commissioning, life cycle support, field services, integrated documentation, and training. 

AKA Energy Systems has developed several world’s firsts including the first marine hybrid propulsion system on a tugboat, hybrid drilling floor system operation, and mobile offshore drilling unit and working on the largest solar power plant in Atlantic Canada - Sunbank in Summerside, PEI, with its expertise in renewable energy and microgrid systems. 

AKA is committed to the continuous development of industry-leading sustainability strategies and makes every effort to align its environmental stewardship and social responsibility efforts with its business objectives.

Name: UNITe group
Description:
Founded in 1985, the UNITe group develops, builds and operates local and sustainable electricity production plants: hydroelectric plants, wind farms and photovoltaic installations. The group has been working for more than 35 years to combine the need for energy and respect for the environment, and today stands out as one of the main independent producers of low-carbon, local, sustainable and competitive electricity in France. , with more than 60 production sites. With its subsidiary GREEN-ACCESS, the group also occupies a leading position in energy recovery, in particular through the sale of Guarantees of Origin.
UNITe is an independent, agile, financially solid group, rooted in the territories, with recognized skills in the renewable energy sector. Led by Alexandre ALBANEL and Stéphane MAUREAU, the group is currently undergoing a very sustained growth phase. Alexandre ALBANEL is also a director of the France Hydro Electricity (FHE) syndicate. Currently, in France, the company rents a lot of land for the very long term (35 years and more) to deploy photovoltaic installations on the ground. ww

Name: PT Energi Listrik Batam (Medco Power Group)
Description: Clean Energy For The Nation

Sundance Equipment Sales LLC is a sales and manufacturers’ representative company that has partnered with renowned brand organizations to provide high-quality power equipment and related products and service.

* Power Cable Assemblies for Portable Generators

Name: SolydEra Group
Description: SolydEra is a key world player in the market of Solid Oxide Cells, Stacks and Solutions, with the largest annual production capacity in Europe. Its Solid Oxide Technology has a proven track record and delivers best in class performance and durability in both fuel cell and electrolysis mode. The company has research & development and industrial manufacturing facilities in Italy, Switzerland and Australia. Its headquarters is in Trentino Alto Adige, Italy.

Name: Sapiens Energia
Description:
“En Sapiens Energia somos pioneros en el modelo de comunidades energéticas en España. Nuestro propósito es transformar el modelo energético tradicional en uno más justo, sostenible y colaborativo, empoderando a las personas y comunidades para liderar el cambio.

Desde nuestra fundación en 2020, hemos trabajado para dinamizar y acompañar a comunidades energéticas que apuestan por el autoconsumo colectivo, la eficiencia energética y el desarrollo local. Nuestro enfoque combina innovación, sostenibilidad y cercanía, ofreciendo soluciones prácticas con impacto social, ambiental y económico.

Nuestros logros:
 Más de 70 comunidades energéticas impulsadas en toda España, promoviendo el autoconsumo compartido y reduciendo la dependencia de fuentes tradicionales.
 Proyectos de energía renovable que benefician directamente a cientos de hogares, empresas y entidades locales.
 Participación en iniciativas educativas para fomentar la transición energética, involucrando a todos los actores del territorio.
 Herramientas innovadoras y procesos colaborativos que hacen accesibles las comunidades energéticas a todos.

¿Qué nos hace diferentes? Nuestro equipo cubre todas las fases clave:
 Dinamización y creación de comunidades.
 Servicios de ingeniería, construcción y legalización del autoconsumo colectivo.
 Gestión integral para facilitar el día a día de las personas socias con procesos simples y efectivos.

¿Nuestro secreto? No solo creemos en este modelo, lo practicamos. Cada proyecto refleja nuestro compromiso con la energía colectiva y sostenible.

La transición energética no es solo un desafío técnico, sino una oportunidad para construir un modelo económico más inclusivo y resiliente.

Únete a esta transformación. Hagamos juntos el cambio hacia un modelo energético más justo y sostenible.”

Name: Reolum
Description: Reolum concibe y desarrolla proyectos innovadores para impulsar la descarbonización y avanzar en la transición energética. Desde la generación de energías renovables, hidrógeno verde y e-metanol verde, hasta la captura de CO₂, pasando por la cogeneración con biomasa, tanto de energía eléctrica como de calor, así como el propio suministro de biomasa.

Name: Central Vuelta de Obligado
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina creada en el 2010 con la visión de contribuir en el desarrollo del país generando energía eléctrica acorde a los máximos estándares de eficacia y eficiencia en servicio. Operamos tecnología de vanguardia con combustible gas natural y gasoil, contando con aproximadamente 840 MW de capacidad instalada abasteciendo a un millón de hogares. 
Confiamos en que el crecimiento y desarrollo sustentable de nuestra empresa únicamente es posible realizando todas las gestiones para minimizar el impacto sobre el medio ambiente y mejorando la calidad de vida de las comunidades con las que interactuamos y de toda la sociedad.
Nuestros pilares: seguridad, integridad, ética, responsabilidad y trabajo en equipo. Superando los desafíos e impulsando al máximo las capacidades de todos los colaboradores que forman Central Vuelta de Obligado.
Location: Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires, Capital Federal

Name: TLS Geothermics
Description:
TLS Geothermics is a geoscience tech company, exploring and developing geothermal projects for power, heat, cold and byproducts. We conduct exploration projects globally, with 10 years of R&D activities to significantly reduce upstream drilling risks (geology, geophysics). We implement geothermal power systems independently and in partnership. We operate field campaigns for geological and geophysical data acquisition, with support from renowned laboratories and experts. Offering a complete acquisition / processing / interpretation value chain and expertise in geoscience studies, basin analysis, economics and technical feasibility in geothermal energy.

TLS Geothermics est une société technologique des géosciences, explorateur et développeur de projets en géothermie profonde, pour la production de chaleur et d'électricité.
L'entreprise mène des projets d'exploration en France et des activités R&D visant à réduire significativement les risques en amont des forages (géologie, géophysique) et met en œuvre des projets de centrales géothermiques par une approche globale seul ou en partenariat.
Nous mettons en oeuvre nous-même sur le terrain des campagnes d'acquisitions de données géologiques et géophysiques (MT, gravimétrie, sismique passive) et cela toujours avec un appui de laboratoires et experts parmi les plus reconnus dans les techniques utilisées.
TLS Geothermics dispose d'une chaîne complète d'acquisition/traitement/interprétation, et propose à ses clients et partenaires son expertise : études géosciences, expertise bassins, études économiques et financières, faisabilité technique en géothermie, préparation des projets d'exploration en géothermie.

Name: Jakpower (Jakson & Company)
Description:
Jakson & Company was founded in 1947 and operates under the brand name Jakpower. It was created with a dream and determination to bring to India world class products & services for power generation, distribution and control & automation.

Headquartered in Delhi, Jak Power today is the largest player in design and manufacture of Silent Diesel Generator Sets in India with Kiloskar. It is a dynamic company specialising in the areas of Pumps, Pumpsets, DG sets, Motors, Monoblocks and allied products.

Jakson & Company is also one of the largest distributors of Transformers, VCB Panels, Motors, Alternators & Pumps of Kirloskar make in India.

Our manufacturing units of KOEL Green DG Sets are located at:
Mayapuri – New Delhi (Northern region), Falandi and Kherdi at Silvassa (Western Region) 

We are also present across India through our strong dealer network in various cities.

Name: Customized Power Technology Group - CPT
Description:
CPT is a full scale international producer and supplier for Power generating sets, Spare parts and related after-market services with a long & reputable reference list of successful supplying stories to all segments (Government , Construction , Industrial & Agriculture , Commercial , Oil & Gas , Residential , Marine ,……) supported with approvals from most of major Consulting Companies & Government Authorities worldwide.        
 
We supply CKD & Complete generating sets solutions for the Middle East, Africa.. 
 
CPT Group can supply diesel generating sets from 9kva to 3,000KVA, 50Hz/60hz and customized packages that may include: 
 
• Sound proof, Weather proof and all related acoustical treatments and accessories. 
• Switchgears and synchronizing panels for all needs. 
• Genuine parts for the entire range. 
• Local and international after sales support.

Name: Enercoop Languedoc Roussillon
Description:
Coopérative d'électricité 100% renouvelable pour particuliers et professionnels. 
Production d'énergie renouvelable sous forme coopérative, développement de nouveaux projets, achats de centrales existantes, négoce d'électricité
Services à la maîtrise de l'énergie

Name: TECNIELECTRICA
Description:
Substations | Transformers  |  Insulators  |  Lightning Arresters 

Tecnielectrica was born in 2002 and since then has a place in Ecuadorian Electrical market for all of its developed jobs.

The Company counts with 23 years  in Equadorian Industrial Market, bringing Automation and Electrical Solutions to its customers

Tecnielectrica has an excelent group of qualified engineers.
 
Solar Energy, On Grid and Off Grid Projects, Automation, Industry 4.0, IOT, Energy Efficiency.

Renewable Energy Company. Leader in Equadorian Industrial Market Bringing Electrical Solutions to Its Clients.

New technologies are changing the world as fast as you can imagine and we can help your business to change now.
Renewable Energies are the present and the future of humanity.

Zero Emissions and Carbon Free Energy is the current goal. With Tecnielectrica is possible.

Name: Generadora Gatún
Description:
Generadora Gatún sumará 670 MW de capacidad más limpia a la matriz energética de Panamá, impulsando el desarrollo del país con confiabilidad y estabilidad en el sistema eléctrico. El proyecto será desarrollado y operado por la empresa, cuyos accionistas son InterEnergy Group Ltd. (51%) y AES Panamá (49%). Utilizando el gas natural como fuente de energía, se permitirá fortalecer la matriz energética del país con energía más competitiva, confiable y amigable con el medio ambiente.

Este proyecto representa una inversión de USD $1,000 millones y traerá muchos beneficios para el país, como la reactivación de la economía y el desarrollo a largo plazo, mejorando la calidad de vida de miles de panameños. Además, estaremos generando hasta 3 mil empleos, directos e indirectos, durante la fase pico de construcción, e invirtiendo en capacitación para ofrecer un servicio de calidad mundial.

Únete a nosotros en este importante proyecto por el futuro de Panamá!

Name: Terra Firma Energy Limited
Description: Terra Firma Energy delivers flexible, low-carbon power solutions across the UK, specialising in agile generation assets designed for a rapidly evolving energy landscape. With hydrogen-ready infrastructure and a focus on grid support, Terra Firma Energy is at the forefront of enabling a reliable, resilient, and renewable future.

Name: Natural Energia
Description:
Natural Energia is one of the Brazil’s leading clean energy developers. Founded in 2012, Natural Energia has clean tech power generation projects that exceeds 5.0 GW, part of these projects have already been transferred into large utilities. The company has head office in Brazil, but with development activities in Brazil, US and Australia.  

Levered by its partners’ expertise, with advanced engineering tools and with high qualified team,  the Group has also an extensive experience in development, implementation, finance and operation of power plants.

Name: GO EC
Description:
GOEC is transforming the future of electric automobiles by building a strategic and collective network of Electric Vehicle (EV) charging stations across India.
The future needs to be planned today with sustainable solutions that can address environmental concerns fairly. We envisioned meeting the opportunities for sustainable mobility through collaborations with willing and progressive partners. Our focus remains on creating a chain of EV Charging Stations network that is optimized within the best-given space and infrastructure capacities.
Creating a more sustainable future together means meeting the needs of our customers, meeting your needs. How? By offering state-of-the-art solutions that go beyond the initial charging station. Our vision incorporates your complete system, your e-Mobility world.

Name: TGC-1
Description:
Territorial Generation Company no. 1 (TGC-1 or TGK-1) is the leading producer and supplier of electricity and heat in the North-West of Russia and the 3rd largest territorial generating company in Russia in terms of installed electric capacity. It operates 55 electric generating stations in four regions of Russia – the City of St Petersburg, Republic of Karelia, Leningrad Region and Murmansk Region – with a total installed electric capacity of over 6.3 GW and heat capacity of over 14,300 GCal per hour. The Company’s major assets include thermal (cogeneration) and hydroelectric power plants and a heating grid of over 970 km. TGC-1 sells electricity on the domestic wholesale market and partly exports to neighboring Finland and Norway. The company is a strategic supplier of heat in St. Petersburg, Petrozavodsk, Murmansk, Kirovsk and Apatity.
TGC-1 is listed in Russia on MICEX (ticker – TGKA) and RTS stock exchange (tickers – TGKA, TGKAG).
Major Shareholders: Gazprom (51.79%), Fortum (25.66 %).

Name: Tidewater Renewables Ltd.
Description: Tidewater Renewables is an energy transition company focused on the production of low-carbon intensity fuels like Renewable Hydrogen, Renewable Diesel and Renewable Natural Gas.

Name: PROPWR
Description:
Let's rethink the grid together. Introducing the Permian Basin’s first and only pure power service business, dedicated to empowering local communities through innovative electrification solutions. With a focus on efficiency, safety, and collaboration, we deliver holistic, data-driven power infrastructure tailored to meet the demands of today’s energy industry.

As part of the ProPetro Holdings organization, PROPWR delivers the same commitment to Ownership, Safety, Quality, Continuous Improvement and Collaboration with Partners through a new organic division, purely focused on serving The Permian Basin with Power. 

NYSE: PUMP

Name: BIOPOWER AFRICA GROUP
Description:
BIOPOWER AFRICA GROUP est une entreprise innovante et visionnaire engagée dans la promotion des solutions durables, les Bioénergies, l'Agroecologie, avec un accent particulier sur la production du BIOGAZ au Togo et en Afrique. Fondée par des experts, ingénieurs et passionnés des technologies du Biodigesteur avec plusieurs années d'expériences, l'entreprise s'est imposée comme un acteur clé du développement durable sur le continent.
En 2023, elle a été classée parmi les trois meilleures entreprises écocitoyennes aux awards "Togo Top Impact", témoignant de son engagement à contribuer à la stabilité sociale, climatique et sécuritaire des communautés.
L'entreprise sensibilise activement & forme des jeunes et communautés locales, dans la valorisation énergétique des déchets, favorisant l'autonomisation des femmes et des populations.

Lauréat du prestigieux "GRAND PRIX GÉNÉRAL MATHIEU KEREKOU", en reconnaissance de ses efforts et actions en faveur du développement, l'engagement de BIOPOWER AFRICA a été, une fois encore mis en lumière lors de la "2ÈME CONFÉRENCE INTERNATIONALE SUR L'ÉCONOMIE CIRCULAIRE, LES ÉNERGIES RENOUVELABLES ET L'HYDROGENE VERT EN AFRIQUE", où l'entreprise  a présenté sa vision pour un avenir énergétique durable.

BIOPOWER AFRICA GROUP est aussi un pilier du développement communautaire. Elle a activement soutenu des initiatives telles que LE CAMP NATIONAL DES JEUNES, axé sur le leadership & l'autonomisation des jeunes.

Grâce à une approche innovante et inclusive, BIOPOWER AFRICA GROUP s’efforce de démocratiser l’accès à l’énergie verte tout en soutenant les acteurs du biodigesteur au Togo à travers l'Association professionnelle des Acteurs du Biodigesteur (APAB-TOGO), présidée par M. Edwards GUINI, son leader.

Par des actions concrètes, une équipe d'experts confirmés, une vision claire et une mission bien précise, BIOPOWER AFRICA GROUP continue d'inspirer un changement positif, prônant Un Modèle Économique Circulaire, Inclusif Et Durable en Afrique.

Name: Wood Pellet Association of Canada
Description: The Wood Pellet Association of Canada is a member-driven organization advancing the interests of Canadian wood pellet producers. Our goal is to help members grow through promoting the role of wood pellets in the Canadian and global markets, supporting market and technical research, and encouraging fair and open energy trade. Membership is open to Canadian pellet producers, as well as suppliers and partners (associate membership).

Name: Volta Groupe
Dall Energy
Description:
Dall Energy have developed and patented a new multifuel - low emission biomass furnace
Many plants are in commercial operation since 2012

Our unique combustion technology offer:
- Use of a vide range of (low cost) biomass fuel 
- Ultra low emissions, including Dust, NOx, CO
- 10%-100% load
- Low electricity consumption
- Low maintenance cost
- Low noice
- Small footprint

Name: L-Charge
Description:
L-Charge are on a mission to revolutionise the EV charging landscape in support of global net zero and a faster transition to an all-electric future. 

We design, manufacture and operate scalable off-grid ultrafast charging solutions, that use clean fuels as an input, to deliver an ultrafast charging experience that guarantees less dwell time and optimal convenience for electric vehicle drivers, OEM’s and fleet operators. Our solutions are quick to mobilise and are available in several formats, including a mobile truck and containerised version for permanent commercial use and operation across multiple sectors.

We realise simplicity around electric refuelling is a key enabler towards mass adoption of electric vehicles and are fully committed to working with our clients and partners to deliver a network of innovative charging solutions that positions us at the forefront of this evolution.

Name: Kuopion Energia
Description:
Kuopion Energia on monipuolinen ja nykyaikainen energiapalveluyritys. Tarjoamme asiakkaillemme kilpailukykyisiä ja luotettavia energiapalveluja samalla kantaen vastuumme ympäristöstä ja henkilöstöstämme.

Tuotamme sähköä ja kaukolämpöä yhteistuotannolla Haapaniemen voimalaitoksella ja biokaasulla Pitkälahdessa. Käytämme pääosin pohjoissavolaisia polttoaineita, mikä tuottaa työpaikkoja ja hyvinvointia koko maakuntaan. Kuopion Energian tytäryhtiö Kuopion Sähköverkko Oy huolehtii sähkönsiirrosta.

Paremman huomisen energiaa. Kotikaupungistasi.

Name: EVM Energía
Description: EVM Energía fue adquirida por Valia Energía.

Name: Energy Infratech Private Limited
Description: Energy Infratech seeks to leverage its extensive pool of intellectual capital for adding value to the efforts of power project developers in India and abroad. The Company also intends to build its capacity to provide services for associated energy infrastructure.

Name: Global Sustainable Electricity Partnership (GSEP)
Description:
The Global Sustainable Electricity Partnership (GSEP) is an international alliance of utilities and electricity sector leaders. We build on our members’ unparalleled expertise in electricity technologies to empower decisionmakers and companies worldwide to embrace electrified solutions.

Through a strong collaborative approach underpinning activities convening the electricity ecosystem, unlocking electrified solutions, and advocating for efficient electrification, we aim to deliver a clean, secure, and affordable energy future for all.

We believe that thanks to cross-industry collaboration, a fully electrified, decarbonized future can be rapidly achieved across geographies and sectors.

Name: Xela Energy
Description: Xela Energy is an Enterprise Independent Power Provider (EIPP) redefining how large-scale energy users access clean, reliable, and cost-effective power. Xela Energy develops and operates Private Wire renewable energy infrastructure — enabling customers including data centres, industrial manufacturing, pharmaceutical and blue-chip technology organisations to reduce carbon, cut costs, and secure long-term energy certainty without the burden of capital investment.

Name: Manawa Energy
Description:
Manawa Energy is one of Aotearoa New Zealand’s largest renewable electricity generators. Our goal is to develop renewable generation to support our country’s ambitions for a thriving, low-emissions and climate-resilient future.

Manawa Energy also operates a commercial and industrial electricity business with approximately 680 customers at more than 14,000 electricity connections nationally, currently supplying approximately 1,250GWh per annum.

Name: EPUKI
Description:
EPUK Investments Ltd (EPUKI) is the UK division of Energetický a průmyslový holdings (EPH), a leading energy group of over 70 companies that owns and operates assets across Europe.  EPH group employs circa 25,000 people internationally, owns €16.7bn of assets, generating €8.6bn of revenue and an EBITDA of €2.1bn.  

EPUKI was established in 2015 as the strategic platform for expanding the EPH group into the UK and Ireland energy markets.  Since launching, EPUKI has made several acquisitions and now owns multiple renewable and flexible power generating assets.  More recently, EPUKI has enjoyed repeated success in Capacity Market auctions that has enabled the development and construction of new generation across a range of fuel types.   

EPUKI has grown rapidly to revenues ~£1.5bn and EBITDA > £300m. We pride ourselves on an entrepreneurial culture and flat leadership structure where every colleague has the opportunity to make a real impact on our business.  

EPUKI is one of the largest independent generators in the UK and Ireland, with an asset base that covers multiple technologies and a range of revenue streams; these include fully merchant baseload and peaking plant and index traded baseload plants, providing a range of system services across the energy and balancing spectrum.  Despite its significant market presence, EPUKI has a flat structure with fast paced decision making ability enabling better optimisation of market positions.  The market continues to evolve and develop as the UK and Irish governments drive towards Net Zero with increasing challenges of renewables penetration, introduction of hydrogen and other new technologies.

Name: ESCOFI Energies Nouvelles
Description: Created in 1988 in the North of France, ESCOFI is an independent family-owned group that develops and operates renewable energy sites. The company is involved in all steps of the development and operation of solar and wind energy projects: site research, institutional relations, studies, financial arrangements, operation of the parks. With an installed capacity of 90 MW and more than 400 MW under development, ESCOFI is actively pursuing its growth in France and Europe.

Name: Fidra Energy
Description:
Powered by our people, we develop, build and operate large battery storage projects in the UK and other European markets.

Established in 2024, we are an independent battery energy storage business headquartered in Edinburgh, UK.

Backed by EIG,  a leading institutional investor in the global energy and infrastructure sectors, we believe that energy storage will play a crucial role in the decarbonisation of our electricity systems.

Name: Unicompex
Description:
Unicompex Congo est une société congolaise offrant principalement des solutions d’énergie de secours avec des groupes électrogènes à des particuliers et des industriels en République Démocratique du Congo.

La société fournie, installe et entretien la gamme de produits suivants:

Les groupes électrogènes de FG Wilson (Caterpillar Northern Ireland, Irlande du Nord)
Les moteurs Deutz (Allemagne)
Les pompes et équipements hydrauliques de KSB (Allemagne)
Les équipements de contrôle d’accès de Centurion Systems (Afrique du Sud)
Pourquoi choisir Unicompex Congo ?

Une réputation de produits et de services solides et de qualité
Une expérience dans l’énergie de secours depuis 20 ans en RDC (depuis 1997)
Nos techniciens (électriques, mécaniques et électroniques) sont régulièrement envoyés pour des formations certifiées chez le fabricant FG Wilson en Irlande du Nord et ailleurs

Name: Tecnicargo Grupos Geradores
Description:
Fundada em 1993, A TECNICARGO acumula grande experiência em projetos, fabricação e instalação de grupos geradores, quadros de comandos e demais equipamentos para geração de energia (fonte principal ou de emergência). Possui uma equipe de engenheiros e técnicos, com know-how de milhares de equipamentos instalados.

Por conta desse “know-how”, a TECNICARGO foi escolhida para ser uma das Distribuidoras Autorizadas da Líder Mundial FG WILSON, empresa pertencente ao grupo CATERPILLAR. Com mais de 50 mil unidades por ano, FG WILSON está há 35 anos produzindo equipamentos de altíssima qualidade, testados e aprovados em mais de 180 países, nos mais diversos ambientes e formas de aplicação.

Name: Central Vuelta de Obligado
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina creada en el 2010 con la visión de contribuir en el desarrollo del país generando energía eléctrica acorde a los máximos estándares de eficacia y eficiencia en servicio. Operamos tecnología de vanguardia con combustible gas natural y gasoil, contando con aproximadamente 840 MW de capacidad instalada abasteciendo a un millón de hogares. 
Confiamos en que el crecimiento y desarrollo sustentable de nuestra empresa únicamente es posible realizando todas las gestiones para minimizar el impacto sobre el medio ambiente y mejorando la calidad de vida de las comunidades con las que interactuamos y de toda la sociedad.
Nuestros pilares: seguridad, integridad, ética, responsabilidad y trabajo en equipo. Superando los desafíos e impulsando al máximo las capacidades de todos los colaboradores que forman Central Vuelta de Obligado.
Location: Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires, Capital Federal

Name: EDP South America
Description:
EDP operates in 30 markets and is present in four regions: North America, Asia-Pacific, Europe and South America.

In South America, we operate in the energy generation, transmission, networks and the free markets segments, as well as in the development, construction and maintenance of wind, solar and green hydrogen assets, with assets worth R$41 billion, making it the EDP Group's second largest operation.

A benchmark in ESG, we are the most sustainable electricity company in the world according to the Dow Jones index, as well as being part of the Bloomberg Gender Equality Index.

In the European and South American markets - Brazil, Chile and Colombia - we won the Top Employer 2024 award. 

In the Brazilian market, the largest country in the region, we were voted the most innovative company in the electricity sector by the  Valor Econômico Publishes, making the list for four consecutive years.

Visit our website: edp.com.

Name: Nam Theun 2
Description:
The Nam Theun 2 Hydropower Company is an industrial and development investment owned by two private shareholders and the Lao Government, backed by commercial lenders and international financial institutions including the World Bank and the Asian Development Bank.

NTPC is composed of three shareholders: 40% represented by Electricité de France International (EDFI), 35% by Thailand’s Electricity Generating Public Company (EGCO) and 25% owned by the Lao Government through Lao Holding State Enterprise (LHSE).

NTPC is dedicated to running a world class hydropower facility and to improving the living conditions of people in the areas around the Project. 
The company is also committed to achieving the highest standard of environmental stewardship and protection of the environment for current and future generations.

The Power station has an installed capacity of 1,070 MW that can generate 6000 GWh of electricity per year. About 95% of the power is exported to Thailand.
Nam Theun 2 is recognized as a vehicle for national growth and development in Laos. NTPC is expected to generate 2 billion US$ in government revenue over the 25 year concession period.

For more information, the Nam Theun 2 corporate film can be viewed at: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lamIrmejEmE

Name: Innomerics
Description: Innomerics develops software and provides services tailored to the electric power generation industry, with a focus on the nuclear and hydroelectric sectors. Our solutions enable power plant operators to understand the impact of operating decisions on the remaining life of their critical assets, optimize in-service inspection strategies, and diagnose the root causes of operational anomalies and equipment malfunctions. Our digital twin software allows real time simulation of power plant systems by integrating operational data from plant sensors with high-fidelity finite element models, which were previously limited to design applications.

Name: Goesgreen
Description:
Somos una compañía de Data & Asset Management enfocados en el sector de energías renovables. Administramos activos con más de 600 MW de experiencia en parques fotovoltaicos. 
Nuestra solución I4Business, ofrece una potente plataforma que permite integrar todos los datos relevantes de su negocio en un entorno hecho a su medida. 
Ser Microsoft Partner nos permite desarrollar entornos confiables para nuestros clientes.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: BattMan Energy
Description:
BattMan Energy is a clean energy developer and operator of BESS (Battery Energy Storage System) in Denmark. 
Our mission is to anticipate the future and act fast, to deliver early solutions that power a future of sustainable energy for impact and for-profit.

Name: Powerturbines
Description: Powerturbines is an specialized company in small hydroturbines for energy recovery in water networks (irrigation, drinking water, raw water, etc.). Our technology is based on the use of pump as turbines (PAT) and we can offer turbines for battery charging (interesting on places without grid access) or connected to the grid for self-consumption or energy selling.

Name: EnergyLive
Description: EnergyLive is an innovative platform focusing on energy data. This is a unique product specially designed for the energy markets. On a daily basis, our platform collects, processes & analyses an abundance of data, that are presented and translated into graphs through a modern UI. EnergyLive platform can deliver crucial information & insights quickly and accurately so you can make the most informative decision for your business.

Name: skupina Sev.en
Description:
Jsme energetická skupina, která svou klíčovou kompetenci vidí v konvenčním způsobu výroby elektrické energie. Jsme přesvědčeni, že právě ona bude hrát důležitou roli v přechodu energetických soustav směrem k energii z obnovitelných zdrojů.
Skupina zahrnuje širokou škálu činností - od těžby a výroby toho nejkvalitnějšího hnědého uhlí v Evropě, po výrobu elektrické energie a tepla.

Name: FlexEnergy Solutions
Description:
FlexEnergy Solutions is a technology company that designs, manufactures, leases and sells innovative gas turbine systems that produce continuous clean energy and heat. Flex Turbines are capable of running on virtually any fuel gas – from low quality biogas to pipeline-quality natural gas to oilfield associated gas and overhead gas. The Flex Turbine is the industry’s most reliable choice for remote, onsite power generation.  

FlexEnergy, which launched in 2010 upon its acquisition of Ingersoll Rand’s Energy Systems division, has maintained a culture focused on manufacturing quality, technical expertise, and safety. At the start of 2013, Flex Leasing Power and Service was established to provide greater commercial access to and outstanding localized service for Flex Turbines.  Formerly working in parallel as sister companies, these power solution providers joined to form FlexEnergy Solutions in the summer of 2019 so as to maximize resources, market potential, and offer additional financing solutions to valued customers.

Name: Ethiopian Electric Power - የኢትዮጵያ ኤሌክትሪክ ኃይል
Description:
Ethiopian Electric Power Authority (EELPA) was established in 1955(1948 E.C).  It was reestablished as Ethiopian Electric Power Corporation (EEPCo) after restructuring in 1996(1989E.C). The corporation was reorganized in to two entities, Ethiopian Electric Power (EEP) and Ethiopian Electric Utility (EEU) in 2013(2006 E.C).

Ethiopian Electric Power (EEP) was established by the FDRE Council of Ministers Regulation No. 302/2013 and amended Regulation No. 381/2016

Name: GENEX ENERGY
Description:
GENEX ENERGY are specialists in the design, installation, commissioning, and maintenance of industrial electrical, instrumentation, and industrial gas (Type-B) appliances.

Providing technical services and equipment to meet the needs of the mining, power generation, oil and gas, manufacturing, and chemical processing industries.

Our core services include:
    - Electrical & Instrumentation
    - Industrial Gas (Type B) Appliances
    - Hazardous Areas Management
    - Renewable Energy Systems
    - Power Station Operations

At GENEX, we are committed to delivering sustainable energy solutions, our mission is to provide reliable, innovative industrial energy systems which maximise productivity, increase profitability, and minimise environmental impact.

Name: Greaves Power
Description: Greaves Power is a leading manufacturer of generator sets in the range of 5kVA to 2500 kVA. Our Gensets power critical installations and a wide range of applications across various industries, including healthcare, telecommunications, manufacturing, and retail.

Name: Sinop Energia
Description: A Sinop Energia é responsável pela construção e operação da Usina Hidrelétrica (UHE) Sinop. Uma sociedade de propósito específico que tem como acionistas as empresas EDF Brasil e Eletrobrás. A empresa foi criada com o objetivo exclusivo de construir, implantar, operar, manter e comercializar a energia gerada pela Usina Hidrelétrica (UHE) Sinop por 35 anos.

Name: Safira Energia
Description:
Com mais de 15 anos de experiência no mercado, a Safira Energia oferece um ecossistema completo de energia elétrica para você e sua empresa, incluindo geração, gestão, comercialização e consultoria.

Somos uma empresa que respira inovação e está comprometida com a sustentabilidade. Por isso, investimos em projetos ousados e transformadores que nos ajudam a transformar o mercado de energia no país.

Nossos produtos e serviços são desenvolvidos para ajudar nossos clientes a reduzir seus custos com energia elétrica de maneira simples, segura e eficiente.

Nossa missão é ajudar os brasileiros a economizar por meio do consumo de energia limpa, de forma digital.

Por isso, oferecemos um atendimento humanizado, especializado e personalizado, para atender as necessidades dos diversos perfis de consumidores.

Promovemos a redução no valor da fatura de energia elétrica e resultados em todas as frentes relacionadas à geração, gestão, inteligência de mercado, comercialização e consultoria em energia elétrica.

Entre em contato com nosso time de especialistas para saber mais sobre como podemos ajudar você e a sua empresa.

Name: Solarçatı
Description: Solarçatı, güneş enerjisini evinizin ve işyerinizin elektriğine dönüştürür, artık hem tasarruf etmek hem de yeşil enerjiyle çevrenizi korumak sizin elinizde.

Name: Newave Energia

Name: Aalborg Energie Technik a/s
Description:
Welcome to a Greener World - 24/7 
Aalborg Energie Technik a/s (AET) is a leading, independent engineering and contracting company supplying biomass-fired and residue-fired boiler plants, power plants and combined heat and power plants (CHP) in the size range of 25 to 170 MWth.

The business comprises design, engineering, delivery and service of plants fired with all forms of biomass. The well-proven AET Biomass Boiler and AET Combustion System are based on more than 30 years of hands-on experience with industrial processes, steam generation and biomass combustion.

The company has a well-known and recognised reputation for supplying biomass-fired boilers and plants with exceptionally  high efficiencies, high availabilities, high fuel flexibility and low emissions. Moreover, with very low maintenance costs, the AET biomass-fired plants ensure you, as an investor, a viable business case.

See more details at our webpage: https://www.aet-biomass.com/

Name: Slovenské elektrárne
Description: Slovenské elektrárne is the key power generating company in Slovakia and one of the largest in Central and Eastern Europe. We operate 4129 MWe of capacity in 5 nuclear units and 31 hydroelectic power plants.  Our electricity is 100% free of direct carbon dioxide emissions, thanks to shutting down our lignite and black coal power plants.

Name: Termo Caribe SAS ESP
Description: Termo Caribe es una central de generación de energía eléctrica interconectada al sistema de transmisión nacional en Colombia. Tiene punto de conexión a 220kV en la subestación Bolivar de ISA. Respalda su obligación de energía en firme con Gas LP y tiene la posibilidad de utilizar Gas Natural como combustible alternativo. Su primera fase está proyectada para generar 50 MW y su segunda fase entregará 120 MW adicionales al sistema eléctrico.

Name: EP Produzione
Description:
EP Produzione è la società italiana di generazione elettrica del Gruppo ceco EPH (Energetický a Prumyslový Holding). Gestisce una capacità di generazione di 5,2 GW, attraverso le centrali termoelettriche di Fiume Santo, Livorno Ferraris, Ostiglia, Tavazzano e Montanaso, Trapani e Scandale. Sei siti produttivi efficienti e performanti, gestiti secondo i più elevati standard ambientali, di sicurezza e affidabilità. Tutti gli impianti hanno infatti ottenuto la registrazione ambientale EMAS, la Certificazione ambientale ISO 14001 e la Certificazione OHSAS per la Salute e Sicurezza dei Lavoratori. 
EPH (Energetický a průmyslový holding) è uno dei più grandi gruppi energetici europei a capitale privato, leader nella transizione energetica verso fonti a zero o basse emissioni.
Con sede a Praga, gestisce attività in Repubblica Ceca, Slovacchia, Germania, Paesi Bassi, Regno Unito, Irlanda, Francia, Svizzera e Italia ed è strutturato in tre aree di business:  EP Infrastructure, Power Generation Group, EP Logistics International.
EPH è una utility verticalmente integrata attiva lungo tutta catena del valore: produzione di energia elettrica, cogenerazione, trasporto e stoccaggio di gas naturale, distribuzione di energia elettrica e gas, fornitura al dettaglio di energia e gas.

Name: Net Power
Description: Net Power's (NYSE: NPWR) mission is to transform natural gas into the lowest cost form of clean firm power.

Name: Carnegie Clean Energy
Description: Carnegie Clean Energy Limited is an Australian, ASX-listed (ASX: CCE) wave energy technology developer. Carnegie is the 100% owner and developer of the CETO Wave Energy Technology intellectual property. A spin-off from this core IP is the MoorPower product, providing electricity from waves for barges and other floating infrastructure.

Name: Sweetch Energy
Description:
Sweetch Energy is a renewable energy company pioneering osmotic power, turning the natural salinity of water into clean, 24/7, and cost-efficient electricity. 
Our mission is simple yet bold: build a sustainable future where carbon neutrality meets energy security. Thanks to our proprietary INOD technology, we’re unlocking one of Earth’s most abundant and untapped energy sources, making it a new cornerstone of the global clean-energy mix. 
We’re a multicultural team of pioneers, uniting science, engineering, and vision to turn deeptech innovation into real-world impact. 
Sweetch Energy is backed by leading European institutions and top-tier investors in cleantech and industry, including Crédit Mutuel Impact, Go Capital, Demeter Investment Managers, Axeleo, Future Positive Capital, EDF Pulse Ventures, and Compagnie Nationale du Rhône, alongside Bpifrance, ADEME, and the European Innovation Council. Recognized as a Tech Pioneer by the World Economic Forum, we have earned multiple international awards, including the Grand Prize of the Hello Tomorrow Global Challenge.

Name: Vatia | Colombia
Description:
Somos expertos en sostenibilidad energética en Colombia y nos mueve transformar a  los negocios con servicios que innoven e impacten en su eficiencia energética para ofrecerle a las industrias una gran ventaja competitiva.
Comercializamos y generamos energía renovable no convencional, siendo la 9° empresa a nivel nacional en transacciones de energía en el mercado regulado. Creamos un portafolio de ingeniería complementario y entregamos acompañamiento integral a nuestros clientes diseñando soluciones energéticas a su medida.

Name: Hexicon
Description:
Hexicon is a Swedish cleantech company that develops international floating offshore wind power projects. The company has its own patented technology; TwinWind, which consists of a floating foundation with two turbines. The innovative twin turbine design enables more turbines per sea area, which increases the energy yield and reduces the environmental impact. Sustainability, innovation, and cooperation are at the core of Hexicon's business. Floating wind power is a key component as the world transitions to renewables. Hexicon is listed on Nasdaq First North Premier Growth Market (ticker HEXI). Certified Adviser is FNCA Sweden AB, info@fnca.se, +46 (0) 8528 00 399.
www.hexicon.eu

Name: EnerVenue
Description:
Named one of The World's Top Greentech Companies by TIME in 2024 and 2025, EnerVenue builds simpler, safer, and more flexible energy storage solutions for the clean energy transition. Based on technology proven over decades under the most extreme conditions, EnerVenue offers a differentiated stationary storage solution that improves upon today’s alternatives.

Commercialized from research completed at Stanford University and backed by well-funded investors, EnerVenue is redefining the stationary storage market.

Name: Pleavin Power
Description:
Delivering on our promise to be a reliable, effective and powerful solution for your business. Providing generator power to organisations across the UK. We sell, rent, provide parts and service for equipment and engines to customers in various industries including Hospitals, Data-Centres, Prime Power end-users and a wide range of Critical, Prime and Standby power systems applications.

Since 2017, when Pleavin Power was first established in Merseyside by Jack Pleavin, our name has conveyed integrity, reliability and resourcefulness. Over the years, the company has grown as a result of a genuine commitment to earning customer loyalty and trust offering Generator Repairs, Generator Emergency Services, Reactive Response, Engine Refurbishment and Alternator Refurbishments.

With our broad product support infrastructure and unmatched service capabilities, we deliver services that enable customers to achieve the lowest operating costs while maximising uptime and minimising equipment downtime.

As a business we a proud to be-

•Committed to delivering service excellence across the UK and international markets.
•Provide passionate service to a diverse range of industrial markets, such as oil & gas, electric power, marine, industrial applications, and CHP operations.
•Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week through our Customer Support Centre wherever our customers are working at any time of day.

As well as offering a wide variety of specialist services-

• Dedicated Incident Support
• Dedicated Emergency Response 
• New & Used Equipment Sales 
• Generator Service & Maintenance 
• Control system manufacturing or upgrades 
• Generator Installations 
• Fuel Services 
• Generator Hire 
• Disaster Recovery
• UPS Hire, Sales, Maintenance & Installation 

For more information or to find out more about the services we offer please visit our website or get in touch with a member of our awesome team using the details below: 

24/7 Nationwide Support Line +44(0)800 689 4803
Location: Nationwide Coverage Throughout The United Kingdom

Name: Verso Energy
Description: Verso Energy est spécialisée dans le développement, l’ingénierie, le financement, la construction et l’exploitation d’installations de production d’énergies renouvelables pilotables, d’installations de stockage d’électricité pour la fourniture de services aux réseaux électriques, et d’installations de production d’hydrogène décarboné et de molécules de synthèse (e-methanol, e-SAF).

Name: STE Energy
Description:
With more than two hundred systems implemented over the past years in Italy and abroad, and with its branch offices located in various countries, STE Energy today is a major contractor in the field of Renewables Energy and Electricity Infrastructures.

STE Energy was established in 1995 in Padua, Italy. It develops, designs, builds and manages energy production plants, especially hydroelectric, solar and wind as a general contractor. It also builds hydrogen power-to-power (P2P) and power-to-gas (P2G) hydrogen systems and BESS (Battery Energy Storage Systems) all around the world.

Thanks to collaboration with important research centres and partnerships with leading global suppliers, STE energy is able to carry out the engineering for preliminary and final projects, water pipes and electromechanical works, to build civil engineering projects and to build, assemble, and to start up plants and systems, while ensuring quality, performance and especially efficiency.

Since June 2025, STE Energy has been acquired by 𝐀𝐥𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐚, becoming part of the 𝐓𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚 𝐄𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐠𝐲 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 world, bringing experience and innovation to the Group.

Description: BC Energia is formed by a group of companies focused on the electricity sector: BC Renováveis: energy generation through renewable sources, offering products and services that bring savings and environmental preservation. A pioneering company in the generation of energy aimed at the commercial and corporate segments in the model of micro and mini distributed generation. Name: PT Indo Raya Tenaga
Description:
The Benchmark and Showcase of Indonesia’s first and only USC+SCR Power Plant

As part of the national strategic program of 35,000 MW by the Indonesian government, the Jawa 9&10 Coal Fired Steam Power Plant project is deploying OECD-made 2x1000MW ‘most efficient Steam Turbine Generator’ and ‘latest generation Ultra-Super Critical (USC) Boiler with Selective Catalytic Reduction (SCR)’ technology to be combined with the most complete emission control equipment ever implemented by any power plant in Indonesia. The Jawa 9 &10 project is delivering efficient, reliable and environmentally responsible base-load electricity supply to PLN for industries, businesses, and residences throughout Java and Bali.

Indo Raya Tenaga, as the developer of the Jawa 9 & 10 project, aims to excel beyond stakeholders’ expectation to become developer and operator of choice, and to be the benchmark and showcase for being the best in every aspect of a large scale IPP in Indonesia. We are Indonesia’s lowest emission USC+SCR Power Plant operator and we are implementing (and ready to embark with PLN on) net zero transition initiatives.

Name: ACOLGEN
Description:
La Asociación Colombiana de Generadores de Energía Eléctrica (Acolgen) es una organización gremial privada, sin ánimo de lucro, ajena a cuestiones de orden político, creada con el objeto de promover la libre y sana competencia y el desarrollo sostenible y económicamente eficiente del mercado eléctrico colombiano, en particular de la actividad de generación eléctrica.En la actualidad, estamos conformados por 14 empresas de generación de energía eléctrica que representan aproximadamente el 85% de la capacidad efectiva neta de generación en Colombia.


The Colombian Electric Power Generation Association - ACOLGEN, is a private, non-profit, non-political advocacy Association that represents nearly 85% of the total installed capacity of electric power generation in Colombia. The organization aims to promote free and fair competition and the sustainable and efficient development of the Colombian electricity market, through active participation in the design of regulatory frameworks and public policies.

Name: TDM Service & Solutions
Description:
We have been in the market for over 20 years serving the main industrial and commercial markets, gaining prominent positions in the segments of Engineering, Commissioning of Substations, Service and Maintenance in Transformers and Protection and Control.

VISION - What do we want to achieve?

To be a reference in Services in Transformers in Latin America and consolidate its expansion in other segments of the sector.

Name: Elements
Description:
Elements produit de l'électricité verte à partir de centrales photovoltaïques, éoliennes et hydro avec pour ambition de synchroniser la consommation des territoires avec leur mix de production EnR. 

La particularité d’ELEMENTS est de développer des projets ancrés aux territoires, avec une orientation forte sur le participatif / la concertation citoyenne et l’intégration des partenaires dans les projets. 

Les valeurs de la société sont orientées vers cette approche collaborative des projets et des hommes.

Name: Sunprime
Description: Sunprime è un Independent Power Producer nel settore fotovoltaico in rapida crescita con sede a Milano. Sunprime è market leader nel segmento del mercato fotovoltaico italiano C&I (Commercial & Industrial), BESS (Battery Energy Storage Systems) ed EV chargers, con una importante pipeline di progetti ed ambiziosi piani di investimento. Con oltre 280 MW di impianti fotovoltaici, a terra e su coperture, realizzati in Italia ed oltre 150MW in costruzione e’ tra i principali operatori del settore in Italia.

Name: GridStor
Description:
GridStor develops, constructs, and operates battery energy storage projects that improve grid reliability and power economic growth across North America. Backed by Goldman Sachs Asset Management, GridStor today manages a pipeline of over 3 GW of battery storage projects in later-stage development, active construction, and commercial operations. We work as one team, share learnings across functions, and outperform in how we deliver, optimize, and operate. Our reliability earns trust with customers, partners, and investors—and sets us apart.

GridStor is headquartered in Portland, Oregon, with regional offices in Denver, Colorado and Los Angeles, California.

Name: WaterPower Canada | Hydroélectricité Canada
Description:
WaterPower Canada (WPC) is the national voice of Canada’s waterpower industry. As a not-for-profit trade association, WPC represents members across the sector, including hydropower producers, manufacturers, and developers, who collectively account for over 95% of Canada’s waterpower capacity, advocating for the sustainable development and use of waterpower to meet Canada’s current and future energy needs.  

Subscribe to our newsletter: http://eepurl.com/hvOaTL
Become a member: https://waterpowercanada.ca/membership/
Learn more at waterpowercanada.ca

Hydroélectricité Canada (HC) est l’association nationale qui représente l’industrie hydroélectrique canadienne. En tant qu’association à but non lucratif, HC regroupe des membres de l’ensemble du secteur, y compris des producteurs d’hydroélectricité, des fabricants d’équipements et des développeurs qui représentent collectivement plus de 95 % de la capacité hydroélectrique du Canada. À ce titre, l’association promeut le développement durable et le recours à l’hydroélectricité pour répondre aux besoins énergétiques actuels et futurs du Canada. 

Inscrivez-vous à notre infolettre: http://eepurl.com/hvOYTj
Devenez membre et informez-vous sur hydroelectricitecanada.ca

Name: KS Orka Renewables Pte. Ltd.
Description:
KS Orka Renewables is one of the most ambitious geothermal developers in the world. The projects are led by geothermal and power project developer experts with over 30 years of experience in some of the world's most significant geothermal development projects. 
 
We aim to deliver geothermal power in a clean, safe and responsible way for the benefit of the all individuals by applying KS Orka's inovative incremental business model and technology to develop and accelerate geothermal power projects, with a target of producing up to 1,000MW by 2026. 

Visit our website www.ksorka.com to learn more about KS Orka.

Name: GeoPura
Description:
GeoPura has a totally zero emissions answer to how we’re going to generate and distribute the vast amount of energy required to decarbonise our global economies.

Generating 100% emissions free energy, independently from the grid, is essential to supporting a rapid transition away from fossil fuels. Off grid, renewable energy generation will pave the way to decarbonising transportation, construction and the events industry.

Through harnessing the power of hydrogen, GeoPura delivers 100% renewable off grid energy when and where it’s needed.

Name: BIOVEA Energie
Description: Le projet porté par BIOVEA Energie consiste en la conception, la construction et l’exploitation pendant 25 ans d’une centrale à biomasse, qui produira de l’électricité vendue à l’Etat de Côte d’Ivoire. Celle-ci sera située à Ayebo dans la commune d’Aboisso, à 100km à l’Est d’Abidjan et produira 336 GWh par an, soit l’équivalent de la consommation annuelle de 1,7 million d’habitants en Côte d’Ivoire.

Name: Geothermal Development Company - CeraPhi Energy
Description:
CeraPhi Energy is a leading project development company delivering global geothermal energy solutions at scale.

Our patented CeraPhiWell system unlocks deep geothermal energy through both repurposed oil and gas wells and newly drilled wells, supported by our in-house drilling experts. This approach reduces project risk, shortens delivery times, and ensures cost-effective access to reliable, sustainable heat.

We provide practical, future-ready solutions for the decarbonisation of heat across a wide range of sectors—including NHS facilities, universities, leisure centres, industrial estates, large housing developments and agriculture.

CeraPhi enables long-term, base-load heat delivery that supports district heating, low-carbon infrastructure planning, and sustainable estate management—helping organisations meet climate targets while maintaining operational resilience and fluctuating energy costs.

CeraPhi Energy delivers reliable, available, baseload thermal energy anywhere, everywhere.

Contact us to explore how our proven system can support your net-zero journey.

Name: SEPCOIII 1230 MW CCPP Haveli Bahadur Shah, Pakistan
Description:
SEPCO3 (Shandong Electric Power Construction Corporation III or SEPCO III)  is a Chinese construction and engineering company working globally and providing construction, engineering and operations & maintenance services in energy sector in Egypt, Indonesia, Jordan, Nigeria, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Iraq, Myanmar, Singapore  and Pakistan. 
In Pakistan SEPCOIII is performing Operation & Maintenance of one of the most efficient plant, with a total production capacity of 1230MW, fueled by liquefied natural gas. The plant is estimated to provide to supply electricity of 2.5 million Pakistani homes. World’s most efficient and state of the art technology has been used in this plant which guarantees efficiency of the plant at 62.4% on LNG.

Name: PT Datang DSSP Power Indonesia
Description:
PT Datang DSSP Power Indonesia (DDPI) drive to improve the quality of the society's life by operating several power plants in Indonesia: PT DSSP Power Sumsel 2x150MW (IPP Sumsel-5 CFPP), PT DSSP Power Kendari 2x50MW (IPP Kendari-3 CFPP), and PT SKS Listrik Kalimantan 2x100MW (IPP Kalteng-1 CFPP).

PT Datang DSSP Power Indonesia never charges any fees and has no cooperation with any travel agency in the recruitment process. Beware of fraud on behalf of PT Datang DSSP Power Indonesia or its subsidiaries.

Name: Societatea Nationala Nuclearelectrica SA
Description:
Since July 27, 1998 "Nuclearelectrica" - SA is registered with the Register of Commerce, Chamber of Commerce and Industry, as a state owned company. SNN SA is reporting to the Ministry of Economy. The state owns 81,2700% of Nuclearelectrica's shares, Fondul Proprietatea - 9,7270% and other shareholders - 9.0030%.

The main activity fields of SNN SA are centered on the generation of electrical and thermal power, and manufacturing of nuclear fuel. SNN SA also coordinates the investment-development activities as well as the human resources training and optimization.

SN Nuclearelectrica SA has two branches, no legal person:
- Cernavoda NPP Division operating Cernavoda NPP Units 1 and 2 and the auxiliary services and performing the preservation of Unit 3, 4 & 5 until completion and commissioning;
- FCN - Pitesti, the Nuclear Fuel Plant - manufacturing nuclear fuel for Cernavoda NPP Units 1 & 2

Name: Burmeister & Wain Energy
Description: BWE Biomass Boilers (BWE) meets the market demand through development, design, construction and commissioning of high efficiency advanced utility and biomass steam boilers to the energy industry. Based on over 180 years of experience in biomass, the boilers represent the best-available-technology (BAT) in the market through proprietary designs, which include own boiler, grate and fuel feeding technology as well as deep knowledge of flue gas technology . The Business has a particular strong track-record and solution offering for utility companies, independent power producers (IPP) and industrial customers, primarily targeting the segment ranging from 20-150 MWth. Market-leading position within agricultural biomass, where BWE sees significant market potential, particularly in developing markets.

Name: ÉS
Description:
Chez ÉS, nous développons nos activités pour offrir à l’Alsace un futur énergétique décarboné. Avec notre production d’énergie renouvelable locale, la distribution et fourniture d’énergie intégrant une part croissante d’énergie renouvelable et la recherche de performance énergétique des installations pour nos clients, nous contribuons à faire de l’Alsace un territoire énergétique d’avenir. Nous conseillons et accompagnons nos clients en proposant une approche énergétique innovante pour répondre aux enjeux de la transition énergétique du territoire. Nous avons inscrit durablement la responsabilité et la confiance au cœur de notre relation avec nos clients et partenaires du territoire alsacien. La satisfaction client est notre priorité, chaque collaborateur s'engage à 100 % au quotidien pour délivrer le meilleur service.
En 2024, ÉS est devenue société à mission ets’engage ainsi à renforcer l'impact positif deses activitéssur le territoire alsacien.

Name: JERA Americas
Description: JERA Americas is supporting an energy transition in an environmentally and socially responsible manner. JERA has committed to achieving net zero CO2 emissions from its businesses by 2050 and is contributing to the development of a sustainable society.
