Name: LCS LINK ENGENHARIA LTDA
Description:
Mais do que uma provedora de soluções em Sistemas de Automação e Elétrica, somos uma empresa focada em atender, de forma completa, as necessidades e demandas de nossos clientes nos segmentos: Geração de Energia, Transmissão de Energia e Missão Critica.

SERVIÇOS
Executamos desde o estudo de viabilidade até a manutenção dos sistemas implementados. Contando com uma equipe altamente qualificada, desenvolvemos também soluções próprias de automação para o monitoramento da mão de obra do cliente. Dessa forma, garantimos a segurança do processo, minimizando a possibilidade de falha humana.

MERCADOS
Atendemos hoje a grande maioria dos key players nos segmentos de Geração, Transmissão e Missão Crítica no Brasil e exterior. Não por coincidência, nos consolidamos como parceiros nas três áreas onde o fornecimento ininterrupto e confiável de energia é fator crucial para a manutenção de negócios e vidas.

SOLUÇÕES
Importantes empresas dos mais variados setores dos cenários nacional e internacional utilizam e atestam a eficiência e confiabilidade de nossas soluções.
Desenvolvemos soluções técnicas e estruturais para atender demandas específicas de áreas como: CENTRAIS DE GERAÇÃO, CENTROS DE CONTROLE, EFICIÊNCIA ENERGÉTICA, FIBRA ÓTICA E SUBESTAÇÕES.

Name: Inkia Energy
Description: Somos una gestora de portafolio dedicada a potenciar soluciones energéticas innovadoras y sostenibles para desarrollar cada casa, empresa, ciudad y país.

Name: Leader Energy
Description:
Leader Energy Group Berhad (“Leader Energy”) is a 100% renewable energy developer with over 30 years of experience delivering clean and reliable power across Asia.

We own and operate renewable energy assets in solar, hydro, wind, and battery energy storage systems (BESS), as well as transmission infrastructure that strengthens access and reliability across 7 markets in Asia.

Guided by our Aspiration — RE-Energising a tomorrow where renewable energy uplifts lives and economies — and our Purpose — to deliver sustainable energy that betters society and environment — we are committed to achieving net zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2030.

Leader Energy: Forging a greener path forward with renewables.

Name: Ecogy Energy
Description: Ecogy’s platform provides renewable energy solutions that are distributed, de-carbonized, digitized, and democratized to commercial and industrial customers across historically underserved entities. We specialize in custom renewable energy systems, energy management and efficiency, and energy storage solutions that reduce costs and carbon footprints. Join us in creating a more sustainable and accessible clean energy future.

Name: Boven Energia
Description:
A Federal Energia agora é BOVEN, com a mesma energia!

A BOVEN é uma comercializadora de energia autorizada através da Despacho Nº 478 da ANEEL - Agência Nacional de Energia Elétrica, devidamente inscrita como agente da CCEE - Câmara de Comercialização de Energia Elétrica.

O principal motor da BOVEN tem sido a completa integração dos princípios do desenvolvimento sustentável e eficiente assegurando que os objetivos econômicos e ambientais são levados em conta.

Name: Qair France - Qair Group
Description:
Qair est un énergéticien indépendant du renouvelable qui développe, finance, construit et exploite des projets solaires, éoliens terrestres et en mer, hydroélectriques, hydroliens, de valorisation de déchets, de stockage et de production d’hydrogène renouvelable. 

Avec 1,7 GW de capacité en opération ou construction, les 780 collaborateurs du groupe développent un pipeline de 34 GW dans 20 pays à travers l’Europe, l’Amérique Latine et l’Afrique. Notre ambition est de devenir un leader indépendant de l’énergie responsable.

Name: PNG Power Ltd
Description:
PNG Power is a fully integrated power authority responsible for Generation, Transmission, Distribution and Retailing of Electricity throughout Papua New Guinea. 

PNG Power Limited (Company No 1-44680) was corporatised under Section 3 (1) of the Electricity Commission (Privatisation) Act 2002 as the successor company to the Papua New Guinea Electricity Commission (ELCOM). 

All of ELCOM’s assets, liabilities, rights, titles and personnel were transferred to PNG Power.

PNG Power services customers in almost all urban centres throughout the country covering industrial, commercial, government and domestic sectors. Where possible, the services extend to rural communities adjacent to these urban centres.

PPL is also undertaking a regulatory role on behalf of the Independent Consumer Competition Commission (ICCC. These responsibilities include approving licenses for electrical contractors, providing certification for models of electrical equipment and appliances to be sold in the country and providing safety advisory services and checks for major installations.

PNG Power is a State Owned Entity (SOE). The Kumul Consolidated Holdings Limited (KCHL) holds the shares for corporatised state entities as trustee of the General Business trust. 

KCHL acts as the sole shareholder on behalf of the Government. The Minister for Public Enterprise & State Investments appoints a Board who report to KCH. PNG Power through the Board provides regular financial and operational reports and a Five-Year Business Plan to KCH on an annual basis.

The PPL Board consists of seven (7) Directors appointed through the National Executive Council (NEC). The Directors come from a diverse professional background whose task is to make policy decisions for the operations of PNG Power.

Name: WinPower, S.A.
Description:
WinPower is an engineering company with more than 30 years of experience in the energy sector, and references of power generation projects in Europe, Africa, and America.

As a global energy transition partner, WinPower provides engineering services and solutions for the different stages of energy project development, from the design, consulting, development, implementation, and O&M services.

As the world is shifting towards a sustainable and lower carbon future, WinPower thinks, shapes, and creates new energy systems being part of the global decarbonization and the green economy.

We are driven through our clients’ satisfaction, growth, and progression, anticipating their needs by ongoing investment in new engineering solutions and innovation.

Name: Renecore Energy
Description:
Renecore Energy is a renewable energy investor, developing, building and operating sustainable, clean and renewable energy infrastructure and services by providing and investing in innovative and reliable solutions. 

Renecore Energy is part of “Tay Group”, a multinational industrial group of companies operating in textile, hospitality and real estate development since 1970’s. 

The group’s ability to develop and operate large industrial complexes and to manage international partnerships across MENA and Europe is the main driver of Renecore Energy Investments. 

Renecore Energy's focus is to acquire, develop and invest in renewable projects in Türkiye, North Africa, Europe and in other international markets as well as investing in emerging clean energy technologies to become a respected renewable power generation and technology company.

Name: Lureye Chile
Description: Por más de siete décadas, Lureye ha estado aportando con soluciones tecnológicas y de suministro de energía al sector productivo nacional.

Name: Alsons Power Group
Description:
The Alsons Power Group is Mindanao’s first and most experienced private sector power generator. Alsons Power is the umbrella brand that groups together all the power business affiliates of the Alcantara Group and Alsons Consolidated Resources, Inc.
Alsons Power has a portfolio of four power facilities with an aggregate capacity of 468 mega-watts (MW) serving over eight million people in 14 cities and 11 provinces in Mindanao.
These power facilities are: the 103 MW Mapalad Power Corporation (MPC)diesel plant in Iligan City; the Southern Philippines Power Corporation’s (SPPC) 55 MW diesel plant in Alabel, Sarangani Province; the Western Mindanao Power Corporation’s (WMPC) 100 MW diesel plant in Zamboanga City; and the 210 MW Sarangani Energy Corporation (SEC) baseload coal-fired power plant in Maasim, Sarangani Province.
For the long-term the company is slated to focus on renewables with the company’s first renewable energy facility- the ₱4.5 billion 14.5 MW hydroelectric power plant currently under construction at the Siguil River basin in Sarangani Province. The Siguil Hydro Power plant will be the first of eight hydropower facilities that Alsons Power plans to develop.

Name: Ecoener
Description:
Ecoener es una multinacional española especializada en energía renovables, con 37 años de experiencia en el desarrollo de proyectos que buscan una perfecta integración ambiental y social y generar un impacto positivo en las comunidades. 

Desde un enfoque industrial, controla todas las fases del negocio desde la promoción y diseño a la construcción y gestión de centrales hidroeléctricas, parques eólicos y plantas solares fotovoltaicas, así como proyectos de almacenamiento. Con sede en La Coruña (España), tiene presencia en doce países de Europa y América a través de sus proyectos en operación y construcción y las oficinas de desarrollo de negocio.

Ecoener is a Spanish multinational specialising in renewable energy. With 37 years of experience, Ecoener develops projects that seek perfect environmental and social integration, as well as a positive impact on communities

From an industrial approach, it controls all phases of the business from promotion and design to construction and management of hydroelectric power plants, wind farms and solar photovoltaic plants, as well as storage projects. 

Headquartered in La Coruña (Spain), Ecoener has a presence in twelve countries in Europe and America through its operating and construction projects and business development offices.

Name: Alternergy Holdings Corporation
Description: Alternergy is a Philippine pioneer in renewable energy. With a proven track record of developing, building, and operating groundbreaking renewable power projects in the country, we strive to create a more sustainable future for the next generation. Alternergy takes a Quadruple Bottom Line approach that prioritizes profitability, carbon reduction, host community benefits, and employee fulfillment.

Name: FRI-EL GREEN POWER S.P.A.
Description:
BENVENUTI NEL FUTURO DELL’ENERGIA!
Siamo un’azienda leader in Italia nel settore della produzione e vendita di energia elettrica da fonti rinnovabili, un partner competente, affidabile ed orientato al futuro.

Cuore pulsante delle nostre attività é Bolzano, città al centro delle Alpi, dove é situata la nostra sede amministrativa. Da diversi secoli l’uso sostenibile e rispettoso delle risorse naturali ha rappresentato per gli abitanti del luogo un vero e proprio stile di vita e per la nostra azienda una vocazione.

Questo principio è ancora oggi parte integrante dello stile di vita e della mentalità di chi abita e lavora in questa zona. Abbiamo adottato ed assimilato questi valori grazie ai quali vogliamo dirigerci verso un nuovo futuro.

Name: Clean Energy Association of British Columbia (CEBC)
Description:
For over 30 years, the Clean Energy Association of British Columbia (CEBC) has been the leading voice of BC’s clean energy sector, advocating for policies and partnerships that promote an affordable, safe, and equitable clean energy future. CEBC represents diverse members, including clean energy developers, First Nations, service providers, academic institutions, students, and more – all of whom contribute to the growth of BC’s clean energy sector.

CEBC plays a pivotal role in fostering collaboration between industry, government, and First Nations, with a strong focus on economic reconciliation and Indigenous self-determination. We champion projects that not only benefit local economies and the environment, but also accelerate the province’s transition to a low-carbon future.

Name: TEBSA
Description: TEBSA es la empresa que opera la planta de generación térmica más grande de Colombia, con una capacidad efectiva neta de 918 MW que cubre cerca del 12% de la demanda de energía nacional y del 45% de la demanda del Caribe. Ubicado a orillas del río Magdalena, departamento del Atlántico, municipio de Soledad. Soporte del sistema eléctrico con su aporte en energía firme respaldado con gas natural, que enmarca a TEBSA como un agente confiable y eficiente.

Name: Enercal
Description:
Enercal, entreprise calédonienne d'énergie au service du développement durable du pays.

Enercal est la seule société calédonienne qui intervient sur les trois métiers du domaine de l’électricité :
* La production : Enercal produit 80% de l’électricité consommée en Nouvelle-Calédonie dont 75% de celle produite à partir d’énergie renouvelables,
* Le transport et la gestion du système électrique : Enercal achemine l’électricité des centres de production aux portes des communes et assure l’équilibre en temps réel entre la production et la consommation,
* La Distribution : 25 communes sur 33 et la zone aéroportuaire de Tontouta ont choisi Enercal comme concessionnaire de leur distribution d’électricité. Enercal livre l’électricité aux particuliers et professionnels desdites communes et assure la relation avec le concédant et les clients finals.

Enercal est l’entreprise du pays qui porte le système électrique et doit rendre possible la transition énergétique en Nouvelle Calédonie.

Enercal est composé de 430 agents.

Enercal bénéficie de l’appui d’EDF, 1er électricien mondial, et a ainsi accès de manière privilégié au conseil, à l’expertise technique, à la formation continue professionnelle, à l’assistance juridique et à l’innovation technologique d’un groupe mondial présent sur plusieurs continents.

Construisons notre pays, économisons l'énergie.

Name: Mesa Power Solutions
Description: We are a leading energy services provider specializing in the engineering, manufacturing, sales, leasing, and operations of cutting-edge power technology including natural gas and liquid propane-powered generator sets and microgrids. Mesa’s best-in-class power solutions enable customers to reduce their energy costs and capital expenditures as well as increase reliability and operational up-time, all while lowering emissions and decreasing their carbon footprint. Mesa currently operates across the globe with headquarters and multiple satellite locations in the United States. Today, Mesa provides sustainable power generation for commercial and industrial prime power, microgrids, standby power, and a variety of other global applications.

Name: Refoenergy Villanueva
Description: Refoenergy Villanueva is a subsidiary of EDF Colombia & Refocosta dedicated to the development, construction and operation of a 27.7 MW biomass power plant in Villanueva, Casanare, Colombia.

Name: Shenton Group
Description:
The UK's leading Technical Experts in Standby Power, Uninterruptible Power Supplies and Combined Heat & Power Systems.

We design, supply, install, rent and maintain standby power generators, combined heat and power systems (CHP systems) and uninterruptible power supply systems (UPS systems).

We keep companies – of all sizes, across every industry and in any UK location, no matter how remote – fully functioning in the face of mains power failure or the ongoing absence of available mains power.

As a family-owned and family-run business we apply the best principles of corporate business, yet ensure we maintain everything a family business can offer – genuine, caring customer relationships and pride in our work. Hundreds of industry leading brands and organisations have put their trust in what we do and how we do it. 

Celebrating over 40 years in business, we’re proud to say that our standby power solutions have provided countless clients with continuous power which hasn’t just saved businesses their livelihoods, data and reputation, but has saved lives.

Our national network of service depots, refuelling stations and engineers guarantee 24/7 fast access to installations anywhere in the UK.

The nerve centre of Shenton Group operations is Shenton House in Andover. It’s from here we support our nationwide depots and network of power generator engineers. Our 24/7 emergency call-out desk is based here, monitoring national news and power supplies and offering our clients reassurance, technical support and engineer dispatch.

Name: Energia Pecém
Description:
Somos uma usina termelétrica localizada no Complexo Industrial e Portuário do Pecém, no município de São Gonçalo do Amarante, Ceará - Brasil.

Nossa capacidade total é de 720MW, o que representa aproximadamente a metade da capacidade geradora do Estado do Ceará. Essa importante condição faz de nossa usina um pilar estratégico no desenvolvimento energético sustentável do Brasil.

A operação da usina termelétrica não apenas garante uma fonte segura de energia para milhões de brasileiros, mas também marca a transformação do Ceará de um estado importador para um exportador de energia. Temos orgulho de contribuir significativamente para o aumento da produção de energia, reforçando a posição do Ceará no cenário energético brasileiro.
Com pioneirismo, inovação e uma visão para o futuro, nossa missão é gerar energia elétrica de forma responsável, apoiando o crescimento do Ceará, do Nordeste e do Brasil através do Sistema Interligado Nacional.

Desde 2012, investimos mais de R$ 70 milhões em pesquisas e desenvolvimento para, além da oferta de energia confiável, sermos uma referência em inovação na conversão energética justa e sustentável.

Name: Power Systems Mfg., LLC, a Hanwha company
Description:
Since 1999, PSM has evolved from a leading supplier of technologically advanced aftermarket parts to a comprehensive multi-OEM gas turbine services provider providing our service capabilities worldwide.

Owned by Hanwha General Chemical, part of the Hanwha Group, PSM is joined in these efforts with our sister company Thomassen Energy, and together we form the core of our parent company’s gas turbine service group.

Our innovative spirit, supported by our growing and diverse technology patent portfolio, can be seen in our evolving product and service solution portfolio. Our value-based solutions offer paradigm-shifting capabilities to meet our customers’ business needs, including upgrades and enhancements for efficiency, operational flexibility, enhanced reliability and optimized life-cycle maintenance costs.  We are immensely proud to offer advanced technology combustion system platform retrofits for the vast majority of the installed fleet of gas turbines worldwide, which offer ultra-low emissions and the ability to co-fire with renewable gases such as hydrogen, an increasingly necessary requirement for gas turbines to remain viable and become an integral part of the emerging decarbonized power grid.

Our customer focus, speed-to-market, transparency and ability to quickly cross-pollinate successful concepts to multiple OEM platforms differentiates us from every other independent OEM power plant service provider in the world. PSM welcomes you, whether as a customer, employee or supplier, and invites you to join us as a partner on our continuous journey as the premier global service leader in the gas turbine market.

Name: Saeta Yield
Description: Saeta Yield is an energy company headquartered in Madrid, Spain, that manages an energy portfolio of 601 MW of wind and PV solar energy in Spain and 144 MW in Portugal.

Name: V-Green Indonesia
Description: V-Green Indonesia is a company developing a global electric vehicle charging network by building charging stations and also providing a comprehensive software solution by integrating charging stations from partners onto the platform.

Name: GreenFire Energy Inc
Description:
About GreenFire Energy
GreenFire Energy delivers advanced geothermal solutions designed to maximize the productivity of underutilized geothermal fields, expand operational capacity, and unlock the potential of new geothermal sites. Focused on providing continuous, resilient, and scalable baseload power, GreenFire’s innovative systems address today’s urgent need for energy assurance in a sustainable manner. By revitalizing existing geothermal assets and partnering with industry leaders like Baker Hughes, H&P, Vallourec, and top geothermal producers, GreenFire is committed to pioneering the geothermal sector’s role in the global energy transition. With 22 international patents and a mission to make geothermal energy accessible and impactful, GreenFire Energy is redefining renewable power for the industries that need it most.

Name: Ghaddar Machinery Co.
Description:
GHADDAR Machinery Co. specializes in the field of electrical Generating Sets, Power Solutions and all types of Sound and Weather Proofs. 

The company produces its own Generating Sets branded “GHADDAR Powertech”. It is a combination of the highly renowned KUBOTA, John Deere & Cummins engines with LEROY SOMER alternators. 

GHADDAR Machinery Co. also develops and executes customized projects:
- Complete solutions for power control and all ranges of sound and weather proofs.
- Special electrical generating sets with low & medium voltage up to 11 KV.
- Turn key projects with complete installation requirements.
- Hybrid Power Solutions

Name: CELEC EP
Description: Power generation and transmission, comprised of multiple business units across the Ecuadorian territory (mainland and insular).

Name: Africa Power Services
Description:
Energy is essential to the success of every project.

At Africa Power Services, we accept your energy challenges by developing ever more efficient and responsible solutions.

You will find the resources and experience to support you in your power plant construction and operation projects throughout Africa.

- Engineering Procurement and Construction - turnkey: design, procurement, construction, and commissioning of power plants Thermal gas or heavy fuel oil power plants, solar/battery power plants, hybridization optimizing costs and environmental impact.
- Full operation and maintenance contracts, overhauls, and performance monitoring
- Supply of spare parts, technical assistance
- Performance optimization
- Full-service rental of power plants (for a few months or for several years). 

With over 20 years of experience and numerous achievements in West Africa, Africa Power Services' teams understand the needs and specificities of mining clients, power companies, and IPPs. They understand the challenges of operation and maintenance, and know how to combine and implement high-performance technologies throughout the life cycle of installations and projects.

Name: Motive Energy
Description:
Motive Energy transforms how businesses source, store, convert, move, and manage their energy through end-to-end solutions that empower customers to take control of their energy.

Motive Energy is not only the largest supplier in the material handling industry, but we also provide solar, energy storage, energy management, and EV charging solutions to help our customers take end-to-end control of their energy.

We pride ourselves on turnkey services, forward-thinking technologies, and our emphasis on sustainability and safety. From recycling initiatives to helping businesses tap into renewable energy sources, our solutions safely meet our clients’ needs, reduce costs, and maximize sustainability.

Name: Lunsemfwa Hydro Power Company Limited
Description: Lunsemfwa Hydro Power Company Limited is a Hydro Electric Power Company based in Kabwe Zambia

Name: Oxe Energia
Description:
A OXE Energia é responsável pela operação de 4 usinas termoelétricas, à biomassa de madeira reflorestada, nos arredores de Boa Vista, Roraima. 

O objetivo principal deste empreendimento é aumentar a diversificação de suprimento de fontes energéticas em Roraima e região norte do Brasil, atendendo à evolução do número de consumidores de energia elétrica. 

Ademais, ao priorizar o uso de uma fonte renovável de matéria prima, será disponibilizado à região uma energia barata, eficiente e sustentável.

Name: Philippine Geothermal Production Company, Inc. (PGPC)
Description: The Philippine Geothermal Production Company, Inc. (PGPC) is a 100% Filipino corporation operating the Tiwi and Mak-Ban geothermal steam fields and is committed to operating in a manner that puts premium on the safety, security and well-being of its employees, the environment, and its host communities. PGPC is also committed to harness our country’s geothermal resources in a sustainable and efficient manner to provide clean, reliable, and renewable geothermal energy.

Name: EDF PEI
Description:
EDF PEI - Production Electrique Insulaire -est un acteur majeur de la production d’électricité dans les zones non-interconnectées. 

Nous sommes une filiale à 100 % d’EDF SA qui construit et exploite des moyens de production d’électricité dans les départements et régions d’outre-mer et en Corse. 

Nous accompagnons la transition énergétique des territoires insulaires grâce à notre projet de conversion à la biomasse liquide de nos centrales électriques situées dans les départements et régions d’Outre-Mer, et grâce à la construction de notre futur site de production guyanais qui fonctionnera avec cette énergie renouvelable.

Notre cœur de métier est la production d’électricité dans les zones insulaires avec la maîtrise de l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur : du développement de projets, de la maîtrise d’ouvrages de construction, à la mise en service industrielle et à l’exploitation de nos centrales. Notre savoir-faire est spécifique aux systèmes électriques non-interconnectés.

Nous exploitons quatre centrales de production d’électricité : à Lucciana en Corse, Port Est à La Réunion, Pointe Jarry en Guadeloupe et Bellefontaine en Martinique et avons deux projets de construction en Corse et en Guyane. 

Nous exploitons également des installations EnR photovoltaïques (Montjoly en Guyane) et éoliennes (Gress à la Martinique) et développons de tels projets avec une autre filiale du Groupe, EDF Renouvelables.

Name: Independent Power Producers Association of India (IPPAI)
Description:
IPPAI was set up as a not-for-profit association shortly after the Government of India opened the power sector to private industry. Since its inception as an independent body, IPPAI’s aim has been to provide a neutral platform for the examination of issues critical to the development of the power sector in India, to discuss energy policy and to focus on strategic, financial, legal, regulatory and technical issues in the power, oil, gas and allied sectors, with a prime focus on independent power producers. 

As we initiate dialogues within the power sector incorporating environmental and socio-ecological concerns in our deliberations, we look at strategies which are more holistic and do not prescribe economic growth at the cost of the environment. Moving ahead, we are keen to bring a sustainable approach in our policies.
 
At the core of IPPAI initiatives are its industry-acclaimed conferences that focus on policy, strategic, financial, legal, regulatory and technical issues in the power, oil, gas and allied sectors. IPPAI’s expertise and focused discussions ensure consistently relevant programmes with high-profile experts and erudite speakers who address issues of direct relevance to the energy needs of today. 

IPPAI’s opinions and knowledge are sought by international think-tanks and media and featured on BBC, Reuters, CNN, Far Eastern Review, Wall Street Journal, The Economist, NDTV and ZEE among others. 

IPPAI obtains knowledge through research, interactions with experts, industry heads, regulators, policymakers, government officials, academicians, and consumer groups.

Name: Greenwood Energy
Description:
Greenwood Energy se dedicada a desarrollar, financiar, construir y operar plantas de generación eléctrica en América Latina, entregando una energía confiable y competitiva a nuestros clientes mediante proyectos de Generación Distribuida y conectados al Sistema Interconectado Nacional: Solar | Biomasa | Biogás | Cogeneración | Gas Natural | Almacenamiento de Energía | Microgrids.

Empresa subsidiaria de Libra Group.
______________________________________________

    Greenwood Energy is dedicated to developing, financing, constructing and operating power plants in Latin America, delivering a reliable and competitive energy to our clients through Distributed Generation and Utility-Scale projects: PV | Biomass | Biogas | CHP | NatGas | ESS | Microgrids.

Subsidiary company of Libra Group.

Name: Jakson International Ltd.
Description: Jakson International Ltd. is the Bangladesh Business Unit of the Jakson Group. JIL is the sole authorized distributor of Cummins Power Generation, Cummins Generation Technologies, Cummins Marine, Hyster Material Handling Equipment, and Valvoline Lubricating Oil in Bangladesh.

Name: Clean Energy Association of BC (CEBC)
Description:
For over 30 years, the Clean Energy Association of British Columbia (CEBC) has been the leading voice of BC’s clean energy sector, advocating for policies and partnerships that promote an affordable, safe, and equitable clean energy future. CEBC represents diverse members, including clean energy developers, First Nations, service providers, academic institutions, students, and more – all of whom contribute to the growth of BC’s clean energy sector.

CEBC plays a pivotal role in fostering collaboration between industry, government, and First Nations, with a strong focus on economic reconciliation and Indigenous self-determination. We champion projects that not only benefit local economies and the environment, but also accelerate the province’s transition to a low-carbon future.

Name: Grupo Lago Escondido
Description:
29 años de producción en perfecto equilibrio con la naturaleza. Lago Escondido, Río Negro, 
Con nuestras acciones y proyectos nos convertimos en una Empresa referente en la Patagonia Argentina. 

Nos especializamos en diferentes actividades sustentables y con un fuerte compromiso social empresarial. Contamos con la experiencia y el oficio de nuestro equipo para ofrecer servicios de excelencia a todas aquellas empresas y emprendimientos que buscan nuestro mismo estándar de calidad. 

Nuestro espíritu innovador y emprendedor nos lleva a proyectar todos los días.

Name: İSKEN İskenderun Enerji Üretim ve Ticaret A.Ş.
Description:
İSKEN Sugözü Power Plant is one of the biggest international investments in our country and an important socio-economic factor in the Çukurova Region of Türkiye.
İSKEN Sugözü Power Plant (1308 MW installed capacity), which proves its reliability with its efficient design and high availability, meets approximately 3% of our country's electricity consumption (9 billion kWh/year) and is being operated in accordance with the international technical and environmental standards.
Within the scope of energy transformation, our Company has also started combined (hybrid) renewable electricity generation investments. Within this scope, a solar electricity generation plant ("SUGES I") with an installed capacity of 21.12 MWp was installed and commissioned. 35 MW installed capacity solar and/or wind power generation investment studies are also ongoing.
FEATURES
•	1308 MW Installed Capacity
•	High Quality Hard Coal Fuel + Renewable Energy
•	Contribution to Regional Economy
•	Reliable and Environmentally Friendly Electricity Generation
İSKEN is an OYAK company.

Name: Priority Power
Description:
Priority Power is an independent energy management services and consulting firm. We act as an extension of our client’s staff to develop and implement strategies that mitigate risk and overcome challenges associated with managing energy data, supply, demand, and delivery infrastructure. By leveraging our deep experience and resources, combined with unsurpassed commitment, Priority delivers financial and operational improvements to our clients as their trusted energy advisors.

Priority Power is an innovative provider of integrated energy services for commercial and industrial clients.

Name: Impacto Bioenergia Alagoas S/A
Description: We produce sugar, alcohol and energy. We believe in the search for efficiency in our products, not forgetting our greatest asset, people.

Name: Quantum Energía
Description: Quantum Energía es una empresa líder en el sector energético en México que opera un portafolio de 12 plantas de ciclo combinado y un parque eólico, con una capacidad instalada de ~8.5 GW.

Name: Reel
Description:
Reel is an electricity supplier and trader accelerating the energy transition.

We strengthen the impact, stability, and economic value of renewable energy for businesses and energy producers - helping it grow faster and reach further. Because the climate can’t wait.

We are a Certified B Corporation: our business practices have been certified on environmental, social, and governance standards, and verified by an independent third party.

Name: Equilibrium Energy
Description: Equilibrium Energy is building the operating system for tomorrow’s power company. Our AI-native PowerOS platform, powered by Connective Intelligence, breaks down data and system silos to unlock true portfolio optimization and integrated, enterprise-wide command. More than a technology provider, we stand side by side with power leaders to help accelerate innovation and amplify your team.

Name: Central Dock Sud S.A.
Description: Somos una empresa de generación de energía eléctrica radicada en Dock Sud, Avellaneda. Contamos con 928MW de capacidad instalada con la que generamoa energía eficiente y confiable para la zona del AMBA.

Name: Jaiprakash Power Ventures Ltd
Description:
We are an Indian power company, incorporated on Dec 21, 1994, that is part of India’s leading Infrastructure conglomerate - Jaypee Group. We plan, develop, implement and operate power projects in India. We currently operate the largest hydroelectric power plant in the private sector in India.
Jaiprakash Power Ventures Ltd. is in Power Generation/Distribution. It was incorporated in year 1994. The current market capitalisation stands Rs 1055 Cr. The company is listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) with the BSE code as 532627. and also listed on National Stock Exchange (NSE) with NSE code as JPPOWER.

Jaypee Group is a diversified infrastructure conglomerate in India with interests in Civil Engineering and Construction, Cement, Power, Real Estate & Expressways, Hospitality,Fertilizer, Health Care, Sports and Education (not-for-profit). We believe we benefit from the Jaypee Group’s experience in the conceptualization, design, development, construction and operation of hydroelectric power plants. As a Group, we are able to manage multiple aspects of power projects, from front-end engineering design to completion, operation and maintenance.

Name: EGO
Description:
The EGO Group, which has been operating in the energy markets for over twelve years, is organized into three distinct companies:

EGO Energy S.r.l. is an integrated energy operator that merges a deep understanding of the markets with cutting-edge expertise in energy efficiency and energy management. The company manages a significant volume of energy through the aggregation of multiple production plants (facilities powered by renewable sources and co-generators), offering innovative services for the optimized management of energy assets. Its clientele includes major renewable energy producers and numerous industrial companies in energy-intensive sectors: paper, food, chemical-pharmaceutical, plastics, textiles, glass and steel, electricity producers, and water managers.

EGO Energy by the numbers: over 3.2 TWh of dispatched green energy, 250 MW of adjustable power in the flexibility and capacity markets, over 25 TWh of Origin Guarantees, and more than 40,000 white certificates produced.

Ego Data S.r.l. is the Group's digital technology service provider, capable of managing millions of data daily to support business processes through next-generation IT infrastructures. The technological architecture in place is highly scalable and resilient, rooted in proprietary artificial intelligence systems, and accommodates the primary industrial communication protocols.

EGO Data by the numbers: 900 devices monitored in the field, 800,000 data points acquired in real-time every day, 20 million pieces of data sourced from external providers daily, and 3,000 intricate processes executed daily.

EGO S.r.l. is the Group's holding company, delivering corporate services to its subsidiary companies through a suite of managerial and professional skills cultivated over an equivalent of more than 100 years of experience in various energy market specializations.

Name: Energo
Description:
Welcome to Energo’s LinkedIn page! 

About Us:
Energo is at the forefront of Engineering, Construction, and Manufacturing in India, delivering comprehensive services to diverse sectors. Our expertise spans Power Plants, Steel Plants, Aluminum Plants, Mineral Beneficiation, Pneumatic / Bulk Material Handling, Ports, Cement, Mining, Infrastructure, Fertilizers, Renewable Energy, and other Process Industries.

Solutions and Services:

Ash Handling Solutions:  Energo excels in providing innovative solutions in all areas of ash handling including  fly ash handling, slurry disposal, ash water recovery, and pneumatic coal mill rejects handling.

Materials / Bulk Handling Systems:  Energo provides a wide range of materials handling systems and equipment, ensuring efficiency in various industrial processes.

Turnkey EPC Services:  We offer end-to-end solutions, from design and manufacturing to construction, commissioning, and operation of BoP packages related to Thermal Power Plants up to 800 MW unit sizes.

ESCO and O&M Services:  Our services extend to Energy Service Company (ESCO) initiatives and comprehensive Operation & Maintenance (O&M) support.

Clientele:
Energo is working with most of reputed Government / Private / MNCs including NTPC, CIL, DVC, NLC, NALCO, Genco’s, TATA Power, L&T, Reliance, Adani, CLP, Arcelor Mittal Nippon Steel, Saudi Aramco, Hatch Technip, Siemens, and many more.

Name: Toshiba International Corporation - Oceania
Description:
Toshiba has delivered high quality and technically advanced solutions to Australia’s Energy, Mining, Industrial and Social Infrastructure Sectors for over 40 years.
 
Our advanced turbines, generators, transformers and electrical drives/motors continue to play a pivotal role in driving our energy and industrial industries forward. 

Sustainability, and a commitment to a carbon neutral future, remains at the core of our business. Toshiba strives to be an active and influential participate in the global energy transition through the development of innovative technologies in the Battery Energy Storage, Digital Asset Management, Hydrogen and Thermal Plant Repurposing segments. 

With a team focused on creating value for our customers and solving the complex and unique energy challenges of our time, Toshiba remains a trusted and reliable partner throughout Australia's energy, industrial and mining industries.

Name: South Luzon Thermal Energy Corporation
Description:
South Luzon Thermal Energy Corporation (SLTEC) owns a 2x135 Megawatt Circulating Fluidized Bed (CFB) Coal-Fired Power Plant located in Brgy. Puting Bato West, Calaca, Batangas, with the first unit commencing its commercial operations in April 2015, followed by the second unit in February 2016. In pursuit of generating safe and reliable electricity, SLTEC operates as a baseload plant and utilizes modern, clean, and environment-friendly technology to meet the power demand of Luzon.
 
In carrying out its operations, SLTEC initiates responsible business practices that safeguard the well-being of the environment and the communities where it operates. Through its sustainability initiatives, SLTEC aspires to further improve the quality of life of its stakeholders, especially its host communities whose roles are equally important as the fuel that runs its industry.
 
SLTEC believes that its power comes from its people. SLTEC harnesses the proficiency and expertise of its workforce to continuously foster a culture that collaborates in the path towards efficiency, innovation, and excellence. SLTEC dedicates itself to deliver safe and reliable power to the grid to keep the lights on in every home.

Name: ENERGIAS RENOVABLES DEL PLATA
Description:
ERP / ENERGIAS RENOVABLES DEL PLATA es una compañía de gestión de proyectos de generación eléctrica, en especial de energías renovables, en cualquiera de las fases de su ciclo de vida (estrategia de negocio, desarrollo, pre-construcción, construcción y operación).

Fundada en 2016, la compañía tiene oficinas en Buenos Aires, Santiago, Montevideo y Barcelona, y un equipo central con más de 25 años de experiencia en el sector de las energías renovables y el gas natural, con experiencia demostrable en desarrollo, construcción y operación de proyectos en Europa y América.
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Braden Group
Description:
World leading solutions for air handling, noise emissions control, energy storage and gas turbine auxiliary support systems.

We deliver plant performance and efficiencies for our customers in the power generation, oil & gas, petrochemical, and industrial sectors.

Our purpose is to continually develop and deliver advancements in our core technologies, which significantly reduce the amount of NOx and carbon produced in energy generating operations. Through a clear design approach, our team is creating new products and services that focus on achieving net zero emissions, with safety first.

Name: VS Group
Description:
At the heart of development is science, knowledge of which is translated to creation of solutions to human problems. The VS Group is a global enterprise founded and domiciled in Sri Lanka with a global presence in Asia, Africa and Oceania. Founded on the basis of scientific knowledge and craft, the company develop and improve on technological solutions in different sectors and industries worldwide.

VS Hydro is a fully integrated hydro company originating from Sri Lanka and operating in Africa. Established in 1972 to manufacture scientific equipment for schools we soon became the first solar and hydro developer and contractor in Sri Lanka.

In 2009, the Company made a strategic decision to bring its expertise to East Africa. The expansion business model of VS has been to enter a new territory by first securing an EPC contract and eventually owning and operating its own projects.

After the commissioning of VS’s first project in Uganda, an 18 MW project called Mpanga, the Company applied to develop 3 sites in Uganda. These projects, Siti 1, Siti 2 and Nyamagasani1, together with Nyamaghasani2, Lubilia and Kakaka which VS guided through the Pre-implementation processes, are now completed. VS constructed 7 of the 17 Getfit projects in Uganda.

VS has also completed a 5MW project in Kenya and has been awarded a further two contracts. During the construction phase of Gura, VS developed its own sites in Kenya. At present VS holds concessions totaling a possible installed capacity of 78 MW. 

In Rwanda, VS carried out full retrofit and rehabilitation for 3 projects for the client Prime Energy and another 10MW project is under construction. VS is also implementing 3 other projects in Rwanda, and actively pursuing several new project concessions including 20MW cross border.

After being awarded a project in Zimbabwe, VS identified 2 new sites in the country. 

This year VS is in the final stages of being financed of several project in Kenya, Uganda, Zimbabwe, Malawi.

Name: VIRTUAAL PARENG HYDRO PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: VIRTUAAL PARENG HYDRO PRIVATE LIMITED is an hydro power generation company based out of Arunachal Pradesh, India.

Name: Pacifico Energy
Description:
Pacifico Energy (“Pacifico” and formerly “Pacifico Power”) is a forward-looking energy infrastructure platform that delivers customized industrial-scale energy solutions to data centers, companies and communities looking to quickly secure reliable and affordable electricity.

Pacifico develops, constructs, operates, finances and invests in prime generation (microgrid) and distributed generation energy projects—which help data centers, commercial & industrial companies, and communities become less reliant on utility companies for electricity.

Pacifico is backed by the Pacifico Energy Group, which has significant ownership stakes in energy development companies around the world, including Japan’s largest solar developer.

Name: Otojet
Description: 2022 yılında OYAK Enerji Şirketleri bünyesinde kurulan Otojet, elektrikli ve plug-in hibrit araçlar için yenilikçi elektrikli şarj üniteleri sunan öncü bir markadır. Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu (EPDK) tarafından verilen Şarj Ağı İşletmeci Lisansı'nı alan ilk 10 şirketten biridir. Hızlı büyüme stratejisi kapsamında, Türkiye genelinde başta akaryakıt istasyonları, otomotiv satış ve servis noktaları, otoyollar, AVM'ler, belediyeler, üniversiteler, oteller, konut siteleri ve diğer çeşitli yaşam alanlarında hizmet vermektedir.

Name: GNPower Dinginin Ltd. Co.
Description:
GNPower Dinginin Ltd. Co. (GNPower Dinginin) is a 1,336 MW coal-fired power plant in Mariveles, Bataan.

Similar to its sister plant GNPower Mariveles Coal Plant Ltd. Co., GNPower-Dinginin operates under the private limited partnership of AboitizPower’s Therma Power, Inc. and AC Energy Holdings, Inc., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Ayala Corporation and Power Partners Ltd. Co.

GNPower-Dinginin began construction of its first unit in September 2016 and is set for completion in 2021. It is considered by far the biggest coal-fired power plant to be built in the country, spanning 30 distribution utility contracts and two retail electricity suppliers.

Name: Rai Power
Description:
Rai Power specialises in the design, manufacture, assembly, supply, project execution, commissioning and servicing of captive power generating systems giving it the outlook of a one-stop shop for complete power back up solutions. The company is recognised as a front runner in the field of power generation, transmission and distribution, furnishing businesses across sectors ranging from pharmaceuticals, healthcare, cement and heavy industry to hospitality, entertainment and the IT sector.

Key Services -
- Project design and engineering for captive power plants
- Manufacture, assembly and supply of Gensets across fuel types (250 kVA up till 30,000 kVA single unit on HSD, LDO, Natural Gas, HFO, Biofuels etc.)
- Execution, installation, testing and commissioning of CPPs (SITC basis)
- Mechanical, electrical and civil works for CPPs (EPC/turnkey basis)
- After sales maintenance service support (annual maintenance contracts, operation & maintenance contracts, minor and major overhauls)
- Spare parts support
- Repair and workshop facilities
- Refurbishment and re-engineering facilities
- Technical expertise through OEM-ships and authorised dealerships of world renowned international engine manufacturing companies (we have hands on experience of working on engines such as Mitsubishi, Hyundai, MTU, Caterpillar, Skoda, Volvo Penta, Cummins, Perkins, Deutz, Kawasaki, Yanmar etc.)
- Export sales
- Relocation of power plants
- Gensets for rental usage
- UPS
- Pan India and Nepal operational capability
- Project execution capabilities on global level

Authorised Agent - Mitsubishi Heavy Industries (MHI Gensets), Volvo Penta (Industrial PowerGen engines)

Key Clients - Adani Group, Dr. Reddy's, Grasim Industries, HDFC Bank, JSW Steel, Larsen & Toubro Ltd, Mahindra & Mahindra, Oil & Natural Gas Corporation Ltd, Reliance Industries Ltd, Sun Pharmaceuticals, Tata Consultancy Services, Tata Steel, Tech Mahindra, Wipro and many more

Name: Enernet Global
Description:
Enernet provides energy as a service to customers with no access to grid power or with poor quality grid connections worldwide.

OUR VISION
We will put sustainable energy innovation in the hands of companies all over the world.

OUR MISSION
To decarbonise the world's supply chains.

WHAT WE DO
Our solutions integrate multiple generation sources, battery storage and advanced control systems. As a focused, first-mover in building microgrids, Enernet has built a team and developed tools and partnerships that ensure the delivery of high-performing assets. Enernet makes it simple.

OUR SERVICES
Today, the combination of expensive power, an impetus for reliable, clean and affordable electricity and advancements in storage and control technology are driving the opportunity for microgrids.

Enernet delivers the benefits of renewable generation and energy storage with intelligent control and no upfront costs, enabling you to focus on your core business.

Name: Sense and Drive
Description:
Sense and Drive is a startup company offering consulting, rapid hardware and embedded software development, production organization and laboratory testing, for power electronics applications in industrial, automotive, medical and aerospace industries.

Our focus is on innovative technologies in the field of power electronics, such as integration of wide-bandgap semiconductors, complex converter topologies, state of the art measurement methods, driving and advance converter control techniques into new, market-ready solutions.

Our team consists of experts with broad experience, gained worldwide in leading industrial and academic R&D groups.

Name: WINCO Generators
Description: WINCO Generators is a leading manufacturer of generators, originally founded in 1927.  Throughout the years we have grown and adapted to meet many unique customer needs. Since 1977, we have been manufacturing in our factory sprawling on 17.5 acres in Le Center, MN.

Name: Renewell Energy
Description: Creating the nation’s lowest cost, highest GHG-abating, most flexible energy storage network by re-purposing oil & gas infrastructure

Name: Genuity
Description: Genuity is an independently-owned electricity generation company with a long, proud history in Queensland. Our main asset is Millmerran Power Station, one of the youngest and most efficient coal-fired plants in Australia. The reliable, base load electricity we generate at Millmerran helps keep the power on in Queensland 24 hours a day, seven days a week, whatever the weather.  Each year, we supply about 10 per cent of Queensland’s energy needs, powering the equivalent of 1.3 million homes.

Name: Gujranwala Electric Power Company | GEPCO
Description:
Gujranwala Electric Power Company Limited (GEPCO) has been setup over the area of jurisdiction and electrification network of former Area Electricity Board, which was created in early eighties. It encompassed the areas of existing districts of Gujranwala, Hafizabad, Sialkot, Narowal, Gujrat and Mandi Bahauddin.

GEPCO was incorporated on 25th April 1998 and obtained certificate for commencement of business on 5th June 1998. Management and Administration is entrusted to a Board of Directors (BOD).

Earlier in 1960s, the Govt. of Pakistan (GoP) has decided to set up an independent and autonomous Authority to deal with all available water resources and power system network including power generation, transmission and distribution. The department was formed and named as Water And Power Development Authority (WAPDA), the 2nd biggest department in Pakistan after Pak Army. In 1980s, the power distribution network of WAPDA was sub-divided into eight Area Electricity Boards (AEB), Gujranwala was one of the AEBs among different Electricity Boards dealing with power distribution system.

In 1998, WAPDA was dis-integrated into two main sector PEPCO and WAPDA. Where, WAPDA was restricted to only deal with water resources and hydro-generation and PEPCO (Pakistan Electric Power Company) was found as overall in-charge/ Company of Thermal Generation (GENCOs: Generation Companies), Transmission (NTDC: National Transmission & Dispatch Company) and Distribution (DISOs: Distribution Companies. PEPCO was formed as temporary in-charge Company of GENCOs, NTDC and DISCOs which was decided to be dissolved when these companies start working independently under umbrella of their respective BODs (Board of Directors)

GEPCO has about 3098120 connections with average monthly collection for the year 2016-17 is approximately 8937 Million Rupees.

Name: Kvasir Technologies
Description: Kvasir's biooil seamlessly integrates into the marine fuel supply chain or refinery infrastructure without additional storage costs or switching expenses, enabling a smooth path towards decarbonization.

Name: Exceed Geo Energy
Description:
Exceed Geo Energy is a privately held clean energy company redefining what’s possible with geothermal. We develop and operate carbon-negative geothermal systems using our proprietary Infinity Loop technology—unlocking scalable, dispatchable clean power with dramatically lower water and land footprints.

With proven expertise in high-temperature, high-pressure drilling, Exceed delivers projects from development to operations across key markets. Our systems are designed to scale globally—bringing true baseload renewables to regions traditionally left out of the clean energy transition.

We’re not just innovating geothermal—we’re building a category.

Name: Enercoop Nouvelle-Aquitaine

---------------------------

Nos missions : 

    • Commercialiser l’offre de fourniture d’électricité Enercoop auprès des particuliers, professionnels et collectivités locales de la région désireux de soutenir la transition énergétique et citoyenne 
    • Développer et accompagner la création de nouveaux projets de production d'énergies renouvelables sur la région, en coopération avec les collectivités locales et citoyens

Name: (مجموعة القصواء) Al Qaswaa Group

Name: Total Energy Solutions
Description:
Total Energy Solutions (TES) is a leading provider of integrated power generation solutions with market leading equipment, engineering and support guaranteeing dependable and efficient performance keeping communities safe. Since 2006, TES has been serving the Gulf Coast supporting customers 24/7 by servicing over 4,000 generators and energy systems with 50+ certified technicians located in 3 satellite locations and 6 service centers delivering quick response times for customers.

The TES team is passionate about solving power generation issues by offering turnkey solutions solving complex energy problems by investing in engineering resources, building a best-in-class support team of certified technicians and representing the best equipment OEMs that support solar, battery storage, wind, natural gas and hydrogen alternatives along with traditional energy sources. If you need a team that is committed to deliver energy to people by offering energy solutions with unwavering support, visit totalenergysolutions.com

Name: Vendée Energie
Description:
www.vendee-energie.fr/

Vendée Energie est une Société d’Economie Mixte (SEM) de production et de distribution d’énergies renouvelables créée par le Syndicat Départemental d’Energie et d’Equipement de la Vendée (SyDEV).

Producteur local d'énergie renouvelable depuis 2002, Vendée Energie est une Société Anonyme (SA) d'un capital public/privé de 11,5M€ qui développe, construit et exploite des unités de production d'énergies renouvelables décentralisées (éolien, photovoltaïque, méthanisation,...).

Avec un chiffre d’affaires consolidé de 15M€ en 2019, Vendée Energie exploite à ce jour 8 parcs éoliens (65 MW) dont 7 en pleine propriété. A cela s'ajoute 61 centrales photovoltaïques sur toitures dont 6 au sol (30 MW). Vendée Energie accompagne par ailleurs le développement de projet méthanisation et co-investi aux côtés des agriculteurs dans les unités.

Forte de son retour d’expérience, Vendée Energie travaille aujourd'hui sur l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur et a diversifié depuis 2017 son activité dans la production et la distribution de BioGNV puis d’Hydrogène vert, contribuant ainsi à une valorisation maîtrisée de l’énergie produite au cœur du territoire.

Name: E2E Energy Solutions Inc.
Description:
ECONOMICALLY VIABLE, GEOTHERMAL ENERGY SOLUTIONS

E2E Energy Solutions is at the forefront of sustainable energy innovation, specializing in cost-effective and eco-friendly geothermal technologies. Leveraging its patented Enhanced Geothermal Reservoir Recovery System (EGRRS), E2E enables access to geothermal energy in areas previously considered non-viable. 

With a steadfast commitment to a net-zero carbon future, E2E designs and develops advanced geothermal heat and power generation solutions. In the short term, the company is focused on showcasing its groundbreaking subterranean enhancement technology. Long-term, E2E aims to commercialize these solutions through licensing, providing a scalable pathway for widespread adoption.

E2E’s innovative approach allows energy producers to economically tap into hidden geothermal resources, presenting an impactful solution to meet future energy demands while reducing greenhouse gas emissions. By pioneering advancements in geothermal energy, E2E Energy Solutions is empowering industries and communities to transition to sustainable power systems, playing a vital role in achieving global climate goals. Guided by innovation, efficiency, and sustainability, E2E is committed to shaping the future of energy for generations to come.

Name: Caparo Power Limited

Name: China Power HUB Operating Company (Private) Limited
Description:
China Power Hub Operating Company (Private) Limited (CPHO) has been incorporated as a private limited company under the Companies Act 2017 on 20th January 2022.

The Company has employed highly skilled foreign and local resources for providing turnkey O&M solutions to thermal power plants including technical support services, development of plant operating and maintenance procedures, routine and annual inspections of plant equipment, training and development of power plant resources etc.

Name: TownRock Energy
Description:
We are an award-winning geothermal company based in Edinburgh, Scotland and a leading specialist in all aspects of the UK’s geothermal resources. 

We help our clients to understand the facts about the low-carbon heating technologies available to them. The advice we provide is bespoke to your site, and is tailored to address your heating and cooling demand requirements, and help you meet your net-zero and sustainability targets.

We specialise in the valuation, development and operation of net-zero heating and cooling projects using flooded coal mines, hot sedimentary aquifers (HSA’s), granites (Hot Dry Rocks), open and closed-loop ground-source heat pumps, district heating integration and thermal energy storage. 

Our mission is to access the abundant geothermal energy of the earth’s subsurface to provide zero-carbon renewable heating and cooling to industrial, commercial and domestic energy users.

Geothermal energy technology is a relatively new path to unlocking clean energy in the UK and is often poorly appreciated or understood. Our small, dedicated team prides itself in taking a clear and strategic approach to assisting clients and partners to understand and realise the value of the geological asset beneath their site.

Name: Nordkraft AS
Description:
Forretningsmodellen vår er utvikling, produksjon og distribusjon av fornybar energi. Det har vi holdt på med siden 1910.

Våre eiere er i hovedsak kommunene i aksen mellom Harstad og Narvik, i tillegg til Hadsel og Andøy. Hovedkontoret til konsernet ligger i Narvik, mens nettselskapet har sitt hovedkontor i Harstad. Til sammen 280 mennesker har sine arbeidsplasser fordelt over hele regionen, med avdelingskontorer også i Grovfjord, Ballangen, Stokmarknes og Andøy. Vi produserer årlig over to TWh strøm, drøyt halvparten eier vi selv. Totalt omsetter konsernet for nesten en milliard.

Vårt mål er å være på pallen i alt vi gjør. Derfor gjør vi prosjekter innen næringsutvikling og innovasjon med et mål om å skape aktivitet til det beste for hele regionen.

Antall ansatte: Ca. 280

Omsetning: Ca. 1-1,5 mrd NOK

Årsproduksjon: ca. 2,4 TWh drift, ca. 1,1 TWh av dette eies selv

Nettkunder: Ca. 54.000

Şirket, ulusal ve uluslararası alanda büyük bir firma olma yolunda etkin, verimli ve yoğun bir çalışma gerektiğinin bilincinde. Name: KOREA SOUTHERN POWER CO., LTD.
Description:
Korea Southern Power Co., Ltd. (KOSPO) specializes in the power generation industry, which was formed under the South Korean government’s Power Industry Restructuring Act on April 2, 2001, when it was separated from Korea Electric Power Corporation (“KEPCO”). KOSPO is currently running ~9.6% (11,343 MW) of Korea’s total installed capacity in seven core areas throughout the country including Shincheon, Busan, and Namjeju contributing to a stable power supply in the domestic market. KOSPO is one of the most reliable electricity providers in the Korean market with availability at over 91% and a Forced Outage Ratio near 0%.
In FY 2017 KOSPO had sales of $4.5 billion, assets of $9.4 billion, energy capacity of 11,343 MW, and 2,184 employees. KOSPO also maintains a high credit rating of Aa2 from Moody’s and AA from Standard & Poor’s. KOSPO has been a leader in new technology winning the IEE Edison Award in 2015, which is the Nobel Prize in Electricity Area.
KOSPO Owns Gas CCPP and Solar PMGD in Chile / Invested a Wind farm and conducting Gas CCPP O&M in Jordan / Commissioned 10+ power plants around the world.

Name: Humanitarian Energy
Description:
Humanitarian Energy PLC is an Ethiopian social enterprise established by international and national shareholders, which aspires to become the partner of choice for clean and sustainable energy access for humanitarian settings, agencies, and operations, in Ethiopia and beyond.
 
For prospective clients, Humanitarian Energy PLC designs, finances, constructs, and operates capital-intensive clean energy infrastructures, thereby meeting the clean energy needs and carbon reduction aspirations through commercially sustainable models. Humanitarian Energy PLC contributes to the energy transition agenda of the humanitarian sector to cleaner, and more sustainable energy solutions than those currently in use. 
 
Humanitarian Energy PLC deploys hybrid solar PV mini-grids to power life and businesses in displaced communities; and an asset leasing model for turn-key stand-alone systems for humanitarian agencies and operations. The company is committed to the operations and maintenance of deployed systems through applicable mechanisms, ensuring that clients receive the needed satisfaction from their investments. 
 
With estimated 84 million forcibly displaced people worldwide, and the average refugee camp lasting 20 years, Humanitarian Energy PLC believes that more can and should be done to provide sustainable energy solutions to those who need it the most; and this is where Humanitarian Energy PLC bridges that gap with clean, quality, and affordable services for humanitarian settings, organizations, and operations, in Ethiopia and beyond

Name: Mira Power Limited
Description:
Mira Power Limited is a special purpose company, setup to design, construct, own, operate and maintain 100MW Gulpur hydro power plant under Government of Pakistan’s Policy for Power Generation Projects 2002 as adopted in Azad Jammu & Kashmir . Mira Power Limited is a subsidiary of Korea South East Power Co. Ltd.

The Gulpur hydro power plant will have 100 MW power capacity with annual generation capability of 465 GWh. The Project site falls administratively in the Kotli district of AJK and located about 5 km south of Kotli town on the Poonch River, a tributary of Jhelum River. Name: Borealis Geothermal
Description:
Borealis is the Canadian Leader in the understanding of convective fracture controlled geothermal systems. Founded in 2007, Borealis is a private company whose sole focus has been to advance development of Canadian geothermal projects.

For over 15 years, Borealis has explored for or consulted on a wide variety of geothermal projects across Canada. We are conversant with all the relevant geologies and play types that can be expected within the Canadian context. Further, on the surface, we have created unique risk-reducing designs for a variety of geothermal applications, that deliver superior throughput at reduced costs.

We’ve spent considerable time advancing the art of geothermal exploration and overcoming the challenges that are inherent in developing both hard rock and sedimentary geothermal reservoirs. We’ve won multiple awards for our geothermal technical advances and have a long list of Canadian “Firsts”. We’ve had the advantage of being able to trial our own ideas at our M’deek (Fuel for Reconciliation) and Valemount (Sustainaville) projects.

Borealis has both developed and enjoys a wide network of specialized geothermal technical support, with multiple University collaborations, direct access to global subject matter experts, and strong ties to local service providers. 

Our deployment of geophysical and geochemical techniques include:
· Gravity
· Magnetics/electromagnetic
· Passive/active seismic
· Magnetotellurics
· Water/Soil/Bio/Rock geochemistry
· Gas sampling
· Heat flux
· Thermal gradients
· Petrographic analysis

These activities have enabled our economic analysis, where we have developed a wide range of models to evaluate the economic value, and risk, related to geothermal projects and/or any one component of those projects.

As consultants and company owners, we practice effective frugality and treat your funds like they are our own. We are creative collaborators who use our business as a force for good to realize your project vision.

Enfinite is a dynamic developer, owner, and operator in the power generation and energy storage sectors. We provide critical energy solutions that seamlessly integrate with current infrastructure, ensuring a reliable power grid so we can live our lives without disruption. 

With expertise in technical proficiency and strategic project design, we construct and deploy Battery Energy Storage Facilities (BESF) through our eReserve program. Additionally, we own and operate gas-powered generation plants. These dual facets of our operations bolster existing energy infrastructure.

Specializing in versatile energy solutions, we prioritize delivering stable power to communities. Our ‘develop, own, and operate’ model ensures responsible resource deployment and long-term value creation for Enfinite, investors, partners, and communities alike.

Through innovation and market insight, we offer essential solutions to policymakers, regulators, and grid operators, facilitating the realization of a reliable and resilient power grid.

Founded in 2018 and based in Calgary, Alberta, Enfinite operates across Alberta and British Columbia, actively contributing to national energy developments. Committed to integrity and collaboration, we are continually Powering Progress towards a reliable energy future.

Name: Rank – Organic Rankine Cycle (ORC) and High-Temperature Heat Pumps (HTHP)
Description:
Rank designs and manufactures Organic Rankine Cycle (ORC) and high-temperature heat pumps (HTHP) tailored to customer needs.

Our catalog has ORC systems (LT, MT, HT, HTC, and MICRO series) that can produce from 2 kWe to 270 kWe net renewable electricity with heat sources from 90 °C to 180 °C. Hence, we have products for heat sources varying from 30 kWth to 2.5 MWth.

We have +10 years of experience in several sectors, including waste heat recovery in industries, engines, waste burning, and renewable energy from biomass boilers, solar plants, and geothermal wells.

Simultaneously, the ORC systems can produce up to 2.4 MWth of low-grade useful heat from 50 °C to 80 °C. It can be used in other applications, such as cold production, heating, sanitary hot water, industrial processes, and drying.

Additionally, our HTHPs are intended for heat revalorization from 60 kWth to 2 MWth at temperatures between 100 °C and 150 °C, operating at a high coefficient of performance (COP).

We base ORC and HTHP products on our own technology that ensures maximum energy efficiency and minimum environmental impact.

Please, refer to our website https://www.rank-orc.com/ for further information about our products or contact us through info@rank-orc.com.

Incubée dans le cadre d’une démarche de R&D menée par une dizaine de collectivités territoriales pionnières, Selfee est aujourd’hui un opérateur du marché de l’électricité, tout à la fois Fournisseur, Agrégateur, Responsable d’Équilibre et acteur du marché de gros. Selfee propose un service complet de fourniture d’électricité dont les sources de production sont prioritairement renouvelables et locales. 

Selfee permet aux collectivités d’acheter en circuit court, à prix local, l’électricité produite sur leur territoire, afin d’approvisionner l’ensemble de leur patrimoine public, dans le cadre d’opérations d’Autoconsommation Territoriale d’Électricité.

HDF Energy is a global pioneer in hydrogen power. HDF Energy develops and operates high capacity large-scale Hydrogen-to-Power infrastructure to provide firm or on-demand electricity from renewable energy sources (wind or solar), combined with high power MultiMegawatt fuel cells.

HDF Energy has developed two models of turnkey Hydrogen-to-Power plants:
    Renewstable (POWER TO POWER)
    Renewstable multi-megawatt turnkey power plants producing firm renewable electricity. These power plants are composed of an intermittent renewable source and a long-term on site hydrogen energy storage.
    Hypower (GAS TO POWER)
    Gas to Power power plants producing electricity on demand from green hydrogen.

HDF Energy has developed a unique in-house know-how in hydrogen multi-MW fuel cells.

HDF Energy is about to commission the first industrial facility for multi-MW fuel cell mass production in the world.

Description:
Virunga Energies, a subsidiary of Virunga Foundation, is a fully integrated electricity utility company in North-Kivu, DRC) and the first privately-owned company created under the liberalization of the electricity sector in 2014 in DRC. It is a for-profit company with a social purpose. All Virunga Energies profits are either reinvested in developing its clean energy assets or in the conservation of Virunga National Park, a world heritage UNESCO site.

It has built over 30MW of carbon-free hydroelectric plants, operates a transmission and distribution network of 500km+ across 3 different geographies, provides free electricity to public infrastructures (public lighting, hospitals, schools) and manages 25k+ paying customers.

Virunga Energies is currently building additional generation and transmission capacity (28MW hydroplant in Rwanguba, high-voltage substations).

Feel free to get in contact via virunga_energies@virunga.org

Em projetos de sistemas fotovoltaicos, atuamos nas áreas de testes de pull-out, cravação das estacas, montagem elétrica e eletromecânica, subestação e comissionamento, com experiência nos mais desafiadores parques construídos na Inglaterra e participação nos maiores parque solares já construídos no Brasil.

Toda a engenharia aplicada é desenvolvida pela ENGM e seus parceiros apresentando uma solução completa incluindo todo o EPC da obra.

Nossa experiência abrange obras de geração de energia a partir do carvão mineral, solar, hídrica e biomassa desde a construção até a operação e em usinas de incineração de rejeitos com reaproveitamento energético.

Com uma equipe experiente e criativa, os mais diversos desafios de execução são vencidos para satisfação total dos clientes.

A ENGM já executou obras em 19 estados da federação e também na Argentina. Possui habilitação junto aos órgãos competentes como CREA, IBAMA, Ministério do Trabalho, sindicatos, entre outros.

Durante todo o nosso trabalho, nunca tivemos autuação e/ou notificação junto a nenhuma entidade governamental ou não governamental destas entidades durante a execução da nossas atividades.

Name: EPSE Energia
Description:
Na EPSE, nosso objetivo é transformar sua visão em energia de forma eficiente, segura e inovadora.

Desde nossa fundação, nos dedicamos a fornecer soluções elétricas com produtos e serviços de alta qualidade, adaptadas às necessidades específicas de cada cliente. Nossa expertise abrange vários tipos de serviços para missão crítica.

Sempre com um compromisso firme com a excelência e a sustentabilidade.

Nossa satisfação é ver sua operação ininterrupta.
Atendimento eficiente e soluções focadas em minimizar impactos
Buscamos constantemente inovações tecnológicas que se alinhem às normas técnicas mais rigorosas do setor.

Nosso compromisso é oferecer soluções que não apenas atendam, mas superem os padrões necessários para o crescimento sustentável de nossos clientes.

Na EPSE, acreditamos que cada projeto é uma oportunidade de inovar e entregar valor excepcional.

Oferecemos diversos serviços e soluções em energia crítica e infraestrutura elétrica para garantir a continuidade e segurança das suas operações.

Nossa expertise abrange desde a manutenção preventiva e corretiva de UPS (nobreaks) e geradores até o planejamento e instalação de data centers e cabines primárias de média tensão.

Com um compromisso inabalável com a confiabilidade e inovação tecnológica, proporcionamos serviços personalizados que atendem às necessidades específicas de cada cliente.

Name: Enercoop Bretagne
Description:
Enercoop Bretagne, la coopérative d'énergie renouvelable citoyenne et solidaire ! 
Rejoindre Enercoop, c’est transformer sa facture d’électricité en investissement direct pour la transition énergétique citoyenne. Grâce à son réseau de 11 coopératives réparties sur toute la France, Enercoop change radicalement la donne via son modèle local et coopératif. Ce modèle permet dès aujourd’hui de se fournir en électricité 100% renouvelable, produite par plus de 460 producteurs locaux dont la moitié sont des projets citoyens et/ou des collectivités. Name: DEsire - Platforma Transformacji Energetyki
Description:
Platforma Transformacji Energetyki DEsire stanowi zaplecze badawczo-doradcze organizujące wsparcie dla interesariuszy zainteresowanych wszystkimi technologiami dekarbonizacji energetyki: przemysłu, instytucji rządowych i pozarządowych, nauki oraz biznesu. PTE DEsire przynosi realne korzyści otoczeniu biznesowemu oraz instytucjom badawczo-rozwojowym poprzez działania kreujące i wspierające optymalne decyzje inwestycyjne.
PTE DEsire zawiązana przez trzy śląskie uczelnie – Politechnikę Śląską, Uniwersytet Śląski oraz Uniwersytet Ekonomiczny w Katowicach – stanowi miejsce wymiany doświadczeń, koncepcji oraz szeroko rozumianej wiedzy eksperckiej z zakresu tworzenia planów i realizacji działań dekarbonizacyjnych w obszarze energetyki zawodowej i przemysłowej. Stanowimy wsparcie inżynierskie, prawne i biznesowe w zakresie kształtowania właściwych dróg do neutralności klimatycznej.
PTE DEsire jest zarządzana przez Politechnikę Śląską.
Zapraszamy do współpracy.

Name: Pioneer Energy
Description:
Pioneer is a company on the move.  Our business is energy but our point of difference is the way we do business, the diversity of our products, energy options, partnerships and our investments.

We are changing the way customers and communities use energy by investing in the next generation of energy services providing alternatives to mainstream utilities and in this, we are leading the industry.

Pioneer takes pride in partnering with customers to develop customised energy solutions; reduce energy costs and usage, lower operating costs and diversify customers’ risk.  We focus on new technologies and partnering to bring emerging energy solutions that improve our ability to deliver the right mix for customers.

Pioneer is not a consultancy - we are a proactive long established energy business operating nationwide.  We partner to provide innovative solutions and services that add value for our customers. We offer flexibility through our own generation and in conjunction with our market partners, we also offer innovative electricity supply options that leverage energy market instruments are not easily accessed through the standard energy retailers.

Through our certified project managers and well-trained designers with several years of experience, we can guarantee a high delivery security with the highest quality for our customers. Kraftag does not see the problems but the solutions. During the past year, Krafttag has also established a fitter department where we have certifying electricians, fitters, testers and commissioners. Through our partners, krafttag can deliver entire power plants, everything from "ordinary" control cabinets to large HSP switchgear and transformers. Warm welcome! - "Engineering for the future"

Name: P&M ELECTRIC
Description:
Nosotros:
Somos una empresa especializada en Sistemas de Protección, Desarrollo de Proyectos de Ingeniería y Mantenimiento Eléctrico para Sistemas Eléctricos de Alta, Media y Baja Tensión, liderada por un equipo de profesionales jóvenes, con ideas innovadoras que combinan calidad, compromiso y eficacia.
Contamos con un equipo de Ingenieros de primer nivel y una gran experiencia en la industria. Avalada por importantes proyectos desarrollados en diferentes áreas. En cada uno de nuestros proyectos hemos puesto todo nuestro conocimiento al servicio de las necesidades del cliente. Confiamos en poder convertirnos en la mejor alternativa para poder apoyar tus ideas, enriqueciéndolas con lo último en soluciones y tecnología de punta.
Nos especializamos en:

1. Proyectos de Implementación para Usuarios Libres
Estudios e implementación de esquemas de rechazo de carga, limitadores de potencia y protección homopolar.

2. Calidad de Energía
Estudios de calidad de energía, instalación de generadores de potencia reactiva y bancos de condensadores.

3. Pruebas Eléctricas a S.E y Celdas Eléctricas
Evaluación de transformadores de potencia, relés de protección, interruptores, pararrayos, cables de energía y bancos de baterías, destacando análisis como tangente delta, SFRA y pruebas funcionales.
Medición de resistencia de aislamiento, resistencia óhmica, y tiempos de operación.

4. Mantenimiento de S.E y Celdas Eléctricas
Mantenimiento de transformadores, análisis de aceite dieléctrico y termografía de equipos eléctricos,entre otras.

5. Levantamiento de Observaciones INDECI - ITSE
Actualización de tableros eléctricos, mediciones de aislamiento, puesta a tierra y calidad de energía, entre otros.

Somos tu mejor aliado para tus proyectos!

Description:

HDF Caribbean team of pioneers is dedicated to decarbonizing the Caribbean power sector and industries through the implementation of bankable green hydrogen infrastructures, benefitting from the steady sources of renewables that the region offers. 

Through flagship projects such as Renewstable (Barbados), NewGen (Trinidad & Tobago), Hyvolucia (Saint Lucia) and Belphy (Jamaica), HDF Caribbean is unlocking the full potential of renewable energy and hydrogen storage to provide reliable, clean power for generations to come.

HDF Caribbean is owned by HDF, a French-based publicly traded company on the Euronext, Paris stock exchange.
