Głównym celem Towarzystwa jest wskazywanie sposobów rozwiązywania problemów związanych z wytwarzaniem i wykorzystaniem energii elektrycznej i cieplnej, wykraczających poza jednostkowe interesy członków Towarzystwa, z uwzględnieniem interesów ogólnospołecznych i ochrony środowiska naturalnego oraz inspirowanie kierunków rozwoju źródeł wytwarzania energii w gospodarce skojarzonej.

htза нас резервираното захранване не е само бизнес. Ние го виждаме и осъзнаваме с всичките му значения и пластове, които споменахме по-горе. Така осигуряването на правилното техническо решение, надеждни устройства и инженеринг е и морален дълг за нас. Въпреки, че крайната дума има клиентът, наша отговорност и основен принцип е да консултираме и разясним всички аспекти.
Наша цел е да изградим дългосрочни взаимоотношения, ако ще това да забави поръчката или да удължи процеса на консултиране. Вярваме и прилагаме мек подход и емпатия, но съчетани с дълбока експертиза, компетентност и солидна аргументация. Оглеждаме заданията от всички позиции и не подхождаме еднозначно даже и при клиенти от едни същи индустриални вертикали. Използваме сходствата на база идустрии и сегменти само за да имаме общи тенденции, аналогични потребности, идентичност в процеса и условията. Но винаги подхождаме индивидуално към всеки проект и задание. Екип сме не само вътре в компанията, но и с доставчиците и партньорите. Вътрешната ни организация ни помага, както да имаме близък контакт с клиентите на търговско и техническо ниво.

Enercoop Hauts-de-France a pour missions de : 

    • permettre aux particuliers, professionnels et collectivités territoriales de se fournir en électricité d’origine 100 % renouvelable et locale à un tarif juste et maîtrisé, 
    • développer et accompagner la création de nouveaux projets de production d'énergies renouvelables sur la région
    • contractualiser avec des producteurs locaux d’énergies renouvelables et les associer à sa gouvernance
    • proposer des services énergétiques adaptés aux besoins du territoire (aide à la réduction des consommations, accompagnement des projets citoyens de production d'énergies renouvelables...). 

Enercoop Hauts-de-France est un outil coopératif au service des territoires et de la réappropriation citoyenne de la transition énergétique grâce à une gouvernance partagée et un capital social ouvert aux collectivités locales, habitants, salariés et partenaires de la coopérative, qui décident ensemble sur le principe 1 personne = 1 voix.

At IPG Energy, we’re committed to tackling this. We’re a climate-tech company working with the construction industry to demonstrate that our hybrid, fuel-agnostic generator is the solution for accelerating the transition to green fuels in hard-to-abate sectors.

Name: UNELEG (Union Nationale des Entreprises Locales d'Electricité et de Gaz)
Description:
L'Union Nationale des Entreprises Locales d'Electricité et de Gaz (UNELEG) est un syndicat professionnel représentatif dans la branche professionnelle des Industries Electriques et Gazières (IEG) chargé de défendre les intérêts des membres dans l’ensemble de leurs activités. 

C’est ainsi que l’UNELEG représente et conseille ses adhérents – pour l’ensemble de leurs activités - sur les questions relatives aux évolutions techniques et juridiques du secteur énergétique ainsi qu’au sein de la branche des IEG dans le domaine social. 

Les entreprises locales de distribution (ELD) adhérentes sont actives sur toute la chaine de valeur de l’électricité : production, gestion de réseaux publics, fourniture et services énergétiques dans le strict respect des règles de séparation juridique de leurs activités.

Fortes de leur ancrage local, les ELD sont des acteurs au service de leurs collectivités support et des politiques énergétiques des territoires qu’elles desservent.  De l’exercice de leurs missions historiques de service public à la poursuite des objectifs de transition énergétique, les ELD répondent aux besoins et attentes de la société et s’inscrivent pleinement dans l’organisation actuelle du système énergétique français.

Name: ZAVTEK, Inc.

ZAVTEK expertise includes every component of critical power systems: uninterruptible power supplies (UPS), power distribution (PDU), transfer switches, battery and flywheel backup, and environmental regulation compliance equipment. We represent best-in-class components from manufacturers including: Starline, LayerZero, Enersys, and many others.

With our extensive industry experience, ZAVTEK employs highly trained technical staff. Our employees stay with our company for an average of seven years, which benefits our customers by allowing us to provide continuity of service. In most cases, the same technician that has serviced your critical power systems for the last several years is the same technician that will continue to service your needs for years to come. 

Our customers and employees stay with ZAVTEK, year after year, because we are a great company to work with and to work for. Relationships are the cornerstone of what makes us outstanding in our field.

Head to our website to learn more.

¿Qué nos diferencia?

	•	Soporte 24/7 y Transparencia: Asistencia continua en campo y generación de informes detallados que brindan tranquilidad y visibilidad en cada etapa del proyecto.

Los beneficios para usted van más allá de un servicio confiable. Con SAM Energy, obtiene soluciones personalizadas que optimizan sus costos y aseguran la continuidad de sus operaciones. Name: All Energy Brasil
Independent Power Producers of New York
Description:
The Independent Power Producers of New York, Inc., (IPPNY) is a premier trade association dedicated to the representation of New York's electric generation fleet, which powers the State's economy. IPPNY members produce more than 75 percent of New York's power from a multitude of fuel sources, such as: wind, solar, hydro, energy storage, natural gas, low sulfur oil, waste-to-energy, biomass, and nuclear. In combination, these resources maintain electric system reliability and “keep the lights on.” 

IPPNY's mission is to assist its member companies in becoming the premier providers of electricity in New York State. In furtherance of its Mission, IPPNY is committed to the following policies:

Advocating fair and efficient competition among wholesale and retail suppliers of electricity and other potentially competitive electric resources, including renewable, fossil-fueled, nuclear, demand response providers and conservation technologies.

Advocating for fair government oversight to foster new generation, fair business practices and environmental stewardship to further enhance the reliability of supply and competition of independent power throughout the state and the region.

Ensuring that existing and future contractual and regulatory agreements and commitments are fully honored. 

Promoting and maintaining open, nondiscriminatory access to utility transmission and distribution systems for all market participants at rates that fairly reflect the actual cost of providing such access. 

Obtaining input from and building consensus among all private and public sector interests involved in the development of competitive electric markets, as well as those that supply goods or services to such markets.

Assisting members' efforts to respond fully to the needs of customers.

Demonstrating and communicating that independent power facilities are reliable, cost-effective and environmentally sound.

Name: Hellenic Biomass Association (HellaBiom)
Description:
The Hellenic Biomass Association (HELLABIOM) is a non-profit organisation and one of the principal National Associations in the sector of renewable energy sources since the 1990’s. 

-	Objectives: 
(a) The promotion and coordination of scientific research on the sustainable utilisation of biomass for energy generation and biofuels’ production.

(b) The provision of consultation and education services to stakeholders involved in biomass utilisation and development at regional and national levels.

(c) The cooperation with companies, government bodies, educational institutions and market regulation authorities on the appropriate application of European standards and directives on biomass-related issues.

-	Geographical coverage: National (Greece).

-	Size: HELLABIOM consists of approximately 140 members. About 25% of those members are companies involved in biofuel production, engineering of bioenergy projects and manufacture and sales of biomass heating appliances, while 75% of members are individuals (scientists, engineers, researchers) who share a common interest in the development of biomass sector in Greece. 

-	Activities organised: collection and analysis of statistical data on biomass, lobbying, conferences, presentations, seminars, participation in trade shows, participation in radio and television broadcasts and interviews aiming at educating interest groups and the general public, as well as at sustaining and expanding national penetration of biomass utilisation and bioenergy.

-	List of publication: newsletter, new website with updated and enriched content under development. 

-	Collaborations: Centre for Renewable Energy Sources & Saving (CRES), Centre for Research & Technology Hellas (CERTH), National Technical University of Athens (NTUA),  Aristotle University of Thessaloniki (AUTH), Wood and Furniture Design & Technology Department (WFDT)

Name: Baseload Power Iceland
Description:
While Iceland started harnessing geothermal energy in the beginning of the 20th century, Icelanders had used natural geothermal springs for bathing and washing for centuries. In 1908 the geothermal hot water began to be harnessed for heating individual homes, and today Iceland is one of the leading geothermal power generating countries in the world, accounting for 30% of the country's total power production, and 98% of residential and industrial heating. 
Due to its low-cost green electricity and reliable transmission system, Iceland is an attractive location for industries, creating intriguing opportunities for the Icelandic power sector. 
Numerous geothermal options remain unharnessed, which sets Iceland in a rare position in our energy-constrained world. The major power producers in Iceland are now able to offer green electricity at very competitive prices – around 50% lower than electricity costs in Western Europe.
Baseload Power aims to play an important part in meeting these opportunities. By building small-scale, zero-emissions binary power plants fueled by geothermal fluids, we have an incredible opportunity to develop this massive yet untapped renewable energy source.

Zo borgen we een toekomstbestendige energiemarkt.

Wij treden structureel in overleg via het MFF. Binnen dit forum maken we samen met alle (markt)partijen afspraken over processen in de energiemarkt waarin energiedata een centrale rol spelen.

Name: Planalto Bioenergia
Description:
A PLANALTO BIOENERGIA é proprietária  de duas Usinas em licenciamento avançado, nas cidades de Formosa e Cristalina - Estado de Goiás, cujos projetos estão em desenvolvimento à 22 meses, ambos em fase de licenciamento ambiental junto à SEMAD – GO.

Estes projetos contribuirão para o desenvolvimento regional nas cidades e regiões, cumprindo aos menos 7 dos Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável (ODS) da Organização das Nações Unidas (ONU). Ambos os projetos seguirão padrões internacionais de emissão de efluentes (Zero Liquid Discharge – ZLD) e utilização inédita no país, de equipamentos Termossolares (CSP) para redução do consumo energético e incremento da redução da pegada de Carbono.

Cada planta processará, em sua primeira fase de operação, 500.000 Ton/Ano de Milho, 1.500 Ha/Ano de Eucalipto e Brachiaria, produzindo mais de 200.000.000 L/Ano de Biocombustível, 150.000 Ton/Ano de Farelo (DDGS) para alimentação animal, 8.900 Ton/Ano de Óleo de Milho, 33.000 Mwh/Ano de Energia elétrica renovável e Descarbonização de 83.000 Ton/Ano.
O design industrial aplicado para a implantação da primeira fase foi desenvolvido de forma a comportar a expansão da capacidade instalada, em ao menos três vezes da inicial, como também o incremento de outras linhas de produção que tenham sinergia com a operação da planta, como por exemplo: produção de Hidrogênio e Uréia verdes.

A transformação do milho empregada nas Usinas, gerará  os seguintes produtos: 
•	Etanol anidro
•	Etanol hidratado
•	Farelo de milho (DDGS): utilizado na formulação de ração animal;
•	Óleo Industrial de milho;
•	Créditos de Descarbonização (CBIOS);
•	Energia elétrica renovável.

Name: Eletrisa
Description:
A Eletrisa, fundada no ano de 2007, iniciou suas atividades direcionada à gestão administrativa, financeira e societária de usinas de geração de energia renovável. Em 2013, expandiu sua atuação abrangendo o Planejamento e Controle da Manutenção de usinas que, hoje, contam com bases técnicas no Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina e Paraná, de forma a garantir o pronto-atendimento de seus clientes.
Em 2018, foi criado o Centro de Operação da Geração, que atua 24 horas por dia, sete dias por semana, realizando toda a operação remota das usinas no padrão do ONS.
Prezando sempre pela qualidade nos serviços entregues aos nossos clientes, em 2021, alcançamos as certificações ISO 9001, 14001 e 45001, que espelham nosso comprometimento e responsabilidade para com o setor energético. 
No ano de 2022, a Opersul, que é dona de um extenso portfólio de serviços prestados para UHE’s de grande porte no Brasil e no exterior, foi adquirida pela Eletrisa e, desde então, esse novo reposicionamento trouxe novas perspectivas para a atuação no segmento de grandes usinas. 
Além disso, no mesmo ano, os sócios da Eletrisa iniciaram uma nova startup, a Eletrify, cujo foco é o desenvolvimento de soluções para o setor elétrico, por meio de tecnologias IIoT e algoritmos de AI, atuando como grande fornecedora da Eletrisa. 
Em 2023, firmamos parceria com a Voith, tornando-nos sua primeira Official Partner no Brasil.

BACS ENERGY Pvt. Ltd. is formerly known as BACS HI TECH ENGINEERING. Our end to end integrated services offers –Planning, Investment through Construction to Operate and Maintain the site – allows us to design local tailored plans for clients across the India and but also to deliver every aspect of large-scale ambitious projects. Our customer base spans both the public and private sectors. Working with supply chain partners, fellow contractors, local communities – and clients, of course – we challenge stereotypes, often transforming the options for clients, and tailor solutions to ensure excellent results.
We pursue our integrated business model – where two or more of the operating segments of Development, innovation and Investments engage on the same project – to create major benchmarks, new establishments and important civic and social infrastructure Stability and relationship longevity are at the core of our philosophy, which we achieve for the benefit of our staff, the local community and our clients.

This model, our financial strength and exceptional track record provide a point of difference we believe few can match.
To leave a legacy our clients care about, and to be an organisation people want to work with and for, we manage and measure our impact and the value we create in five focus areas: Timely Delivery, Quality, Our Clients, Our People and Health & Safety.
We’re proud of our heritage, and as we’ve done for so many years, we strive to learn, to continue to embed innovation in our work, and to lead.
As we expand our footprint and expertise, we look to share our learning so clients and communities beyond our work benefit too.
Our approach is disciplined and underpinned by a strong risk management and governance framework. Our strategy is to grow the business organically and drive long-term profit and social value by focusing on our target markets.

Name: EDC Cameroun (Electricity Development Corporation)
Description:
𝐏𝐫é𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞
Electricity Development Corporation (EDC) est une société à capital public détenue à 100% par l’État du Cameroun. Créé par décret du Chef de l’État N° 2006/406 du 29 novembre 2006, EDC évolue dans le secteur national de l'électricité régi par la loi n° 2011/022 du 14 décembre 2011. 

L'entreprise est placée sous la tutelle technique du Ministère de l'Eau et de l'Energie et sous la tutelle financière du Ministère des Finances. Quatre organes assurent le fonctionnement de l'entreprise à savoir: l'Assemblée Générale, le Conseil d'Administration, la Direction Générale, et le Commissaire aux Comptes.

 Le siège social de EDC est basé à Yaoundé, sis à l'immeuble Hibiscus. L'entreprise totalise un effectif d'environ quatre cent personnes réparties entre le siège social basé à Yaoundé, la représentation régionale de Bertoua, l'antenne du Nord à Garoua, l'antenne de l'Ouest à Bafoussam, l'antenne du Sud à Ebolowa et les barrages de Lom Pangar, Mbakaou, Bamendjin, Memve'ele et Mapé. 

 𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬
● La gestion pour le compte de l’État, du patrimoine public dans le secteur de l'électricité;
● L'étude, la préparation ou la réalisation de tout projet d'infrastructure dans le secteur de l'électricité qui lui est confié par l’État;
● La participation à la promotion des investissements publics et privés dans le secteur de l'électricité.
● L'appui-conseil dans le secteur de l'électricité. 

 𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐎𝐛𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐬
Accroitre l'offre d'énergie électrique au Cameroun, en quantité et en qualité pour favoriser le développement durable de la nation. Pour y parvenir, EDC a opéré le choix stratégique de valoriser le potentiel hydroélectrique et notamment celui du fleuve Sanaga qui représente à lui seul près de 70% de tout le potentiel hydroéléctrique du Cameroun.

Name: Milano Generatori s.r.l. Società Benefit

Milano Generatori s.r.l. is a young and dynamic company that operates in the field of electrical power generation.

Description:
GRUPO NABLA is a company of power solutions that desire to work with and for companies, organizations, territories and people aware of the context in which they have to develop, and keen on produce new practices and sustainable businesses models. In GRUPO NABLA work engineers, clean and renewable energy professionals, who operate with new technologies, and develop strategies, ideas and tools to implement in: 
- Energy optimization plans 
- Design and execution of installation and automation

Name: Black Start, LLC
Description: We are a reputable and veteran-owned business that services the power generation market. Our team of technicians and consultants specialize in start-up and commissioning of combined cycle and simple cycle power plants.

Name: Liberum Energia
Description:
A Liberum Energia Ltda. foi constituída com o objetivo de desenvolver ativos de geração de energia. Estruturamos nossa atuação com foco primeiramente em hidrelétricas e, mais especificamente, em CGH’s (Centrais Geradoras Hidrelétricas).

As CGH’s são as usinas de menor porte, que possuem até 3MW de potência instalada, conforme legislação recente sancionada no início de 2015.

Name: Power Plant Training Ltd
Description:
Established in its present form in 2021, PPTL carries forward a nearly 50-year heritage of training and assessment. As a compact training provider, it is augmented by an extensive network of associates, subcontractors, and partnerships, forming a large corporate family. 

PPTL serves numerous leading power sector companies in the UK, as well as a variety of smaller firms, and caters to learners both domestically and internationally.

PPTL has established a robust Code of Practice and a continuous learning loop model that underpins its operations. We are committed to imparting some of the most critical operational skills required in the power sector and heavy industries. Our experienced training team ensures that trainees have a deeply enriching experience, gaining skills that will benefit them throughout their careers. Our trainers bring a wealth of experience from years in the industry or specialised training, with expertise in High and Low Voltage, Electrical, Control & Instrumentation, and Power Plant operation. Our training offerings are wide-ranging and adaptable, designed to meet specific site needs or through a variety of standard courses available throughout the year.

Name: Electropower S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa especialista en Grupos Electrógenos Diésel, con 7 años de experiencia en el Mercado y un equipo con mas de 35 años de Know How en Generación, participando en desarrollo de negocios dentro y fuera del país, contratos EPC de grandes plantas de generación diésel, entre otros.

Nuestra calidad de productos y servicios, nos ha permitido ser Líderes en el Rubro de la Construcción y otros rubros, así como mantener un crecimiento constante. Nos destacamos por una atención comercial personalizada, entregando toda la asesoría necesaria a nuestros clientes para sus proyectos con una excelente atención post venta.

Ofrecemos a nuestros clientes los siguientes servicios:
- Venta y Arriendo de Generadores.
- Instalaciones de sistemas automáticos, sincronismo entre uno o mas Equipos y 
  una o mas Redes.
- Proyectos de Combustible e Insonorización.
- Respaldo en Baja Tensión.
- Proyectos EPC.
- Contratos de mantención.

Nuestros equipos utilizan componentes de las principales marcas del mundo, como:

Motores: Cummins, Perkins, Deutz, Volvo, Doosan y Mitsubishi
Alternadores: Stamford, Leroy Somer y Meccalte
Sistemas de control y transferencia automática: Deep Sea y Comap

Lo que nos permite entregar las mejores Garantías del Mercado.

Lo invitamos a contactarnos para que podamos poner toda nuestra energía en satisfacer sus necesidades en generación diésel.

Name: Bay City Electric Works

Bay City Electric Works is an Authorized Distributor of Rehlko (formerly Kohler Energy) emergency generator systems.  We also provide a premier Service, Parts, and Rental experience to support our customers. 

Our vision is to become the premier generator supplier in California, Nevada, and Hawaii.  We have a team of experienced technicians, sales professionals, and support staff that are a passionate, focused team making power a certainty.

Founded in 1932, Bay City was honored by KOHLER as Generator Distributor of the Year in 2015, and supports a wide range of customers that includes contractors, critical facilities, city and county governments, utility companies, and the military.

Name: Sidewinders, LLC
Description:
Sidewinders LLC is a premier generator maintenance and repair company providing reliable and efficient service to our customers.  We are committed to serving the power generation industry with outstanding safety, quality and performance—in that order—on every project, without exception.

Backed with strong, multi-OEM experience, Sidewinders provides a valuable option for clients when high profile scopes and specialty repairs arise. We have a portfolio of winders with various skill levels and experience, enabling us to supply the resources best suited for you and your project, ensuring both cost and expertise optimization. Our team members are honest, easy to work with, and unyielding in their effort to perform work flawlessly.

Using a customer-centric approach, Sidewinders performs a variety of services for generator rotor and stator maintenance and repair. We provide comprehensive testing and inspection of your equipment, applying industry best practices and our own expertise based on years of work in the power generation industry.

From the application of expert knowledge, to the implementation of strategies that address specific needs without compromising performance, Sidewinders is ready to work with you wherever you need our expertise in generator rotor and stator maintenance and repairs.

- Electric distribution

- Co-generation solutions

Name: American Battery Factory Inc.
Description:
We have a simple plan for a complex energy crisis: make renewable, independent, efficient and affordable energy a reality.

How are we going to do it?
Create the first and best network of U.S.-owned, vertical manufacturing, supply chain and R&D for LFP battery cells by fusing software, hardware and technology to manage an unlimited inventory of sustainable energy sources stored through state-of-the-art battery manufacturing and innovation.

Name: Fullmark Energy
Description:
Fullmark Energy is an independent power producer squarely focused on energy storage, built on the core values of steadfastness, grit, and integrity. Since 2018, we've tackled the complex challenges of developing, owning, and operating standalone battery systems that strengthen the grid, accelerate renewable integration, and deliver lasting value to the communities we serve.
 
Unlike developers who build and flip projects, we're in this for the long haul. Our 300MWh of operating and in-construction assets across Southern California—including our Redwood Projects portfolio—demonstrate our commitment to seeing things through. We face development hurdles head-on, whether it's navigating intricate permitting requirements, collaborating with wildlife agencies on conservation measures, or working daily with landowners to ensure zero disruption to their operations.
 
Our 4GW development pipeline spans California, Texas, and the Mid-Atlantic region, but we prioritize quality over quantity. We don't chase project numbers—we pursue viable projects where we can create genuine, mutual value. This disciplined approach extends to our proprietary Medea dispatch platform, which optimizes performance while ensuring safe, responsible operations.

Name: EKU Power Drives
Description:
EKU Power Drives strives to bring you total electrification and automation solutions throughout your net-zero journey. Our goal is to find the best solutions for our customers sustainably and efficiently.
While being the market leader in idle reduction technology, EKU continues to develop a product and service portfolio that produces efficient solutions for carbon footprint reduction.

Name: NEOENERGIA S.A
Description:
A Neoenergia é uma das maiores empresas integradas do setor elétrico na América Latina, atuando no Brasil desde 1997. Controlada pelo grupo espanhol Iberdrola, a companhia está presente em 18 estados e no Distrito Federal, operando nas áreas de geração, transmissão, distribuição e comercialização de energia. 

Distribuição: A Neoenergia atende aproximadamente 16,4 milhões de unidades consumidoras, alcançando cerca de 37,7 milhões de pessoas. Suas distribuidoras incluem:

Neoenergia Coelba: atende o estado da Bahia.

Neoenergia Pernambuco: atende o estado de Pernambuco.

Neoenergia Cosern: atende o estado do Rio Grande do Norte.

Neoenergia Elektro: atende partes de São Paulo e Mato Grosso do Sul.

Neoenergia Brasília: atende o Distrito Federal.


Geração: A empresa possui uma capacidade instalada de 4,4 gigawatts (GW), com foco em fontes de energia limpa e renovável. Sua matriz energética é composta por aproximadamente 90% de fontes renováveis, incluindo:

Hidrelétricas: sete usinas em operação.

Parques Eólicos: 44 parques localizados na Bahia, Rio Grande do Norte e Paraíba.

Parques Solares: investimentos em energia solar, como os parques Luzia II e III na Paraíba

Name: Clifford Power Systems, Inc.

We are power experts, offering professional consulting with a focus on customer service across a five-state region in the south-central U.S. Our services include generator and power equipment sales, 24/7 service and planned maintenance for all generator makes and models, generator rental, parts, and service training.

Najważniejszym celem Izby jest poprawa pozycji konkurencyjnej jej Członków poprzez obniżanie kosztów związanych z pozyskiwaniem i wykorzystywaniem energii.

Name: Lanvs India Pvt. Ltd
Description:
LANVS India Pvt. Ltd, headquartered in Delhi, is a leading Diesel generator manufacturer and power solutions provider in India. As an authorized channel partner for Force MTU and a GOEM for VE Commercial Vehicles, we deliver high-performance gensets ranging from 25 kVA to 3000 kVA, built to power industries, institutions, and infrastructure with unmatched reliability and efficiency.
At LANVS, we go beyond supplying generators — we provide end-to-end energy solutions. Our nationwide spares and service network manages a large portfolio of Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMCs), ensuring seamless after-sales support, quickest response times, and minimal downtime for our clients.
With a focus on fuel-efficient performance, low-emission technology, and smart monitoring systems, LANVS India delivers next-generation diesel gensets that meet modern energy demands across sectors like manufacturing, hospitality, healthcare, construction, and data centers.
Driven by innovation and backed by engineering excellence, LANVS stands for dependability, sustainability, and power continuity helping businesses across India achieve energy resilience and operational excellence.
LANVS India is a trusted name in diesel generator manufacturing and power backup solutions across India. We provide high-performance gensets built with advanced low-emission technology, smart monitoring systems, and fuel-efficient engines engineered for industrial reliability and sustainable energy performance.

With a strong focus on energy efficiency, green technology, and Make-in-India engineering, our generators ensure an uninterrupted power supply, reduce operational costs, and meet next-generation emission standards.
At LANVS, innovation meets dependability. From customized power backup design to AMC services, on-site installation, and 24×7 technical support, we deliver complete turnkey power solutions for every industry.
We’re powering the nation with resilience because at LANVS, reliability is our energy.

Name: Edan Group International SAL
Description:
Edan Group International SAL has supplied, installed and commissioned more than 4000 power generation projects at a combined capacity of over 500MW in Lebanon, Asia, and Africa. Its projects have spanned over the industrial, residential and marine sectors powered by diesel, gasoline and LPG fuels. 

 Edan Group is also the exclusive distributor of KOHLER POWER SYSTEMS (generators, transfer switches, switchgears), ORMAZABAL (MV switchgear, Transformers, Ring Main Units), ECO PROZESS TECHNIK (Energy recovery systems, Industrial boilers), and HRO (Commercial and Industrial Watermakers) in Lebanon.

Name: PLN Nusantara Power Services
Description:
PT PLN Nusantara Power Services adalah anak perusahaan dari PT Nusantara Power, yang didirikan untuk memenuhi kebutuhan lini bisnis dalam memberikan jasa operasi dan pemeliharaan unit pembangkit listrik. Perusahaan ini didirikan pada tanggal 30 Maret, 2001 dengan prosentase kepemilikan saham 99% dimiliki oleh PT PJB dan 1% dimiliki oleh YK PT PJB (Yayasan Kesejahteraan PT PJB). Pada awalnya, PT PLN Nusantara Power hanya fokus pada bidang jasa pemeliharaan pembangkit listrik, kemudian berkembang menjadi perusahaan yang berkecimpung dalam jasa operasi dan pemeliharaan pembangkit listrik. Saat ini, PT PLN Nusantara Power telah berhasil Go International dengan pengalaman profesional seperti di Singapura, Malaysia, Kuwait, China dan Arab Saudi dengan reputasi yang baik.

PT PLN NUsantara Power Services telah memperoleh ISO 9001:2000 nomor sertifikat: 01 100 0187 87 pada tanggal 25 Maret 2002 untuk "Manajemen jasa untuk Relokasi, Rehabilitasi, Operasi dan Pemeliharaan Pembangkit Listrik" dari sertifikasi lembaga Jerman “TÜV CERT Certification Body The TÜV Anlagentechnik GmbH”. Pada tahun 2011 PT PLN Nusantara Power memperbaharui ISO untuk 9001:2008.

Name: Conduit Power
Description:
Conduit Power is an Independent Power Producer (IPP) and services platform dedicated to delivering total power solutions for commercial and industrial customers. We specialize in designing, building, owning, and operating natural gas and battery storage power generation assets.
 
Our mission is to help customers accelerate in-service dates, reduce energy costs, enhance operational performance, lower carbon emissions, and unlock greater value from natural gas. By combining on-site generation with a robust services platform, Conduit Power enables businesses to take control of their energy future with reliable, scalable, and cost-effective solutions.
 
Learn more at www.conduitpower.co.

Name: Centrale bioénergie du Larivot
Description:
La future centrale bioénergie du Larivot est un projet clé pour la Guyane. Avec un fonctionnement à la biomasse liquide, elle permettra à la Guyane de franchir une étape significative vers le 100% énergie renouvelable tout en étant garantie. Sa construction est le chantier le plus important à ce jour confié à des entreprises guyanaises. 

Avec une puissance garantie de 120 MW, elle se situe dans une zone industrielle stratégique, bénéficiant d'une proximité optimale avec les lignes à haute tension. 

Grâce à sa capacité de production modulable, elle peut s'adapter aux besoins énergétiques de la population en temps réel, ce qui en fait une solution innovante et durable pour sécuriser l'approvisionnement en énergie de la Guyane et favoriser son développement.

Name: Ecogas
Description:
Ecogas was created to solve the food waste problem for New Zealand homes and businesses.
We support development of a sustainable circular food and energy system in New Zealand through the operation of Anaerobic Digestion facilities.
To do this, we partner with likeminded businesses to redirect food waste away from landfills and instead uses it to create truly sustainable energy, biogas and organic fertiliser.
Ecogas is backed by two businesses with stellar track records in asset management services and food waste recovery: Pioneer Energy and EcoStock Supplies.

Name: TURBINE-X Energy Inc.
Description:
Most power system providers limit support to their own brands. 
In response, we founded X-Group with the core objective to change this practice in the industry. TURBINE-X sets you free to choose cross-platform energy solutions that reduce cost and carbon footprint. 

We believe companies should never put product sales ahead of their customers' success. Our vendor-neutral approach considers all possibilities of OEM hardware, optimizing for your needs, budget and future.

 We listen and help you solve for X. 

 We'll not only help you with turbine or reciprocating engine-driven power systems, we'll help you benefit from new technologies for intelligent ESG (environmental, social, and governance) performance growth. Our lifecycle support will move you from feeling cornered to confident.

We'll walk with you through every project phase, from concept to completion for all rotating equipment, and guide you with the capability and synergy the X-Group of Companies brings.

We provide in-house engineering and design; experienced equipment overhaul teams; seasoned field service personnel; the latest tools and technology research; and OEM experts who work collaboratively on equipment issues to develop customized solutions.

We are the world's leading provider of cross-platform solutions for evolving power systems. 
 
The future of power is bright.

Name: BPower Energia
Description:
BPower Energia è una società che opera nel mercato dell' energia e del gas e dell'efficienza energetica.

L'azienda ha costruito nel tempo consolidate relazioni di partnership, con produttori internazionali che garantiscono grande affidabilità e massima convenienza, garantendo in questo modo l’erogazione di un servizio energetico veramente competitivo.

Gestisce grazie a personale qualificato e con certificazione di Energy Manager, un portafoglio di circa 100 milioni di kilowatt.

Fiore all’occhiello dell’azienda è l’organizzazione con cui gestisce il post vendita, componente fondamentale per una fornitura che possa soddisfare nel tempo le esigenze dei clienti acquisiti.

Name: Generator Services, Inc

Our team is with you all the time, all the way, regardless of size or request because in an emergency, seconds save lives.

Iran Section oversees the operation of about 30 student branches, hosts of annual national conferences, events, meetings, and workshops.

Name: Grupo Quanta
Description:
A Quanta é uma empresa que gera energia solar e hídrica através de usinas próprias, localizadas no Estado do Rio de Janeiro e Minas Gerais.

Ao total são 10 Pequenas Centrais Hidrelétricas – PCH’s, 3 Usinas Solares e 1 Complexo Hídrico-Solar que atendem mais de 440 unidades consumidoras distribuídas em 17 Estados do País.

Ficou interessado em conhecer a Quanta?

Name: Clean Energy Capital ('CEC')
Description:
Clean Energy Capital ('CEC') is a renewable energy development company focussing on large-scale solar, storage and wind projects, with the intention of supplying low-cost, clean power to energy intensive users.

We identify, permit, build, own and operate our projects, offering attractive propositions to both landowners and businesses.

Save Money, Go Green and Reduce your Carbon Footprint with the CEC Solution.

	Businesses: Achieve an immediate reduction in your energy costs with a stable long-term power price through a power purchase agreement (PPA)

	Landowners: Make your land work for you with additional high rental incomes or lumpsum payments whilst maintaining biodiversity

Name: OPG Power
Description:
OPG Power is part of the OPG Group, a diversified business enterprise founded by Arvind Gupta. We are an independent power producer that has been operating in India for over 15 years, delivering reliable and cost-effective thermal energy to support the country's industrial and economic growth.

Our core focus is providing uninterrupted base-load power to sectors such as manufacturing, infrastructure, logistics, and other energy-intensive industries. OPG Power operates and develops power generation assets across India and currently has 414 MW in operation, primarily under the group captive model.  With a key power plant located in Tamil Nadu, we supply electricity through bilateral contracts and open access, helping businesses meet their energy needs with efficiency and stability.

Over the years, we have built a reputation for operational excellence, environmental responsibility, and long-term value creation. While India accelerates its energy transition, OPG Power Ventures continues to play a vital role in ensuring stable power supply for the industries that drive progress.

We remain committed to powering everyday operations with dependable energy and serving as a trusted partner in India's evolving energy landscape. #PoweringEveryday

Name: Devoll Hydropower Sh.A.
Description:
Devoll Hydropower Sh.A. (DHP) është një kompani e regjistruar në Shqipëri, nën pronësi dhe e operuar prej kompanisë norvegjeze Statkraft AS. Në përputhje me një Marrëveshje Koncesioni të nënshkruar dhe miratuar nga Parlamenti Shqiptar në 2009, Devoll Hydropower ka ndërtuar dhe operon hidrocentralet e Banjës dhe Moglicës në kaskadën përgjatë Lumit Devoll, i cili ndodhet në pjesën jug-lindore të Shqipërisë. Kapaciteti total i instaluar i hidrocentraleve është rreth 269 MW.

DHP ka zyrat e saj në Tiranë dhe Banjë dhe operon një Qendër për Informimin e Publikut pranë zyrave të HEC Banjë.
 
--------------------
 
Devoll Hydropower Sh.A. (DHP) is an Albanian registered company, owned and operated by the Norwegian power company Statkraft AS. In line with a Concession Agreement signed and approved by the Albanian Parliament in 2009, Devoll Hydropower has implemented and is operating the  Banja & Moglicë  hydropower plants in cascade along the Devoll River, in southeast Albania. The total installed capacity of the hydropower plants is approx. 269 MW. 

DHP has its offices in Tirana and Banja, and also operates a Public Information Centre in the offices near Banja HPP.

Name: Atlantic Green
Description:
Atlantic Green is joint venture between two entrepreneurial shareholders, Interland and Nofar Energy. Atlantic Green focuses on investing, developing and operating grid-scale battery energy storage projects in the United Kingdom.

Nofar Energy (TASE:NOFR) is a global Independent Power Producer and developer of renewable energy assets, specialising in solar and battery energy storage. Nofar Energy has an operating and under construction portfolio of c. 1.1GW of solar and energy storage assets across Israel, Spain, Italy, UK, US, Romania and Poland. 

Interland is a private real estate investment group that owns, develops and operates real estate and renewable energy assets and businesses in the United Kingdom, Netherlands and Belgium.

Atlantic Green is currently developing a pipeline of Battery Energy Storage projects with a total capacity of c. 500 MW. We aim to become a leading player in the UK BESS market, with c. 1.5 GWh of energised assets in the next 5 years.

Battery energy storage assets can stabilise grid fluctuations, reduce electricity price volatility, enabling the long-term transition from fossil fuels to renewable energies. 

A continuous development of battery energy storage is a vital step in the UK’s journey to achieving net-zero carbon emissions by 2050 and in increasing the country’s power autonomy and energy security.

Name: Rye Development
Description: Rye Development is advancing America’s next generation of pumped storage hydropower, the largest and most proven form of energy storage. Our diverse portfolio of energy storage projects helps ensure people will have reliable access to energy when they need it. We develop projects from inception to operations through site identification, permitting, offtake and construction. Rye works in partnership with utilities, policymakers, community leaders and other stakeholders to bring pumped storage hydropower projects to life.

EGESA Elektrik İnşaat Enerji Üretim A.Ş enerji sektörünün lider mühendislik ve taahhüt firmasıdır. Tecrübeli ve genç bir yönetici ekibin liderliğinde; her yeni projede dinamikliğiyle daha ileriye giderek ülke ekonomisine katkıda bulunmaktadır.

Şirketimizin başarısı kuruluşundan itibaren çok sayıda tamamlanmış projeye dayanan iş tecrübesine, mühendislik ve taahhüt uzmanlığı hizmetlerinden gelen derin bilgi birikimine dayanır. EGESA Elektrik İnşaat Enerji Üretim A.Ş. alanında uzman kadrosuyla müşterilerinin beklentilerinin üzerinde hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Alpha Generation
Description:
Alpha Generation manages and operates power generation facilities that are well positioned to provide reliable, secure, safe, and sustainable sources of power and meet the growing infrastructure needs created by electrification. This diverse portfolio of assets is owned by funds managed by ArcLight Capital Partners, LLC, a leading middle-market, value added infrastructure investment firm with strategic partnerships and investments across the power, renewables, strategic gas, battery storage, and transformative infrastructure sectors.

AlphaGen is led by a deeply experienced senior management team with a proven track record of strategic, operational, and commercial expertise to help create value and manage risk.

To provide excellent contributions for the growth of Egypt and Africa by delivering high valued Engineering, Power Technology ,QA/QC , Trading and Inspection services.

With international key customers and equipment installed in over 75 countries, VibroSystM’s continuing growth is based on state-of-the-art expertise.

Name: EnergyPro Generators
Description:
We are an experienced group in the field of power generators, with over 15 years of expertise in all areas including sales, maintenance, design, implementation, and providing engineering consultations in the generator field. You may think this is the end of the sentence, but it’s just the beginning of our journey.

At our company, we pride ourselves on delivering top-notch services and solutions to meet all your power generation needs. Whether you require a generator for residential, commercial, or industrial purposes, we have the knowledge and experience to provide you with the best options tailored to your specific requirements.

Our team of highly skilled professionals is dedicated to ensuring the highest level of customer satisfaction. We understand the importance of reliable power supply and the impact it has on your daily operations. That’s why we go above and beyond to deliver efficient and cost-effective solutions that meet your power demands.

In addition to our expertise in generator sales and maintenance, we also specialize in design and implementation. We can assist you in creating a customized power generation system that perfectly fits your needs and maximizes efficiency.

Furthermore, we offer comprehensive engineering consultations to address any technical challenges you may encounter. Our team of experts is always ready to provide guidance and support, ensuring that you make informed decisions regarding your power generation requirements.

Choose us for all your power generator needs, and experience the professionalism, reliability, and expertise that sets us apart. Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can assist you in achieving uninterrupted power supply.

Name: AS Graanul Invest
Description:
Graanul Invest Group is the world’s leading sustainable biomass and bioenergy producer. For over 20 years, we have dedicated ourselves to developing and re-inventing the bioenergy sector. 

As a forefront player in renewable energy, we operate 12 modern pellet plants, 6 CHPs, and 4 vessels in the Baltics and the U.S. Our commitment and leadership in biomass are key to meeting the global climate challenge.

With our cutting-edge processes and technologies, we have established ourselves as the industry leader in efficiency, sustainability, and reliability.
 
Graanul Invest operates in two main business areas: producing environmentally friendly, carbon-neutral wood pellets and generating green electricity and heat from forestry and wood industry by-products. We make both premium-grade and industrial wood pellets with exemplary quality.
 
Our mission is to accelerate the advancement of science-driven sustainable bio-economy and the uptake of biomass opportunities. Tackling climate change has never been more important, and urgent action is needed to reduce fossil emissions. The world urgently needs solutions that are effective here and now. Our wood pellets and bioenergy are immediate and cost-efficient substitutes for fossil fuels across industries. Our commitment and leadership in biomass are key to meeting the global climate challenge.

Name: Steam
Description:
Steam is one of the world's leading geothermal consulting and engineering companies.

Founded in Italy in 1987, we provide geothermal developers with integrated Owner's Technical Advisory teams composed of geoscience, geothermal resource, surface engineering, environmental and business case experts. Together, we guide design and decision-making throughout the whole project lifecycle, effectively de-risking projects and maximizing shareholder returns.

With references in over 30 countries in the last decade and a portfolio of geothermal assignments totaling nearly 1 GW, we support our clients in every stage of the project timeline: Preliminary Studies; Surface and Deep Exploration; Engineering, Construction and Commissioning; and Operations.

To schedule a consultation, please write to us at info@steam-group.net.

"Electra POWER” is Israel’s leading energy solutions distribution company.

- Electric distribution

- Natural gas distribution
- Co-generation solutions
- Solar Energy solutions for residential and commercial

Electra Power has a customer base of over 500,000 residential, commercial, and strategic customers, and is a leader in the Israeli energy market, with best in class solutions, entrepreneurship spirit, and customer trust orientation. 
Electra Power is in process to engage and participate in the international renewable energy markets.

Description: Endeavor Energy is a leading independent power company focused on developing, acquiring, financing, constructing, owning, and operating power generation projects in Africa. Endeavor has catalyzed more than $1.6 billion of investment, with nearly 700 MW in three power generation projects under construction or in operation, and with another $4.4 billion of power generation projects under development.

Name: Genco Energia

Uma onda transformadora de energia!

Valorizamos o contato com nossos clientes, construindo relacionamentos fortes e duradouros, capazes de produzir parcerias para o planejamento de um futuro pautado na transição energética e no desenvolvimento sustentável.

Nossa equipe é composta por profissionais experientes e com uma longa história de sucesso dentro do setor de geração de energia, estando preparados para o presente e futuro do setor, desenvolvendo soluções criativas para demandas desafiadoras

Name: Elgór + Hansen SA
Description:
Elgór + Hansen SA provides technical solutions in the field of power supply systems, automation and control of machines and entire industrial facilities. We implement designs of electrical and electronic devices as well as automation and IT systems, including ATEX solutions for potentially explosive zones.

We have over 25 years of experience in creating solutions for the industry. We are part of the GRENEVIA Group.

Check what we do!

 Electrical equipment and components 
We manufacture components and devices for the distribution of electricity, power supply and control of machines and entire industrial installations, including in potentially explosive atmospheres or in areas with a high concentration of dust.

 Automation and software
We create widely understood automation systems and complete system control of industrial facilities. We enable full visualization, remote supervision and archiving of processes.

 Design and production of EMS electronics 
We design and provide assembly of electronic devices based on many years of experience and a modern, fully automated production line. We will also provide full traceability of the production process.

 Full investment support and 24/7 service support
We provide comprehensive services from design, through production, assembly, software implementation, to 24/7/365 service and repairs. We provide ongoing support via our online technical services or directly at customer.

Would you like to join our team? Visit our website:
 www.elgorhansen.com/kariera

Name: MAPA Turbines
Description:
Contact: sales@mapaturbines.com

MAPA Turbines provide Component Repair and Coatings services for industrial gas turbine parts. Our in-house processes enable the safe recovery and reliable life extension of B/E- as well as F-class technology blades, vanes, turbine combustion and large sheet metal components.

MAPA Turbines boasts state-of-the-art facilities covering 5,000m2, housing a wide range of specialized NDT, repair, and thermal spray processes, including HVOF/APS coatings and vacuum heat treatment.

Located in the vibrant university city of Lublin, Poland, MAPA Turbines is proud to build upon a strong foundation and legacy that spans over 21 years.

In 2002, Elbar BV pioneered gas turbine component repairs in Poland, setting the stage for a journey of excellence.

In 2008, these endeavors continued as part of Sulzer's Turbo Services group, contributing to our extensive expertise.

Fast forward to September 2023, and under new management and ownership, MAPA Turbines is thrilled to carry forward over two decades of knowledge and experience into an exciting future.

Our dedicated executive team comprises Pawel Krol (Operations & Engineering), Maurice Rutten (Sales) and Iwona Stolarska (Finance). Together with our excellent employees, we are fully committed to establishing a service organisation at its very core, with a simple mission: delivering beyond expectations.

Located just 1.5 hours southeast of Warsaw, our EU base provides the advantage of uncomplicated logistics, making us an "easy-to-do-business-with" platform.

Whether you're based in Europe or beyond, we invite you to come and see us. Our proximity to major European airports allows for convenient one-day visits to inspect your parts or experience our capabilities in real time.

Connect with us to see and hear what MAPA Turbines is all about, and let's shape the future of turbine component repair together! 

Contact sales@mapaturbines.com

Name: Termoeléctrica Manuel Belgrano S.A.

Com um modelo acessível e seguro, levamos energia solar por assinatura a consumidores que buscam alívio no orçamento sem complicar a rotina.

Para empresas e famílias, oferecemos um serviço prático, digital e confiável, com atendimento próximo e um time que cuida de tudo para que você economize todos os meses com tranquilidade.

Para proprietários de usinas solares, garantimos a gestão completa da energia, com contratos sólidos e retorno atrativo.

Na correria do dia a dia, escolha a economia.

Name: Forsa Energy
Description:
Forsa Energy is a UK based company formed in 2017 to develop, construct, own and operate flexible gas generation and energy storage assets. However its genesis stretches further back to 2011 when it started life as a renewables developer.

Forsa Energy has a history of developing & operating power generation. Under its previous name Velocita, the team developed, built & financed a sizeable renewable portfolio divesting the French renewable platform & UK operational & in-construction assets to institutional investors in 2016/17. In 2017, the business rebranded and entered the flexible gas generation market to meet the UK’s strategic need for flexibility with power generation.

The Company is now part of private equity group Tiger Infrastructure Partners network and resource portfolio. Tiger has over $1.7bn under management and has currently 19 portfolio companies.

Description:
ENTRA1 Energy is an American independent energy company that develops, finances, and owns power generation assets. 

The company is focused on deploying safe, reliable, and scalable nuclear, natural gas, and other baseload energy solutions to strengthen power production for AI, industry, and national energy security. 

In addition, ENTRA1 invests in and commercializes next-generation advanced energy technologies by integrating them directly into its power infrastructure assets.

At Paradigm Power Delivery, we keep communities powered and connected by supporting municipalities and energy providers in the construction and repair of electrical substations and power lines. Our mission is to eliminate costly delays and operational setbacks through integrated electrical construction teams capable of executing everything from minor upgrades to full-scale turnkey installations—with safety, quality, and efficiency at the core of every project.
With offices located in Moorhead, MN, and Overland Park, KS, Paradigm serves electric co-op and municipal substations that demand reliable, responsive, and high-quality execution. Whether we’re modernizing existing infrastructure or building from the ground up, we self-perform all aspects of electrical construction to give clients tighter control over timelines, performance, and safety outcomes.
Getting a dependable supply of power to customers is non-negotiable. From electric co-ops to municipal utilities, our experienced crews bring power to the people—without compromise.

One Source. Many Solutions.
With a unified network of specialized subsidiaries, BPI provides a comprehensive portfolio of energy expertise under one roof. Our collaborative approach removes complexity, ensures consistency, and drives innovation across every engagement.

This would further support the energy transition in the country and our targets to move towards cleaner energy sources. The proposed National Mission on biomass will also contribute in the National Clean Air Programme (NCAP).

Ce modèle permet dès aujourd’hui de se fournir en électricité 100% renouvelable, produite par plus de 400 producteurs locaux dont la moitié sont des projets citoyens et/ou des collectivités. Au plus près des territoires, l’action d’Enercoop participe à remettre les énergies renouvelables entre les mains des citoyen·nes, en soutenant les initiatives locales visant à créer de nouveaux sites de production d’électricité verte.

Name: FG Wilson Enerji Çözümleri
Description:
FG WILSON TÜRKİYE

Borusan Enerji Çözümleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. , Türkiye ve Kuzey Irak’ta gelişen iş hacmi, pazar ve müşteri beklentilerini en uygun ve verimli şekilde karşılamak üzere faaliyet göstermektedir. Avrupa’nın en büyük jeneratör üreticisi olan FG Wilson’ın bölgesel distribütörü olan Borusan Enerji Çözümleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş., sürdürülebilir güç ihtiyacınızı karşılamak üzere, uzman ve yetkin teknik kadrosu ile paydaşlarına kaliteli ve güvenilir hizmet vermeyi ilke edinmiştir.

İstanbul Kartal’daki Genel Müdürlüğümüz, Ankara Marmara, Ege – Akdeniz ile Erbil’deki Kuzey Irak Bölge Müdürlüğümüz’de bulunan, uzun yıllara ve zorlu çevre koşullarına dayalı bilgi birikimine ve deneyime sahip uzman kadromuz ile, projelerinize özgü ihtiyaçlarınız için en uygun çözümleri sunmak üzere gerekli desteği vermeye hazırız. Projelerinizin tasarım ve yapılandırma aşamalarından başlayarak jeneratörlerin montaj ve devreye alma aşamalarına kadar tüm süreci kapsayan anahtar teslim çözümler sunmaktayız.

Name: Fleete Group
Description:
Fleete is committed to accelerating the transition to net zero by supporting businesses to achieve a fully electric vehicle (EV) fleet. 
Established by Macquarie Asset Management’s Green Investment Group, we are at the forefront of fleet-charging innovation. 

We partner with our clients to offer three holistic offerings (Charging Infrastructure, Intelligent Energy management and EV Fleet Consultation) that caters for all commercial EV fleets – electric cars, vans, buses and heavy goods vehicles. With our all-encompassing propositions, we aim to make the transition to electric fleets as economical, efficient and easy as possible.

Our goal is to help make the transition to electric vehicles seamless by providing charging solutions at drivers workplaces and destinations that integrate with their lifestyles whilst providing customer service on a local level via our privately owned public charging Network.

Name: Energyminer GmbH
Description:
We are revolutionizing hydropower by introducing a crucial form of base load-capable renewable energy generation. This approach is essential for achieving our energy transition goals. 
𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐜𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧, 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥 𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐲 𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥 𝐝𝐫𝐚𝐰𝐛𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐬. 

Our solution, the Energyfish, is a scalable micro hydroelectric power production device designed to be suspended in rivers. It harnesses the water's flow to generate electricity. Our patent-pending technology ensures high efficiency, driving remarkable profitability. Notably, this is accomplished without the need for dam walls, while also safeguarding the local flora and fauna. Our objective is ambitious: within the next 5 years, we aim to deploy enough Energyfish to replace a significant coal-fired power plant in Germany. Looking ahead 10 years, our vision expands to installing over 100,000 Energyfish units across Europe, thereby establishing the largest virtual hydroelectric power station on the continent.

Name: Dipro Conductores Eléctricos PY

Nuestra planta en Paraguay cuenta con tecnología de punta y procesos eficientes para garantizar la producción de productos de alta calidad que cumplen con las normas internacionales y las necesidades específicas de nuestros clientes.

Name: TOFA LTD
Description:
TOFA Limited is an electrical engineering ﬁrm providing professional and aﬀordable Power Generation services, in addition to Transmission and Distribution systems amenities. TOFA also specializes in engineering consultancy and electrical systems designs, as well as power system repairs and upgrades.

The highly experienced TOFA team serves public and private corporations, commercial and industrial clients.
TOFA’s services include planning, design, execution and operations of Power Generating Stations, Transmission and Sub-Transmission Lines , Distribution Substations, Distribution Networks and Switching Stations.

TOFA’s experience comes from over 30 years of installing and operating power generating plants and distribution systems in various sizes. TOFA’s mother company was established in Lebanon in 1986 and has been since then generating and distributing over 40 MW of power to around 4,000 commercial, residential and industrial accounts.

TOFA’s acute attention and professionalism in implementing its business and its in-depth understanding of its client’s energy needs, coupled with, cutting edge technology solutions and cumulative decades of hands-on experience make it a trustful partner for business growth.

Today, ENG8 has a team of 30 plus scientists and engineers with decades of experience working on LENR/catalysed fusion technologies and power generation.

ENG8 is developing a range of practical, cost-effective, catalyst fusion reactors, EnergiCells, which have been independently validated. 

Catalysed fusion specialists at ENG8 International have achieved another global first in the race for fusion energy. Specialists have confirmed the results of the latest independent validation of its EnergiCell, conducted by world-renowned LENR expert Dr Jean-Paul Biberian, confirming that the system can be self-powering and export net electricity.

Investors now have the opportunity to contribute to ENG8 in order to accelerate further development and commercial deployment.

Name: OCTOMETHA
Description:
OCTOMETHA est spécialisée dans la conception et la commercialisation d'installations de 𝗺𝗲́𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗶𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗮𝗴𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗲 en voie liquide alimentées en continu avec des matières organiques sèches (voie pâteuse). 
Ces installations sont conçues pour être : 
 simples, 
robustes 
et adaptées aux besoins des fermes françaises. 

Notre solution innovante de méthanisation permet de traiter les déchets de l'exploitation agricole (lisier, pailles, fumier, cannes longues, etc..) de manière 𝗲𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗰𝗲 et 𝘀𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲́𝗲. 

Les digesteurs utilisés dans nos installations sont conçus pour être  facile à installer et à utiliser, et reposent sur les propriétés de rhéologie spécifique du fumier ou de la paille arrosés. 
Les matières avancent toutes seules dans les digesteurs, sans besoin de systèmes mécaniques énergivores et compliqués. 

La construction des installations est assurée par des sous-traitants partenaires spécialisés dans le génie civil, l’étanchéité, la conception et la pose des bâches ainsi que sur la valorisation du biogaz soit en cogénération soit en injection. 
Les installations proposées par OCTOMETHA ont des puissances de 80 à 250 kWe pour les unités individuelles et des capacités de 100 à 400 Nm3/h pour les installations collectives. Elles permettent de produire de l'électricité ou d’injecter du biométhane dans le réseau de gaz après épuration du biogaz. 

 Nous avons travaillé pour minimiser les coûts d'exploitation et de fabrication, nos installations ont un coût inférieur de 35 %, comparé aux produits actuels. 
Les extrémités du digesteur sont standardisées, l’ajustement de la longueur du digesteur (de 32m3 de volume utile par mètre linéaire pour les installations à la ferme, à 64m3 de volume utile par mètre linéaire pour les installations en injection) permet de répondre de manière flexible aux différents gisements à valoriser et à la puissance souhaitée.

Pour nous contacter : www.octometha.com ou messages privés

Name: MV Dugar Hydro Division
Description:
Established in 1884, MV Dugar group is one of the esteemed business houses in Nepal. The commercial conglomerate encompasses agriculture, hydropower, banking, insurance, automotive, import, and export sectors. It is a pioneer in international trade in Nepal and takes pride in being the first-ever business in the country to have imported goods on a large scale. 

With its humble beginnings in the food grain sector, the group ventured into the manufacturing business. Its impact proved to be the major catalyst of the industrial revolution in Nepal. MV Dugar is also one of the largest private sector contributors to the infrastructure and rural development of Nepal. Today, with 32 branches and 4 hydropowers across the country and diversified business ventures, the group has been pursuing new heights relentlessly.

Description:

As the top supplier of industrial container applications for power generation in the U.S., we deliver UL-certified enclosures and fuel tanks that ensure the highest standards of safety, durability, and performance.

Locations:
Houston, TX
Katy, TX
Miami, FL

Why work with us?

 Fastest lead times in the industry!

 Industry Leader in stationary and mobile generator enclosures
We are the #1 supplier of mobile generator applications for the power generation industry. We are also a top supplier of stationary generator enclosures geared towards the mission critical/ data center industry. 

 UL-Certified for Safety & Compliance
We hold UL 2200 certification for our stationary generator enclosures 500-4000 KW and UL 142 certification for our stand-up and sub- base tanks.

 In-House Manufacturing & Large-Scale Production
With three state-of-the-art facilities, we manufacture all components in-house for total quality control, faster lead times, and the capacity to handle high-volume production demands.

 Custom Solutions for Diverse Industrial Applications
We provide generator enclosures, water treatment enclosures, battery storage, and disaster relief shelters, with the ability to retrofit and modify enclosures to meet unique client specifications.

 Durability & Performance You Can Trust
Our enclosures are built to withstand harsh environments and extreme weather, ensuring long-term protection, optimized ventilation, and noise reduction, available in both stationary and mobile configurations.

 Proudly Made in America
Our U.S.-based manufacturing ensures higher quality, shorter lead times, and strict compliance, making us the preferred partner for industry leaders in power generation and water infrastructure.

Name: Powertica Energie a.s.
Description:
Powertica Energie a.s.
Váš silný a spolehlivý partner v měnícím se světě energií

Powertica Energie a.s. je obchodní společnost zajišťující dodávky elektřiny a zemního plynu koncovým zákazníkům v celé České republice. Zaměřujeme se především na velké a střední odběratele z oblasti průmyslu, služeb a veřejného sektoru.

Našim klientům nabízíme komplexní energetická řešení – od nákupu elektřiny a plynu až po záruky původu, PPA kontrakty z obnovitelných zdrojů a další udržitelné komodity, jako je biometan.

Součástí našich služeb je také energetické poradenství a možnost zapojení do agregace flexibility, která pomáhá optimalizovat spotřebu a využití energie.

Díky široké nabídce produktů a služeb, zkušenému týmu odborníků a proaktivnímu pří-stupu k aktuálním tématům evropské energetiky svým zákazníkům umožňuje spolehlivý a udržitelný přechod na nízkoemisní formy energie, při optimálním pokrytí jejich energetických potřeb.

Name: Hellenic Association of Biogas Producers
Description:
Ο Ελληνικός Σύνδεσμος Παραγωγών Βιοαερίου-ΕΣΠΑΒ ιδρύθηκε το 2018, με σκοπό να ενισχύσει την βιώσιμη ανάπτυξη του κλάδου και να προάγει το βιοαέριο ως μία καινοτόμα πηγή ανανεώσιμης ενέργειας η οποία μπορεί να συμβάλει σημαντικά στην ενεργειακή μετάβαση της χώρας.

Στόχος του ΕΣΠΑΒ είναι η προώθηση της παραγωγής και χρήσης των ανανεώσιμων αερίων πανελλαδικά, καθώς και η ανάδειξη των οφελών που μπορεί να προσφέρει η παραγωγή βιοαερίου σε μία από τις πιο καίριες περιβαλλοντικές προκλήσεις, που είναι η παραγωγή αποβλήτων και η μετατροπή αυτών σε προϊόντα αυξημένης αξίας, όπως η ανανεώσιμη ενέργεια και παράλληλα το φυσικό λίπασμα για την γεωργία, συμβάλλοντας έτσι στην κοινωνική και οικονομική ανάπτυξη.

Name: Consórcio Empresarial Salto Pilão - CESAP
Description:
O CESAP - Consórcio Empresarial Salto Pilão é a empresa responsável pela concessão da Usina Hidrelétrica Salto Pilão, junto ao rio Itajaí-Açu, entre os municípios de Apiúna, Ibirama e Lontras, na região do Vale do Itajaí.

A Usina conta com potência instalada de 191,89 MW, conectada ao Sistema Interligado Nacional (SIN) e despachada pelo Operador Nacional do Sistema Elétrico (ONS). Aproveitando o grande potencial hidráulico do Rio Itajaí-Açu, transformamos a força de suas águas em energia para o desenvolvimento de forma sustentável e beneficiando cerca de 700 mil pessoas no Vale do Itajaí.

O CESAP tem como consorciadas, o Grupo Votorantim, através da Companhia Brasileira de Alumínio (CBA) com 60%, DME Energética, com 20% e Companhia Geração de Energia Pilão - (CGEP) com 20 %.

Nossa missão é gerar energia elétrica com segurança, eficiência e responsabilidade socioambiental, atendendo as expectativas das consorciadas e partes interessadas.

Name: PT Bukit Pembangkit Innovative
Description:
PT Bukit Pembangkit Innovative (PT BPI) was established in August 2007 as a consortium involving three companies: PT Bukit Asam (PTBA), PT PLN Nusantara Power (PLNNP), and PT Navigat Innovative Indonesia (NII). The company operates as an Independent Power Producer (IPP) specializing in electricity generation.

Currently, the company oversees the Banjarsari Steam Power Plant with a capacity of 2x135 MW, situated in Desa Sirah Pulau and Desa Gunung Kembang, Kecamatan Merapi Timur, Kabupaten Lahat, South Sumatra. The Representative Office is located at Graha Surveyor, 17th floor, Jalan Gatot Subroto Kavling 56, South Jakarta.

The construction of PLTU Banjarsari commenced in 2012, was completed in mid-2015, and commercially operated since July 2015. With an environmentally friendly Circulated Fluidized Bed Boiler (CFB) technology, the 2x135 MW PLTU Banjarsari contributes to sustainable energy production.

Name: Mongoose Power Solutions, LLC
Description:
Mongoose Power Solutions is a key player in the onsite and emergency power industry, acting as an advocate, educator, and diesel fuel specialist. We strive to connect independent service providers, manufacturers, regulatory agencies, and end-users. We are a Certified Woman Owned Company.

Our founder, Michelle Hilger’s extensive experience in diesel fuel and industry standards has given her a profound understanding of the regulatory challenges that can hinder progress. We know that regulations and codes can significantly impact your company’s growth.

Mongoose Power Solutions has built a strong reputation, allowing us to fulfill our mission of advocating for and empowering the onsite and emergency power sector. We are pioneers and grassroots leaders, not just driving the industry forward, but actively guiding its evolution.

We aim to empower customers to advocate for themselves. Mongoose is at the forefront of educating the governing bodies that create and enforce codes and standards, as well as the customers they serve. 

Under the Mongoose Power Solutions umbrella are Mongoose Diesel Fuel Specialists and OnSite Power Academy.

La nostra missione è migliorare il pianeta attraverso i nostri investimenti e creare valore per i nostri azionisti e per i nostri clienti con indipendenza, affidabilità, trasparenza, integrità e nel rispetto dei più alti standard di professionalità.

Il nostro team, attivo nel settore dell’energia da più di 10 anni, ha sviluppato competenze multidisciplinari nella gestione di impianti di energia e forti relazioni con partner “chiave”.
Gestiamo efficacemente sia le attività ordinarie – supervisione della manutenzione, monitoraggio e reportistica, amministrazione, gestione del finanziamento, delle assicurazioni e della sorveglianza, trading di energia – che straordinarie, garantendo valore aggiunto e alte performance ai proprietari degli asset.

Siamo consulenti finanziari attivi nell’origination, M&A (sia sell-side che buy-side) leveraged buy-out, joint venture, disinvestimenti e altre ristrutturazioni.

Name: AEROVIT A/S
Description:
We specialize in keeping boilers clean – Efficiently and reliably

Since 1981, Aerovit A/S has led the way in boiler cleaning technology, helping industries improve efficiency with our expertise in removing soot, ash, and fouling. With more than 3,700 systems installed worldwide to boiler manufacturers, biomass boilers and Waste-to-Energy plants Aerovit continues to lead in boiler cleaning innovation and excellence. 

At Aerovit, we focus on solving the challenges our customers experience in their boiler operations. Unstable heat transfer, unplanned downtime, increased fuel consumption and CO₂ emissions is some of the general challenges they experience. Our mission is to eliminate these challenges with our automatic boiler cleaning solutions, that keep boilers operating at peak performance and secure a strong return on investment.

Every Aerovit boiler cleaning system is designed, manufactured, and managed in-house by our experienced team. This ensures complete control over quality, performance, and project management - From concept to commissioning. Our proven technology is adapted to each customer’s boiler type and operating conditions, delivering customized solutions that combine stable heat transfer, continuous operation and reduced maintenance needs.

With Aerovit boiler cleaning solutions, customers can achieve ROI within 3–24 months, driven by reduced fuel consumption, reduced maintenance and downtime. Besides efficiency gains, our solutions also improve the working environment, reducing manual cleaning and exposure to dust and hazardous environments for the workers.

We have in-depth experience with various types of boilers such as: firetube, water tube, marine, Waste-to-Energy and biomass boilers, economizers, heat exchangers, catalysts, thermal oil coils or coal combustion for power generation.

Name: GPC Infrastructure
Description:
Founded by energy veterans and backed by an established energy private equity firm, GPC Infrastructure delivers long-term gas-powered energy solutions for data centers. As a behind the meter independent power producer, GPC owns and operates natural gas generation that can scale from 100 MW to 1 GW, managing all aspects of the gas supply chain.   

GPC enters into long-term power purchase agreements with data centers or directly with tenants, providing "energy as a service" as a reliable alternative to the grid and an "easy button" for our customers. These agreements include options for carbon neutrality, such as carbon sequestration or blending biogas, along with the ability to add capacity and/or switch to a more efficient generation configuration over time, balancing speed to market with cost and sustainability.

GPC collaborates with data center operators to evaluate landbank sites for on-site power or provides access to our portfolio of greenfield sites located in ERCOT and PJM for co-located data center and power development.  GPC empowers data centers to control their energy future thru reliable on-site generation, overcoming the uncertainty of utility power, and scaling in response to the capacity demands of their customers.

Name: REPS-Tirol GmbH
Description:
REPS (Road Energy Production System) ist ein Start up und beschreibt einen mechanischen Energiewandler, der verlorene Energie von Kraftfahrzeugen in sauberen elektrischen Strom umwandeln kann. Der generierte Strom kann ins Netz eingespeist oder direkt vor Ort genutzt werden.
Das System erlaubt bei hohen Frequentierungen sowohl eine energetische, als auch eine wirtschaftliche Amortisierung. 

Dadurch kann REPS Straßen zu grünen Energiequellen transformieren und verwendet bereits versiegelte Fläche.

Unser Ziel ist es dabei, dass REPS nicht nur die Sicht  auf unsere aktuelle Energieproduktion radikal verändern kann, sondern auch einen wichtigen Beitrag zur momentanen Klimasituation leisten wird.

Name: Maspo Energy (Gürmen Group)
Description:
Türkiye’nin jeotermal kaynak açısından en aktif bölgelerinden birinde yer alan ruhsatlı sahamız, 12,650 km2’lik genişliğiyle Türkiye’deki en büyük jeotermal sahası olma özelliğine sahiptir.

Maspo Enerji toplam kurulu gücü, %100  yenilenebilir enerji gücüne dayanmaktadır. Çevreye verdiği önem ve duyarlılık esas alınmıştır.

Maspo Enerji, ruhsat sahasının potansiyelinin en doğru şekilde değerlendirilmesi ve sürdürebilir elektrik üretiminin temini için sahada; Jeolojik, jeokimya ve jeofizik araştırmaları, hidrotermal alterasyon çalışmalarının yanı sıra Türkiye’de ilk olarak uzun dönemli etkileşim ve izleyici (tracer) testleri gerçekleştirmiştir.

Maspo Enerji, 2010 yılında başladığı jeotermal enerji yatırmlarına  ALA-1 JES  10 MW lık yatırımı tamamlayarak, tesisi 03.06.2017 tarihinde T.C. Enerji ve Tabii Kaynaklar Bakanlığı tarafından geçici kabulü yapılarak işletmeye almıştır.

MASPO Enerji A.Ş.’nin Manisa Alaşehir’de Türkiye’nin en büyük ilk 10 jeotermal santrali arasında yerini alan 30 MW gücündeki ALA-2 jeotermal enerji santralinin T.C. Enerji ve Tabii Kaynaklar Bakanlığı tarafından geçici kabulü yapılarak 27 Eylül 2019’da işletmeye almıştır.

Ala-2 Jeotermal Enerji Santralinde Yönlü Sondaj Teknikleri kullanılmış, Tarım arazilerinde efektif tasarruf sağlanarak, 30 MW santral minumum bir alana yerleştirilmiştir.

Yenilenebilir enerjide güncel olarak yıllık 40 MW’lık üretime sahip olan ve toplamda 140 MW’lık kapasiteye ulaşmayı hedefleyen Maspo Enerji A.Ş., Aynı zamanda dünya yenilenebilir enerji ligi olarak adlandırılan RE100 platformuna da kabul edilerek Türkiye’de bir ilki gerçekleştirmiştir.


Jeotermal santrallerde enerji verimliliğini artırmak ve dışa bağımlılığı azaltmak üzere Türkiye’nin ilk JES AR-GE Merkezini kurmuştur.

Name: SimularT
Description:

Name: Cadre AS
Description:
Cadre er en norsk vannkraftsprodusent som eier, driver og utvikler småkraft. Vi er en trygg, erfaren og lønnsom partner for grunneiere over hele landet. Sammen skaper vi fornybar energi, vekst og verdier i hele Norge.  

Vi er stolte av å ha Nordkraft og HitecVision som våre største eiere. De investerer norsk kapital i at småkraften skal være en stor del av energiløsningen. Cadre har vokst raskt siden vi ble etablert i 2022. I løpet av få år skal vi levere 2 TWh vannkraft til Norge. Nok strøm til 125 000 norske husstander. 
 
Cadre bruker erfaringen vår til å få mer ut av elven, uten å ta mer av elven. Grunneiere og hele lokalsamfunnet rundt skal få sin rettmessige andel av verdiskapningen fra småkraftverkene våre, men de skal også være stolte over måten det skjer på. Cadre satser på nye løsninger og deler villig erfaringer med alle interesserte, blant annet om det som kalles «Norges første laksevennlige småkraftverk». 

Cadre har samlet ledende ekspertise på småkraft i kontorer langt utenfor Oslo, fordi vi vil og må være der det skjer. Vi er tett på hvert prosjekt og hver grunneier, fra kontrakten er signert og gjennom hele driftsperioden. Den suksessformelen gjør at vi får tillit fra stadig flere grunneiere.  

Har du et fall, utbyggingsprosjekt, en konsesjon eller et kraftverk i drift? 

Ta kontakt med oss!
