Name: Italian Geothermal Forum
Description: The Italian Geothermal Forum is the annual event aimed at exploring current sector developments and fostering international discussion on the potential and opportunities for geothermal energy use in a professional and impartial way. The program includes plenary sessions focused on dialogue between Italy and Europe, aiming to deepen the understanding of current and future market scenarios. The discussions will also involve representatives from national and regional institutions. Additionally, parallel technical sessions are planned, dedicated to low, medium, and high enthalpy geothermal energy, district heating and cooling, heat pumps, geothermal heat for industry, and strategic minerals from geothermal brines. Networking opportunities, media meetings, and the presence of research organizations and Italian and international associations will enhance the participants' experience.

Name: ENERGON ESCO S.P.A.
Description:
Energon Esco nata nel 2009 è una società che opera nel settore dell’efficienza energetica. 
Siamo una realtà completa in un mercato complesso, con l’obiettivo di migliorare la performance energetica delle aziende. 

Il nostro core business è la riqualificazione degli impianti energetici. Operiamo tramite la formula ESCo, realizzando gli impianti tramite il nostro investimento diretto e gestendoli al 100%, in cambio di un accordo di fornitura energetica pluriennale.

Abbiamo superato il concetto di centrale termica, il presente e il futuro risiedono nella Fabbrica di Energia. Una centrale smart che sfrutta il giusto mix tecnologico per assicurare al cliente sostenibilità economica e ambientale. 

Oltre alle fabbriche di Energia possiamo fornire un servizio integrato:
- svolgiamo con i nostri EGE certificati, audit e diagnosi 
 energetiche 
- veicoliamo l'accesso alla finanza agevolata su bandi e 
 incentivi energetici
- supportiamo la costruzione e la gestione di Comunità Energetiche o di altre configurazione giuridiche previste nel Decreto CACER
- garantiamo l'approvvigionamento della materia prima al miglior prezzo di mercato, grazie alla divisione Energon Trade.

Siamo una realtà in forte crescita, con 195 Fabbriche di Energia e un portafoglio attivo da 350 Mln di contratti, abbiamo raddoppiato l’organico interno negli ultimi due anni.

La nostra crescita si basa su persone e competenze: lavoriamo costantemente sulla formazione delle nostre risorse, accrescendo professionalità e identità di Gruppo. 

La nostra mission è quella di creare Fabbriche di Energia sostenibili e vantaggiose, garantendo performance costanti e accompagnando le aziende nel lungo periodo per ogni  esigenza energetica. 
Oltre e generare energia, puntiamo a generare valori, benessere per le persone, per i nostri partner, per l'ambiente. Per realizzare tutto questo crediamo nelle relazioni solide, nell'impegno e nell'innovazione.

Name: Australian Geothermal Association
Description:
The Australian Geothermal Association (AGA) was formed in 2016 to promote and encourage the science, technology and development of geothermal energy in Australia, and is affiliated with the International Geothermal Association (IGA).

The Board of Directors consists of:

President - Mark Ballesteros
Director - Graeme Beardsmore
Director - Trey Meckel
Director - Rosalind Archer
Secretary - Zoe Stackhouse
Treasurer - Jorik Poesse

Charles Davidson is the Chairman of the Hot Springs Special Interest Group.  AGA does not have any employees. 

AGA is a professional society whose members are individuals working in the industry, academia and government, with experiences covering the full range of geothermal applications from ground source heat pumps to direct industrial heat supply, recreational bathing and wellness, and electrical power generation.

We are the central point for information on all things geothermal. 

In saying that, the views and opinions of individual AGA members are their own and not those of AGA or its whole membership. 

AGA also does not support or endorse any particular supplier or technology used or supplied by any member or organisation.

All publications on Australian geothermal sector produced by AGA are accessible on our website at www.australiangeothermal.org.au. 

Contact AGA via email: info@australiangeothermal.org.au

Name: Foz do Chapecó Energia

Os acionistas da Foz do Chapecó Energia são a CPFL Energia, a Eletrobras e a CEEE Geração. Nossa barragem, com 598 metros de extensão e 48 metros de altura, foi a primeira no Brasil a utilizar a técnica do núcleo asfáltico, garantindo eficiência e segurança. 
 
Estamos sempre comprometidos com a responsabilidade socioambiental, implementando programas para a preservação ambiental e a melhoria da qualidade de vida das comunidades vizinhas. Para mais detalhes, acesse o site oficial Foz do Chapecó Energia.

Maruti Clean Coal and Power Limited (MCCPL) was originally incorporated under the name Maruti Explochem Private Limited on March 8, 1999 with the Registrar of Companies, Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh as a private limited company. Subsequently, the name of the Company was changed from Maruti Explochem Private Limited to Maruti Explochem Limited, pursuant to its conversion from a private limited company to a public limited company and a fresh certificate of incorporation was issued by the registrar of companies, Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh on September 17, 2002 in this regard.

Thereafter, the name of the Company was changed from Maruti Explochem Limited to Maruti Clean Coal and Power Limited and a fresh certificate of Incorporation was issued by the Registrar of Companies, Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh on September 25, 2002. The registered office of MCCPL is presently located at Ward No. 42, Building No. 14, Civil Lines, Near Income Tax Colony, Raipur, Chhattisgarh-492 001.

Name: Driving the Future
Description:
The power is in your hands to drive the future! Introducing a new, three-part video series on the role hydropower plays in the energy transition.
For a look at what we are already doing with hydropower, renowned Swiss adventurer and clean energy advocate, Bertrand Piccard, teams with science journalist, Sam Pauly, to set out on an epic 1,000km journey across Switzerland. The duo travel the whole way using only electric vehicles and visit several of the hydropower plants that produce the country’s green electricity. 

Along their journey, our adventurers also speak to key experts and decision makers, including a stop off in Bern to meet the current President of the Swiss Confederation, Ignacio Cassis. They also hear from Norwegian politician Erik Solheim, the former Executive Director of United Nations Environment Programme; Pascal Radue, the President and CEO of Hydro Solutions at GE Renewable Energy; Claudia Dobles Camargo, the former First Lady of Costa Rica; and Pablo Valverde, the Deputy CEO of International Hydropower Association, among others. 

This isn’t simply a story about zero-carbon vehicles and hydropower; it’s about reimagining the way we live, travel, and consume, applying existing technology, and accelerating the energy transition so we can overcome humanity’s greatest challenge. 

Bertrand and Sam’s Swiss adventure proves the potential that this approach has, now it’s up to us to follow through. As Bertrand puts it, “change is needed, and the solutions are already in our hands – the race is on!”

Follow us on our other social media channels:
 Instagram - @drivingthefuture_
 Facebook - Driving the Future
 Twitter - @rivethefuture_

Name: GOCER
Description:
GOCER è il network delle aziende e dei professionisti attivi nel settore delle energie rinnovabili che intendono attuare la Transizione Ecologica attraverso le Comunità Energetiche.

GOCER mette a disposizione dei partner il know-how acquisito con la realizzazione della prima C.E.R. d'Italia a Magliano Alpi (CN) e dalle successive collaborazioni avviate con istituzioni nazionali ed europee in ambito energetico.

Lo scopo di GOCER è quello di proporre al territorio gruppi locali con le capacità professionali necessarie all'attuazione dei progetti che, mantenendo la propria indipendenza ed i propri profitti, consentiranno alle C.E.R. di generare energia per condividere benefici.

Cosa puoi fare con GOCER:
-	Entrare a far parte di una comunità energetica. 
-	Investire in una comunità energetica. 
-	Creare la tua CER.

Perché prendere parte ad una Comunità Energetica con GOCER? 
Perché la produzione locale di energia rinnovabile da parte della comunità toglie potere ai grandi monopoli dell’energia estrattiva, rende le piccole realtà indipendenti creando un vantaggio economico per tutto il gruppo e contrasta la crisi climatica immettendo nel sistema energia pulita. 

Perché realizzare una comunità energetica con GOCER?
Perché si può raggiungere l’indipendenza energetica con un piccolo gruppo, il vicinato, il quartiere o la città senza coinvolgere grandi imprese. Una CER apporta un vantaggio economico a tutti gli attori partecipanti, protegge il territorio e salvaguardia l’ambiente.

Quali vantaggi offre una CER?
Energia pulita a prezzo vantaggioso per chi acquista, ritorno economico per chi vende energia.
Gli investimenti per l’energia restano a livello locale.
Si generano nuovi posti di lavoro sul territorio.
Si fa un passo concreto verso la transizione ecologica per raggiungere l’obiettivo di diventare a emissioni zero entro il 2050.

Name: Equinox Ocean Turbines BV
Description:
In this changing world, there’s an increasing need for clean and reliable sources of energy. Ocean Current energy can provide in that need. Worldwide, there's a huge energy potential in harvesting deep sea currents, with focus areas spread alongside the four continents.

The Promise of Ocean Currents:
The key advantage of Ocean currents is their predictability and constant flow; they are considered clean baseload by energy utility companies. Another feature is their relatively low speed, which minimizes installation and operational risks compared to other energy sources while providing excellent earning capacity -double the energy per megawatt installed compared to offshore wind.

The Challenge:
These low water flow speeds do present a technical challenge for the turbine; traditional turbine designs are uneconomical at very low flow speeds. Equinox utilizes a proprietary two-stage turbine technology, where energy is first concentrated before harvesting. Combined with smart material usage, this results in a highly scalable and economic product. Building on the experience and knowledge of existing, proven technology, Equinox aims to provide a commercial solution in five years.

Our Progress:
In July 2024 we’ve closed a seed funding round, allowing us to develop and build a scale model to prove our turbine concept.  From our HQ in Leeuwarden, Netherlands, we're starting this critical development phase, focused on validating our approach to harnessing Ocean Current energy. 

Follow our page and stay updated on our progress through our recent LinkedIn posts.


Contact us: 
Pieter de Haas, CEO
info@equinoxoceanturbines.com

Sonrasında Enerji Holding Sondaj Servisi tarafından üretim kuyuları açılmaya başlanmış ve başarılı sonuçlar elde edilmiştir.

Through our in-house developed remote monitoring solution, we manage and maintain the performance of our sets in real-time to ensure up time is kept to a maximum and incidents are responded to with minimal service interruption.

Our field service team is built out of seasoned technicians with the ability to deploy, install, service and fault-find on most industrial installations. We look after over 800 third-party sets of all types through ad-hoc service calls and fixed SLA based agreements country-wide.

As one of the few, if not only company to be awarded a NOSA certification in this field, our operations follow very strict compliance in Health & Safety and Environmental management.

Through smart partnerships with technology entrepreneurs, we are able to offer alternative energy and hybrid products that include long storage fuel cells and other related products for cleaner energy.

Name: Baseload Power US
Description:
The U.S. leads the world in geothermal power generation, yet this accounts for less than 1% of the country's total power production. Amidst the intensifying effects of climate change, states like California and Nevada have pledged to get 100% of their power from renewable energy by 2045 and 2050 respectively. 
 
Baseload Power U.S. aims to play an important part in meeting these goals. By building small-scale, zero-emissions binary power plants fueled by geothermal fluids, we have an incredible opportunity to develop this massive yet untapped renewable energy source.

So far we have one plant in operation and a second one on the way. We also have several land leases in Nevada, where we are actively are looking for new opportunities. In addition, we have signed a LOI to develop a pilot project together with Chevron Technology Ventures to advance lower-carbon energy production in the Oil and Gas industry.

A falta de dados e indicadores sobre a presença das mulheres no setor, a falta de um canal de comunicação e conexão entre a mulheres e a dificuldade para encontrar profissionais mulheres diversas trabalhando com biogás motivaram a criação de um grupo para integrar e promover a troca de experiências.

Somos uma iniciativa incubada pelo Instituto 17 e pautada pela Transição energética justa, Diversidade e representatividade, Empoderamento feminino, Respeito mútuo e diálogo, Sororidade, Ousadia e criatividade, Otimismo e Sustentabilidade.

A primeira reunião presencial aconteceu no início do ano, no 4º Fórum Sul Brasileiro de Biogás e Biometano, em Caxias do Sul/RS. Mais recentemente, a rede lançou o site e o Banco de Talentos para reunir e dar maior visibilidade para as profissionais mulheres que trabalham no setor de biogás.

Od prawie 25 lat pomagamy naszym Klientom rozwiązywać problemy związane z zarządzaniem szeroko rozumianą gospodarką energetyczną. Pracując z naszymi Klientami wypracowaliśmy własne podejście do przeprowadzania Transformacji Energetycznych w ich organizacjach. Nasz #ProgramTransformacjiEnergetycznej składa się z analizy stanu obecnego, stworzenia mapy drogowej transformacji, wdrożenia technologii/rozwiązań.

Nasi Klienci doceniają, iż w ramach prowadzonych przez nas Transformacji Energetycznych bierzemy odpowiedzialność za obniżenie kosztów energii oraz śladu węglowego, jednocześnie zapewniając poprawę bezpieczeństwa energetycznego.

Oprócz tworzenia, integrowania i wdrażania technologii, takich jak np. kogeneracja, trigeneracja, pompy ciepła, absorpcja czy fotowoltaika, rozwijamy również we własnym zakresie nowoczesne rozwiązania, takie jak inteligentny system zarządzania energią czy technologie wykorzystujące wodór.

W Polsce mamy 4 biura: Mielec- siedziba, Warszawa, Kraków i Tarnów. W naszej siedzibie, w Mielcu, znajduje się dział R&D oraz zakład produkcyjny.

Zabalgarbi es la planta de valorización energética de residuos de Bizkaia, ubicada en Bilbao.

Tiene como Misión ser un agente fundamental en la economía circular, contribuyendo a la solución integral del tratamiento de los residuos mediante la utilización de tecnologías innovadoras de valorización energética, aplicando la práctica de una gestión excelente basada en la transparencia, en el desarrollo profesional y en el firme compromiso con su entorno, velando por la salud de las Personas, el Medio Ambiente y por la Creación de Valor para el accionista.

Name: Transmark Renewables
Description:
Transmark Renewables is an independent power producer (IPP) and geothermal exploration and development company within the Transmark Group. Transmark Renewables has built a very strong and integrated geothermal platform, supported by:

    Transmark Renewables' project management & financial structuring expertise;
    Transmark Renewables' experience in geosciences
    Transmark Renewables' drilling management capabilities; and
    the Transmark Group's (financial) resources.

Transmark Renewables is becoming a significant player in the geothermal market and aims to contribute to the acceleration of the installed geothermal capacity all over the world. Transmark Renewables will focus on the establishment of a global platform of geothermal projects, either through partnerships with local developers or through greenfield development.

Transmark Renewables has a dedicated team fully focussed on the global exploration and development of geothermal energy resources.

Name: Grupo IMELSA
Description: Somos facilitadores de energía eficiente desde el diseño, construcción, operación y comercialización. Con un sello propio y un espíritu innovador, nos movilizamos en búsqueda de nuevas soluciones que impulsen el crecimiento del país a través de productos y servicios energéticos tecnológicos y sustentables, de base en la economía circular, reconvirtiendo para generar nuevas alternativas eléctricas y siempre conectados con lo que requieren y beneficia a nuestros clientes y su entorno.. Una cultura flexible, colaborativa, inquieta, transformadora, liderada por profesionales con gran experiencia y energía, comprometidos con el futuro del país.
Location: Santiago de Chile, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: RM Services (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
RM Services (Pvt.) Ltd. is a leading engineering company and one of Pakistan's most trusted manufacturers, couplers, and suppliers of diesel generators. Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility operates according to global standards, implementing Six Sigma and lean manufacturing principles to ensure zero defects and minimal waste.

We take pride in hosting Pakistan's only modern canopy manufacturing facilities, strategically located in Karachi and Lahore, covering areas of 2,000 sqm and 5,500 sqm, respectively. Our operations strictly comply with ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001 standards.

RM Services stands out as the only manufacturing facility in Pakistan equipped with an advanced assembly line, adhering to international safety protocols and supported by a team of skilled and qualified professionals. Known for delivering quality, innovation, and reliability, our generators are designed to be eco-friendly, offering low emission levels, reduced carbon footprints, and minimal noise pollution.

Our Offerings:
Largest Manufacturer and Supplier of Diesel Generators
State-of-the-Art ISO-Certified Manufacturing Facilities
Extended Warranty for Reliable Service
Research and Development for Innovative Solutions
Load Assessment, Installation, Testing & Commissioning Services
Customized Trolleys and Canopies
Panel Manufacturing (ATS, Synchronization, and Power Panels)
Fuel Pump and Injector Calibration
Comprehensive After-Sales Service Network
Service Level Agreements (SLAs/AMC) for Ongoing Support
Flexible Rental Solutions.

At RM Services, we are committed to maintaining excellence, exceeding customer expectations, and setting new benchmarks in power generation technology.

Name: VALSEYNE
Description:
Bienvenue chez Valseyne, le fournisseur d'électricité et de gaz du Val d'Oise pour les professionnels qui soutiennent l’économie locale et sont sensibles aux énergies vertes.

Nos clients professionnels et particuliers bénéficient d'une offre locale et économique alliée à un véritable service :
• Proximité : une interlocutrice dédiée et une agence basée à Ennery (95)
• Réactivité : toutes vos demandes traitées sans attendre
• Expertise : un accompagnement pointu grâce à notre ancrage local depuis 1920
• Clarté : une tarification 100% transparente et des factures compréhensibles

Implantée à Ennery dans le Vexin, Valseyne est la branche fourniture d’énergie non réglementée de la SICAE VS, une coopérative agricole qui approvisionne des territoires du Val d’Oise depuis 1921.
Cet acteur historique intervient sur toute la chaîne de l'énergie :
• Production d’énergie renouvelable,
• Gestion et maintenance de réseau d’électricité,
• Fourniture d’électricité et de gaz avec Valseyne.

Nous sommes partenaires du groupe Alterna, un fournisseur d’énergie alternatif né du regroupement de plus de 50 entreprises locales de distribution (ELD) implantées sur tout le territoire français. Ce réseau mutualiste fait d’Alterna l’un des premiers producteurs d’énergie verte en France, un distributeur très présent localement et un fournisseur compétitif proche de ses clients.

Si vous souhaitez réaliser une simulation, nous vous invitons à contacter Alexandra Goudroy-Marc : a.goudroy@valseyne.fr ou 01 87 20 30 50

Name: Eco2 Management Services Ltd
Description:
Eco2 – Making Renewables Work

Eco2 deliver green energy projects across the UK and Europe, including biomass power plants, wind farms, heat projects and emerging technologies. Using our expertise, Eco2 oversee the whole process from initiating and investment, to development and operation.

Since 2006, Eco2 has concentrated on developing biomass projects, and over the last 20+ years, the management team have gained unrivalled experience in the development, construction and operation of over 470MW of biomass projects throughout the world. Our team has been involved in over 60% of the UK’s Dedicated Biomass Capacity.

The project has been commissioned under 2002 Power Policy of GOP and has been granted a generation license by the National Electric Power Regulatory Authority ("NEPRA") in May 2007. Name: Grastim JV
Description:
Grastim formed on 2008 from the joint venture of two former Italian Companies: Graded, established on 1960 and specialized in energy services for Civil applications and Steam Group, whereof core business is the design and construction of hi-tech production lines for Industry. Grastim nowadays is a global player operating permanently in Italy, Portugal, UK, Germany and Spain.

Grastim is a leading developer of high efficient solutions. Our key option is Cogeneration the most effective technology to reduce energy cost and tackle environmental footprint. Grastim combines the flexibility and proactivity of a medium size company with a financial solidness capable to develop projects with great financial exposure. 

Our mission is to establish long term partnerships with our clients based on a win to win approach.

Find out more on our web site www.grastim.com

Name: Stealth Power
Description:
A smarter approach to clean power and low carbon fleets. 

Our team designs and builds idle mitigation and scalable hybrid energy systems that power complex fleet operations into the future. Manufactured in the USA, Stealth Vehicle and Mobile Power Systems are trusted by FDNY, U.S. Customs and Border Protection, and the FAA to power everything from life-saving medical equipment to remote towers equipped with intelligence sensors. 

Stealth Power keeps no-fail equipment on with engines or generators turned off. This reduction of prolonged idling substantially reduces fuel usage and costs while increasing operational performance. 

Designed for EMS, Utility, Service, Military, Government, and City fleet vehicles. Our system is modular and fits any vehicle make and model.

Name: Adjaristsqali Georgia LLC (AGL)
Description:
Adjaristsqali Georgia LLC (AGL) is an energy company, co-owned by Norway’s Clean Energy Invest and India’s Tata Power. The company implemented a 187 MW Shuakhevi Hydro Power Plant. It began operation in the spring of 2020. Shuakhevi HPP  is the only project in Georgia’s energy sector funded by the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development, the Asian Development Bank, and the International Finance Corporation (IFC), a member of the World Bank Group. 
The Shuakhevi HPP plays a vitally important role in Georgia’s energy security.

Adjaristsqali Georgia LLC is committed to the economic and social development of the Adjara region and raising the living conditions of communities in the project area.

Name: WRISE Colorado
Description: The Boulder/Denver Chapter of Women of Renewable Industries and Sustainable Energy, an organization which promotes the education, professional development, and advancement of women to achieve a strong diversified workforce and support a renewable energy economy.

Name: Athena PTS
Description:
Athena PTS is a privately-owned electrical engineering company providing electrical advisory, design consultancy, project support, installation, contracting, and operation and maintenance services in the renewable energy, defence, marine electrical, nuclear, utilities and advanced manufacturing industries.
 
Athena PTS has a diverse capability and broad experience in the design, build and commissioning of electrical power systems & networks. Our skilled and dedicated people give us the strength and ability to deliver complex schemes with ease. The Athena PTS team are committed and conscientious people – people who perform their work with great integrity and efficiency.

Name: Power Users Group
Description: Power Users Group, Inc. is organized to provide an open forum through conferences and technical aids to the Owners/Operators of Power Generation Equipment.  Power Users is the home for multiple steering committees.  They include: 7F Users, Generator Users, Steam Turbine Users, Combined Cycle Users, 7EA Users, 6B Users, Siemens V Users, Frame 5 Users, Low Carbon, Power Plant Controls, HRSG Users, and HA Users Groups.

Name: MAADURGA THERMAL POWER COMPANY LIMITED
Description: Maadurga Thermal Power Company Limited is a 60MW Independent Power Plant located at Cuttack, Orissa. Maadurga Thermal Power Company Limited is promoted by The United Group of Companies with its headquarters in Jamshedpur. The plant got commissioned in July, 2024. The vision is to become one of the leading and sustainable power producer in the nation.

Name: Remote Power Corp
Description: Remote Power Corp specializes in the rental, lease, sale, and service of industrial-grade natural gas and propane generators. Supporting the energy, mining, and construction sectors with turnkey electric power generation and distribution solutions.

Name: KX Power Limited
Description:
KX Power is a leading developer and asset manager of utility scale energy storage and flexibility technology headquartered in the UK.

Power networks and electricity markets are rapidly evolving. To meet the 2050 net zero target, it is estimated the proportion of intermittent wind and solar capacity in the generation mix will need to increase to almost 60% by 2030. Utility scale battery storage is playing a critical role in enabling renewable capacity to connect to the grid.

KX Power’s deep expertise and demonstrable track record in successfully developing, constructing, operating and optimising energy storage projects makes us one of the leading developers and partners in the global energy transition.

Name: SEVA energia rinnovabile
Description: Produciamo energia da fonti rinnovabili e abbiamo oltre vent’anni di esperienza nel settore. Crediamo in una nuova forma di democrazia energetica resa possibile dalla diffusione della generazione distribuita. Progettiamo e realizziamo impianti idroelettrici, fotovoltaici e eolici in tutto il Paese.

Name: J. Schneider Elektrotechnik GmbH
Description:
Spannung in Präzision

Die J. Schneider Elektrotechnik GmbH mit Firmensitz in Offenburg ist ein Hersteller von Produkten und Service-Leistungen für sichere und konstante Stromversorgung. Seit 1939 entwickelt das Familienunternehmen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für unterschiedliche Branchen mit individuellen Anforderungen. Der hochpräzise Umgang mit Strömen, Spannungen und Antriebstechnik machen 
die J. Schneider Elektrotechnik GmbH zum Experten für Elektrotechnik, der Kunden berät und mit Qualität überzeugt. 

Für den kontinuierlichen und langfristigen Erfolg setzt die J. Schneider Elektrotechnik GmbH auf familiäre Werte und seine 470 Mitarbeiter. Angefangen vom Vertrieb über Entwicklung und Produktion bis zum Service – Einsatzbereitschaft und enger Kundenkontakt sind für das Unternehmen essentiell, um anspruchsvolle Aufgaben und Anforderungen umzusetzen. Auch in Zukunft möchte die J. Schneider Elektrotechnik GmbH den steigenden Anforderungen gerecht werden und setzt daher auf Teamgeist, Nachwuchsförderung und ein starkes Ausbildungskonzept, bei dem sich berufliche Talente bestmöglich entfalten können. 

Produkte und Dienstleistungen:
-	Transformatoren
-	Unterbrechungsfreie Stromversorgungen
-	Hochspannung- und Plasma-Stromversorgungen
-	Service-Center für Elektrische Antriebe 

Impressum: https://www.j-schneider.de/unternehmen-jschneider/kontakt/impressum/

Name: PROFIT ENERGY Konrad Bojakowski broker i doradca energetyczny
Description:
EKSPERT w zakresie energia, gaz dla biznesu, transformacje energetyczne,kogeneracje, hydrotermalna karbonizacja (HTC), stacje trafo, kompensacje mocy biernej, energia odnawialna, magazyny energii,

Jestem doświadczonym brokerem energetycznym i członkiem Zrzeszenia Audytorów Energetycznych, współpracującym z największymi firmami sektora energetycznego w Polsce.
Specjalizuję się w obsłudze przedsiębiorstw, spółdzielni oraz wspólnot mieszkaniowych, jednostek sektora publicznego, takie jak urzędy gmin, miejskie przedsiębiorstwa komunalne etc

Moja misja? 
Długofalowa współpraca partnerska, optymalizacja kosztów energii i wdrażanie ekologicznych rozwiązań.

Profesjonalne doradztwo energetyczne
Wspieram firmy i spółdzielnie mieszkaniowe, pomagając w wyborze najlepszych opcji zakupu energii. Oferuję indywidualne strategie zakupowe, które przynoszą oszczędności i stabilność finansową. Zapewniam pełną obsługę jak i opiekę nad Przedsiębiorstwem wraz z przeprowadzeniem wszelkich formalności związanych z wprowadzeniem zmian w obrębie dystrybucji jak i procesie zmiany sprzedawcy. 

Efektywność energetyczna i zrównoważony rozwój

Oferuję audyty energetyczne, instalacje OZE, systemy biomasowe oraz optymalizację kosztów dystrybucji. Pomagam firmom i instytucjom zmniejszyć koszty oraz ślad węglowy, korzystając z certyfikowanej, zielonej energii.

Przewidywalność i transparentność

Zapewniam stabilne warunki umów, minimalizując ryzyko finansowe związane z wahaniami cen energii, dobierając
najlepsze dostępne produkty pod profil Partnera biznesowego. Współpracuję z renomowanymi dostawcami, oferując bezpieczne, niezawodne rozwiązania energetyczne z możliwością kontraktowania stałej ceny nawet nawet na 10 lat.

Korzyści ze współpracy

Współpracując ze mną, zyskujesz dostęp do najlepszych rozwiązań energetycznych, które przynoszą oszczędności i wzmacniają przewagę konkurencyjną. Zapewniam opiekę energetyczną 24/7, abyś mógł skupić się na rozwoju swojego biznesu.

Name: HRSG Forum
Description:
The purposes of this user group are to produce educational events to further the technical development and expertise of those persons involved in designing, procuring, managing, operating, and maintaining power generation plants that incorporate Heat Recovery Steam Generators (HRSGs), to facilitate maximizing equipment reliability and minimize operating costs, and to foster improved communications between owner/operators and equipment manufacturers/service providers. HRSG Forum is organized exclusively for educational and technical purposes.

Steering Committee Members:
Eugene Eagle – Duke Energy
Albert Olszewski – Constellation Energy
Yogesh Patel – TECO Energy
Scott Wambeke – Xcel Energy

Moderators:
Bob Anderson – Competitive Power Resources
Barry Dooley – Structural Integrity Associates

Name: Pantera Energy
Description:
Pantera Energy is one of the pioneer solar energy solutions provider in Pakistan. Innovation and intelligence are the core essence of our solar energy systems for residential, commercial, industrial and agricultural sectors. We have a diversified range of products and services with proven expertise in providing state-of-the-art solar energy systems. With a network of regional teams and partners, Pantera Energy enjoys a nationwide presence in Pakistan.
Established in 2013, with a focus on reliability, dependability and customer service, Pantera Energy is one of the most experienced and long standing names in this relatively new industry in the region. Over the years we have developed a business process and company culture where customer care and satisfaction is considered as top priority. Providing top of the line quality products and services by applying every advancement in technology. At Pantera, our primary focus is on reliability. We have built our credibility around our tagline “Solar That Works”. We do not only install solar but make sure that it keeps working optimally. Each member of our team works tirelessly to achieve that goal. We value the relationship with our customers as our business asset and believe that our customers deserve only the best available solutions that allow them to live peacefully without any worries of expensive repairs or maintenance. We have set a very high benchmark for ourselves to meet the standards to be a customer oriented company. 
Pantera Energy is certified by Pakistan Engineering council (PEC) as a CB category engineering company and holds the highest rated V1 certification from Alternate Energy Development Board (AEDB) Pakistan. We are licensed by National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (NEPRA) for providing net-metering enabled renewable energy systems in Pakistan.

Name: Rönesans Enerji
Description:
Türkiye'nin yeşil dönüşümüne katkıda bulunma amacıyla 2009 yılında kurulan Rönesans Enerji Üretim ve Ticaret A.Ş., 2023 yılından itibaren Rönesans Holding ve Total Energies ortaklığı altında enerji sektöründe yatırımlarına devam etmektedir.
 
Enerji sektöründe oldukça deneyimli bir ekibe sahip olan Rönesans Enerji, faaliyetlerine öncelikle, yenilenebilir enerji üretimi alanında yatırım yaparak ve özellikle de hidroelektrik santralleri kurarak başlamıştır. 
 
Rönesans Enerji elektrik satış ve ticaretinde de sektörde öncü rol üstlenerek faaliyetlerini yürütmektedir.
 

Founded in 2009 with the aim of contributing to Turkiye's green transformation, Rönesans Enerji Production and Trade Inc. continues its investments in the energy sector under the partnership of Rönesans Holding and Total Energies since the year 2023.
 
Rönesans Enerji, equipped with a highly experienced team in the energy sector, initially embarked on its activities by investing in the field of renewable energy production, particularly by establishing hydroelectric power plants.
 
Rönesans Enerji, also plays a leading role in electricity sales and trade, carrying out its activities in the sector.

Name: Doosan Enerbility
Description: Founded in 1962, Doosan Enerbility has supplied integrated solutions in the fields of power generation, energy and desalination plants in 40 countries around the world.  With our proven expertise in energy industry, we strive to create a better future by bringing the more sustainable energy solutions to the world.

Name: AES Dominicana
Description:
AES inicia operaciones en la República Dominicana en 1997 con la firme tarea de aportar valor al mercado energético del país y contribuir con el desarrollo de las comunidades a las cuales sirve. En la actualidad, se posiciona como el grupo inversor más competitivo, con modernas facilidades de tecnología de última generación.

AES Dominicana es el único grupo con presencia local que cuenta con dos infraestructuras portuarias de gran calado. La terminal de Gas Natural Líquido, ubicada en el parque energético de AES Andres, es la entrada exclusiva de gas natural al país; mientras que el Puerto Internacional Itabo, es el único puerto con capacidad de descargar de 1,100 toneladas por hora de recepción de carbón y otros tipos de granos.

Las inversiones de AES Dominicana superan los US1,500 millones e impactan directamente en la vida de 235 trabajadores. AES es el generador de electricidad más económico y eficiente de República Dominicana, con una canasta de combustible compuesta por gas natural y carbón mineral, lo que representa ahorros para el país por más de US$200 millones anuales, por la sustitución de derivados del petróleo y otros combustibles de mayor costo.

Con sus operaciones en las centrales de generación de Dominican Power Partners, AES Andrés e Itabo, que tienen una capacidad total instalada que representa un aporte promedio del 40% de toda la energía que se demanda a través de la red, AES constituye uno de los principales soportes para el Sistema Eléctrico Nacional Interconectado (SENI). 

AES opera en 15 países en 4 Continentes. Es una de las más grandes compañías energéticas en el mundo.

Name: Innergex
Description:
Unis par une vision commune, nous évoluons en tant qu'entreprise internationale pour faire avancer la transition énergétique au Canada, aux États-Unis, en France et au Chili. Notre passion est de faire du bien à la planète et aux communautés pour notre génération et celles à venir. 

En tant que producteur d’énergie 100% renouvelable, Innergex développe, acquiert, détient et exploite des installations hydroélectriques, éoliennes, solaires et de stockage d’énergie en travaillant main dans la main avec les communautés locales et autochtones qui nous accueillent.

Notre processus de recrutement
Si votre profil retient notre attention, un membre de notre équipe vous écrira à partir d’une adresse officielle se terminant par @innergex.com. Nous ne contactons jamais de candidats ou de candidates par message texte (SMS), Indeed ou LinkedIn pour leur proposer un emploi et nous ne demandons jamais d’informations personnelles ou bancaires avant le début d’un emploi. Pour toute question ou doute, vous pouvez nous joindre à info@innergex.com.

———

United by a common vision, we are evolving as an international company to advance the energy transition in Canada, the United States, France and Chile. Our work benefits the planet and communities for our generation and those to come. 

As a 100% renewable energy producer, Innergex develops, acquires, owns, and operates hydroelectric, wind, solar and energy storage facilities while working hand in hand with the local and Indigenous communities that welcome us.

Our recruitment process
If your profile matches our needs, someone from our team will reach out using an official @innergex.com email address. We never reach out to candidates via text messages (SMS), Indeed, or LinkedIn to offer a job, and we never request personal or banking information before employment begins. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact us at info@innergex.com.

Name: Iqony Solutions do Brasil
Description:
Iqony Solutions do Brasil is wholly owned subsidiary of Iqony Solutions GmbH, a well-known provider of professional and expert energy services worldwide. Since 2002, Iqony Solutions do Brasil, based in Rio de Janeiro, is offering its services, Engineering and Operation and Maintenance, to customers in the  South America market. The Group owns approximately 10 GW capacity, including solar, wind, thermal, etc... 
Being in the investor's side,  allows us to offer the best solutions for Engineering and Operation and Maintenance.
