Name: EDF EU Affairs
Description:
The European Union is playing an increasingly active role in tackling climate change, ensuring energy security, organising markets and supporting R&D. Its acts, regulations, directives and recommendations directly affect not only Member States, but also the lives of all EU citizens and the day-to-day operations of European businesses and industries.
The EDF Group, Europe’s leading electricity company, is firmly established across the continent. With companies in 14 Member States, we supply almost 39 million customers. The Group’s future will in part be defined by decisions made in the EU. 
One of the main contributions EDF can make is through our vision for Europe’s energy future. Generating genuinely sustainable development requires innovation, investment, industrial expertise and a deep commitment to social and environmental responsibility. In the European energy sector, EDF is the largest investor overall, and the largest investor in R&D and innovation. With its diversified mix and the biggest hydropower fleet in Europe, the EDF Group contributes to security of supply and emits the lowest level of carbon among major European energy companies. As the leading nuclear operator in the world, EDF has developed and maintains the highest standards of industrial safety.
Communicating our vision for sustainable energy in Europe is why EDF has a representative office in Brussels. The European Affairs team of around 12 people draws on expertise from a range of business activities and subsidiaries. We promote, explain, and share EDF’s insights and opinions on the policy issues that matter to the EU institutions. We are a consistently active and engaged participant in EU stakeholder dialogue.

Name: Orrön Energy
Description: Orrön Energy is an independent, publicly listed (Nasdaq Stockholm: “ORRON”) renewable energy company within the Lundin Group of Companies. Orrön Energy’s core portfolio consists of high quality, cash flow generating assets in the Nordics, coupled with greenfield growth opportunities in the Nordics and Europe. With significant financial capacity to fund further growth and acquisitions, and backed by a major shareholder, management and Board with a proven track record of investing into, leading and growing highly successful businesses, Orrön Energy is in a unique position to create shareholder value through the energy transition.

Name: Meralco PowerGen (MGEN)
Description:
Meralco PowerGen Corporation (MGEN) aims to be the leader in the Philippines’ transition to a secure, affordable, and sustainable energy future-while fueling economic growth by meeting our region’s energy requirements. 

A Commitment to Diverse and Advanced Energy Solutions

MGEN operates a diverse portfolio of power generation assets equipped with advanced technologies. Its main subsidiaries include Global Business Power (MGEN Thermal), MGEN Renewable Energy Inc. (MGEN Renewables), and MGEN Gas Energy Holdings, Inc. (MGEN Natural Gas). Additionally, MGEN holds stakes in PacificLight Power (PLP), a Liquefied Natural Gas facility in Singapore, and SP New Energy Corporation (SPNEC), a renewable energy company. Recently, MGEN has invested a 40.2% stake in an integrated LNG facility in Batangas, Philippines. Across its portfolio, MGEN has a combined net sellable capacity of 5,068 MW from traditional and renewable sources as of June 2025. 

A New Dawn in Solar Power: The MTerra Solar Project

The MTerra Solar Project, which broke ground in November last year, represents a transformative step in Philippine renewable energy development. With an 850 MW power supply agreement with Meralco, it will deliver 600 MW of clean energy by 2026 and an additional 250 MW by 2027. The project spans 3,500 hectares across Nueva Ecija and Bulacan and features 3,500 MWp of solar capacity and a 4,500 MWhr battery energy storage system. The MTerra Solar Project has been recognized by the Department of Energy as an Energy Project of National Significance. It also secured a Green Lane Certificate from the Board of Investments, reinforcing its commitment to sustainable development goals.

Powering a Better Tomorrow 

It’s our clear commitment—that everything we do today contributes to a more inclusive, resilient, and hopeful future not just for ourselves but for the next generation as well

We are MGEN. Powering a Better Tomorrow.

Name: ORYGEN
Description:
Somos Orygen, empresa peruana dedicada a la generación de energía sostenible, confiable y competitiva para las industrias del Perú, mediante una matriz energética diversificada con cuatro tecnologías: solar, eólica, hídrica y térmica a gas. 

Lideramos la generación de energía renovable en el país, con una capacidad instalada de más de 2,2GW y 13 centrales, que nos permiten producir alrededor de 10,000GWh al año de energía sostenible y evitar la emisión de más de 1 millón de toneladas de CO2 al medio ambiente en el mismo período.

Operamos los complejos de tecnología solar y eólica más importantes del Perú, ubicados en Moquegua e Ica; y contamos con un portafolio de más de 12GW de proyectos solares, eólicos e híbridos, presentes en 7 regiones a lo largo y ancho del territorio nacional. 

Transformamos energía en bienestar y desarrollo sostenible para un futuro mejor.

Bienvenidos a Orygen, energía que genera cambio!

Name: GRUPO ALBANESI
Description:
Albanesi es un grupo empresario argentino de capitales privados fundado en 1912, con 112 años en el mercado local. 

Sus actividades principales son la generación de energía eléctrica y la provisión de gas natural. Es el principal comercializador de gas natural de la República Argentina.

Para el final del año 2024 se aproximará a los 2.000 MW de capacidad instalada a través de sus 10 centrales equipadas con tecnología de última generación: las centrales térmicas de Ezeiza en Carlos Spegazzini y Solalban en Bahía Blanca, ubicadas en la provincia de Buenos Aires; la Central Térmica Modesto Maranzana en Río Cuarto, Córdoba; la Central Térmica Riojana en La Rioja; la Central Térmica General Roca en Río Negro; las centrales térmicas Arroyo Seco y Timbúes, ubicadas en Santa Fe; la Central Térmica Frías en Santiago del Estero; la Central Térmica Independencia en Tucumán; y fuera del país, la Central de Cogeneración en Talara, al norte de Perú.

Name: Entek Elektrik
Description:
We are an energy company growing through Koç Holding’s renewable energy investments.

We are a leader in employee engagement and experience. Behind our success lies a transparent, collaborative company culture that views feedback as an opportunity for growth, and this culture is built by our competent, dedicated, and happy employees.

We provide innovative solutions for future generations and a sustainable world, producing the energy of the future. With 11 power plants operating across 7 cities, we generate electricity while expanding our activities in electricity trading. In 2023, we launched EntekSENS, offering end-to-end solutions for solar energy investments and unlocking the doors to sustainability and renewable energy for our customers. With our recent investments, we have increased the share of renewable energy in our portfolio to 78%.

By focusing on people, the environment, and next-generation technologies, we equip our employees with the skills of the future, shape our investments with a sustainability perspective, and move forward with our vision of zero-carbon electricity.

Name: Jupiter Power
Description:
Jupiter Power is putting deep energy storage expertise, proven project execution capability, and significant capital to work to help make the energy transition a reality. 

Jupiter is backed by BlackRock’s Diversified Infrastructure business. Together, we are capitalized to build, own, operate and trade products from our portfolio of energy storage assets.

Jupiter’s fleet of assets in operation or construction includes the largest energy storage fleet in Texas and one of the largest development pipelines in the country – totaling over 11,000 megawatts.

Name: UNY
Description:
Leading provider of sustainable mobility solutions, delivering eco-friendly electric vehicle fleets across Europe to help businesses, governments and institutions transition to a cleaner and greener future. 

Our unique and complete ecosystem offers an all-in-one solution: from electric vehicle fleets to battery swapping stations, interchangeable batteries and full maintenance services. 

As the first company to introduce a fully integrated e-mobility infrastructure in Europe, we empower our partners to optimize operations, reduce their carbon footprint and meet ESG goals. Join us today and get a zero-emission, cost-effective and scalable solution that ensures maximum efficiency and minimal downtime.

Name: Eletrobras CGT Eletrosul
Description: Perfil desativado. Acompanhe nossos conteúdos em @Eletrobras.

Name: Eksim Enerji
Description:
Enerji üretiminde tamamı yenilenebilir kaynaklara dayanan 1600 MW’ı aşkın portföy ile ülkemizin önde gelen enerji yatırımcıları arasında yer alıyoruz.
Silivri, Susurluk, Bergama, Seferihisar, Tokat, Amasya, Osmaniye ve Geyve’de kurulu rüzgâr santrallerimiz ile Türkiye’nin yenilenebilir enerji dönüşümde önemli, rol oynuyoruz. 
Ulusal alanda yakaladığımız başarıyı yakın coğrafyalardaki yenilebilir rüzgâr enerjisi yatırımızla uluslararası pazarlara taşıyoruz. Bu kapsamda Gürcistan’da 200MW, Ukrayna’da 67MW’lık projeleri geliştirmeye devam ediyoruz. 
Hidroelektrik alanında, Rize’de bulunan santralin yanı sıra Gürcistan Batum’da bulunan  iki santralle üretime devam ediyor ve yıllık 1 milyar metreküp doğalgaz ithal etme yetkisine sahip olarak özel sektörün yıllık doğalgaz ithalatının yüzde 10’unu karşılıyoruz.

Eksim Energy ranks among the leading energy investors in Türkiye with a portfolio over 1600 MW, all are based on renewable resources in energy production. We lead an important role in Türkiye’s renewable energy transformation with our wind farms in Silivri, Susurluk, Bergama, Seferihisar, Tokat, Amasya, Osmaniye and Gevye. We are carrying the success we have achived in national arena through international markets with renewable wind energy investment in nearby geographies. In this context, we are progressing to improve projects with 200MW in Georgia, 67MW in Ukraine.
In hydroelectric field, the two hydroelectric farms have been producing in Batum, Georgia along with the hydroelectric farm in Rize, Türkiye. Moreover, we are authorized to import 1 billion cu m gas to supply 10 percent of private sector’s yearly gas need.

Name: Arabelle Solutions
Description:
Arabelle Solutions is a leading provider of nuclear turbine island technology and services. Our innovative solutions and highly skilled teams energize the world with reliable, low-carbon electricity - critical for a sustainable future. 

With a heritage going back to the industry’s early days, our expertise is built on continuous design innovation, manufacturing world-class turbine island technology and providing essential services to maintain, maximize and extend the lifetime of nuclear power plants across Europe, Asia and Africa. 

Our technologies range from the world’s most powerful steam turbine in operation to modular designs optimized for SMRs, as well as generators, pumps, heat-exchangers, controls systems and cyber security.
A third of the world’s nuclear power plants rely on our technologies and services. 

Arabelle Solutions has around 3,300 employees working across 16 countries - owned by EDF Group the business was formerly part of GE Vernova.

Name: Amp Energy
Description:
Amp Energy is a founder-led private investment platform, investing at the intersection of AI-driven infrastructure and the energy transition. 

Founded in 2009 by Dave Rogers, the company has deployed more than $4.5 billion into 14 GW of power infrastructure worldwide.

Amp is a high-growth disruptor at scale, backed by major investments from institutional capital partners including most recently the Carlyle Group, which invested US$374 million into the company in 2021.

The company is headquartered in Toronto with global operations throughout North America, Europe, and Asia.

Name: Celepsa
Description:
Somos una empresa especializada en la comercialización y generación de energía, perteneciente al Grupo UNACEM. Iniciamos nuestras operaciones en el 2010, asumiendo un rol protagónico en la lucha contra el cambio climático y contribuyendo para una transición energética segura hacia energías renovables. 

Con un portafolio diversificado de tecnologías, contamos con dos centrales hidroeléctricas certificadas como carbono neutral, El Platanal y Marañón; así como una central térmica a gas natural, Santo Domingo de los Olleros (Termochilca).

Estamos comprometidos en sumar nuestra energía para cumplir con nuestro propósito de construir un mundo más sostenible.

Name: Eren Enerji
Description:
EREN ENERJİ

Zonguldak ilinin Çatalağzı ve Muslu Beldesi’nin sınırlarının içinde bulunan Zonguldak Eren Termik Santrali (ZETES) toplam 2.790 MW’lık kurulu güce sahiptir. ZETES sahasında Akışkan Yatak Teknolojili 160 MWe, Süper Kritik Pulverize Kömürlü 2x615 MWe ve Süper Kritik Pulverize Kömürlü 2x700 MWe kurulu güçlerindeki üniteler ve Eren Limanı yer almaktadır.

Türkiye’nin toplam elektrik ihtiyacının %6’sını tek başına karşılayan Eren Enerji, 2009 yılında EUROMONEY-Proje Finans Dergisi tarafından “Yılın Avrupa Elektrik Anlaşması” ödülü, EMEA Finance Dergisi tarafından 2013 yılında “Avrupa, Orta Doğu ve Afrika’da En İyi Proje Finansmanı” ödülü ve 2019 yılında The Green Organisation tarafından “Enerji Yönetimi” alanında Gümüş Ödülü ve “2020 Yeşil Dünya Büyükelçisi” ödülleri ile onurlandırılmıştır. Çevresel yatırımlar anlamında dünyada var olan en son ve en iyi teknolojiler ile donatılan Eren Enerji, “en çevreci kuruluş olma” hedefi doğrultusunda bugüne kadar sadece çevre için 220 milyon dolar yatırım gerçekleştirerek yalnızca Türkiye’de değil, dünyada da örnek bir şirket oldu.

Eren Limanı, Eren Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.Ş’nin yıllık ihtiyacı olan yaklaşık 7.000.000 ton kömürün tahliyesini gerçekleştirmekte olup aynı zamanda yan ürün olarak elde edilen uçucu kül ve alçı taşı gibi malzemelerin yaklaşık 1.000.000 ton yüklemesini sağlamaktadır. Eren Limanı, yıllık yaklaşık 15.000.000 ton yük elleçleme kapasitesi ile birlikte dökme yük kategorisinde Türkiye’nin en büyük 5 limanı arasındadır.

Name: Leeward Renewable Energy
Description:
LRE (Leeward Renewable Energy) is forging an American energy future with integrity, innovation, and positive impact. Born in Texas in 2003, we own and operate 30 utility-scale wind, solar, and energy storage projects in local communities across the United States, totaling 4 gigawatts (GW) of generating capacity.   

LRE's ambitious goal of 10GW of operating assets by 2028 will help meet increased U.S. energy demand through our robust pipeline of new projects every year. Domestic jobs and manufacturing are fundamental to our full-lifecycle approach to projects, along with a long-term ownership model and a company culture dedicated to our community partners and protecting the natural environment.  For more information, visit www.lreus.com.

Name: Grupa TAURON
Description:
Napędzamy transformację energetyczną Polski, dołącz do MegaMocnej drużyny Grupy TAURON, która liczy blisko 18,5 tysiąca pracowników.

Jesteśmy jednym z największych producentów energii elektrycznej i ciepła w Polsce. Każdego dnia dokładamy wszelkich starań, by zapewnić ponad 5 milionom naszych klientów nieprzerwane dostawy energii elektrycznej i ciepła. Realizując Strategię #Zielonego Zwrotu, chcemy produkować przede wszystkim w farmach wiatrowych na lądzie i morzu, elektrowniach fotowoltaicznych oraz elektrowniach wodnych i gazowych. Inwestujemy też w nowoczesną i niezawodną sieć dystrybucyjną gwarantującą pewność dostaw energii elektrycznej. Nasze innowacyjne rozwiązania zmierzają w jednym kierunku – osiągnięcia neutralności klimatycznej. Podążaj za zieloną zmianą i aplikuj już dziś!

Name: Âmbar Energia
Description: Pantanal Energia is the company responsible for the construction and operation of Usina Termelétrica Governador Mário Covas (thermoelectric plant), located in Cuiabá, Mato Grosso.Also known as E.P.E. - Empresa Produtora de Energia(our company name), Pantanal Energia is part of Projeto Integrado Cuiabá, an enterprising private project of regional development that organized and operates both the thermoelectric plant and a gas pipeline covering a distance of 648 Km from Bolivia to Cuiabá, called Gasoduto Bolívia - Mato Grosso, controlled by the companies GasOriente Boliviano (in Bolivia) and GasOcidente do Mato Grosso (on the Brazilian site).

Name: GE Saudi Advanced Turbines (GESAT)
Description: GESAT is at the forefront of high value added ‘Made in Saudi for the World’ efforts, with the capability to manufacture the world’s most advanced gas turbines, including GE’s H-class heavy duty gas turbines.

Name: EDF Brasil
Description:
Fundada em 2004, a EDF Brasil é parte do Grupo Électricité de France (EDF), a maior empresa de energia elétrica do mundo, presente nos cinco continentes. Como plataforma de desenvolvimento para projetos e serviços de geração térmica e hídrica, produz energia para mais de 4 milhões de pessoas no Brasil, além de também atuar no segmento de transmissão, com planos de expansão para novos negócios.

Por meio da gestão eficiente, governança moderna e estrutura consolidada, a EDF Brasil oferece soluções competitivas, combinando inovação, desenvolvimento econômico e preservação do meio ambiente. Com isso, tem se tornado referência em eficiência operacional, contribuindo para a transição energética e a modernização do setor elétrico brasileiro, e assumindo um papel fundamental frente aos objetivos do Grupo EDF no país.

A holding EDF Brasil abriga as seguintes subsidiárias: EDF Norte Fluminense, empresa responsável pela usina termelétrica homônima, situada em Macaé (RJ); EDF Serviços, que concentra os contratos de serviços de Operação & Manutenção (O&M) de usinas geradoras; a Sinop Energia, companhia que controla a Usina Hidrelétrica Sinop, em Mato Grosso, e que conta com participação de 51% da EDF Brasil; e a EDF Oiti Transmissora, responsável pelo primeiro empreendimento de transmissão de energia da companhia.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Precision Industries
Description:
Precision Industries, Your Trusted Partner for Reliable Diesel Power Solutions in MEA

Based in Dubai, UAE, Precision Industries delivers custom diesel generators, industrial backup power solutions, and soundproof enclosures across the Middle East and Africa. Our solutions range from 5kVA to 3500kVA, serving sectors including oil & gas, construction, manufacturing, rental power, residential, and renewable energy projects.

We integrate globally trusted engines and alternators (Cummins, Perkins, Mitsubishi, Yuchai, Stamford, Leroy Somer) to provide reliable, high-performance power solutions tailored to your needs.

Why Choose Precision Industries?

Custom-built solutions to match your exact requirements.

Durable and reliable performance for harsh environments.

Competitive pricing with exceptional after-sales support.

Expert consultation for generator sizing and project planning.

 Get Your Custom Quote or Sizing Consultation Today:
 www.pi-dubai.com

Vision: Leading innovation in sustainable, reliable power to empower communities and industries across MEA.
Mission: Deliver high-quality, efficient, and cost-effective diesel generator systems with continuous innovation and customer-focused service.

Name: Atriacorp
Description:
Impulsamos relaciones de largo plazo con soluciones personalizadas, minimizando riesgos y maximizando el valor.

Estamos presentes en Perú, Chile, México, España y Brasil con el propósito de ser la energía que el mundo necesita para seguir girando.

Name: Proxima Fusion
Description: Proxima Fusion is Europe's fastest-growing fusion company, building the first generation of stellarator fusion power plants.

Name: Eavor Technologies Inc.
Description:
Eavor is an Alberta-based tech company that has invented a new geothermal power generation technology that overcomes all the traditional roadblocks of geothermal. We call this new highly effective green power generation system Eavor-Loop. Our system is made with existing commercial componentry configured in a completely novel way. We use the most recent advances in drilling techniques and merge them with the latest heat to power generation technology to create the world’s first scalable, steady, and reliable source of green power.

This is 'Energy for Eavor'.

Name: Geronimo Power
Description: Geronimo Power (formerly National Grid Renewables) develops, owns and operates large-scale power assets throughout America’s Heartland, including solar, wind and energy storage. As a farmer-founded and community-focused business, Geronimo Power equips landowners and rural communities with sustainable revenue to ignite local economic growth. Geronimo Power is a portfolio company managed by Brookfield Asset Management.

Name: IPROCEL
Description:
IPROCEL es una empresa multinacional fundada en 1993 especializada en la prestación de servicios de ingeniería, puesta en marcha, operación y mantenimiento de sistemas eléctricos e instrumentación en plantas de generación, sistemas de T&D y plantas industriales.

La experiencia de IPROCEL nos permite adaptar nuestros servicios a las nuevas tecnologías gracias a una organización de personal altamente cualificado y un sistema integrado de gestión. 

IPROCEL cuenta con filiales en Bolivia, Canadá, Estados Unidos, México, Perú,  Marruecos y Sudáfrica. No obstante, la experiencia internacional de la empresa comenzó en 1996 y desde entonces  hemos prestado servicios en más de 30 países alrededor del mundo.

Afrontamos el futuro apostando por la innovación e internacionalización, avalados por una extensa cartera de reconocidos clientes y socios comerciales.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran canaria, Islas Canarias

Name: PowerCell Group
Description:
PowerCell develops and produces hydrogen electric fuel cell stacks and systems with a uniquely high power density, targeting applications in the aviation, marine, power generation, off-road and on-road segments.

PowerCell products run on pure or reformed hydrogen and generate electricity and heat without any other emissions than water. Our technology combines high efficiency with compact design, and contributes to increased energy efficiency and a substantial reduction of emissions regardless of application.

Name: Aydem Yenilenebilir Enerji
Description:
Aydem Enerji’nin, yenilenebilir enerji üretimi alanında faaliyet gösteren şirketi Aydem Yenilenebilir Enerji olarak, doğal kaynakların, çevrenin ve gelecek nesillerin ihtiyaçlarının sürdürülebilirliğini gözeten yaklaşımımızla yenilenebilir enerjiyi odağımıza alıyoruz.

1995 yılında Türkiye’nin ilk özel hidroelektrik santralini hayata geçirme cesaretimizle çıktığımız yolculuğumuzda, insanı odağa alan yenilikçi yaklaşımımızla bugün ve gelecek için daha iyisini aramaya, ülkemizin sürdürülebilir büyümesine katkı sağlamaya ve yenilenebilir enerji üretimiyle çevreye, topluma ve sonraki nesillere daha güzel bir gelecek hazırlamaya devam ediyoruz.

Türkiye geneline yayılmış, 25 yenilenebilir enerji santralimizle ulaştığımız 1.180 MW kurulu gücümüzle hayat için enerji üretiyoruz. Hidroelektrik, rüzgar, hibrit GES ve jeotermal santrallerimizle Türkiye’nin enerji ihtiyacını temiz enerji üretimimizle karşılıyoruz. Portföyümüzde yer alan 23 enerji santralimizin tasarımından mühendislik ve işletme aşamalarına kadar tüm yapım işlerini kendi çatımız altında yürütmekten gurur duyuyoruz.

Tüm santrallerimizde Entegre Yönetim Sistemi (ISO 9001:2015, ISO 45001:2018, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 50001:2018) uygulanmaktadır.

Name: Fenix
Description:
Somos una de las principales compañías de generación y comercialización de energía eléctrica en el Perú. Gracias a nuestra central termoeléctrica de 570 MW de capacidad instalada ubicada en Chilca, generamos el 8% de la energía que consume el país. 

Como Partner Energético de confianza buscamos acompañar los desafíos de eficiencia y sostenibilidad de nuestros clientes, con una oferta de valor integral que incluye un suministro eléctrico confiable y competitivo, soluciones energéticas a su medida y el mejor equipo de especialistas. 

Estamos comprometidos con la transición energética responsable del país, por lo que venimos trabajando un pipeline de proyectos eólicos y solares, al mismo tiempo que velamos por optimizar y hacer cada vez más sostenible nuestra actual operación.

Name: Luminus
Description:
Luminus, a key player in the energy transition in Belgium, is active in electricity generation, energy supply and energy solutions and flexibility. The company is No 1 in onshore wind and hydropower in Belgium and has diversified and flexible production units, playing a key role in the country's security of supply and contributing to grid balance.

Luminus supplies electricity and gas to residential and business customers, with a commercial market share of about 23% and offers solutions to help its customers electrify and reduce their CO₂ emissions and energy consumption. By investing in storage and flexibility to overcome the challenges of intermittent renewable energy sources, Luminus turns flexibility challenges into opportunities.

The unwavering commitment of its 3,000 employees drives the realization of Luminus’ sense of purpose: build a CO₂-neutral energy future with electricity and innovative solutions, to help save the planet and drive wellbeing and economic development. To this end, Luminus leans on strong local roots and the expertise of the EDF Group, a world leader in low-carbon energy. The future is electric! #Electrify

Name: Atiaia Renováveis
Description: A Atiaia Renováveis atua na geração de energia limpa e renovável, com aproveitamentos hidroenergéticos de pequeno porte, eólicos e solares fotovoltaicos, sendo responsável pela construção, operação e manutenção, além da comercialização da energia elétrica gerada pelas usinas. Nos destacamos pelo compromisso com aspectos técnicos, sociais e ambientais, contribuindo para o crescimento sustentável das regiões onde atuamos.

Name: Forestalia
Description:
Forestalia es un grupo empresarial que abandera el nuevo paradigma de las energías renovables, en un mercado abierto, competitivo y libre de primas y subsidios públicos.
Nuestra cartera de proyectos es de más de 8 GW de energía eólica, fotovoltaica y de generación mediante biomasa agroforestal, además de la producción de pellets. 
Contribuimos al desarrollo territorial frente a la despoblación.

Name: Geronimo Power, formerly National Grid Renewables
Description: National Grid Renewables is a leading North American renewable energy company based in Minneapolis, Minnesota, with satellite offices located throughout the United States. As a farmer-friendly and community focused company, National Grid Renewables develops projects for corporations and utilities that seek to repower America’s electricity grid by reigniting local economies and reinvesting in a sustainable future. National Grid Renewables is part of the Ventures division of National Grid and has a portfolio of solar, wind, and energy storage projects located throughout the United States in various stages of development, construction, and operation.

Name: BOTSWANA POWER CORPORATION
Description: Botswana Power Corporation is a state-owned company for electrical power generation, transmission and distribution in Botswana. It was established in 1970 and is currently the only electricity supplier in the country.

Name: PT Krakatau Chandra Energi
Description: PT Krakatau Chandra Energi (KCE), a member of Chandra Asri Group, is dedicated to delivering reliable and sustainable energy solutions. Through our pillars of Electricity Provider, Electrical Services, and Renewable Energy, we are committed to supporting Indonesia’s energy security.

Name: Maamba Energy Ltd
Description:
Maamba Energy Limited formally known as Maamba Collieries Limited, in Sinazongwe District in Southern Province, is Zambia’s largest coal mine and is also the nation’s biggest Independent Power Producer (IPP) with Zambia’s only coal-fired Thermal Power Plant (TPP).
The company operates a 300 MW (2 X 150 MW units) modern, eco-friendly power plant – the only one of its kind in Zambia – with the capacity to supply 10 percent of the country’s current installed electricity generation capacity.
It is owned 65 percent by Nava Bharat Singapore Pte and 35 percent by ZCCM-IH, with capital outlay of US$919 million for the integrated project.
The plant provides diversity in the nation’s energy mix and contributes to the nation’s base load electricity demand with high-availability factor that is independent of climate change, thereby augmenting energy security of Zambia.

Name: TNB Genco
Description:
TNB Power Generation Sdn Bhd also known as TNB Genco was incorporated as a wholly owned subsidiary of TNB on 1st October 2020 to spearhead TNB’s power generation role to provide secure, stable, reliable and sustainable power in contributing to the long-term energy needs of the country with E2E capabilities ranging from plant development, O&M to end-of-life management.
At TNB Genco, we are aspired to become a top power generation solutions provider that sustainably delivers value to all stakeholders by 2025 focusing on key strategic initiatives: Turnaround Excellence, Productivity Uplift and Asset & Service Expansion whilst sustaining BAU performance within PPA levels.

Moving forward, TNB Genco will accelerate plant turnaround program for new fleets and sustain the impact of value uplifts, develop pipeline of new assets plant-ups & service businesses and unlock productivity savings.
As TNB Genco, we are committed to drive further Growth, Efficiency and Performance.

Name: Hyliion
Description:
Hyliion is committed to creating innovative solutions that enable clean, flexible and affordable electricity production. The company’s primary focus is to provide distributed power generators that can operate on various fuel sources to future-proof against an ever-changing energy economy. 

Headquartered in Austin, Texas, and with research and development in Cincinnati, Ohio, Hyliion is initially targeting the commercial and waste management industries with a locally deployable generator that can offer prime power as well as energy arbitrage opportunities. Beyond stationary power, Hyliion will address mobile applications such as vehicles and marine. The KARNO generator is a fuel-agnostic solution, enabled by additive manufacturing, that leverages a linear heat generator architecture. Hyliion aims to offer innovative, yet practical solutions that contribute positively to the environment in the energy economy. 

For further information, please visit www.hyliion.com.

Name: HIMOINSA
Description:
HIMOINSA is a global corporation that designs, manufactures and distributes power generation equipment worldwide. The company adds incomparable application and engineering know-how, excellent design and service capabilities, delivering value beyond the equipment it produces.

The equipment that the brand offers includes diesel and gas generator sets, control panels and paralleling systems for standby emergency power, prime power, peak power and distributed power. It also develops hybrid power gensets for the telecom sector and manufactures lighting towers for the rental and construction markets. 

Being a vertical manufacturer is HIMOINSA’s main strength, as the company has the capability of producing all components of the genset: alternators, engines, canopies, control panels, automatic transfer switches and paralleling systems. All the parts are perfectly integrated and the final product is always tested before shipping, minimizing potencial problems. 

An added value of the company is the HIMOINSA Engineering Solutions, a concept that defines the work of the brand, as all their power generation products are designed and customized following their high technical know-how to adapt the product to the unique specifications of each special project. This of course includes commissioning whenever the client needs it and specialized training on site to ensure perfect maintenance of the equipment when required.
This concept includes turnkey projects, where the company assumes the role of an EPC contractor, taking care of everything from the engineering design of the project, civil construction, manufacture of the equipment and installation and commissioning as final steps.

The company has 8 production plants located in China, India, Spain, France, Brazil, USA and Argentina. It also has 11 subsidiaries around the world located in Germany, UK, Portugal, Poland, Singapore, Panama, Dominican Republic, Argentina & South Cone, Angola, Southern Africa and the UAE.

Name: HDF Energy
Description:
HDF Energy is a leading global player in the hydrogen industry, dedicated to developing large-scale hydrogen infrastructure and advanced multi-megawatt fuel cell technology. 

 These fuel cells generate electricity from hydrogen, driving the decarbonization efforts across the power generation, heavy maritime and rail mobility sectors. Set to commence mass production in 2025 at HDF Energy’s facility near Bordeaux, these fuel cells serve as the cornerstone of the power plants and heavy mobility solutions developed by HDF Energy.

 HDF Energy's Renewstable power plants deliver non-intermittent renewable, stable and baseload power by seamlessly integrating intermittent renewable energy sources with substantial on-site energy storage in the form of green hydrogen. HDF Energy is also developing extensive infrastructure for the mass production of carbon-free hydrogen.

 Backed by a team of over 150 hydrogen experts boasting more than a decade of operational experience across the value chain, HDF Energy is currently developing a portfolio of projects valued at over €5 billion.

Headquartered in France, HDF Energy has regional offices in Australia, Barbados, Indonesia, Mexico and South Africa with highly qualified and dedicated employees servicing its worldwide customers.  Do you want to join our fast growing, dynamic, international team? Then take a look here  https://jobs.hdf-energy.com/

Since 2021, the Group has been listed on the Euronext Paris stock market.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x40Y_xz37ys&t=16s

Name: BrightNight
Description:
BrightNight is a next-generation power and digital infrastructure company, purpose-built to serve the evolving needs of utilities, data centers, and commercial and industrial customers. As a leading integrated power producer, BrightNight delivers clean, dispatchable, and resilient power solutions.
BrightNight’s AI-native platform, PowerAlpha, has enabled the development of a 37 GW portfolio comprising more than 70 best-in-class power projects, concentrated in the fastest-growing energy markets and data center hubs across the U.S. With a strong customer focus, a seasoned team of experts, and a trailblazing AI platform, BrightNight’s projects deliver industry-leading performance, deployment time, economics, and uptime. Strategic investors include Goldman Sachs and Global Infrastructure Partners (BlackRock).

Name: Jakson Genset
Description:
With a legacy spanning over 77 years, we are dedicated to revolutionizing the energy sector through cutting-edge distributed energy solutions. As industry leaders in generator set manufacturing, our innovation ensures uninterrupted 24x7 power backup for all. Leveraging our expertise in solar rooftop systems and battery energy storage, we craft tailored, sustainable solutions for businesses.
Our commitment extends to serving the Ministry of Defence, where our custom solutions for its applications withstand extreme conditions, reflecting our unwavering dedication to empower our nation with excellence.
We are driven to provide dependable and efficient solutions that cater to the diverse needs of our clients, ranging from government entities to the armed forces and everyday individuals. Our mission to enable power independence for all remains at the heart of our purpose.
Together, with our formidable market presence, we are poised to achieve many more milestones in the journey of sustainable and efficient global empowerment.

Name: EDF power solutions Chile
Description:
EDF power solutions Chile es parte del Grupo EDF, líder global en generación eléctrica y en la transición energética, con más de 70 años de experiencia y presencia en 25 países. El grupo impulsa un modelo sostenible y bajo en emisiones para alcanzar la carbono neutralidad al 2050, desarrollando proyectos competitivos e innovadores para enfrentar el cambio climático.

En Chile, estamos presentes desde 2014, con seis proyectos en operación y más de 1.400 MW de capacidad instalada, lo que nos posiciona como el quinto generador del país. Además, contamos con un robusto portafolio en desarrollo y una ambiciosa hoja de ruta que incluye iniciativas en hidrógeno verde, almacenamiento y soluciones energéticas flexibles y eficientes.
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Quaise Energy
Description:
Quaise develops superhot geothermal power plants for a terawatt-scale world. Our unique millimeter wave drilling system can build geothermal wells at unprecedented temperatures and depths, unlocking energy security and independence for every nation.

By targeting temperatures of 300-500 degrees Celsius at depths of 3-20 kilometers, we can build power generation and heat distribution plants within a short distance of every major population and industrial center on the planet.

We can even achieve the terawatt-level annual deployments required to meet accelerating global energy demand by scaling through the fossil fuel industry's established supply chain and workforce. There is no other energy solution capable of the same scale and speed.

Name: Doral Renewables LLC
Description: Doral Renewables is a Philadelphia-based developer, owner, and operator of renewable energy assets throughout the United States. Our solar and storage development portfolio comprises nearly 18 GW, which includes 400 MW currently in operation and nearly 1.3 GW of solar and 340 MWh of Battery Storage under construction. Doral Renewables operates in 17 states and across five electricity markets. With a strong focus on community engagement, we aim to integrate agrivoltaics practices throughout our pipeline, creating additional opportunities for farming communities. Our team of global partners includes the Doral Group (TASE: DORL), Migdal Group (TASE: MGDL), Clean Air Generation, APG, and Apollo Funds. Learn more at doral-llc.com and follow us on LinkedIn and Facebook. Our development methodology puts our stakeholders, landowners, and partners in the middle of decision-making, focuses on the incorporation of agrivoltaics practices in our project, and facilitates strong relationships with the local community

Name: E-Mobility-Rentals
Description:
Leading provider of sustainable mobility solutions, delivering eco-friendly electric vehicle fleets across Europe to help businesses, governments and institutions transition to a cleaner and greener future. 

Our unique and complete ecosystem offers an all-in-one solution: from electric vehicle fleets to battery swapping stations, interchangeable batteries and full maintenance services. 

As the first company to introduce a fully integrated e-mobility infrastructure in Europe, we empower our partners to optimize operations, reduce their carbon footprint and meet ESG goals. Join us today and get a zero-emission, cost-effective and scalable solution that ensures maximum efficiency and minimal downtime.

Name: Pacific Hydro Chile
Description:
Fundada en Australia en 1992, Pacific Hydro es de propiedad de State Power Investment Corporation (SPIC), a través de China Power International Development (CPID).
SPIC es uno de los cuatro mayores grupos de generación energética en China y tiene presencia en 43 países y regiones en el extranjero, incluyendo Australia, Chile, Malta, Japón, Brasil, Turquía y Vietnam.
Es líder en la fabricación de paneles solares y suministros para la generación de energía, cuenta con su propio laboratorio de pruebas de materiales e innovación en China.
SPIC cuenta con una capacidad instalada total de 151 GW y una valorización de activos de $160 billones.
Presente en Chile desde 2002, Pacific Hydro produce energía limpia a través de sus centrales hidroeléctricas de pasada en la VI Región del país. Los proyectos en operaciones son las centrales hidroeléctricas Chacayes, Coya y Pangal, en el Valle del Cachapoal, y La Higuera y La Confluencia, en el valle del Tinguiririca, a través del joint venture Tinguiririca Energía.
Nuestra central Chacayes fue uno de los primeros proyectos en Chile y América Latina y actualmente uno de las 6 iniciativas certificadas en Chile por Naciones Unidas para comercializar bonos de carbono.
Desde 2018 Pacific Hydro opera su primer proyecto de parque eólico en Chile, Punta Sierra, ubicado en la región de Coquimbo que contempló una inversión de US$140 millones.
Actualmente, Pacific Hydro Chile está contemplando y estudiando proyectos hasta por 2GW en tecnología solar, eólica, entre otras; además de incluir algunos proyectos piloto de tipo híbrido y nuevos negocios de energía.
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Enchanted Rock
Description: Enchanted Rock, your partner for Electrical Resiliency-as-a-Service, has reinvented how organizations ensure power resiliency with fully managed clean microgrids, support services, and flexible pricing options designed for fast, simple, and worry-free protection from extended grid outages.  High availability solutions, backed by skill personnel and advanced systems result in low risk, predictable resiliency.

Name: Saavi Energía
Description: Somos una empresa de energía con una capacidad de generación de 3.7 GW y más de 20 años de experiencia operativa. Contamos con 6 plantas de ciclo combinado, 1 planta solar, 3 estaciones de compresión de gas y 3 turbinas móviles, a lo largo y ancho del país. #IluminamosVidas

Name: AES Colombia
Description:
Somos la energía, somos el espíritu, el compromiso y el trabajo de miles de personas que día a día dan lo mejor para que AES entregue soluciones de energía a cada uno de sus clientes alrededor del mundo. 
 
AES es la quinta empresa generadora de energía en Colombia, energizando diariamente cerca de 3,2 millones de consumidores en todo el país.

Name: Toshiba America Energy Systems
Description:
Toshiba America Energy Systems Corporation (TAES), headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, with major manufacturing and services, provides turbine/generator equipment and services for the energy industry in the Americas, including thermal, hydro and nuclear power plants. TAES takes pride in being a technology leader, providing high-quality, reliable and cost-effective products and services that address current and future power generation needs.

Energize your career and find the power to lead with Toshiba America Energy Systems Corporation (TAES)!

Name: EDF power solutions India
Description:
EDF Renewables and EDF’s International Division are now EDF power solutions.

As a responsible and innovative industrial company, EDF power solutions develops, builds and operates renewable and low-carbon powerplants as well as flexibility solutions and transmission assets. 

Leveraging all our expertise for tailor-made offers to our clients, EDF power solutions drives the decarbonization and global performance of electrical systems.

Name: Marvel Fusion
Description: Our mission is to enable humankind to access clean, safe & reliable energy by developing a laser-driven fusion power plant.

Name: Trugo
Description: Trugo, Togg'un %100 iştirak firmasıdır. Türkiye genelinde yüksek hızlı şarj cihazlarından oluşan şarj istasyonları kurma hedefiyle yola çıkan şirket, bu şarj istasyonlarından oluşan ağı yöneten şarj hizmeti sağlayıcısıdır. Yüksek performans ve geniş kapsam ağıyla tüm elektrikli araç kullanıcılarına hizmet vermeyi amaçlayan Trugo, kullanıcı odaklı yazılım servisi ve yenilikçi iş modeliyle de farklılaşıyor. Şarj hizmetinin yanı sıra elektrikli araç kullanıcılarının ihtiyaçlarına yönelik farklı uygulamalarıyla da kullanıcı deneyimini üst seviyeye taşıma hedefiyle çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir.

Name: Origis Energy
Description: Origis Energy is accelerating the transition to a carbon-free future by Reimagining ZeroSM. As one of America’s leading renewable energy and decarbonization solution platforms, the company continues to expand and reimagine its contribution to the world’s net-zero goals. Origis Energy puts customers first to deploy a wide range of sustainable solutions for grid power generation, performance optimization, and long-term operation of solar and energy storage plants across the U.S. Learn more at OrigisEnergy.com.

Name: Haldia Energy Limited- A subsidiary of CESC Limited
Description:
Haldia Energy Limited (HEL), a fully integrated power utility of the flagship RP-SG group of companies, has developed a 2 X 300 MW coal based thermal power plant at Haldia, East Medinipur, and West Bengal, India. The project was conceived to bridge the gap between the demand and supply of power in the CESC system to make it self-sufficient to ensure un-interrupted power to the city of Kolkata and its suburbs. The power is transferred through a dedicated 400 KV twin circuit transmission line connecting the power station to PGCIL substation at Subhasgram.
The BTG supplier for the project was M/s Shanghai Electric Group Co. Ltd., China while the BOP supplier and EPC contractor was M/s Punj Lloyd Limited, India.
Both the 300 MW units achieved COD on 28.01.15 and 21.02.15 respectively.

Name: Generadora Metropolitana
Description:
Generadora Metropolitana provee soluciones energéticas para mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas, con un fuerte foco en la responsabilidad ambiental, la seguridad, la innovación, el compromiso social y en sus colaboradores.

Es una de las empresas de generación de energía eléctrica más relevantes de Chile, con tres centrales de generación ubicadas en puntos estratégicos del Sistema Eléctrico Nacional y tres proyectos renovables en desarrollo. En la Región Metropolitana tiene la Nueva Renca (379 MW); en la Región de Valparaíso la Central Los Vientos (132 MW) y en la Región del Biobío, Central Santa Lidia (139 MW).

Está en la última etapa de CEME1, la central solar más grande de Chile, y cuenta con otros dos proyectos fotovoltaicos aprobados: Sol del Loa (800 MW) y La Pampina (200 MW). Los tres están ubicados en la Región de Antofagasta.

Name: Uganda Electricity Generation Company Ltd
Description: Uganda Electricity Generation Company Limited (“UEGCL or the Company”) was incorporated in 2001 initially with the main objective to take over as a going concern the generation activities of the now defunct Uganda Electricity Board (UEB) together with all or any part of the property, assets and liabilities associated with it as was transferred to the Company by UEB in accordance with the Public Enterprise Reform and Divestiture Act. These assets transferred to the Company from UEB were principally the 180 MW Nalubaale and 200 MW Kira Hydro Power Stations located in Jinja.

Name: GRUPO NEOELECTRA
Description:
Neoelectra es un grupo empresarial especializado en aportar soluciones energéticas eficientes a la industria. Más diversificada en servicios y más especializada en el cliente industrial, Neoelectra gestiona activos de cogeneración, biomasa y recuperación de CO2 alimentario y ofrece una amplia oferta de soluciones energéticas eficientes (electricidad, calor, vapor, agua, CO2 alimentario, servicios de back-up energético…), servicios industriales y comercialización de energía y gas para la industria.

Nuestra fórmula de éxito es la combinación de un excelente equipo humano con la aplicación de tecnologías para generar la máxima eficiencia en todos los procesos y proyectos. Ponemos al servicio de nuestros clientes industriales nuestra propia experiencia en la gestión de activos.

Nuestra misión: aportar soluciones energéticas eficientes e innovadoras y crear valor para clientes, empleados y accionistas.

Nuestra visión es ser la primera compañía de energía independiente de España.

Nuestros valores: las personas, la sostenibilidad, la eficiencia, la sensibilidad con el entorno natural, social y cultural de los territorios donde actuamos.

Name: Fadhili Operations & Maintenance Company
Description: Located in the east of Saudi Arabia, 50 kilometers northwest of Jubail Industrial City, the Fadhili project is a combined cycled gas power plant with a capacity of 1,507 MW, 1,447 tph of steam and 768.8 tph of feed water.

Name: Electrip Global
Description:
Electrip” is a global partnership in electric vehicle charging (EVC) and energy services areas between Wren House Infrastructure LP (WH), a direct subsidiary of Kuwait Investment Authority, and the leading global energy company Zorlu Enerji.

As the dynamic player of the ever-evolving mobility system, “electrip” aims to power up electric vehicle ecosystem and sustainable transportation, making the lives of its users easier with the nature-friendly travel experience and end-to-end solutions it offers.

Name: Dispatch Energy
Description: Dispatch Energy is a full-service, customer-focused distributed energy solution provider. Our team’s decades of combined expertise and consultative approach enable every customer to capitalize on market opportunities, take advantage of incentives, and seamlessly bridge the gap from project inception to project operation.

Name: Zenith Energy
Description: Zenith Energy is one of Australia’s leading Independent Power Producers, specialising in tailored remote off-grid power generation and urban microgrids. With excess of 710MW capacity under contract or in-development, we are committed to growing our renewable energy portfolio, and helping our clients reach net zero.

Name: Smart Electric Power Alliance
Description:
The Smart Electric Power Alliance (SEPA) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit accelerating the transition to a clean, affordable, and resilient energy system for all.

With more than 1,000 member organizations—including utilities, technology companies, regulators, and policymakers—SEPA works at the intersection of technology, policy, and programs to address the energy sector’s most pressing challenges.

Through education, collaboration, and convening, we help industry leaders implement innovative, real-world solutions that deliver reliable and affordable power to customers across the country.

Since 1992, SEPA has supported the integration of electrification, grid modernization, and regulatory and business innovation—empowering stakeholders to meet rising energy demand and drive meaningful progress.

Our work is guided by three strategic priorities:

Grid – The grid is the backbone of the energy transition. Modernizing it with advanced technologies and customer-centric programs is critical to ensuring resilience and meeting evolving needs.

Growth – From surging electricity demand to the rise of EVs and electrified homes, SEPA supports stakeholders in managing growth reliably, sustainably, and affordably.

Globe – We connect members to proven domestic and international innovations, providing scalable solutions that accelerate impact.

SEPA is the proud co-founder and co-host of RE+, the largest clean energy event in North America. Together with the Solar Energy Industries Association (SEIA), SEPA has helped shape RE+ into a one-of-a-kind convening that brings together every corner of the modern energy industry, covering sectors such as solar, energy storage, grid-edge technologies, hydrogen, and EV charging infrastructure.

SEPA is also home to Public Utilities Fortnightly (PUF), a trusted platform for utility, regulatory, and energy industry leaders.

For more information, visit www.sepapower.org.

Name: BTS Biogas
Description:
BTS Biogas is an Italian company specialized in developing and producing tailor-made and technology-intensive Biogas and Biomethane plants. 

With more than 25 years of experience in the field of Anaerobic Digestion, BTS Biogas leads the entire process from design and construction to operation and maintenance of agricultural, agro-industrial and organic waste biogas facilities.

BTS Biogas has built so far over 230 plants worldwide, and it directly invests in the development and construction of new biogas plants in Europe and USA. 

The company currently employs over 100 professionals in the Headquarters of Affi (Verona) and Brunico (Bolzano) and the foreign branches in France, United Kingdom and USA.

Our skills:
 Support the customer as an investor partner
 Construction of customized plants, from the adequate pre-treatment of the biomass to the optimal disposal of the AD outcomes: energy/bio-fertilizers/heat/CO2 
 High reliability and advanced technology
 Biological and mechanical assistance 24/7 
 Spare parts available within 48 hours
 METANLab, our dedicated performance analysis laboratory
 Facility management and maintenance

Designing and building our plants, we offer our contribution to innovative agricultural practices and sustainable paths in livestock farming. We foster the CIRCULAR ECONOMY and the optimum disposal of food industry leftovers and the organic fraction of municipal waste. 

We deem Anaerobic Digestion as the best process to drive the ECOLOGICAL TRANSICTION by producing:
A) biogas and biomethane that turn into biofuels, electric and thermal energy
B) organic soil conditioners and fertilizers
C) carbon dioxide for food use

Name: MSU Energy
Description:
En MSU Energy generamos energía para los hogares argentinos desde 2016. Con casi una década en la industria, trabajamos para que el desarrollo del país se consolide con energía confiable.

Hoy operamos tres centrales térmicas a ciclo combinado con una capacidad total instalada de 750 MW que inyectamos al sistema nacional de manera eficiente, estable y competitiva.

Nos mueve la idea de generar energía de manera responsable, con tecnología de excelencia y trabajando con la convicción de producir más y mejor para llegar más lejos.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Iberdrola France
Description:
Avec plus de 170 ans d'histoire, Iberdrola est aujourd’hui un leader mondial de l'énergie et l'une des plus grandes compagnies d'électricité du monde en termes de capitalisation boursière. 

Il y a 20 ans, Iberdrola a fait le choix audacieux et visionnaire d’anticiper la transition énergétique et les besoins croissants en énergie dans le monde de demain, faisant de l´entreprise l'un des fers de lance européens dans les énergies renouvelables. 

Iberdrola œuvre pour lutter contre le changement climatique et offrir un modèle économique propre, fiable et intelligent. 
Pour ce, la société investit massivement dans les énergies renouvelables, les réseaux intelligents, le stockage d'énergie à grande échelle et la transformation numérique pour offrir les produits et services les plus avancés.

Name: respect energy
Description:
First: respect
Respect Energy S.A. is a Polish electricity trading company that offers a renewable energy mix from hydro, wind, biogas and photovoltaic power. Respect Energy is operating in Poland, as well as in 23 other countries and collaborates with more than 600 green energy generators. The company is focusing on financing the development of renewable energy, especially wind and photovoltaic farms. CICERO Shades of Green -  leading global provider of Second Opinions on green bonds - has rated Respect Energy’s green bonds framework CICERO Dark Green.

Name: PLN Indonesia Power Services
Description:
Berdiri sejak 15 April 1998, PT PLN Indonesia Power Services (PLN IP Services) mulai beroperasi di Jakarta pada 15 Agustus 1998. PLN Indonesia Power Services merupakan Perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang ketenagalistrikan, khususnya untuk mengelola Pembangkit Listrik dalam bentuk pemberian Jasa Operasi dan Pemeliharaan

Mayoritas saham PLN IP Services dimiliki oleh PLN Indonesi Power (PLN Indonesia Power / PT PLN IP) dengan presentase sebesar 99,9% dan 1% YPK PT IP. PT Indonesia Power sendiri merupakan Anak Perusahaan PT PLN (Persero)

Awalnya, PLN IP Services bertujuan untuk menjadi pionir pengembangan bisnis Cogeneration, Distributed Generation, serta pengelolaan Captive Power yang optimal. Memasuki arahan baru pada tahun 2009, PLN IP Services memiliki aset utamanya, yaitu PLTD Batakan 45 MW di Balikpapan, Kalimantan Timur. Memasuki tahun 2010, adanya pengembangan usaha pada bidang Jasa O&M. Hal ini terlihat dari kepercayaan yang diberikan untuk mengelola PLTU Labuan 2x300 MW. Dalam memberikan solusi yang terbaik bagi Pelanggan, pada tahun 2012, PLN IP Services melakukan pengembangan usaha di bidang Jasa MRO (Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul). Aset PLN IP Services kian bertambah dengan berdirinya PLTD MFO 10 MW yang awalnya beroperasi di Pesanggaran, Bali. Pada tahun 2015, PLN IP Services menambah layanan bisnis baru, yaitu Trading &Stockist

Setiap tahunnya, PLN IP Services berhasil menuai kepercayaan Pelanggan hingga berkembang mendukung Pembangkit besar di wilayah Jawa, beberapa area di Sumatera, Kalimantan dan Indonesia Bagian Timur

Di masa mendatang, PLN Indonesia Power Services berkomitmen penuh dalam menjamin pelayanan yang terbaik bagi Pelanggan dan terus mendukung penyediaan listrik untuk meningkatkan kesejahteraan Bangsa

VISI
Perusahaan Terpercaya dalam Jasa Pembangkitan dan Usaha Terkait

MISI
Mitra Penyedia Energi Listrik untuk Kesejahteraan Bangsa

Name: Energy Solutions (Pvt.) Limited
Description:
Energy Solutions (Pvt.) Limited is a leading sales and service company in Power Generation. We are the Exclusive Distributor of Aksa Power Generation, Turkey, and Cummins Gas UK. Additionally, we provide energy-efficient renewable solutions. Our long-standing association with Shirazi Trading Company since 2005 and collaboration with local assemblers for ESL POWER products further reinforce our commitment to quality and service.
Aksa Power Generation (Turkey) has an extensive range of Diesel Generator sets from 3kVA to 3000kVA and is the Global OEM of Cummins & Perkins Engines. It is the largest genset manufacturer in Europe and fourth largest in the world. 
Cummins (UK) is a well-known global leader in Power Generation Industry with its range of Lean Burn Gas Generator sets from 1200KW to 2000KW showcasing products with Electrical Efficiency up to 44.2%. 
ESL Renewable solutions include MW+ solar and microgrid solutions with Tier 1 Grade A Mono Crystalline Solar Panels, world’s top rated Solar Inverters and energy storage & back up power energy batteries based on Lithium Ion and Tubular technology.

Our value package includes:
1. turnkey energy and solar solutions with comprehensive technical support over the entire life cycle of the chosen equipment. Our certified engineers and technicians across Pakistan ensures reliable service and expertise.
2. in house facility for designing, customizing and supplying all types of electrical components including AMF, ATS, Battery Chargers, Change Over Switches, Distribution Panels, Manual and Automatic Synchronizing, Bumpless Transfer Panels, Real Time Power Factor Correction (RTPFC) Panels, etc.
3. engine rebuild services including top and major overhauls in accordance with the manufacturers’ recommendations.
We are present in virtually every sector of our economy including Banking Industry, Telecom Sector, Oil & Gas, Textile, Hotel Industry, Pharmaceuticals, Construction, Food, Hospitals, Beverages, Engineering Services, etc.

Name: EDF India
Description: EDF Group has been present in India for more than 25 years and aims at being part of the ambitious energy development program in India. EDF Group has been constantly engaged in various capacities in development of large Hydro Projects, Pumped Storage Projects with Indian State Utilities. EDF Group has been instrumental in designing the Southern Regional Load Dispatch Centre & has been contributing to Indian Transmission Sector with in-depth studies. EDF Group has designed the first Indian High Voltage Test Laboratory for Central Power Research Institute (CPRI). EDF has large investments in the Solar & Wind Power Projects in India with a Renewable portfolio of 371 MW. EDF Group is leading the negotiations on behalf of the French Nuclear Industry with NPCIL for developing the World’s Largest Nuclear Project with 6 EPRs.

Name: Hy Brazil Energia
Description:
A Hy Brazil atua há mais de 20 anos no setor de energia, inicialmente no segmento de distribuição e, atualmente, nas áreas de geração e eficiência energética. 

Com 32 usinas em operação comercial em seu portfólio, somando mais de 140 MW instalados, trabalhamos de forma verticalizada: desde a identificação do potencial, desenvolvimento do projeto, licenciamento ambiental, implantação e operação, além da comercialização e gestão de energia no mercado livre.

Realizamos a gestão de mais de 9.000 unidades consumidoras em geração distribuída, concentradas em 4 distribuidoras nos estados de MG, SP e RJ

Name: EDF Renewables India
Description: EDF Renewables India Pvt. Limited is a leading Independent Power Producer, generating grid-scale power. We develop, build, and operate Renewable power plants. Our Portfolio is approximately 1 GW out of which more than half is operational. Our team of leaders strive to solve energy challenges regardless the size or complexity. We help foster the emergence of new technologies and help optimize mature renewable technologies.

Name: Grupo Bolt
Capwatt
Description:
Capwatt is an innovating company which promotes energy solutions, contributing to a sustainable energy model.

Currently, Capwatt is located in Portugal, Spain, Mexico and Italy, and manages a wide portfolio of projects in operation, being recognized as an independent Power Producer.

Sustainability is in our DNA. Each day we commit to care for the environment and to contribute to the betterment of the community to which we belong. 

Capwatt manages and operates around 270MW and its areas of expertise are biomethane, renewable methanol, utility scale and decentralized energy solutions.

Name: CTG Latam
Description: CTG Latam is the subsidiary of China Three Gorges which is incorporated and Head Quartered in Hong Kong.

Name: Hindustan Power
Description:
Hindustan Power is a leading integrated infrastructure company with a diversified portfolio across both renewable and transitional energy generation as well as mining operations. 

Having delivered large-scale sustainable infrastructure projects both in India and internationally, the company is rapidly expanding its clean-energy footprint through a robust multi-gigawatt growth pipeline, while remaining committed to shaping a resilient, low-carbon future for the nation.

Name: International Geothermal Association
Description: We connect the Global Geothermal Community, serving as a platform for networking opportunities aimed at promoting and supporting global geothermal development. We run the flagship event called the World Geothermal Congress every three years and many regional events on a yearly basis putting the spotlight on policies, the regulatory framework, financial mechanisms and tech development. We are building the geothermal eco-system to serve Sustainable Development Goal #7: clean and affordable energy for all.

Name: Dipro
Description: Empresa desativada

Name: Talen Energy
Description: Talen (Nasdaq: TLN) owns and operates approximately 13.1 gigawatts of power infrastructure in the United States. We produce and sell electricity, capacity, and ancillary services into wholesale U.S. power markets, including PJM and WECC, with our generation fleet principally located in the Mid-Atlantic, Ohio and Montana. Talen is headquartered in Houston, Texas

Name: Cuerva
Description:
En Cuerva, desafiamos lo convencional. Queremos ser el ecosistema de referencia en la transición energética del siglo XXI, fomentando el uso de nuevas fuentes y tecnologías, introduciendo soluciones inteligentes de energía y potenciando la transformación hacia la estructura eléctrica del futuro. 

Somos una compañía fundada en 1939 en Granada (España) con una larga y contrastada trayectoria en el sector energético y eléctrico. Nacimos como un taller familiar de reparaciones hasta posicionarnos como referentes en el sector gracias a la apuesta continua por la mejora, la innovación, y la disrupción. 

Con espíritu global, contamos con equipos profesionales multidisciplinares. Pensamos, creamos y lanzamos herramientas y tecnologías que aseguran la transición hacia un nuevo, y mejor, modelo de consumo energético. Gracias a nuestro compromiso continuo y prácticas de trabajo eficiente nos hemos convertido en agente de cambio dentro del sector energético. 

Llevamos más de 85 años apostando por la innovación y buscando nuevas y mejores maneras de entender y trabajar la energía. Entendemos la energía como un canal a través del cual ofrecer servicios útiles y relevantes para las personas. Es por eso que ponemos al usuario en el centro de todo lo que hacemos y aprendemos del dato para poder dar respuesta a sus necesidades, presentes y futuras.

Estamos presentes en toda la cadena de valor de la energía:

— Generación de energía renovable
— Distribución de energía eléctrica
— Comercialización de energía

— Digitalización de la energía y servicios energéticos.

Estamos dispuestos a llevar la energía al siguiente nivel. ¿Te unes a la transformación?

Cuerva
Más allá de la energía.
www.cuervaenergia.com

Name: Bolt Energy
Description:
Desde 2011, a Bolt Energy vem liderando a transformação no setor elétrico, consolidando-se como um dos principais grupos de energia no Brasil. Nossa atuação abrange soluções integradas, atendendo clientes em diferentes segmentos, com foco em eficiência, economia e sustentabilidade.

Com forte presença no mercado livre de energia, negociamos contratos que atendem às demandas de curto e longo prazo, sempre priorizando a flexibilidade e as melhores condições para nossos clientes. Nossa experiência nos posiciona como uma referência em energia renovável, em soluções que promovem a transição energética de maneira prática e acessível.

O grupo Bolt vai além da comercialização. Nossas unidades de negócio oferecem produtos estruturados que conectam consumidores, empresas e oportunidades, impulsionando a inovação no setor elétrico. Estamos presentes em todo o território nacional, promovendo práticas sustentáveis e investindo em tecnologia para atender às mudanças do mercado e contribuir com o desenvolvimento econômico e ambiental do país.

Nossa visão é clara: ser reconhecidos pela excelência e qualidade em todas as frentes em que atuamos. Com valores como inovação, transparência e excelência, seguimos construindo um futuro energético mais limpo, acessível e eficiente para todos.

Seja no fornecimento de energia para grandes consumidores ou na geração de soluções personalizadas, a Bolt Energy é parceira estratégica para quem busca transformar desafios em oportunidades no setor elétrico.

Name: BYD Argentina
Description: BYD es una compañía pionera global, de origen chino, que ofrece soluciones eco eficientes para diferentes industrias. Inicio en 1995, en la ciudad de Shenzhen como una compañía orientada al desarrollo de baterías para la industria de telefonía celular, luego expandió su rango de acción a automóviles y componentes para celulares.

Name: Entidad Binacional Yacyretá
Description:
La Entidad Binacional Yacyretá fue creada por el Tratado firmado en 1973 entre Paraguay y Argentina con el propósito esencial de desarrollar un aprovechamiento hidroeléctrico y mejorar las condiciones de navegabilidad del río Paraná a la altura de la isla Yacyretá.
Nuestro complejo hidroeléctrico es hoy el principal generador de energía eléctrica de la Argentina y uno de las más grandes de América Latina.
En 2021 se alcanzaron cifras récord en la generación de energía habiendo acumulado una generación de 13.363 GWh en el año
En la actualidad Yacyretá lleva a cabo la construcción de una nueva central en el brazo Aña Cuá. Esta permitirá incrementar la producción en aproximadamente un 9% a la vez que genera nuevas fuentes laborales , y oportunidades para las empresas de ambas márgenes del río Paraná
Durante su construcción Yacyretá ha ejecutado y supervisado más de 2.000 obras para la recuperación de áreas de valor económico, social y cultural.
Se realizó la construcción viviendas para la población afectada por el llenado del embalse a cota 83 msnm. Se han construido caminos y rutas se ha realizado el tratamiento costero a lo largo del embalse También la EBY proveyó la reposición funcional de infraestructura edilicia y se han ejecutado obras de infraestructura eléctrica y construcción de cloacas y plantas de tratamiento.
Desde su área social la empresa interactúa con la población afectada por el embalse. Se desarrollan políticas de acompañamiento que contribuyen al mejor desarrollo de las familias que fueron relocalizadas.
Mediante la implementación de programas de capacitación se ha permitido a la población afectada ampliar sus horizontes tanto a nivel educativo como laboral.
En materia de medio ambiente contamos con 120.000 hectáreas de reservas y áreas protegidas en las que trabajamos en forma continua y permanente en el cuidado y protección de la biodiversidad de la región.

Name: Lucky & Yunus Energy Portfolio
Description: Lucky Energy Portfolio is comprised of Lucky Renewables, Lucky Energy, and Yunus Energy which are the subsidiaries of the renowned Yunus Brothers Group (YBG). This portfolio is a leading source of reliable, affordable, and environmentally-friendly energy supply in Pakistan and reflects YBG's commitment to sustainable development and growth since its inception in 1962. Yunus Energy Limited, established in 2011, and Lucky Renewables, established in 2015, are both 50 MW wind farms located in Jhimpir, District Thatta, in the province of Sindh. Each farm is equipped with cutting-edge technology, including 20 x 2.5 MW Nordex N100 Turbines and 25 x 2 MW SGRE G114 Turbines at Yunus Energy and Lucky Renewables, respectively. In addition, Lucky Energy, a Small Power Producer (SPP) which is in services as a Captive Power Plant, has been in operation since its incorporation in July 1993. With two gas-powered, thermal power generation facilities featuring state-of-the-art Wartsilla Engines and Jenbacher Engines, Lucky Energy is dedicated to providing the most sophisticated technology with optimal efficiency. As Lucky Energy Portfolio, our mission is to maintain a strong reputation as a leading power generation company, contributing our part in the development and growth of trade and industry in Pakistan along with social upliftment, well-being, and prosperity of the people around our localities.

Name: Sage Geosystems
Description:
Sage Geosystems is pioneering Pressure Geothermal—a new category of geothermal energy that delivers grid-scale power and long-duration energy storage virtually anywhere.

Our patented technologies harness both heat and pressure from the Earth, enabling breakthrough performance in power generation and energy storage at a cost and speed unmatched by conventional geothermal or battery systems. From powering data centers to replacing coal plants, our systems are compact, modular, and commercially viable today.

Sage has already commissioned a 3MW energy storage facility, secured major contracts with Meta, the Department of Defense, and top utilities, and is backed by leading energy operators and venture funds.

Description: We connect the Global Geothermal Community, serving as a platform for networking opportunities aimed at promoting and supporting global geothermal development. We run the flagship event called the World Geothermal Congress every three years and many regional events on a yearly basis putting the spotlight on policies, the regulatory framework, financial mechanisms and tech development. We are building the geothermal eco-system to serve Sustainable Development Goal #7: clean and affordable energy for all.

Name: Bredenoord
Description:
Everything is about energy. 

Energy provides people with a comfortable life and keeps the economy running. With its solutions Bredenoord provides the energy for successful and powerful entrepreneurship. 

Especially in those situations in which energy is not always certain and obvious. Bredenoord's energy enables its customers to operate in the way they want to. Guaranteed. All over the world, today and tomorrow.

Name: Genesal Energy
Description:
We are a business based in the Galician region of Spain with over 25 years of experience in the distributed energy sector. As well as offering standard gensets both reliable and efficient, we are focused on the personalisation of our products. Through our in-house projects department, we bring extra value in technical ability with relation to developing specialist solutions. This includes viability assessments, detailed planning, execution and on-site commissioning carried out by expert engineers.

WE PUT OUR SOUL INTO EVERYTHING WE DO
Whether it’s generating power, helping our clients, chasing excellence in the creation of our gensets, innovating constantly, being more and more environmentally friendly. In everything we do, we put our soul.
