Name: Grupa Enea
Description:
Grupa Enea to wicelider  rynku elektroenergetycznego w zakresie produkcji energii. Odpowiadamy za bezpieczne dostawy prądu do 2,7 mln klientów. Zatrudniamy 18,2 tys. pracowników w całej Polsce.

 Zarządzamy pełnym łańcuchem wartości na rynku energii elektrycznej: od paliwa, poprzez produkcję energii elektrycznej, dystrybucję, sprzedaż, aż po obsługę klienta.

 Do Enei Operator należy sieć dystrybucyjna w północno-zachodniej Polsce (ok. 1/5 powierzchni kraju). 

 Należą do nas dwie ważne elektrownie systemowe: Elektrownia Kozienice i Elektrownia Połaniec. W Grupie działa również Lubelski Węgiel Bogdanka – kopalnia jest głównym dostawcą surowca do naszych elektrowni.

 Nasza działalność obejmuje również energetykę cieplną w zakładach w Białymstoku, Obornikach i Pile oraz wytwarzanie energii elektrycznej w elektrowniach wodnych, wiatrowych i biogazowniach. 

 Zatrudniamy najlepszych specjalistów w branży, a do naszego grona szukamy ambitnych osób otwartych na nowe technologie i innowacje.

Name: Nidec Power
Description:
Nidec Power is a world leader in Electric Power Generation products and solutions: the manufacturer of Leroy-Somer and Kato Engineering alternators - renowned for their performance and reliability.

Nidec Power is our new brand, uniting 3 Nidec entities (Leroy-Somer, Kato Engineering, and Houma Armature Works) as a unified global division.
Together, with the passion of our teams, we strive to bring value and sustainable innovation to power generation professionals worldwide.

Nidec Power, a subsidiary of the Nidec Group, is the world leader in industrial alternators ranging from 10 kVA to 35,000 kVA. We work with generator manufacturers and power producers around the world to help deliver reliable, high-performance power generation solutions.

We have over 3,000 employees, 10 production sites worldwide, and a global service network.

We know our alternators inside out, and we're in the best position to look after them. Our teams are on hand worldwide for repairs, diagnostics, maintenance and refurbishment. Our qualified personnel are accustomed to the most delicate interventions, and we coordinate easily with other teams to your complete satisfaction.

The result for you: optimized performance, reduced downtime and the assurance of having your equipment under control!

Powering sustainably in the world, together!

Name: ARKE ENERGIA
Description:
A Arke Energia é uma empresa criada pela joint-venture entre o fundo global Pátria Investimentos, com know-how em infraestrutura; a Shell, com reconhecida atuação em toda cadeia de óleo e gás; e a Mitsubishi Hitachi Power America, líder na indústria de equipamentos e turbinas para geração de energia elétrica. Nascemos alinhados ao que há de mais importante e vital para o planeta: fortalecer a transição para uma matriz energética mais limpa, rumo a uma economia forte e sustentável, comprometidos em operar com respeito às pessoas, ao meio ambiente e às comunidades onde atuamos.

Nosso primeiro projeto é a Usina Termelétrica Marlim Azul (UTE MAZ), localizada em Macaé, estado do Rio de Janeiro, e inaugurada em 22 de novembro de 2023. A MAZ é a primeira térmica brasileira a utilizar o gás natural vindo do pré-Sal, extraído na Bacia de Santos, para gerar energia elétrica.
A alta tecnologia empregada na UTE Marlim Azul proporciona maior eficiência de conversão do gás natural em energia. O empreendimento conta ainda com uma Linha de Transmissão de cerca de 14km, conectando a UTE Marlim Azul ao Sistema Interligado Nacional (SIN), e com um Gasoduto Dedicado de aproximadamente 20km. A UTE Marlim Azul entrega sua energia, comercializada em um leilão, para 25 distribuidoras em diversos estados do país, e gera energia suficiente para atender a cerca de 2,5 milhões de residências. 
Trazemos mais segurança energética para o país, fornecendo energia confiável, a baixo custo e de maneira eficiente.

Name: Powerstar
Description:
A D2Zero Company

With a 24-year track record, Powerstar is an industry leader in electrification, specialising in designing and manufacturing cutting-edge power management tech for businesses around the world. We pride ourselves on a client-centric ethos, technical prowess, and a commitment to sustainability. 

At Powerstar, we drive the energy transition by delivering end-to-end energy efficiency solutions. From initial feasibility studies to design, installation, and aftercare, we offer advanced technologies, including Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), Voltage Optimisation and Low-Loss Transformers.

Let us be your gateway to a sustainable, resilient, and cost-effective energy future. 

Find out more about Powerstar at www.powerstar.com

Name: Eagle Creek Renewable Energy LLC
Description:
Eagle Creek Renewable Energy was founded in 2010 to acquire, enhance and operate small hydroelectric power facilities.  Eagle Creeks’ facilities provide clean energy to electricity consumers in North America while allowing recreational opportunities and protecting historical resources and the environment.  Eagle Creek currently owns and operates eighty-six hydroelectric facilities representing approximately 640 megawatts of capacity across  the United States.  Eagle Creek also has ownership interests equivalent to approximately 12 megawatts in fourteen other hydroelectric facilities and two solar facilities in New England.

Eagle Creek is a privately-owned entity and is wholly-owned subsidiary of Ontario Power Generation.

In November 2018, Ontario Power Generation (OPG) acquired Eagle Creek from Hudson Clean Energy Partners, Power Energy Corporation and its other previous investors. On October 8, 2019, Ontario Power Generation announced the finalization of the acquisition of Cube Hydro Partners and Helix Partners (collectively, Cube Hydro) from I Squared Capital. The two companies are now merging into one, operating under the Eagle Creek Renewable Energy Name. 

Eagle Creek continues to seek opportunities to acquire hydroelectric facilities and improve them to increase clean power production, operate them in harmony with the environment and enhance the value of the company's hydroelectric portfolio for its investor, employees, host communities and all stakeholders in the projects.

Name: Acema Ingeniería
Description:
Brindamos soluciones en ingeniería para proyectos de granjas solares, sistemas eléctricos de baja, media y alta tensión.  Nos caracterizamos por innovar y optimizar costos y tiempos de implementación 


Nuestro equipo de ingeniería está esperándote para comenzar tus proyectos:

-Ingeniería en granjas solares 
-Centros de control para sistemas eléctricos
-Equipos de media y alta tensión
-Soluciones, automatización y soluciones en granjas solares
-Ingeniería en servicios auxiliares
-Sistemas de gestión y protección de eléctricos
-Sistemas de control y protección eléctricos
-Gestión de proyectos

Estaremos complacidos de diseñar la solución que necesitas!

Name: OCI Energy
Description: OCI Energy is a leading developer of utility-scale solar and battery energy storage projects that strengthen America’s energy security, reduce energy costs, and support long-term grid reliability. From concept to operation, OCI Energy continues to lead the way in advancing energy solutions for a more secure and affordable energy future.

Name: Genrep Ltd/Ltee
Description:
Genrep is Canada's comprehensive generator and engine solutions provider, delivering reliable backup power systems to industrial, commercial, government, marine, and residential customers since 1983. With over 40 years of specialized experience, we've engineered and serviced thousands of power systems across Ontario, Quebec, and nationwide through our extensive service network spanning Hamilton, Mississauga, Ottawa, Toronto, Edmonton, Surrey, Halifax, Moncton, Digby, and St. John's. 

Generator Solutions Portfolio 

Our CSA-certified custom-built Seneca Power Generation systems include diesel units (10KW-2MW) and natural gas generators (30KW-950KW) assembled in Canada with premium HD Hyundai Infracore and Mitsubishi engines. Sentry V residential generators (18KW-20KW) feature water-cooling, integrated Wi-Fi monitoring, cold-start kits, and 6-year warranties—engineered specifically for harsh Canadian climates. Our engineers also work with OEMs across country-wide to create custom power solutions that meet Tier-4 and IMO 3 emission standards. 

Comprehensive Services 

TSSA and EGSA certified technicians deliver turnkey solutions including generator design, installation, CSA 282 load-bank testing, fuel storage systems, exhaust systems, sound attenuation, transfer switches, preventive maintenance contracts (CSA 282/Z32 compliant), fuel polishing, equipment upgrades, and emergency repairs. Parts ship within 2 business days from our extensive inventory. 

Generator Rentals & Engine Distribution 

 Genrep provides commercial generator rentals (30KW-2000KW) across Canada for construction, events, and emergency applications. We are exclusive engine distributors of HD Hyundai Infracore and Mitsubishi engines for marine, industrial, and power generation.  

Service Areas: Ontario, Quebec, New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, Newfoundland, Prince Edward Island, British Columbia, Alberta

Name: TOMCo - Saudi Aramco Cogeneration Plants
Description: Tanajib Operation and Maintenance Company (“TOMCo”) is an operation and maintenance company for a Power Cogeneration Plant and Seawater Desalination Plant established as part of Saudi Aramco's Marjan Field Project, with a net capacity of approximately 940MW of electricity generation and a steam output of approximately 1,084 tons per hour, as well as a desalinated water output of approximately 19,470 cubic meters per day.

Name: ATCO EnPower
Description:
As part of the ATCO group of companies, ATCO EnPower is a critical business line for ATCO’s commitment to sustainability and for a Net-Zero future for generations to come.

 We work globally with a sustainable business model that generates value not only for the company but also for the communities where we operate. ATCO EnPower is uniquely positioned within the industry and has an integrated business portfolio of innovative solutions in clean energy storage, industrial water, wind, solar and hydro power generation. Our dedication is reflected in our efforts to deliver non-regulated energy solutions that support a cleaner, reliable, and affordable energy future, while championing the safety, inclusivity and equity of our people, communities, partners and customers.

Name: ORPC
Description:
Proven and reliable underwater power systems that generate energy from free-flowing tides and rivers, ORPC improves people’s lives and their environment through sustainable energy solutions. A global leader in marine energy technology and project solutions, we are initially focused on solving the problem of high cost diesel power generation in remote islanded communities by harnessing the power of ocean and river currents to create predictable, locally produced and reliable energy. 
 
Worldwide we are the only company to have built, operated and delivered power to a utility grid from a tidal energy project, and to a local microgrid from a river power project. ORPC is committed to working with local partners and creating local economic opportunities.
 
In 2019, ORPC launched its commercial RivGen Power System in Igiugig, Alaska, supplying energy to the remote community and setting a record as the longest operating current energy converter device in the Americas. ORPC has installed a second RivGen device in Igiugig, along with smart grid technology and energy storage, with the goal of decreasing the community’s diesel fuel use by 60-90%.
 
ORPC has developed a globally respected knowledge database of fisheries and marine life interaction with our power systems, and in over a decade, no known adverse impacts have been observed in either river or ocean environments. Our projects are carried out in full collaboration with local communities, universities, environmental agencies, fishing industry groups and other stakeholders. 
 
ORPC is pursuing strategic and financial partnerships that will allow us to expand our operations in North America, South America and Europe, and supply our commercial power systems and expertise worldwide where ocean and river energy resources exist.

Name: PT Sumberdaya Sewatama
Description:
PT Sumberdaya Sewatama ("Sewatama) is one of the integrated, most complete, and trusted power service providers. More than 30 years of experience in providing power solutions, including power rental, power plant operation & and maintenance services, and mining operational support services in power.

Sewatama has shown significantly strong growth since it was first established in 1992. We have succeeded in developing various kinds of electricity business portfolios and are supported by hundreds of qualified experts in their fields. Sewatama is now operating in multiple regions of the country with five representative offices and four depot stations.

We serve customers' needs in terms of electricity in various industries, including the mining, oil and gas, manufacturing, construction industries and industrial areas. We have also succeeded in building a reputation as a trusted partner for the Indonesian government in its national electrification efforts – a testament to our credibility and reliability in the industry.

HOTLINE: 0812 29001500

Name: XGS Energy
Description: XGS Energy is a geothermal energy company founded and headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.  Our proprietary heat harvesting technology and closed-loop well architecture enable global deployment of terawatt-scale geothermal heat and power.

Name: PLUG Elsewedy Electric
Description:
Plug is a leading electric vehicle (EV) chargers supplier based in Egypt, managed by Eng. Ahmed Elsewedy, with extensive expertise in the field of EV charging solutions. The company is dedicated to developing and providing advanced charging solutions that meet the needs of individuals, businesses, and governments in Egypt and beyond.

Plug's mission is to operate as an infrastructure developer/investor, charging point developer/provider, and operator, with the goal of promoting and accelerating the adoption of electric mobility. The company is committed to investing in the field of infrastructure and the platform of EV services, with a focus on building the necessary charging infrastructure to support the growth of the EV market in Egypt.

Plug is known for its strong expertise in the field of EV charging, and the company operates with the best technology to provide reliable, efficient, and user-friendly charging solutions. The company's comprehensive range of EV charging products and services includes charging stations, software management systems, maintenance and support services, and more.

One of Plug's key strengths is its strong software and after-sales services, which are critical for ensuring the optimal performance and reliability of EV charging stations. The company's experienced team of engineers and technicians work closely with customers to provide customized solutions that meet their specific needs and budget.

Name: GPS GROUP
Description:
Un ecosistema empresarial especializado en soluciones de energía, eficiencia energética y automatización para las distintas industrias con proyectos enfocados en potenciar la competitividad y sostenibilidad en el Ecuador. 

Desde el año 2016 hemos liderado la transición energética, tecnológica y digital de los sectores acuícola y agrícola en Ecuador; dinamizando las relaciones gubernamentales y privadas, al igual que las relaciones comerciales de cada unidad de negocio del grupo con las principales empresas y actores del mercado.

Name: GIE A.G. Generadores Independientes de Energía
Description:
Asociación Gremial de Generadores Independientes de Energía 

GIE AG es una asociación gremial que reúne a empresas generadoras independientes de energía, con presencia en todas las regiones de Chile. Nuestros socios, desarrollan proyectos diversificados y soluciones innovadoras, bajo una mirada tecnológicamente neutra.

Impulsamos una transición energética más descentralizada, inclusiva y sostenible, para avanzar hacia un sistema eléctrico más justo, resiliente y participativo.

Actualmente, representamos a 20 empresas.

Name: GMK Energy
Description: GMK Energy is a world leader consulting, engineering and project development company which gives engineering, project design, consultancy, owner's engineering and integrated reservoir&well services in global geothermal energy market for power plant, district heating, greenhouse etc.

Name: Life Cycle Power
Description: Life Cycle Power is a turnkey mobilized turbine power provider. We service the production/drilling/completions segments of the oil & gas industry, salt water disposals (SWD), all industrial / commercial markets, emergency response & utility power markets.

Name: PECC2
Description:
Power Engineering Consulting Joint Stock Company 2, commonly referred to as PECC2, since its establishment 38 years ago, has never stopped being the rising star of the Vietnamese electric power sector. With a steadily growing revenue stream and a long-term business perspective, we endeavour to look as far as possible into the future so as to always provide our clients with state-of-the-art solutions and services. Our business philosophy has allowed us to create a reputation of a “must-have” in our industry, which naturally connected us with hundreds of electric power generation and network projects throughout the country thus deeply inscribing the name PECC2 into the minds. 

As of today, PECC2 is focusing its operations on three main areas: Power Engineering Consulting, EPC service, and Investment in power generation projects. Our constant strive for quality and excellence in terms of engineering consulting and business activities (EPC General Contractor, mechanical processing and equipment manufacturing, power plant operation management) is the key reason for our massive revenue augmentation. Taking that into consideration, PECC2 made its first path on the power generation market by investing in renewable energy projects, particularly in photovoltaic power stations, and we plan to undertake further vigorous paths in this direction in the years to come.

Drawing upon our experience, the technologies that we use, the technologies that we are developing  and our human resources, our Company is always wide-alert for opportunities – especially for in-depth investments, applications of new technologies, management improvements and organizational restructurations so as to always be able to enhance the quality of our services and products, to secure our competitive advantages and the sustainable development of the Company.
Location: Thu Duc City, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: GPM · Generadoras Pequeñas y Medianas · AG
Description:
Asociación Gremial de Pequeños y Medianos Generadores

GPM AG es una asociación gremial abierta compuesta por generadores eléctricos pequeños y medianos, de cualquier tipo de tecnología de generación, que se encuentran operando en el Sistema Eléctrico Nacional.

Actualmente, GPM AG representa a 20 empresas, abarcando fuentes de energía hidroeléctrica, térmica, solar, biogás y biomasa.

Name: Optimal Group
Description:
The Australian energy landscape is undergoing perhaps the biggest shift since electrification began over 140 years ago. An overwhelming and urgent shift to decarbonise the energy needed for businesses, homes, and transport systems requires a mix of solutions including renewable energy, energy efficiency and energy storage solutions, in order to meet climate goals for industry and government alike.

Optimal Group, an Australian-owned energy solutions business, is at the forefront of innovation and application in the energy sector and prides itself on “being in the problem-solving business” for our customers and partners. We offer a one-stop shop for our clients with services from feasibility, engineering to project delivery and lifetime service, support and monitoring.

We are a dynamic business who have delivered world-first technical solutions for urban and remote energy users across Australia and the South Pacific. Our team has pioneered and developed solutions in Capstone Microturbine combined heat and power, microgrids, ultracapacitor energy storage, gas microturbines & hydrogen fuel cells. We have active technologies in both CO2 capture and CO2 recovery for protected cropping fertigation.

Our business continues to expand into new and exciting areas of renewable energy through the development of biogas solutions, green hydrogen, and syngas from biomass to displace fossil fuels for power and thermal energy applications. Optimal Renewable Gas was formed in 2020 to develop grid-scale biomethane plants to produce and deliver renewable gas via the gas network and virtual network (rLNG & rCNG) pathways. Optimal Renewable Gas is targeting the delivery of over 10 biomethane plants by 2030.

Can you see yourself working with an organisation that values its people, leads the industry in delivering practical sustainable solutions, and is actively working on and developing new and innovative technologies?

If so, we would love to talk with you!

Name: BRAVO Genset
Description: BRAVO Genset is a leading brand in the power generator industry, registered and owned by Al Faddaghi industries, established in 1979 and located at the Riyadh Second Industrial City. The company features a fully integrated manufacturing complex spanning an area of 55,000 square meters, where various power generator units are assembled using the latest global technologies to meet the needs of both local and international markets.”  Al Faddaghi industries provides power with a capacity of up to 3438 KVA, relying on advanced engineering technologies and ISO quality standards, utilizing world renowned diesel engines. The company’s annual production capacity exceeds 700 megawatts, enabling it to meet large demands and provide sustainable and efficient power solutions for customers. The company manufactures Automatic Transfer Switch (ATS) panels and mobile lighting towers powered by diesel engines, enhancing its product diversity and ability to meet customer needs.

Name: Kraft Power Corporation
Description:
IN POWER FOR 60 YEARS
 
Kraft Power was founded in 1965 in Boston, Massachusetts.  Initially named “W. A. Kraft Corp”, the company distributed and serviced industrial engines, transmissions, and clutches.  We designed and manufactured engine-generator systems, and were among the pioneers of “Total Energy” (now known as Combined Heat and Power) power plants, as well as of emergency generator systems and service programs.  Early projects included on-site power systems supplied to facilities such as the World Trade Center, Federal Reserve Bank, the Statue of Liberty, and Yankees Stadium in New York, as well as many hospitals, factories, communications, and municipal projects that require reliable energy. Today Kraft Power operates nine sales and service facilities in eight states, with a staff of over 170 professionals dedicated to service excellence.
 
Kraft Power is a family business that strives to build long-term mutually rewarding relationships with clients, suppliers, and employees.  We take pride in the employees who choose to build their careers with Kraft Power.  For example, more than a quarter of our employees have served with the company for over 15 years, enabling us to offer a unique depth of experience and problem solving knowledge. We are small enough to be responsive, care for, and know our clients, but big enough to deliver industry leading services and products.
 
We are proud to partner with best-in-class manufacturers in order to offer our clients leading edge technology and solutions.  Our equipment and experience in a wide range of industrial, marine, renewable, mechanical and hydraulic power applications backs our commitment to deliver innovative, cost-effective, and reliable solutions every day.
 
Thank you for your interest in Kraft Power!
 
Sincerely,
 
Owen Duffy, President

Name: Lundsby Renewable Solutions A/S
Description:
As one of Denmark's largest and most experienced suppliers in developing, building, and operating biogas plants, we help our customers convert many thousands of tons of biomass into green CO2-neutral energy. Our purpose is to contribute to the green transition and transform nature's resources into sustainable energy so that more people can live greener on our blue planet. We achieve this by developing biogas plants that perform more efficiently and effectively, creating a positive bottom line for everyone, including the environment and climate.

When we help visionary companies, organizations, and communities turn the goal of secure and green energy into reality, we bring all our competencies into play. This applies to our relationships with each other as colleagues and with our customers, suppliers, and partners. If we are to succeed in bridging the gap in green energy supply (and we must), we need to do it together.

Name: GenServe
Description: Keeping the Power ON. Providing comprehensive power solutions guaranteed to keep you running.

Name: Greenstat ASA
Description:
Greenstat is a company aiming to develop profitable projects in the renewable energy sector. The main focus areas are Hydrogen, Local Energy and Insight (knowledge based decision support model). Other areas of interest are Offshore wind, wave/tidal, solar power, battery, geothermal energy and all other renewable production, storage and end user segments. 

Greenstat is working in the intersection between industry, politics and R&D and believe that a strong cooperation between these sectors is important to assure success in the transformation to green business modelse and a zero emission society.

Name: MPMC Group
Description:
MPMC POWERTECH CORP. (hereafter MPMC) is an international high-tech enterprise established in the Year 2008. It is a world-class smart cloud hybrid energy solution provider.  MPMC’s main products are intelligent generator sets, mobile lighting towers, hybrid micro-power stations and other smart cloud energy management solutions worldwide. MPMC has established holding subsidiaries and offices in the USA, South Africa, Panama, UK, UAE, Netherlands and China, taking full advantages of its independent R&D, core technologies, full-process manufacturing, global marketing & services. Up to now, the distributors of MPMC have covered a wide range of countries & regions in the Americas, Europe, Oceania, Africa, Middle East and Southeast Asia. MPMC’s products have been sold to more than 120 countries & regions in the world.

With more than 50 experienced engineers in the expert team of mobile energy solutions, MPMC has also co-founded a joint laboratory of distributed hybrid energy cloud technology with TONGJI University, one of the most prestigious universities in China. By utilizing the self-developed APP named “More Power Cloud”, the laboratory is striving to conduct various technical researches on global hybrid cloud life-cycle management. To become a leader in hybrid cloud power solutions, MPMC makes every endeavor to provide 24-hour “cloud services” for different customers all over the world.

MPMC is launching its third manufacturing plant in the USA which is equipped with advanced CNC, welding, painting, testing equipment and a high standard lean manufacturing process. 

With more reliable, more intelligent and more attentive services, MPMC is willing to provide the most timely, customized and comprehensive solution of intelligent cloud hybrid energy to the global customers.

Name: elmy
Description:
elmy, c’est un énergéticien avant tout ! 100% vert surtout.

Nous sommes convaincus que pour aller dans le sens de la transition énergétique et maximiser notre impact, il faut être plus qu’un simple fournisseur. 

C’est pourquoi nous investissons dans des actifs de production renouvelable, nous valorisons l’énergie issue de nos producteurs sur les marchés et fournissons de l'électricité et du gaz verts pour les particuliers, les entreprises ou encore les collectivités.

En résumé, c’est la garantie d’une énergie verte et française. Et l’énergie d’agir pour la transition énergétique. Avec elmy : prise de tête minimum, impact maximum !

Name: Worldwide Power Products, LLC
Description:
Based in Houston, TX, Worldwide Power Products is your trusted partner for power generation solutions, serving various industries across the globe. With four specialized divisions—Sales, Rental, Service, and Parts—and a team of skilled professionals, we deliver reliable, fast, and flexible power solutions tailored to meet your needs.


Why Partner with Worldwide Power Products?

Largest Inventory in Texas: 
→ We carry the largest stock of new and used diesel and natural gas generators in Texas, with generator sets ranging from 20 kW to 3300 kW and engines from 150 hp to 4000 hp.

Custom Power Solutions: 
→ Our independent status means we’re not tied to any one manufacturer, allowing us to provide flexible, customized solutions that fit your specifications, budget, and delivery needs. We work with major brands like Caterpillar, Cummins, HIPOWER, Gillette, and IGSA. 

Comprehensive Services: 
→ We operate four key divisions—Sales, Rental, Service, and Parts—offering end-to-end power solutions. Whether you need new equipment, rental units, expert maintenance, or parts, WPP has you covered.

Faster Delivery: 
→ With a large in-stock inventory and a dedicated team, we can deliver power solutions faster than our competitors, helping you avoid costly downtime.

Technical Expertise: 
→ Our experienced engineers and technicians provide full-service support, from design to installation and maintenance, ensuring your power system runs smoothly.

Award-Winning Business: 
→ Recognized by Forbes Magazine as one of America’s 100 Most Promising Companies and named to the Inc. 5000 Fastest-Growing Companies list multiple times, WPP is a proven leader in the industry.

Name: Generator Source
Description:
Generator Source is a trusted global provider of new, surplus, and used industrial generators, delivering reliable power solutions to businesses around the world. With a large in-stock inventory ranging from 20 kW to 4000 kW, we specialize in high-performance gensets from leading manufacturers such as Caterpillar, Cummins, Kohler, MTU, Generac, Detroit, Katolight, Onan, and more.

All equipment is inspected, tested, and ready for immediate shipment, ensuring fast turnaround and dependable performance.

In addition to generator sales, we offer Field Services and Rentals across key regions including Colorado, Florida, and Texas—supporting customers with expert installation, maintenance, troubleshooting, and short- or long-term rental options.

Whether you're powering a facility, preparing for emergencies, or expanding your operation, Generator Source is your go-to partner for industrial generator solutions.

Name: PASH GLOBAL
Description:
PASH GLOBAL (“PASH”) is an impact investor in the clean energy sector. PASH is a London headquartered company established in 2012 to develop, finance, build, operate and maintain power assets globally.  

PASH is a collection of creative individuals with a multitude of complimentary skill sets who are passionate about creating value and being part of building a better world. This passion centres on developing sustainable and reliable energy and infrastructure solutions where required.  

PASH’s uniqueness is its ability to take projects from inception of an idea all the way through to completion. PASH relies on its in-house capabilities and its committed shareholder advisory committee rather than external advisers.

PASH has been involved in projects in Ghana, Puerto Rico and Mali. 

PASH has established the PASH Foundation, which is the philanthropic arm of PASH, and its mission is to promote health and wellbeing among the communities where our founding company operates.

The PASH Foundation seeks to establish long-term relationships with the communities affected by the power solutions we provide. Our goal is the advancement of the socioeconomic conditions surrounding our energy facilities through the engagement of existing charitable and philanthropic initiatives with expertise and knowledge of the local areas.

Name: Eavor Deutschland
Description: Eavor-Loop ist ein geothermisches System zur erneuerbaren Energieerzeugung und kann fast überall in Deutschland zuverlässig Energie für Fernwärmenetze und Strom liefern. Eavor-Loop ist seismisch sicher und skalierbar. Eavor-Loop hat das Potenzial, zum Gamechanger der Energie- und Wärmewende in Deutschland zu werden.

Name: Harbin Electric Internatinoal - O&M Pakistan
Description: Harbin Electric International Co., Ltd. (HEI), is China’s leading large-scale enterprise in power project contracting and export of power generation operating in Pakistan.

Name: İş Enerji
Description:
İş Enerji Yatırımları A.Ş. (İş Enerji) was established in August 2022 as a part of Isbank Group in order to create an integrated energy portfolio based primarily on renewable energy sources such as wind and solar. In accordance with this purpose, Is Energy aims to engage in electricity generation and energy trading.
Having the mission of managing the transformation that will reduce the energy dependency of Isbank Group and being an effective actor in the energy sector, Is Energy aims to contribute to the group's sustainability approach and the "green economy" transformation.

Name: HBJ Biomassa
Description: A HBJ Biomassa tem como princípio atuar de forma segura e rentável, com responsabilidade social e ambiental, nas atividades da agroindústria e transporte, fornecendo produtos e serviços adequados às necessidades dos nossos clientes, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento sustentável do nosso Brasil

Name: Kallista Energy
Description:
Kallista Energy invests in competitive, decentralised renewable energy, offering the best compromise between available local resources, efficiency and environmental impact.
Since 2005, we have been expanding our power generation portfolio through the development of our own facilities and the acquisition of new projects. We have expertise in project development, financing and construction, as well as in the operation and maintenance of our plants, in conjunction with specialist partners.
Kallista Energy develops and operates wind and solar projects in France, the Netherlands and Germany. Our company is also developing a network of 90 high-power charging stations for electric vehicles in France, powered directly by renewable energy.
Kallista Energy is pursuing a long-term vision for energy transition and electric mobility with the support of its institutional shareholders APG and Ardian.

Name: DONGFANG ELECTRIC CORPORATION (DEC)
Description: DEC, one of the world's largest power generation equipment manufacturers and power plant EPC contractors, is rising to shape the future with green power.

Name: Mepa Energy Systems
Description: Authorized Dealer of Cummins Power Generation, Distribution Europe for power generation sale, service and spare parts, MEPA Energy has taken an important role with high level experience in the energy field since 2000. We do serve with our multinational expert staff around the world.

Name: DP CleanTech Co. Ltd
Description:
DP CleanTech is a world leader in providing efficient and flexible waste to energy and environmental management technologies.  With a reference list of over 350 projects around the world, DP's technologies include Thermal Combustion, Anaerobic Digestion, Landfill Management and Remediation, Emissions Management, Automation.  DP's technologies are well proven, performance guaranteed,  and best in class.  They have been developed or acquired by DP to create a portfolio that can turn all forms of waste into a source of energy.  
With advanced technology and in-depth understanding of plant economics, fuel logistics,  DP also has design and engineering expertise built on decades of experience.  DP strengths are in developing and delivering solutions that are efficient, flexible and performance guaranteed.   We manufacture in multiple locations and can provide consultancy, design, engineering, procurement, & construction (EPC) services to deliver turnkey projects. 
Our management team operates from 7 offices in 6 countries, and our global footprint is a key element of our company culture - learning and innovating from diverse experiences and perspectives.   We have a firm commitment to developing and integrating the technologies and skills needed to create truly sustainable solutions that can deliver long term benefits to the planet and our society. 

The knowledge and experienced gained through DP's industry-pioneering role in biomass has enabled the extension of the product and solutions portfolio to address other environmental challenges such as waste management, emissions control and water purification.

Name: GRIPS Energy
Description:
GRIPS Energy is a renewable energy investor and contractor (IPP/ESCO). We substitute fossil-based electricity supply with reliable, affordable, and pre-financed renewables-based systems for companies in emerging markets. Our solutions are vendor neutral and technology agnostic in order to design and build power systems based on our customers’ specific requirements. Our goal is to foster economic growth and contribute to CO2 reduction worldwide.
GRIPS is part of and supported by econnext Group, a German-Dutch industrial holding with purpose, founded to build profitable businesses around the U.N.’s Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Name: ènostra
Description:
La società cooperativa ènostra è il fornitore cooperativo di elettricità etica e sostenibile.

L’energia elettrica fornita ai soci e clienti di ènostra è energia 100% rinnovabile, prodotta dai nostri impianti o da soci produttori selezionati in maniera trasparente con criteri di responsabilità ambientale e sociale o  acquistata sul mercato elettrico con la certificazione di provenienza dell'energia da fonti rinnovabili (Garanzia di Origine - GO).
Risponde a un'esigenza concreta: offrire ai cittadini l’opportunità di scegliere le fonti da cui approvvigionarsi.

ènostra intende favorire la produzione di energia dal basso, fondata sui valori di bene comune, di innovazione sociale e di rispetto ambientale. Il modello prevede una gestione democratica e trasparente, con la partecipazione diretta dei soci alla definizione di scelte strategiche e operative della cooperativa. Ogni socio sceglie di essere consumatore attivo e fornitore etico e responsabile.

ènostra non ha l’obiettivo di fare profitto, ma di garantire una fornitura di energia elettrica equa e responsabile. La forza sta nel numero di soci, non nei kWh venduti: al crescere della cooperativa si abbassa il prezzo dell'elettricità. Alla fine di ogni anno, l'assemblea deciderà come destinare eventuali guadagni.

ènostra nasce nella cornice di REScoop20-20-20, il progetto UE finanziato dal programma Intelligent Energy Europe con l’obiettivo di favorire l’accettabilità delle rinnovabili, a partire dal coinvolgimento e dalla partecipazione diretta dei cittadini nella produzione e nel consumo di energia. 
Dalla condivisione di esperienze, identità, mission e competenze dei soci promotori, ha preso così forma ènostra.

Name: EVNPECC3
Description:
Power Engineering Consulting Joint Stock Company 3 originated from Power Design Department belonged to the Southern Power Company (1975). Due to the demands for development of power plants and power networks, on 13th February, 1979 Minister of Electricity and Coal had the Decision No. 04/T/TCCB on establishing the Sub-institute of Power Design and Planning belonged to the Power Company 2; and on 7th May, 1986 Ministry of Energy had the Decision No. 128/L/TCCB to rename the Sub-institute of Power Design and Planning to the Energy Center.
Right after the establishment of Electricity of Vietnam, the Energy Center directly belonged to Electricity of Vietnam at the Decision No. 429/VNTCCB-L dated 4/6/1995.
On 7th April, 1999 Minister of Industry signed the Decision No.17/1999/Q-BCN on reforming Energy Center to Power Engineering Consulting Company 3. On 26th January, 2007 Minister of Industry issued the Decision No. 335/Q-BCN on equitizing Power Engineering Consulting Company 3 to Power Engineering Consulting Joint Stock Company 3.
Over 40 years of operation and development, Power Engineering Consulting Joint Stock Company 3 has continuously developed and always completed all assigned tasks. Consequently, the company was awarded one Third-Class Independence Medal, One First-Class Labor Medal, one Second-Class Labor Medal by the State and many Certificates of Merit by the Prime Minister and Ministry of Industry.
Headquarters Co. is located in:
  - Head Office:     32 Ngo Thoi Nhiem St, Ward 7, Dist 3, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
  - Fax: (+84) 2839307938
  - Email: pecc3@pecc3.com.vn
  - Website: https://www.pecc3.com.vn/

Name: GMNK
Description:
O Gabinete de Implementação do Projecto Hidroeléctrico de Mphanda Nkuwa (GMNK) foi criado através do Diploma Ministerial nº 18/2019, de 07 de Fevereiro, pelo Ministério de Recursos Minerais e Energia (MIREME). O objectivo central é assegurar a coordenação das acções para a implementação do projecto Hidroeléctrico de Mphanda Nkuwa e do sistema de transporte de energia hidroeléctrica e outras infraestruturas associadas.

O GMNK tem como funções primordiais, a realização e o acompanhamento dos estudos técnicos e da estruturação do Projecto com vista à sua implementação.

O GMNK desenvolveu uma Visão Estratégica que visa refletir as  orientações estratégicas do Governo na implementação do Projecto Hidroeléctrico de Mphanda Nkuwa. Neste contexto a Visa Estratégica assenta nos seguinte vectores:
• Focalizar e imprimir celeridade aos processos de estudos especializados, desenvolvimento (estruturação legal e financeira) e a implementação (construção do projecto).
• Estruturar o projecto no âmbito da estratégia nacional do sector eléctrico, plasmado no Plano Director de Infraestruturas eléctricas 2018 - 2043 (Polo energético, Electrificação e Potenciar a Industrialização).
• Recuperar/actualizar os estudos especializados e assegurar a propriedade intelectual dos mesmos. 
• Assegurar a qualidade dos estudos e desenvolvimento, para garantir a competitividade do investimento, atrair o mercado regional e assegurar energia de baixo custo para o mercado nacional a médio e longo prazos. 
• Conteúdo Local, criando oportunidades e fortalecendo as instituições, técnicas e Financeiras e do sector e empresas nacionais, que deverão ter um papel, activo, nas diferentes fases do desenvolvimento do projecto, incluindo as instituições académicas.

Name: Genovate Power Solutions Ltd
Description:
Genovate Power Solutions are specialists in the design and delivery of power generation projects, offering a complete power back up solution for the public and private sector. 
 
We provide complete solutions for all power generation installation needs. We supply, install and maintain diesel and gas generators across the UK, whether you need a single standby engine or a multi-engine power station.
 
Our services include:
24/7 emergency response team
On-site fault diagnostics repair
Load bank testing
Control upgrades
Remote monitoring
Power quality and harmonic testing
G99/G100 injection testing and hybrid power solutions
 
As the UK enters a period of power instability, our systems and services to the UK National Grid are able to provide the service and reliability so essential.
 
To find out more about what we do, follow us for updates on our current projects, industry insight and news. Or give us a call on 0800 689 0597 or visit our website: http://www.genovatepowersolutions.com

Name: bioelectrica
Description:
Brindamos soluciones integrales en energías renovables, desarrollando proyectos de biogás y biometano, acompañando a nuestros clientes en cada etapa, desde la planificación hasta la operación, con un enfoque centrado en la innovación y la sostenibilidad.

SERVICIOS
1. Desarrollo y gestión de proyectos
Desde la planificación estratégica hasta la puesta en marcha. Brindamos consultoría en modelos de negocio, financiamiento y gestión integral de proyectos de biogás y biometano.

2. Ingeniería
Diseño conceptual, básico y de detalle para procesos industriales. Abarca desde la idea inicial hasta la operación y mantenimiento de plantas. Incluye software, laboratorio, planta experimental y capacitaciones.

3. Innovación y mejora continua
Investigación y desarrollo (I+D) para optimizar tecnologías en producción de biogás y biometano, aumentando eficiencia y sostenibilidad.

4. Regulación y cumplimiento normativo
Asesoramiento en certificaciones, habilitaciones y regulaciones del mercado de energías renovables.

5. Suministro de biometano
Comercialización de un energético renovable y bajo en carbono como alternativa al gas natural.

Name: GreenGo Srl
Description:
GreenGo originates, develops, finances, and builds greenfield projects with cutting-edge solutions and state-of-the-art technologies. 

Founded in 2018 as a start-up by a group of recognised professionals led by Giuseppe Mastropieri and driven by the exceptional skills and strong dedication of its constantly growing team of high-profile professionals and managers, GreenGo has achieved significant milestones. 
To date, the company counts 50 employees and collaborators, in addition to exclusive agents in the country.

GreenGo's activity is focused on solar, wind, storage, and hybrid solutions.

In 2024, GreenGo started its journey as a RES-native Independent Power Producer on the Italian energy market.

The partnership with the Eiffel Essentiel fund, launched in 2022 with a capitalisation of 7 million euros and renewed with the 15-million-euro equity bridge in 2023, has accelerated GreenGo's growth, leading the company to position itself as a leading player in the Italian and southern European panorama of the development of utility-scale RES plants, and to project itself impetuously into the horizon of independent energy production, the main focus of the current business plan.

To date, GreenGo's pipeline has reached 75 renewable projects in 12 regions for a total of 1.73 GW, counting 1.04 GW in approval and 693 MW approved/RTB.

Since September 2023, GreenGo has resided in the new green hub S/PARK - Sustainability Workplace, located via G. Matteotti 31/2 in Bologna. The structure, desired and conceived by Fimm S.R.L., represents a significant redevelopment of an architectonic site of artistic and urbanistic relevance and stands as a point of reference for the Italian green economy, hosting the Group's operations and opening up to companies, professionals, institutions and citizens.

Name: MPS (Modern Power Systems)
Description:
Now in its 41st year of publication, in print, online, newsletters, video and across all social media platforms Modern Power Systems examines the subjects that are changing the electricity sector, from generation, transmission and distribution to digitisation and beyond. 

Renowned for its informed and insightful commentary Modern Power Systems delivers up to date analysis and news as well as in-depth articles on trends, technology, and exciting projects as well as leading opinion and thought from industry experts.

From pre-event promotion, to new service or product launches, to thought leadership content marketing, to lead generation campaigns and beyond, we surely will have something to suit and fit in with your media, marketing and communications plans.

Please contact Roy Morris (roy.morris@btmi.com) or Tim Price (tim.price@btmi.com) for more information.

Media Kit ---> https://content.yudu.com/web/442ay/0A444rp/MPS-MP-25/html/index.html?origin=reader

Name: Valia Energía
Description: Proveemos la energía asequible, confiable y sostenible que requiere el país para el desarrollo de sus industrias, comercios y familias mexicanas, estando enfocados en la excelencia de nuestras operaciones y con un claro espíritu de colaboración con las autoridades energéticas y las comunidades donde operamos.

Name: Gigawatt Moçambique S.A.
Description:
Gigawatt is a Mozambican company that has developed, built, and operates a 100MW natural gas-fired power station in Ressano Garcia, Maputo Province, Mozambique.

OUR VISION
“Making Gigawatt a reference in energy production in Mozambique.”

Name: Novatron Fusion Group AB
Description:
Novatron Fusion Group AB is a Swedish company aiming to revolutionize the field of nuclear fusion for energy production and fast-track the transition to commercial fusion power. Founded in 2019, the company is today comprised of first-class talent from around the world. 

Building on the groundbreaking NOVATRON solution from the inventor and founder Jan Jäderberg, Novatron Fusion Group has become one of Europe’s leading fusion companies.

Nuclear fusion could provide a much needed solution to several of humanity's greatest challenges: the growing need for energy and the accelerating climate change. 

Through the efforts of Novatron Fusion Group, and the growing global fusion community, the world might finally unlock the secrets behind fusion power and create an opportunity to supply mankind with unlimited, fossil-free, reliable, safe, and cost-effective energy.

Name: Genersol
Description:
GENERSOL is part of a business group with over 20 years of international experience, delivering comprehensive solutions for key industries such as electric power, general industry, mining, water, refining, and fuel storage.

We combine the know-how of world-class companies with deep expertise in the Latin American market. This synergy, along with a strong client-oriented approach, allows us to provide tailored solutions—from the supply of critical components to the execution of turnkey projects.

What sets us apart is the value we add: we are not just suppliers, we are strategic partners. We design efficient, reliable, and forward-thinking solutions that meet the real challenges of each industry.

Our team includes more than 70 highly specialized professionals in mechanical, electrical, electronic, chemical, naval engineering, and international logistics, committed to technical excellence and innovation.

We operate through 10 commercial offices located in Uruguay, Argentina, Ecuador, Panama, Peru, Paraguay, Colombia, Mexico, Spain, and the United States, and collaborate with a network of over 500 strategic partners and suppliers. With more than 150 active clients across Latin America, we bring solid experience in multicultural and complex project environments.

We ensure traceability and quality through factory inspections, complete logistics management (FCA, CIF, DAP, DDP), and a dedicated Foreign Trade Department responsible for every step from origin to final delivery.

GENERSOL is ISO certified:

ISO 9001 – Quality Management

ISO 14001 – Environmental Management

ISO 45001 – Occupational Health & Safety

ISO 37001 – Anti-bribery Management

Choosing GENERSOL means choosing trust, efficiency, and long-term value.

For more information:
Phone: +598 2208 1443
Email: genersol@genersol.com

Name: Realta Fusion
Description:
Realta Fusion spun out of a groundbreaking physics experiment at the University of Wisconsin-Madison in 2022 and is developing the lowest capital and least complex path to commercially competitive fusion energy. 

We are applying advances in super-conducting materials, plasma physics, and computing power to a simple linear fusion reactor configuration. These advances allow for a much lower capex power plant, utilizing abundant fuel sources to provide a new, zero-carbon source of heat and power.

Name: Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.
Description:
Türkiye Elektrik Üretim-İletim A.Ş. (TEAŞ) Genel Müdürlüğünün, 02.03.2001 tarih ve 24334 sayılı Resmi Gazetede yayımlanan 05.02.2001 tarih ve 2001/2026 sayılı Bakanlar Kurulu Kararı ile Elektrik Üretim A.Ş. (EÜAŞ), Türkiye Elektrik İletim A.Ş. (TEİAŞ), ve Türkiye Elektrik Ticaret ve Taahhüt A.Ş. (TETAŞ) unvanlı üç ayrı anonim şirket olarak teşkilatlandırılmasına karar verilmiştir.

Şirketimiz EÜAŞ’ın ana statüsü 29.06.2001 tarih ve 24447 sayılı Resmi Gazetede yayımlanarak yürürlüğe girmiştir. Ana Statümüz 2006 yılında yenilenmiş, 2010 ve 2012 yıllarında ise değişiklikler yapılmıştır. 

Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.’nin sermayesi 14 milyar TL’dir.

Name: Green Gravity
Description: Green Gravity is enabling the global renewable energy transition through developing the next generation of ultra-green energy storage technology.

Name: AMDA energía
Description: Compañía especializada en la promoción, desarrollo, construcción y operación de proyectos de alto valor tecnológico en el campo de las energías renovables, siempre en un marco de sostenibilidad y respeto al medio natural. Presente en los mayores mercados.

Name: Opale Energies Engagées
Description:
Agir ici et maintenant pour demain.

Chez Opale, nous sommes une équipe de plus de 60 personnes qui unissons nos forces au quotidien pour développer des énergies renouvelables respectueuses des territoires et des acteurs qui les composent. Engagés dans la lutte contre le réchauffement climatique, nous militons pour construire un modèle énergétique durable.

Découvrez notre page Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/OpaleEnergiesNaturelles/ 

Créée en 2008 par des professionnels expérimentés des énergies renouvelables, Opale a développé en quelques années plus de 400 MW de projets éoliens autorisés, et compte un portefeuille de 200 MW en cours de développement pour son propre compte. 
Avec une équipe aujourd’hui, de plus de 60 personnes réparties sur 4 antennes en France (Strasbourg, Avignon, Porte de Savoie, Reims), Opale gère et développe plus de 40 projets d’énergies renouvelables. En forte croissance, l’entreprise se déploie sur de nouveaux marchés et a initié un vaste programme de diversification.

Reconnue pour son dynamisme et son engagement, Opale se caractérise par un modèle social d’entreprise fort, par un esprit permanent d’innovation dans le développement de ses projets et par le respect des partenariats humains et des territoires.

Name: Emerald Energy
Description: EMERALD ENERGY is an engineering and consulting service company for renewable energy which is located in TURKEY/Gaziantep and USA/Chicago.

Name: Konelsis Energy
Description: Turnkey Construction & Electricity & Mechanical & Project & Manufacturing & Contracting Services

Name: Noale Energia
Description:
One-stop shop para projetos de energia.

Atuamos na estruturação de projetos em geração distribuída e mercado livre de energia, nas fontes: solar, eólica, hídrica e térmicas a biomassa e gás natural.

Assessoramos:
(i) consumidores finais a identificar oportunidades de redução de custos,
(ii) investidores a identificar e modelar oportunidades de investimentos e
(iii) empresas que atuam no setor elétrico a melhorar sua estratégia e otimizar seus resultados.

Alguns dos serviços que prestamos: regulatório, societário, tributário, contratos, modelos de negócio, estudos de viabilidade, fluxos de caixa, planejamento e integração de projetos, engenharia, inteligência de mercado, business development, workshops e treinamentos in-company.

Name: Malakoff Technical Solutions
Description:

The company’s services include:-

Name: AKJ Energiteknik
Description:
Boiler Plants Turnkey Contractor:

At AKJ Energiteknik AB, we are driven by a passion for bioenergy and sustainable heating solutions. For over 60 years, we have been at the forefront of energy technology, serving sawmills, wood industries, district heating networks, industries, and large real estates.

With decades of experience, we have gained unique expertise in bioenergy combustion and renewable energy solutions. Our offering covers the entire value chain—from design and engineering to installation, commissioning, service, and maintenance.

We deliver both prefabricated modular boiler plants and on-site built boiler plants, tailored to our customers’ needs for heating, steam, and process energy.

Prefabricated Boiler Plants (examples)
	•	Pellet boiler plants up to 6 MW
	•	Wood chip boiler plants up to 5 MW
	•	Bio-oil boiler plants up to 12 MW

On-Site Built Boiler Plants
	•	Pellet boiler plants 1–30 MW
	•	Wood chip boiler plants 1–32 MW
	•	Electric boiler plants 1–60 MW
	•	Oil boiler plants 1–30 MW

Technologies We Deliver
	•	Pellet boilers
	•	Wood chip boilers
	•	Oil boilers
	•	Electric boilers
	•	Steam boilers
	•	Hot water boilers
	•	Thermal oil boilers

Fuels We Work With
	•	Pellets
	•	Wood chips
	•	Dry chips
	•	Shavings
	•	Sawdust
	•	Bark
	•	Forest residues (GROT)
	•	Bio-oil
	•	Oil
	•	Biogas
	•	Landfill gas
	•	Natural gas

	•	Waste-derived fuels (RDF, SRF, recovered wood)

With a strong commitment to sustainability, reliability, and innovation, AKJ Energiteknik helps customers transition from fossil fuels to renewable energy—securing efficient, future-proof energy systems for generations to come.

Name: CalWave Inc.
Description:
CalWave is bringing superior power generating technology to market with global reach. Our proprietary wave energy converter technology achieves high performance while surviving storms and extreme conditions.
 

Ocean waves are 20-60 times more energy-dense, predictable, and consistent compared to other forms of renewable energy. They are available at night and during winters. CalWave's patented technology converts this energy to electricity, equipping coastal communities with clean, reliable and local energy while keeping our planet and the health of future generations in mind.

Name: Technopower Group
Description:
TechnoPower Group is a leading supplier of power generators and complete power solutions in the Middle East and Africa. Established in 2008, TechnoPower quickly became one of the top companies in designing, manufacturing, and distributing power generation equipment. Their range includes diesel generators, portable generators, DSE controllers, ATS and synchronization panels, spare parts, solar solutions, water pumps, lighting towers, and air compressors.

The company’s extensive sales network, supplying over 5,000 diesel generators per year, has given them a deep understanding of the market. This has enabled them to develop tailored products for various sectors, including hospitals, engineering, rental companies, construction sites, telecommunications, and institutions.

TechnoPower proudly serves a wide range of industries such as Construction, Manufacturing, Oil & Gas, Hospitals & Healthcare, Data Centers & IT Services, Mining, Utilities & Energy, Telecommunications, Hotels & Hospitality, Agriculture & Farming, Government & Defense, and Logistics & Warehousing.

TechnoPower is dedicated to innovation and delivering top-notch products and services that go beyond customer expectations. We work tirelessly to ensure our customers have access to electricity whenever and wherever they need it, drawing on our passion, international experience, and local knowledge. We bring our expertise and equipment to any location, from bustling cities to the most remote places on Earth.

Name: Nishat Power Limited
Description:
Nishat Power Limited (NPL) is a public limited company incorporated in February 2007, formed under the Power Policy 2002 as an Independent Power Producer (IPP). The company is a subsidiary of Nishat Mills Limited. The Company’s ordinary shares are listed on the Pakistan Stock Exchange Limited.

The principal activity of the company is to build, own, operate and maintain a fuel fired power station having gross capacity of 200 MW in Jamber Kalan, Tehsil Pattoki, District Kasur, Punjab, Pakistan. The address of the registered office of the company is 53-A, Lawrence Road, Lahore.

Name: TrønderEnergi
Description:
TrønderEnergi wants to help our region meet its energy needs in a renewable and cost-effective way. Our core business is about producing energy (primarily water and wind) and contributing to electrification through energy-related services.

TrønderEnergi is organized as a group with TrønderEnergi AS as parent company. CEO Ståle Gjersvold is the general manager of the group. The business is organized into units and staffs; The units Operations, Energy Management, Market & Business Development, Technology and Projects. And the staffs: Reporting and Finance, Adm.staff and General Counsel, Organization and Communication. Director of Communications is Stig Tore Laugen.
TrønderEnergi owns the company Ohmia Charging AS which provides charging services and Ohmia Retail AS which provides energy advice, energy management and energy monitoring in the grocery industry.

TrønderEnergi is owned by 24 municipalities in Trøndelag (old Sør-Trøndelag), KLP (Kommunal Landspensjonskasse mutual insurance company) and Nordmøre Energiverk AS. TrønderEnergi owns 40% of the grid company Tensio.

Name: Ontario Waterpower Association
Description:
Since 2001 the Ontario Waterpower Association (OWA) has been representing the common and collective interests of the waterpower industry. To date our membership has grown to over 150 organizations, including generators, engineering firms, environmental consultants, legal, project financing and insurance firms, Aboriginal communities and other organizations, all sharing the common interest of advancing waterpower in Ontario.

The OWA hosts the Power of Water Canada Technical Conference & Trade Show annually, which has now grown to be the largest gathering of the hydroelectric sector in Canada.

Name: Union Rhac
Description:
Experiência de 31 anos em Geração e Cogeração de Energia.

A UNION RHAC, fundada em 1992 e com  31 anos de atuação no mercado nacional, destaca-se por sua ampla capacitação técnica e de recursos para realização de estudos de viabilidade técnico-econômica, elaboração de projetos e execução de sistemas de climatização e geração de energia elétrica a gás natural e biogás.

A experiência da UNION RHAC em Geração e Cogeração proporciona a realização de projetos e instalação de sistemas de energia de alta tecnologia às necessidades dos clientes, eliminando riscos de blecautes e grande economia para empresas dos setores: industrial, comercial e de serviços. A UNION RHAC valoriza a preservação do meio ambiente em todos os seus projetos e instalações.

Name: Aquarius Engines
Description:
Aquarius Engines is driving the future of power generation for a world transitioning to electric mobility and sustainable energy. 

As the demand for faster and more reliable EV charging continues to skyrocket, the pressure on existing AC electrical networks intensifies. These networks, constrained by the massive capital investments required for upgrades, struggle to keep pace with these evolving needs.
At Aquarius Engines, our mission is to revolutionize rapid (ultra-fast) EV charging. We offer innovative, grid-independent power solutions designed to:
-	Charge a greater number of vehicles in a shorter time
-	Reduce charging costs 
-	Enhance operational efficiency

We deliver compact, scalable, and green power systems that are easy to deploy in both urban and remote areas. 
With a focus on reducing emissions and maximizing fuel efficiency, our solutions align with global sustainability goals while providing reliable, continuous power where it's needed most. 
Our patented technologies ensure a cleaner, smarter, and more efficient approach to power generation, addressing the key pain points of modern EV infrastructure.

Our unique solutions are designed to seamlessly integrate with existing systems, allowing Charging Point Operators (CPOs) and EV Fleet Owners to charge up to three times more vehicles at a given time, cutting down on congestion and wait times and maximizing profitability.

With a global presence and over 57 patents, Aquarius Engines is at the forefront of a new era in power generation, offering comprehensive support, including service, maintenance, and remote management, as well as power optimization software to meet the evolving needs of the market.

Join us in driving the future of electric mobility with innovative, scalable, efficient, and eco-friendly charging power solutions.

Name: Wildcat Power Gen
Description:
Leading the Charge in Better Power Solutions

Our solutions are engineered for commercial, industrial, and military applications, designed for 10,000+ hour lifecycles under the toughest conditions.  WILDCAT delivers true value with superior products, unmatched customer service, and our best-in-industry commercial warranty.

Name: SOCELEC Engineering
Description:
Nous sommes une entreprise spécialisée dans la gestion des réseaux électriques, le contrôle-commande numérique et la fourniture de matériels électriques de haute qualité. Notre équipe est composée de professionnels expérimentés et qualifiés, capables d'offrir des solutions techniques innovantes et personnalisées pour des infrastructures électriques complexes. Grâce à notre expertise, nous assurons la sécurité, l'efficacité et la fiabilité des installations électriques dans un environnement en constante évolution, marqué par la transition énergétique et l'intégration des technologies intelligentes.
Nos services incluent :
- Le paramétrage et la configuration des relais de protection en fonction des besoins spécifiques des installations.
- La mise en service sur site pour tester et valider les protections dans des conditions réelles.
- L’ajustement des paramètres pour garantir une coordination optimale des protections et une gestion efficace des défaillances.
- L’analyse des caractéristiques des réseaux électriques et la définition des paramètres de protection optimaux.
- L'approbation des notes de calcul pour garantir la bonne coordination des protections.
- La validation de la performance des protections sur le terrain avant leur mise en exploitation.
- La programmation des systèmes SCADA pour garantir une supervision optimale des installations.
- L’intégration des protocoles de communication (IEC 61850, Modbus, DNP3) pour assurer l'interopérabilité des équipements.
- La mise en place de solutions de supervision permettant de contrôler et de monitorer les installations en temps réel 
- La mise en service de régulateurs de tension pour maintenir la stabilité du réseau.
- Le paramétrage et la programmation des reconfigurateurs de réseaux à boucle cicatrisante pour améliorer la résilience des installations.
- La gestion des systèmes de téléconduite, y compris les équipements Schneider Electric comme T200, Flair, et ITI3.

Name: Martin Energy Group
Description:
Martin Energy Group (MEG) has its roots in 1960 when founder Harlan Martin recognized potential in the power generation industry. In the years following, the Martin company was founded and quickly expanded its capabilities, packaging new equipment, and exploring new frontiers. Since then, under CEO Marcus Martin’s guidance, Martin Energy Group has become an industry leader specializing in creating reliable and innovative energy solutions for companies all over the world.

We are a comprehensive solutions provider for microgrids, generator packages, combined heat and power (CHP) systems, switch gear, battery energy storage, anaerobic digester design & construction, and renewable natural gas systems.

MEG supplies and services the full range of power generation products including gas handling skids, waste heat recovery systems, absorption chilling systems, and carbon credit monitoring systems. We also include long term service agreements (LTSA).

Our packages serve a wide variety of industries and applications – including greenhouses, hospitals, universities, manufacturing sites, landfills, mining operations, oil fields, wastewater treatment, landfill gas, and data centers.

MEG has installed over 1,500 gas and diesel power systems and 500+ combined heat and power plants in the United States and around the globe including Canada, Central and South America, Africa, Europe, Asia, the Middle East, and Australia. Our commitment to customer satisfaction is second-to-none, and we strive to engineer turn-key solutions that exceed your expectations.

Name: Ethiopian Electric Power - የኢትዮጵያ ኤሌክትሪክ ኃይል
Description:
Ethiopian Electric Power Authority (EELPA) was established in 1955(1948 E.C).  It was reestablished as Ethiopian Electric Power Corporation (EEPCo) after restructuring in 1996(1989E.C). The corporation was reorganized in to two entities, Ethiopian Electric Power (EEP) and Ethiopian Electric Utility (EEU) in 2013(2006 E.C).

Ethiopian Electric Power (EEP) was established by the FDRE Council of Ministers Regulation No. 302/2013 and amended Regulation No. 381/2016

Name: TATA Power Mundra
Description:
Coastal Gujarat Power Limited (CGPL) was incorporated on February 10, 2006, as a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) and a subsidiary of Power Finance Corporation (PFC). The primary objective of CGPL was to develop and implement the 4,150 MW Mundra Ultra Mega Power Project (UMPP) located in Mundra Taluka, Kutch District, Gujarat. This landmark project was a key initiative to meet the growing energy demands of India and contribute to the nation's power infrastructure.

The Mundra UMPP was awarded to Tata Power Company Limited (TPCL) through a competitive bidding process. TPCL emerged as the successful bidder, and, as a result, entered into a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with five states: Gujarat, Maharashtra, Punjab, Haryana, and Rajasthan. This agreement ensured the long-term purchase of power generated by the Mundra UMPP, marking a significant step towards enhancing the regional power supply.

In April 2022, following the approval of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), CGPL underwent a merger with its parent company, Tata Power Company Limited. This strategic merger further strengthened Tata Power's position in the Indian energy sector, combining the capabilities and assets of both entities to drive growth and innovation in the power generation space.

Name: Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
Demirer Kablo is among the world’s leading manufacturers in high and extra high voltage energy cables industry. Manufacturing energy cables up to 500 kV and providing laying, jointing, terminating, testing, supervision and commissioning services, Demirer Kablo is a global turnkey project contractor.
 
Satisfying the growing demand of energy in today’s world, is one of the main prerequisites for industrial growth and thus, rise in living standards. Demirer Kablo, with the cable systems it manufacture, creates value in the energy transmission area and contributes to satisfaction of this demand.

Demirer Kablo is committed to being the pioneering company of the world in its sector and puts human and environment to the first place along with customer satisfaction and carries out its R&D activities in order to manufacture cables providing more efficient, more reliable and more clean energy transmission.

In every region we operate, we take pride in contributing to local societies. Being aware of our responsibility towards human and environment, we always give priority to health and safety and environmental consciousness, we preserve our high ethical values, we abide by laws, rules and regulations and we respect local and national culltures.

State of the art manufacturing facility of Demirer Kablo,  founded in 1982, consists of a cable factory and an accessories factory. Three high technology CDCC lines and a test laboratory are in operation in the cable factory.

Up until today, Demirer Kablo manufactured and delivered more than 8.000 km of HV/EHV cables. Cable systems of Demirer Kablo are certified through type and prequalification tests by KEMA, CESI, Georgia Power and similar international institutions.

In addition to the 400kV cable systems supplied for the local market, Demirer Kablo has completed High & Extra High Voltage projects in over 50 countries, from India to United States and from Saudi Arabia to Iceland with complete customer satisfaction.

Name: Allied Power
Description: Allied Power is dedicated to delivering best-in-class maintenance, modifications, and project services. Name: Sohar Power Company SAOG
Description:
Powering the Future of Oman: A Revival Story

Established in 2005, Sohar Power Company began its journey as an independent power and water producer serving the Al Batinah region of Oman. For over 15 years, we delivered reliable power and water under our initial contract, which concluded in May 2022.

The COVID-19 pandemic threw unprecedented challenges to all the Company’s stakeholders.  Despite our best efforts at being relevant for the market, with no contract extension and outstanding financial obligations, we faced the difficult decision to file for bankruptcy in 2023.
Yet, this was not the end of our story. A committed core team kept the plant preserved and operationally ready, anticipating future needs. That foresight paid off: in early 2024, responding to Nama PWP’s request, Sohar Power Company signed a 9-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) to supply electricity from our gas turbines in open-cycle mode.

This achievement reflects resilience, strategic vision, and unwavering dedication to Oman’s energy security. We are proud to continue serving the nation and contributing to its sustainable growth.

Follow us for updates as we power ahead into a new chapter.

Name: PT Energi Duta Utama
Description:

Name: Guacolda Energía
Description:
Guacolda Energía SpA es una empresa de generación y venta de electricidad, con 31 años de presencia en el sector eléctrico, abasteciendo tanto a clientes regulados como clientes libres minero-industriales y comerciales a lo largo de todo Chile, esencialmente en la zona del norte chico. La central termoeléctrica Guacolda, ubicada en Huasco, Región de Atacama, tiene una ubicación estratégica en el Sistema Eléctrico Nacional, aportando energía segura, confiable, flexible y competitiva.

Se compone de cinco unidades generadoras termoeléctricas, en base a carbón, de 152 MW cada una, marca Mitsubishi, que inyectan su electricidad mediante dos líneas de transmisión propias.

Cada una de estas unidades cuenta con tecnología de última generación para el control de emisiones, lo que permite cumplir rigurosamente con la normativa medioambiental y los compromisos adquiridos en sus permisos ambientales.

As a company, Energya Cables has been considered one of the largest manufacturers of low, medium, high, and extra-high voltage power cables in Egypt and the Middle East since 1988.

Our primary objective is to provide high-quality products and full technical solutions catering to our customer's specialized needs that satisfy our customers’ requirements and exceed their expectations.

Our range of products includes low, medium, high, and extra high voltage cables with copper or aluminum conductors, and PVC or XLPE insulated. Steel or Aluminum tape or wire armored, PVC or PE sheathed. As we believe in continuous enhancement of our product range, which is one of our strategic goals, Energya recently started to produce submarine cables and extra high voltage cables up to 500 KV with a lead sheath that provides a high level of protection to the cable. At the same time, we qualified our management system to achieve ISO 9001 fully: 2015 EH&S requirements to delight our customers and gain their confidence.

Name: Enersok FE LLC

Name: Comisión Técnica Mixta Salto Grande
Description:
La Comisión Técnica Mixta de Salto Grande es un organismo binacional creado por la República Argentina y la República Oriental del Uruguay para aprovechar los rápidos del río Uruguay.
El Complejo Hidroeléctrico Salto Grande es un ejemplo de integración y unión entre dos pueblos en la misión de producir y suministrar energía eléctrica a través del aprovechamiento del rio  y de una efectiva administración, preservando el medio ambiente y contribuyendo al desarrollo socioeconómico y a la integración de ambos países.

El complejo se encuentra  ubicado en el kilómetro 342,6 del río Uruguay, aguas arriba de las ciudades de Concordia (Argentina) y Salto (Uruguay).  Posee catorce unidades hidrogeneradoras  y cada una tiene 135 MW de potencia. Se obtiene, de esta manera, un total de potencia instalada de 1.890 MW, con un promedio de generación media anual de diseño de 6.700 GWh. En lo  transcurridos hasta 2018 se ha generado un total de 314.967 GWh.
Salto Grande produce el 7 % de la energía consumida en Argentina y el 50% de la utilizada en Uruguay.
El sistema de transmisión tiene 345 kms de líneas de 500 kV y cuatro estaciones transformadoras. Puede transmitir hasta 4.000 MVA con cuarenta y cuatro interruptores de 500 kV.

La Represa de Salto Grande es el primer complejo hidroeléctrico binacional de Latinoamérica,  importante por su ubicación estratégica, permitiendo que el flujo de energía circule con Brasil y entre Argentina y Uruguay.

Somos una organización que tiene como propósito obtener el mayor beneficio de las disposiciones naturales que ofrece el río Uruguay, realizándolo con recursos técnicos actualizados, y en un marco de calidad, cuidando el ambiente y con responsabilidad social.

Do naszych zadań należy również kompleksowe opracowanie studium wykonalności dla projektów rozwoju ciepłowni bazujących na dolnym źródle ciepła. Wykonujemy projekty robót geologicznych i dokumentacje techniczne wiercenia otworów geotermalnych, nadzorujemy prace wiertnicze, prowadzimy testy złożowe i opracowujemy koncepcje wykorzystania wód termalnych dla celów ciepłowniczych.

Founded in 1951, Hallador has a long history of strategic growth through a pragmatic, shareholder-driven approach that inspires trust, builds lasting relationships, generates value, and meets the energy demands of a changing world.

Its most recent transformation begins in 2022 with the acquisition of the Merom Power Plant, a 1-gigawatt electric generation facility in Indiana. Name: KORPORATA ELEKTROENERGJETIKE SHQIPTARE Sh.a. Faqja Zyrtare
Description:
Energy of Albania (KESH) is the public producer and, at the same time, the largest electricity producer in Albania. KESH operates the most important electricity generating plants in the country.

These assets consist of the Drin River Cascade hydropower plants (Fierza HPP, Komani HPP and Vau i Dejës HPP), with an installed power capacity of 1,350 MW, and the Vlora TPP, with an installed power capacity of 98 MW. The cascade, built on the Drin River, is the largest in the Balkans, by installed capacity, as well as by the size of the hydropower plants. By operating 79% of the generation capacity in the country, KESH supplies about 70-75% of the customers’ demand for electricity, provides the energy needed to cover the losses in the transmission grid, as well as guarantees the security of the Albanian energy system through balancing energy and auxiliary services.

KESH is also responsible for the administration, the proper operation as well as for guaranteeing the technical and operational safety of the power plants it operates. KESH is not only one of the most important producers of electricity from hydro sources in the region, but is considered to have a regional impact, in terms of the security of hydro plants.
