Name: STAR Turbine, Inc.
Description:
Since 1988, STAR has relentlessly pursued client excellence. STAR Turbine understands and addresses turbine distortion. STAR is not just in the business of making turbine seals, we are creating turbine efficiency. We willl do whatever it takes to get a turbine up and running to top performance levels.

The STAR team is passionate about the company's MISSION TO MASTER DISTORTION. The team understands how important their role is in upgrading turbine efficiencies. Every part is micro-customized to compensate for turbine distortion. We aim to exceed customer expectations by giving them 110% effort through the design, manufacturing, and installation of our custom seals.

STAR FIELD FIT mobilizes to be on site assessing distortion and returning with equipment to accurately install STAR's custom designed seals to ensure maximum turbine performance. The STAR FIELD FIT team is highly trained on the geometry of packing, the packing holder, and their impact on turbine performance. Neck lengths, packing height and width, back travel, restrictions, and radial and axial shifts are all considerations that effect performance.

The future is bright as we take the STAR Turbine experience further into the Gas, Coal generation, Nuclear, Biomass, Waste to Energy, Geothermal, and Solar markets.

Name: SPL SEER
Description:
La SPL SEER est née de la détermination des deux villes co-fondatrices GRIGNY et VIRY-CHATILLON en s’appuyant sur l’expertise du SIPPEREC, de doter leur territoire d’une énergie vertueuse, non polluante, avec un coût maitrisé moins soumis aux fluctuations tarifaires des énergies fossiles. 
C’est ainsi qu’est née en 2014 la SPL SEER, société avec un actionnariat exclusivement public.
Fort de la réussite du premier forage implanté sur Grigny et des travaux réseaux, deux collectivités l’ont rejointe Sainte-Geneviève des Bois et Fleury-Mérogis, permettant ainsi le raccordement de la plus grande prison d’Europe à Fleury-Mérogis.
La SEER poursuit désormais la mise en œuvre du schéma directeur territorial pour les communes avoisinantes.

Name: MAUGES ENERGIES
Description:
Mauges Energies est une société d'économie mixte locale (SEML) basée à Beaupréau-en-Mauges (Maine-et-Loire). Elle a été créée en janvier 2020, à l'initiative de Mauges Communauté, en partenariat avec la SEML Alter Energies et avec la Banque des Territoires. 
Mauges Energies a vocation à développer, financer, gérer et exploiter les énergies renouvelables et locales sur le territoire des Mauges. 
Sous contrôle majoritairement public, Mauges Energies agit dans l'intérêt général du territoire. Elle travaille en partenariat avec les acteurs locaux (citoyens, entreprises, collectivités, associations...) dans un objectif de réappropriation de la production d'énergie par le territoire et pour faire du développement ENR une source de développement local et de cohésion territoriale. Les Mauges ont pour objectif d'être un territoire à  énergie positive et donc de couvrir l'ensemble des besoins énergétiques par des énergies renouvelables à l'horizon 2050.

Name: PT. Hyprowira Adhitama
Description:
PT. HYPROWIRA ADHITAMA didirikan pada tahun 1997 dengan peran utama sebagai distributor produk filter PALL. Dalam perkembangannya yang begitu pesat, didukung oleh 44 personilnya,  PT Hyprowira Adhitama tidak lagi hanya berfokus ke bidang pertambangan tapi juga ke pembangkit listrik untuk memberikan kepuasan pelanggan. Bahkan saat ini telah memiliki laboratorium uji untuk pelumas dan bahan bakar yang sudah terakreditasi ISO 17025, juga menjadi distributor Mettler Toledo, V-MER, Laser Alignment Vibro Laser, alkitronic dan Promax, FASA, Dynaset, Weel & Sandvig, dan PGS. PT Hyprowira Adhitama memiliki kerja sama operasi dengan MAP  untuk mengembangkan uji pengukuran PCBs di minyak trafo dengan mendapatkan technical assistant dari YS Corp Korea.

Kantor pusat PT. HYPROWIRA ADHITAMA berlokasi di Tangerang Selatan, mempunyai ruang lingkup operasional termasuk Jawa Barat dan Jawa Tengah. Kantor cabang Surabaya untuk melayani pelanggan kami di Jawa Timur, Bali, Sulawesi, dan Papua. Sedangkan untuk wilayah Sumatera Utara, Riau, Jambi dan Padang akan dilayani oleh kantor cabang Pekanbaru. Banyaknya kegiatan penambangan dan eksplorasi di Kalimantan, akan dilayani oleh personil kami di kantor cabang Balikpapan. Kantor ini secara aktif melakukan kunjungan ke pelanggan di Sengatta, Samarinda dan Tanjung Tabalong. Dua kantor representatif kami berada di Cilacap, Gresik dan Soroako (Sulawesi).  

Kantor PT Hyprowira Adhitama pusat di Tangerang Selatan dan Balikpapan dilengkapi dengan fasilitas laboratorium yang telah dikembangkan selama bertahun-tahun dan saat ini telah terakreditasi ISO 17025. Kami dapat memberikan bantuan ahli untuk melakukan pemeliharaan prediktif dengan tren uji kebersihan minyak ISO 4407-2002 kontaminasi kebersihan. Botol sampel kami telah divalidasi sesuai dengan ISO 3372 untuk memastikan kontaminasi yang ada di dalam botol sampel pada batas yang diperbolehkan.

Name: respect energy SolarWind
Description:
Respect Energy SolarWind - we are part of Respect Holding - one of the largest entities in the electricity market in Poland. The EPC formula in which we operate includes several key steps that, meticulously thought out and executed, lead to the success of the project. We implement turnkey projects! Engineering: At this stage, we carefully plan and design the entire project. During this time, we focus on developing all technical aspects of the project, including spatial concepts (Site Plan), construction and detailed design. Our goal is to optimize the layout of structures, cables and traffic in order to achieve the highest possible efficiency while reducing investment costs. Procurement: In this phase, we purchase all the necessary materials, equipment and services required for the project. All transactions are made after approval of the budget and construction schedule. We also initiate the logistics and transportation process to ensure that materials are delivered to the construction site at the right time and place. 
Construction: This phase involves the physical implementation of the project, including construction, commissioning and testing of all project components. Successful EPC project management requires the use of appropriate project management processes and tools, such as quality control, risk management and resource management. Since each project is unique, we tailor our formula to its specifics, location and client requirements. Once construction is completed and energy is obtained, we hand over the operating power plant to Asset Management. Behind each of these steps is careful planning, strict quality control and coordinated activities to ensure the success of the EPC project.

Además desarrollamos e implementamos soluciones de almacenamiento inteligente, que extrae el máximo

Estaremos a tu lado para generar grandes proyectos, contáctanos, te estamos esperando.
Si necesitas generar tu propia energía, con soluciones personalizadas, somos tu mejor opción. Te esperamos, tenemos grandes proyectos por hacer juntos.

Name: RAW Solid Fuels
Description:
RAW Solid Fuels is revolutionising the biomass industry with the world’s first carbon-negative sustainable biomass pellet which is GGL certified.

We grow Hybrid Tropical Grass "HTG", a scalable, sustainable first intent energy feedstock which is pelletised and exported via long-term supply contracts for use in renewable energy power generation.  

Our HTG is grown on marginal non-food land and is a high yielding, superior, sustainable, scalable feedstock with the most efficient carbon cycle in biomass. A thermal energy content exceeding that of woody biomass and a carbon cycle measured in days rather than many decades.

Sustainability is at the heart of our agronomy and production processes and we are proud to be GGL certified and meeting international standards on sustainability, environmental responsibility whilst actively promoting biodiversity conservation and reduced GHG emissions.

We are RAW Energy.

Takip eden yıllarda birçok projede danışmanlık rolü ile yer alarak 2009 yılında Enerji Bakanlığı Yenilenebilir Enerji Genel Müdürlüğü tarafından Enerji Verimliliği Danışmanlık Şirketi olarak yetkilendirilmiş ve o tarihten bu yana hem endüstriyel işletmelerde hem de ticari binalarda enerji performansını artırıcı projeler geliştirerek, enerjji verimliliği bilincinin oluşmasına katkıda bulunmayı sürdürmektedir.

Kayseri’de ve Rusya’da kurulumuna alçak gerilim pano satışı ile enerji santralleri kurulumu sektörüne tanışmıştır. 2016 yılı itibariyle inşaası tamamlanmış ve devrede olan 8,000 kWp yenilenebilir enerji santrallerine ek olarak toplamda 42,000 kWp gücünde yeni güneş enerjisi santrali projeleri yürütmektedir. Name: Buffalo Energy Ltd
Description:
Buffalo Energy was founded to facilitate the uptake of renewable energy in sub-Saharan Africa. We provide a bridge between investors and world class project opportunities in remote and inaccessible areas. With our headquarters in Lusaka, Zambia, we have a unique position as developers based on the ground to add significant value to projects. The team has extensive experience in the sector, and we pride ourselves on delivering projects of the highest technical quality.
  
WHAT WE DO
 
Utility Scale Project Development
Buffalo Energy develops grid connected solar PV, wind, hydro and biomass projects in Zambia, Malawi and Mozambique. We have a diversified pipeline with development rights to over 100MW solar PV, 40-200MW wind, and 15MW biomass projects in the region. We have been involved in, and successfully submitted 45MW of solar and mini hydro applications to the Zambian GET FiT programs. 
 
Commercial and Industrial (C&I)
High operational costs due to excessive use of diesel generators and variable electricity tariffs can cripple a business. We offer a fully financed on-site solar PV solution that sells power back to clients at a cheaper electricity price than their current blended price of grid connected energy and diesel generator use. The company has been successful with competitive tenders in Zambia and is developing a pipeline of 3MW C&I solar PV projects.
 
Off-Grid and Mini-Grids
Currently, only around 50% of people in sub-Saharan Africa have access to power, with that number rising to 70% in Zambia. We are developing a pipeline of 35 mini-grid projects in Zambia, collaborating with other partners to bring added value and impact to rural communities alongside electricity. Community services may include asset leasing, battery distribution, cookstove provision and soil testing.  
 
Get in touch to find out more by emailing info@buffaloenergy.co

Name: Biotérmica Energia

A usina gera 8,55 MWh e tem potencial para atingir 15 MWh de energia limpa a partir do resíduo doméstico depositado no aterro sanitário de Minas do Leão, operado pela Companhia Riograndense de Valorização de Resíduos (CRVR), empresa do Grupo Solví. Name: London Geothermal Consortium
Description:
At London Geothermal, we position ourselves as an infrastructure-focused GreenTech startup. While we are still in the early stages, we are building a scalable organization that works with both public and private stakeholders through the ESCO model. Name: GEOFIT Project EU
Description:
Developing tomorrow’s smart Geothermal Systems and construction processes. Co-financed by the European Commission under INEA’s Low Carbon Energy, Renewable Energy Technologies program.

GEOFIT is an integrated industrially driven action, funded by the H2020 programme and carried out by 24 partners across EU, aimed at deployment of cost effective enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) on energy efficient building retrofitting. 

This entails the development technical development of innovative EGS and its components, namely, non-standard heat exchanger configurations, a novel hybrid heat pump and electrically driven compression heat pump systems and suite of heating and cooling components to be integrated with the novel GSHP concepts, all specially designed to applied in energy efficient retrofitting projects. 

To make viable the novel EGS in energy efficient building retrofitting, a suite of tools and technologies is developed, including: low invasive risk assessment technologies, site-inspection and worksite building monitoring techniques (SHM), control systems for cost-effective and optimized EGS in operation phase and novel BIM-enabled dedicated tools for management of geothermal based retrofitting works (GEOBIM platform). 

Furthermore, the project is committed with the application of novel drilling techniques as the improved low invasive vertical drilling and trenchless technologies.

This project has received funding from the European Union’s H2020 Grant Agreement No. 792210

Name: Store2Hydro
Description: Starting in January 2024, Store2Hydro is a four-year initiative funded by the European Commission's Horizon Europe program. It's primary objective is to optimise electricity storage through the integration of reversible pump turbine technology into current hydropower infrastructures. This strategic approach has the potential to augment European storage capacity by up to 22TWh/y. The project entails validating inventive mechanical solutions for pumped storage and identifying untapped hydropower reservoirs, all in alignment with the objectives of the European Green Deal, while maintaining reservoir volumes. Additionally, the project introduces digital twin technology to enhance monitoring and adaptability to fluctuating renewable energy generation, thereby offering more efficient, cost-effective, and flexible hydropower operations.

Name: Holcomb Energy Systems
Description:
An entirely new source of 100% clean energy, the Holcomb Energy System (HES) is a world-changing scientific breakthrough in clean energy generation. 

Patent protected worldwide, the HES utilizes the natural energy produced by the electron spin in the iron atom, converting it into usable electricity while requiring no fuel, releasing zero carbon emissions, and having no moving parts - therefore running completely silent. 

The HES addresses some of the world’s most critical issues, including pollution, climate change, global access to electricity, and endless wars for fossil fuels. Eliminating the need for centrally generated power plants, the HES instead places energy production right where it is being used — in homes, commercial buildings, transportation, consumer electronics, and on or off the grid. 

The HES comprises three patent-protected commercial technologies, each with multiple applications: 

1. The In-Line Power Generator significantly magnifies power output, cutting power bills and carbon footprints by up to 80%.

2. The HES Phase Converter operates by converting single or split-phase power to three-phase power,  while significantly magnifying power output.

3. The Stand-Alone, Self-Sustaining HES Power Generator operates off the grid, with no outside energy source, in a self-sustaining, self-looping fashion by powering itself while putting out enough excess power to meet the requirements of any size electrical load.

Name: ENA Energi AB
Description:
ENA Energi AB produces all heat and electricity from renewable Energy. 
Fossil fuels belongs to the history. 
 
 
ENA Energy supplies all heat necessary to heat all houses and all tap water in Enköping. The combined heat and power station (CHP) also produce the mayor part of the electricity demand in the town.
The company is owned by the municipality so the profit goes to the people living in the region.
Enköping is a small Swedish town with a little bit more than 20000 inhabitants. 
The winter is normally quite cold with an average temperature in February at about –4 °C.
To keep a reasonable indoor climate we supply about 220 000 MWh of heat over the year.
In the CHP we also produce about 100 000 MWh of electricity yearly.
We use waste material from the forest industry and about 15% short rotation crops that we call Salix.
The waste material from the forest industry is mostly branches and tops from trees, sawdust from the sawmill industry and bark. 
The bioenergy comes from the neighbourhood and we calculate the average transport distance to about 70 km.
This way of producing heat and electricity doesn´t influence the greenhouse effect.
We believe this is a intelligent way to use local sustainable energy and sell it locally. Enköping will be a sustainable society.

 Fondée en 1985, Prowatt est la première entreprise à faire partie du groupe. Située à Jonquière, elle est le chef de file dans le domaine de l’électricité et de gestion de projets pour les secteurs industriels et commerciaux. 
 
 Fondée en 1992, Les Lignes du Fjord intègrent le groupe afin de répondre à la demande des contrats liés à la haute tension. Depuis, l’entreprise se spécialise en construction et entretien des réseaux électriques de haute tension et de communication, aériens et souterrains. Elle effectue également l’installation de câblage de fibre optique. 
 
 Finalement en 2015, Élexco se joint au groupe pour répondre aux besoins grandissants en ingénierie et automatisation. Cette dernière se présente comme une solution rafraichissante et abordable en ingénierie électrique et automatisation. 
 
Pour le Groupe Pylium, le bien-être des employés est le mot d’ordre. Chacune des entreprises qui forment le groupe porte en elle les valeurs de la famille, du plaisir au travail, du sens de la communauté et accorde une importance primordiale à la santé et la sécurité des travailleurs.

Name: Cal Microgrids
Description:
As a business owner, you know that power outages can be costly. They can cause disruptions to your supply chain, damage to your inventory, and loss of revenue. In fact, power outages are one of the most common causes of business interruption. That's why it's so important to have an energy assurance plan in place. And one of the best ways to ensure a reliable and resilient power supply is to invest in on-site micro grid power plants.
Micro grids are small, self-contained power systems that can operate independently from the main grid. They offer a number of advantages for businesses, including increased reliability, redundancy, and resiliency. Micro grids can be powered by clean, renewable energy sources like solar and wind, which can help reduce your carbon footprint. 
Investing in an on-site micro grid power plant is a smart way to protect your business from the effects of power outages. Micro grids are reliable, resilient and can be backed up by clean natural gas cogens to take up any slack in the system. Battery Banks are used for nighttime operations and can help maintain smooth power delivery to sensitive systems.
Here at Cal Microgrids, we understand that running a business is hard enough without having to worry about energy outages. That's why we're committed to helping businesses build energy assurance with on-site microgrid power plants. Our plants are clean, renewable, and reliable, providing a cutting-edge solution for businesses looking to reduce their carbon footprint. Further, our plants are redundant and resilient, meaning that they can continue to provide power even in the event of an outage. At Cal Microgrids, we work with you to design the right fit for your operation, your current needs and future growth. We work with the best of breed solution providers and bring the perfect fit to your unique requirements. 
You can trust Cal Microgrids to keep the lights on no matter what!

Name: U.S. DOE Southeast Onsite Energy TAP

Technical assistance for end users can include a broad range of services in support of onsite energy project deployment, from the earliest stages of screening for multi-technology solutions, to the end stages of post-installation operation. The Onsite Energy TAPs also conduct outreach and engage with policymakers, utilities, and other key stakeholders to accelerate pathways for integration of clean onsite energy technologies. Additional activities include developing public tools and resources, sharing best practices, and building partnerships that drive decarbonization across the U.S. industrial sector.

Confía en GENPAC para asegurar la continuidad y eficiencia de tus sistemas energéticos. 
Nos consideramos tu socio confiable, brindándote servicios y productos de excelencia respaldados por nuestro conocimiento y experiencia. 
Estamos comprometidos con tu satisfacción y listos para ayudarte a alcanzar tus metas.

ABOUT COMPANY: 

VIRTUD Sp. z o.o. was founded in 2015. Our main task is to provide ideas and solutions that reduce energy consumption and CO2 emissions. We use renewable energy sources such as photovoltaics and heat pumps, and hydrogen as an energy carrier. 

For 4 years we have been gaining knowledge and experience related to the use of hydrogen as an energy carrier. We are an integrator of hydrogen solutions, using ready-made devices and proven solutions. We have and constantly develop knowledge and experience to be able to fully meet the requirements of ongoing projects. 

Our unique VIRTUD HYDROGEN SYSTEM enables complete energy independence. This solution uses renewable energy sources to power and produce hydrogen through an AEM membrane electrolyser. Then storing the hydrogen for conversion via the fuel cell into heat and electricity during periods of increased demand.

-	Piotr Napierała, is a member of the Wielkopolska Platforma Wodorowa,

Name: Vogel Wilson Energy Solutions
Description:
At Vogel Wilson Energy Solutions (VWES), we design, finance, and deploy custom onsite energy systems that reduce operating costs, boost resilience, and help organizations meet their sustainability goals—without requiring any upfront capital.

We specialize in delivering scalable, turnkey solutions that integrate power generation, energy efficiency, and carbon capture technologies tailored to the unique needs of commercial and industrial customers. Our systems help future-proof businesses by cutting electricity costs, increasing reliability, and ensuring long-term environmental compliance.

We take a pragmatic, technology-agnostic approach—selecting the best mix of equipment, partners, and financing structures for each site. Whether it’s combined heat and power (CHP) with renewable natural gas, solar with storage, advanced refrigeration upgrades, or CO₂ capture, we build systems that generate power and curb carbon dioxide where and when it’s needed most. All with zero upfront cost and attractive offtake agreements.
We also unlock new revenue opportunities—like EV charging integration and merchant CO₂ sales—while helping our clients lock in long-term, predictable energy rates.

Name: Green Energy Resources (M) sdn bhd
Description:
GREEN ENERGY RESOURCES (M) SDN. BHD (GER), a wholly owned subsidiary of GPP Resources Berhad (GPP), is an established EPCC provider on renewable energy solutions since 2008. Our core expertise and activities are geared towards helping clients utilize alternative energy sources like natural gas, biogas, and syngas, in the application of reciprocating engines for power generators.

With the rising cost of fuel, especially diesel, the use of biomethane generated from agricultural waste to power engines has proven to be a very attractive fuel alternative. In the South‐East Asia region, palm oil obtained from the agricultural sector has shown much promise as an alternative fuel to power IC engines. This is an area we also have much expertise in, using technologies to run diesel engines on methyl esters obtained from palm oils. These biodiesel alternatives, as well as being economically sound, also help to reduce damage to the environment by using proven green technologies – which has been a main focus of our company.  In this win‐win situation, we hope to capture a major share of the energy market, especially in Asia region.

Our well-trained technical staff are able to handle all the electrical, instrumentation and controls set-up, routing maintenance and troubleshooting. We can provide outright sale of equipment, or build-own-operate-transfer arrangement. To ensure that you benefit in the after-sales service, a comprehensive package of field maintenance and contracting capabilities can also be arranged.

As a SEDA approved local engine assembler, We provide our clients with incentive of higher F.I.T. rate & strong after sales support. We stocks a comprehensive spare parts inventory to serve our customers on timely basis.

Name: Summit Energy Solution
Description:
At Summit Energy Solutions Pvt. Ltd., we are driven by a vision to produce clean, green energy and reduce Nepal’s dependence on imported petroleum fuels. Our mission is to unlock the country’s vast hydroelectric potential, contributing to national energy security and sustainable economic growth by investing strategically in renewable water resources and skilled human capital.

Nepal’s path to energy independence requires strong collaboration between the public and private sectors. We advocate for greater public awareness of the challenges faced by hydroelectric entrepreneurs from difficult terrain to logistical and regulatory barriers and for transparency in the generation and distribution of power.

Despite policy support for hydropower development, practical implementation and ease of doing business remain challenging. Through our flagship project, the Bakan Khola Hydro-Electric Project (BKHEP 44 MW) in Sankhuwasabha, we aim to demonstrate responsible development that creates local employment, strengthens infrastructure, and empowers communities.

Every challenge presents an opportunity. Out of Nepal’s 83,000 MW of hydroelectric potential, only about 2,900 MW is currently harnessed. We are committed to turning this untapped potential into real value for investors, local communities, and the nation as a whole.

Nasce nel 2010 dalla volontà di due famiglie di imprenditori di costruire un progetto comune nel quale mettere al centro la creazione di un nuovo modo di fare agricoltura con l'obiettivo di creare valore per il territorio , valore economico per il nuovo gruppo e un team con una cultura industriale pronto ad affrontare le nuove sfide del settore.
Il gruppo , grazie all'estensione delle superfici coltivate e il giro di affari, rappresenta una delle realtà più importanti della regione , fornendo energia rinnovabile a circa 23 mila persone. 
Il nostro pensiero quotidiano è la consapevolezza di essere il territorio , valorizzando l'inclusività sociale , la sostenibilità delle imprese che collaborano con noi e la creazione di relazioni di valore anche in settori diversi dall'agricoltura.

Description:
Green Power Technologies PR, LLC's mission is to provide affordable and reliable renewable energy technology to emerging markets and remote regions where alternative energy solutions are expensive or undesirable. Our experts and industry partners have distinguished careers worldwide as leaders in environmental applications.

Water transportations with lower flows like pump stations, water treatment plants, pipelines, and small rivers worldwide have historically been bypassed for creating energy because of the relative inconsistency of flow throughout the day. The Variable Flow Hydropower System (VFH Turbine) generates peak energy from fluctuating water sources — which is how our technology differs from conventional impoundment hydroelectric facilities.

Establishments, businesses, and communities worldwide now have the opportunity to utilize lower water flows to provide independent (off-grid/on-grid) power to run on 100% renewable energy and help be carbon neutral.

Name: Tab Baykal Akümülatör
Description:
TAB firması faaliyetlerine ilk olarak 1665 yılında Slovenya’da, bulunduğu bölgedeki Kurşun Madde İşleme tesisi ile başlamıştır.

350 yılı aşkın bir geçmişe sahip köklü bir firma olan TAB, 1965 yılında Rudnik Mežica Holding'in (Kurşun Madeni Mežica Holding) bir yan kuruluşu olarak, Starter Akü imalatına başlamıştır. İlk 15 yıl boyunca TAB, Tudor, İsveç'in lisans ortaklığı ile üretim yapmıştır. Günümüzde TAB, üç farklı lokasyonda yaklaşık 1.500 çalışanı ile 3 modern fabrikada çok çeşitli kurşun asitli, VRLA AGM ve VRLA Jel aküleri üretmektedir.

- TAB, Slovenya'daki ilk lokasyonunda, yaklaşık olarak 60.000 ton üretim yapan bir geri dönüşüm tesisi ve bu 60.000 ton hurdadan yılda 33.000 ton yumuşak kurşun ve alaşım elde etmektedir. Bu tesiste yıllık 1,8 milyon adet TAB markalı Traksiyoner ve Stasyoner hücre kapasiteli endüstriyel akülerin üretimini gerçekleştirmektedir.
- Slovenya'daki ikinci Lokasyonunda, yıllık 3,3 milyon parça kapasiteli TAB, Topla, Vesna ve Volthor markalarının Starter akü üretimini gerçekleştirmektedir.
- Üçüncü fabrikanın bulunduğu Kuzey Makedonya Cumhuriyetinde yıllık 2,2 milyon adet Starter akü üretimi kapasitesine sahiptir. Burada Vesna marka akülerin üretimi, yıllık 400 bin adet TAB markalı Traksiyoner hücresine sahip endüstriyel akülerin üretimi ve yaklaşık 18.000 ton hurdadan yılda 10.000 ton yumuşak kurşun ve alaşım elde edilen geri dönüşüm tesisinin faaliyetleri yürütülmektedir.

Bunların yanısıra TAB'de ayrıca çeşitli askeri piller de üretilmektedir.
Yüksek kaliteli pillerimiz başta Avrupa, Asya ve Amerika olmak üzere dünya çapında tanınmaktadır.

Hudson Engineering is a leading engineering company specializing in power generator services and electrical solutions. Since 1999, we have been providing industrial, commercial, and residential power solutions, ensuring uninterrupted electricity for businesses and homes across Karachi, Pakistan.

Name: FLORESTAN TECHNOLOGY PTY LTD
Description:
Florestan Technology is delivering practical and high-impact solutions to meet global energy needs. We specialise in cutting-edge microturbine technologies designed for unparalleled efficiency, flexibility, and reliable power generation.

Our Mission:

To drive the adoption of practical and effective energy solutions that support microgrid stability, trigeneration needs, and carbon footprint reduction. By developing technologies that work seamlessly across a range of fuels and grid applications, we are committed to advancing energy independence by providing a cheap, clean, reliable and secure energy solution.


Key Features:

Advanced Microturbine Systems: Our flagship product, the P2X-MTS microturbine system, is a groundbreaking innovation that converts various fossil-based fuels as well as renewable fuels, into electricity with unparalleled efficiency and flexibility.

Smart Grid Integration: With proprietary digital twin capabilities and predictive maintenance algorithms, our microturbines offer scalable solutions for smart grid integration at any level, from standalone generation to utility-scale applications.

Fuel Flexibility: Optimised for a wide range of fuels (all the way from diesel to hydrogen), our systems offer unmatched adaptability, making them a resilient and practical choice for varying operational environments.


Collaborative Innovation:

Florestan Technology partners with governments, defence, industry leaders, and research institutions to bring real-world applications of our solutions to life. By working together, we demonstrate what is possible with resilient, flexible energy solutions tailored for a changing world.

Name: SiteSpan
Description:
The clean energy and infrastructure industries all face the same silent bottleneck:
projects don’t fail because of engineering… they fail because companies can’t find the right electricians fast enough.

Solar, EV charging, commercial electrification, utilities — all scaling faster than the workforce can be sourced, verified, or mobilized. EPCs spend weeks chasing subcontractors, checking licenses, waiting on quotes, and guessing labor budgets without knowing who’s actually qualified or available.

SiteSpan was created to solve that.

We built a platform that uses AI + geo-location to instantly match companies with vetted electricians nationwide — with real data on licensing, insurance, service areas, skill sets, and labor cost ranges.

Because access to the workforce shouldn’t be the reason clean energy slows down.

With SiteSpan, companies get:

• Instant matching to qualified, licensed electricians
• AI-screened compliance, insurance, and credentials
• AI-generated job scopes & budget estimates
• Rapid access to crews across local & nationwide markets

Our Mission

To eliminate workforce delays and empower companies with instant, reliable access to skilled electricians — so projects can be built at the speed the industry demands.

Name: De Boormeester bv
Description:
Geothermische boringen zijn waardevol omdat ze toegang bieden tot aardwarmte, een duurzame en milieuvriendelijke energiebron. Waarom geothermie?

1. Duurzaam en hernieuwbaar
Geothermische energie maakt gebruik van de warmte die van nature in de aarde aanwezig is. Deze warmtebron wordt constant aangevuld door radioactief verval in de aardkern, waardoor het een vrijwel onuitputtelijke energiebron is.

2. Lage uitstoot van broeikasgassen
Bij het opwekken van geothermische energie is de uitstoot van CO₂ en andere schadelijke gassen minimaal, vooral in vergelijking met fossiele brandstoffen.

3. Efficiëntie
Geothermische systemen werken zeer efficiënt, omdat ze zowel voor elektriciteitsopwekking als verwarming en koeling kunnen worden gebruikt. Dit maakt ze geschikt voor huizen, kantoren en zelfs industriële toepassingen.

4. Kleine landoppervlakte nodig
Geothermische installaties hebben een kleinere ecologische voetafdruk dan veel andere hernieuwbare energiebronnen zoals zonneparken of windmolenparken.

5. Betrouwbaarheid
Geothermische energie is een constante energiebron die niet afhankelijk is van weersomstandigheden, zoals wind of zon. Hierdoor levert het een stabiele energievoorziening.

6. Lage operationele kosten
Nadat de installatie eenmaal is aangelegd, zijn de operationele en onderhoudskosten relatief laag, omdat de energiebron zelf gratis is.
7. Geschikt voor diverse toepassingen

Geothermie kan worden gebruikt voor elektriciteitsopwekking in geothermische centrales, maar ook voor directe verwarming in stedelijke gebieden of kleinschalig gebruik zoals warmtepompen in woningen.

8. Lange levensduur
Geothermische installaties kunnen tientallen jaren meegaan, waardoor ze een langdurige bron van duurzame energie bieden.

These technologies allow for the extraction and distribution of geothermal energy on a level comparable to oil and gas; a level of energy production that far exceeds current geothermal technologies.  What is so awesome about this technology is that it allows for the transport of geothermal heat to existing power plants the same way that coal and oil is transported to power plants.  By implementing minimal retrofitting for geothermal power these existing power plants can be turning out base load power to millions of consumers.  Using existing power plants will reduce start-up costs significantly compared to existing geothermal technologies.  Currently renewable energy capability has stalled at 28% of worldwide production.  The world requires base load power from renewable energy in order to mitigate climate change.  The only source that can accomplish this endeavor is geothermal energy.  The only geothermal energy technology that can produce base load power at this level of production is American GeoPower. American GeoPower has many cutting edge geothermal systems that will fundamentally change the way we collect heat/energy from the earth seven granted patents that encompass geothermal energy collection, storage, transportation,  carbon sequestration and an advanced Hydrothermal Spallation drilling system, Geothermal pyrolysis and much more.

Name: Emission Free Generators, Inc.
Description:
Thanks for checking out our page. EFG is now raising a community round of investment on Wefunder. Check out our page and video. https://wefunder.com/emissionfreegenerators

EFG is a silent, emission free, generator that creates hydrogen-on-demand dictated by end user electricity requirements. The fuel, safe to send by mail, is a novel powder contained in a reusable fuel cartridge. The EFG converts the output demand data into an energy requirement that is met by hydrogen created from within the cartridge. Every few seconds hydrogen is produced and immediately converted to the specific electrical demand, there is no storage, making the EFG ultra safe, portable and simple to operate. 

EFG is completely independent of fossil fuels, grid power and solar and it’s 100% emission free, meaning it can work anywhere, including indoors, at any time, for as long as power is required. EFG is a step change in the household, recreation and business power generation markets.

The company is a startup and our technology is in the MVP stage. Our invention has been successfully refined, prototyped, tested and verified by third party engineering companies and laboratories. After 10,000+ hours of rigorous real-world testing, across diverse conditions, independent engineering firms have verified that the technology delivers exactly as promised. 

This proven breakthrough innovation is secured by four pending patents expected to be granted before our market launch.

The portable generator, battery and solar market has a total addressable market of over $7.8B and is growing.  Consumers are seeking alternative options as they experience more blackouts, emergencies and/or want more leisure or off-grid freedom. 

We have been invested in and supported by SoCal Gas RD&D, Corporate Venture Capital (CVC), The Heritage Group Accelerator, Caltech Rocket Fund, Procopio Launchpad, and private investors. 

EFG is raising our Seed round now (April 2025).

Name: BIAPWS, The British & Irish Association for the Properties of Water & Steam
Description:
The British and Irish Association for the Properties of Water and Steam (BIAPWS) is a non-profit organisation that focuses on industrial applications in water chemistry and treatment in the energy sector and related industries.
We are an independent representative body for Power Plant Chemistry in the UK and Ireland, bringing together electricity generators (fossil, biomass, nuclear and EfW), steam generators and users, and providers of water treatment, analytical equipment and chemistry services.

As a forum for information and knowledge exchange, we hold regular meetings and webinars, and our annual BIAPWS Symposium. We work with regulators, standards organisations and research institutions to promote best practice to improve plant chemistry, water treatment and environmental management.

Name: SciCat Oil LLC
Description:
Technology for Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS)

SciCat Geo is a subsidiary of SciCat Oil LLC (or SciCat) founded in 2011 by Dr. Michael Shoemaker and is based in Houston, Texas.

SciCat is subsurface geophysical technology providing a seismic driven development solution for Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS) in sedimentary basins. 

SciCat has developed award winning 3-D seismic geomechanics technology that measures in-situ 3-D minimum horizontal stress which is the key rock parameter that governs hydraulic fracture stimulation of relatively tight geologic formations, not only for enhanced energy production, but for controlled fracture design and minimal environmental footprint. 

The novel technology and method is the recent recipient of the 2020 prestigious AAPG Levorsen Memorial Award for innovation in subsurface exploration. 

Changes in rock geomechanics and subsequent minimum stress define stimulated rock volume (SRV) and reservoir extent, which drives well performance and ultimate recovery of geothermal liquids, for unconventional Enhanced Geothermal Systems. 

For oil/gas and unconventional petroleum systems application, the novel technology has been successfully applied to the prolific Midland and Delaware sub-basins of the greater Permian Basin, the results of which have been peer-reviewed and published.

Name: EDTL, E.P.
Description:
A Eletricidade de Timor-Leste, Empresa Pública, abreviadamente designada por EDTL, E.P., é uma pessoa coletiva pública, integrada na administração indireta do Estado, sob a forma de empresa pública, dotada de personalidade jurídica e capacidade judiciária, autonomia administrativa, autonomia financeira e património próprio, tendo sido legalmente estabelecida através do Decreto-Lei n.º 29/2020, de 22 de julho.

A EDTL, E.P. propõe, acompanha e assegura a execução da política nacional do setor energético, garantindo a gestão sustentável e integrada da produção, transmissão, distribuição e venda de energia elétrica, nomeadamente através do estabelecimento e prestação de serviços públicos de fornecimento de energia elétrica.

A sua sede é em Díli, capital de Timor-Leste, sendo que exerce a sua atividade ao longo de todo o território nacional. 

O capital estatutário da EDTL, E.P. cifra-se no montante de USD $ 94.424.461,00 (noventa e quatro milhões, quatrocentos e vinte e quatro mil quatrocentos e sessenta e um dólares norte americanos).

As principais atribuições prosseguidas pela EDTL, E.P. são:

Assegurar o fornecimento de eletricidade nas melhores condições de qualidade, continuidade, eficiência e economia do serviço;

Name: Hamitabat Doğal Gaz Kombine Çevrim Santrali
Description:
Türkiye’nin ilk doğalgaz kombine çevrim santrali

2017’den bu yana tam kapasiteyle faaliyet gösteren Hamitabat Elektrik Üretim ve Ticaret A.Ş. (HEAŞ), Limak Enerji bünyesindeki özel bir santral. Orijinal Hamitabat santralinin renovasyonu, benzersiz altyapı inşaatıyla santralin daha az doğalgaz tüketmesini, daha az gürültü emisyonu ve daha az su tüketimi yapmasını sağladı. Ayrıca HEAŞ, Çevre ve Şehircilik Bakanlığı tarafından başlatılan Sıfır Atık Projesi’ne uygun olarak sıfır atık yönetim sistemini kurarak Sıfır Atık Belgesi’ni almaya hak kazandı. Türkiye’nin ilk doğalgaz kombine çevrim santrali olan HEAŞ, sürdürülebilir enerji üretiminde Türkiye’nin büyüyen rolünün simgesi olarak faaliyetlerine devam ediyor.

HEAŞ, 1.156 MW kurulu gücü ile 2017 yılı içerisinde yenileme projesinin tamamlanması sonrasında, enerji tedariğine katkı sağladı. Gerek stratejik konumu, gerekse yüksek güvenilirlik ve emre amadelik ile Marmara Bölgesi’nde enerji arzının güvencesi olan HEAŞ, 2018 yılında kurulu gücünü 1.220 MW’a çıkardı. 2021 yılı içindeki üretim miktarı 7,349 milyar kWh olarak gerçekleşti.

Name: VIPE POWER ENERGY

Este grupo empresarial se destaca por su diversificación y solidez, participando activamente en actividades que van desde el comercio de electricidad y gas natural hasta la generación de energía y el comercio de productos energéticos en la unión europea. Además, tiene una destacada presencia en el desarrollo de proyectos de energía renovable, así como en la compra y venta de productos petrolíferos como gasóleo y gasolina. Su influencia también se extiende a sectores cruciales como la ingeniería, la construcción industrial y residencial, consolidando así su posición como un actor integral en la economía global.

Lo que diferencia a este grupo empresarial es su capacidad para gestionar un extenso y diversificado portafolio de actividades. Dentro de este, se incluyen la fabricación de equipos tanto estándar como personalizados, la producción y comercialización de una amplia variedad de transformadores, así como el procesamiento de residuos electrónicos y el reciclaje de neumáticos al final de su vida útil. Estas actividades no solo muestran la amplitud del grupo, sino también su capacidad para adaptarse y liderar en múltiples frentes industriales. Además, el grupo tiene una sólida presencia en la gestión de bienes raíces y la administración de hoteles de lujo, lo que refuerza su posición en sectores estratégicos de la economía global. Esta diversificación le permite no solo mantenerse a la vanguardia del sector energético, sino también afrontar con eficacia y eficiencia los desafíos complejos que plantea el mercado global.

Name: Wemed Energy
Description:
Valorizziamo l’energia potenziale delle reti idriche.

Wemed Energy nasce nel 2025 dall’unione tra WECONS e Medra Servizi, due realtà italiane con competenze complementari nei settori idraulico, meccanico ed energetico.

WECONS, spin-off accademico dell’Università di Palermo, si è distinta fin da subito per il suo approccio innovativo nel campo della progettazione idraulica, che ha permesso di ottenere due brevetti nel campo delle turbine idrauliche, tecnologie che hanno ricevuto importanti riconoscimenti, tra cui il titolo di Start-Up della Green Economy al Premio per lo Sviluppo Sostenibile.

Medra Servizi, attiva dal 1975, è punto di riferimento nella fornitura di componenti per reti idriche, gas ed energie rinnovabili, distinguendosi da sempre come garanzia di qualità, affidabilità e servizi.

Oggi, insieme, produciamo il Power Recovery System (PRS): un sistema brevettato che trasforma la pressione in eccesso nelle reti idriche in energia elettrica pulita, senza modificare il funzionamento della rete.

Zero emissioni, nessun consumo aggiuntivo, solo energia recuperata da fluido che scorre.

Grazie a un monitoraggio continuo e a un’integrazione proattiva, il PRS migliora l’efficienza della rete, trasforma l'energia potenziale idrica e contribuisce agli obiettivi di decarbonizzazione. Questo lo rende la soluzione ideale per i gestori del ciclo idrico, consorzi di bonifica, comunità energetiche e realtà industriali che vogliono integrare sostenibilità e performance operative.

Affianchiamo i nostri clienti lungo tutto il processo: dalla progettazione alla realizzazione, offrendo impianti chiavi in mano e soluzioni su misura che integrano l’ingegneria idraulica con la transizione energetica, creando tecnologie che valorizzano ciò che già scorre nelle nostre reti.

L’acqua è già in movimento. Sta a noi trasformarla in valore.

Seguici per scoprire come uniamo ingegneria, innovazione e sostenibilità al servizio delle infrastrutture idriche!

Name: Blueflux Power
Description:
We are the designers and builders of near-green and true-green Power Generation, Storage and Distribution solutions. Our advanced software control systems enable the inclusion and balancing of Distributed Energy Resources (DERs), such as solar and wind, in stand-alone (microgrid) and grid-connected systems, to deliver capabilities and efficiencies that are unmatched in the world.

We apply our advanced proprietary and patented technologies in two areas:

Power Generation – We produce UPS-quality Prime Power (24/7) to grid-connected or island mode environments. Our near-green hybrid (polyphase/poly frequency) platforms intelligently blend renewable sources with conventional power systems to deliver on-demand power – while reducing emissions and cutting fuel use by 20%+. We apply our emission-free voltage generators in microgrids to deliver 'green' digital power that is resilient and reliable in a safe, and compact footprint.

Power Storage – Our hybrid storage systems employ advanced Battery Management Controls. These proprietary systems apply intelligent management of charge/discharge cycles – extending the life of batteries. Our Automatic Arc Protection System (AAPS) improves thermal stability and reduces the possibility of thermal runaway, lowering the risk of lithium battery fires.

Power Distribution – We intelligently optimize multiple energy input sources to enable the inclusion of green sustainable resources, such as solar and wind, with the predictability and performance found in conventional power systems. Our proprietary predictive A.I. controls enable 100% utilization of renewable sources, and our proprietary cybersecurity techniques provide advanced protections. The result: heterogeneous solutions that deliver on-demand power in a secure, reliable and resilient platform.

Name: Brevian Energy
Description: A Micro Grid is merely a smaller scale version of the larger electrical grid that powers our country. The electrical grid exists to supply our electricity demand, connecting electrical supply to electrical demand with the transmission and distribution system. Microgrids work in the same way, just for a smaller geographic area, like a couple of buildings or a local community. To meet the electricity demands of its users, a Micro Grid must have a generation source. Traditionally, the electricity supplied to Micro Grids has historically been from “behind the meter” fossil fuel generators – gas-powered generators, for example. However, with the rapid advancement in renewable energy technologies, today’s Microgrids are being designed to supply electricity with a combination of various renewable generation sources. When paired with versatile energy storage solutions, the combined generation sources can form an islanded system that detaches from the electrical grid. At Brevian Energy, we are committed to fighting the effects of climate change. Our mission is to bring affordable, reliable, renewable power to homes, businesses, and communities in every possible location.

Projektet bidrar till att:

öka användningen av lokala och hållbara biomassaströmmar

minska klimatpåverkan och stärka kolinlagring i jordbruksmark

skapa ny kunskap genom tvärsektoriella samarbeten

omsätta resultat till policyrekommendationer på nationell och europeisk nivå

Accel AgroBiogas är en plattform där forskning möter praktik, och där innovation i jordbruk och energi går hand i hand med hållbar regional utveckling.

Name: Partnership for Electric Pathways
Description:
Renewable fuels are fundamental to decarbonizing transportation, and electricity is becoming the fuel of the future. PEP represents a new partnership between the transportation, energy, and agricultural industries designed to expand America's renewable fuel supply. We aim to simultaneously accelerate the deployment of electric vehicles and reduce emissions from the electricity that powers them using existing, available resources and organic wastes. The gases emitted at existing solid waste, wastewater, agricultural, and other organics processing facilities, including methane, can be captured and used to produce renewable electricity for EVs. 

Our mission is to ensure the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency finalizes its “Electric Pathways” framework proposal as part of its Renewable Fuel Standard Program (RFS) as soon as possible, allowing for the generation of electric-RINs (eRINs) for renewable electricity that is used to power electric vehicles. The RFS Electric Pathways connect the four “Ws”: reducing emissions from waste gases, particularly methane (Waste); generating more renewable electricity (Watts); deploying more EVs (Wheels); and supporting hundreds of thousands of new, high paying construction and operations jobs in communities across the country (Workforce).

Name: ORCHYD
Description:
Deep geothermal reservoirs are being targeted for renewable energy supply worldwide. However, while international research efforts are stepping up to the challenge of overcoming the low efficiency of heat recovery from depth to the surface, the showstopper remains the slow drilling speed provided by the conventional rotary system in deep hard rocks (> 4 km). Deep drilling requires long drilling times, often resulting in unacceptably high initial investment. ORCHYD’s new drilling technology will increase hard rock drilling rates from the current range of 1-2 m/h up to 4-10 m/h. The novelty is to combine two, previously separate, mature technologies: High Pressure Water Jetting (HPWJ) and Percussive Drilling, in a system customised for hard rock geothermal reservoirs to depths of 6 km. Planned experiments and solid-fluid coupled models designed to reveal the critical fragmentation mechanisms under in-situ stress conditions will be used to design, build and validate, with pilot drilling tests, the new system for field operations. 
The hybrid development requires optimisation of: i) release of high stress concentrations on the hole bottom while drilling, ii) slotting circumferential relieving grooves on the hole bottom using HPWJ (up to 200 MPa), iii) in-hole production of the HPWJ using a down-hole pressure intensifier activated by the drilling vibrations, hence damping out harmful drilling system vibrations and iv) an advanced down-hole percussive rotating mud hammer for drilling to derive the maximum benefit from the modified bottom-hole stress regime. ORCHYD will decrease the drilling cost by 65% in hard rock sections. This will result in 30% reduction of the total cost of deep geothermal well construction. In addition, the new coupled Intensifier-HPWJ-Hammer system has the potential to drill and steer multi-lateral wells which greatly increase thermal connectivity, are cheaper, use far less water and are more controllable than conventional fracking stimulations.

Name: Athos Energy Solutions
Description:
Athos Energy Solutions (AES), a leading provider of turbine combustion tuning management and optimization solutions. With a dedicated focus on enhancing operational efficiency and sustainability, AES is well positioned to address the unique needs of your business with gas turbine tuning.

At AES, with a combined industry experience spanning over 60 years across multiple technologies, we understand the critical role that gas turbines play in your operations, and we are committed to maximizing their performance while minimizing operational costs and environmental impact. Our team of experienced engineers and technicians specializes in advanced turbine tuning techniques and low load turn down, utilizing cutting-edge technology and industry best practices to achieve optimal results.

Our approach to gas turbine tuning and performance testing encompasses a thorough assessment of your turbine systems, identifying areas for improvement and implementing tailored solutions to enhance performance and reliability. Whether it's low load turn down, optimizing combustion processes, fine-tuning control parameters, or implementing advanced monitoring and diagnostics, we leverage our expertise to deliver measurable improvements in efficiency, reliability, and emissions reduction.

By partnering with AES, you can expect:

·         Customized solutions tailored to your specific operational requirements.

·         Enhanced turbine performance, efficiency, and reliability.

·         Reductions in fuel consumption and operational costs.

·         Compliance with environmental regulations and emissions standards.

·         Comprehensive support throughout the project lifecycle, from initial assessment to ongoing maintenance and optimization.

We are confident that our proven track record of success and commitment to excellence make us the ideal partner for your gas turbine tuning needs.

Name: REUSE - Horizon Europe Project
Description:
Hi, we are REUSE!

The REUSE project, funded by Horizon Europe, is pioneering a breakthrough in CO₂ capture and reuse. Using an advanced Rotating Packed Bed (RPB) system, REUSE integrates Carbonic Anhydrase enzymes and innovative solvents to efficiently capture CO₂ from biogenic sources. The captured CO₂ is then transformed into valuable chemicals like carbon monoxide and formic acid through a CO₂ reduction process. 

Running from 2024 to 2027, REUSE tackles key challenges in CO₂ utilization, from optimizing fuel blends and stabilizing flue gas compositions to developing new catalysts and scaling up sustainable CO₂ recycling processes.

FOLLOW us on LinkedIn or SUBSCRIBE for our Newsletter: reuse-project.eu/

Name: D-HYDROFLEX project
Description:
HYDROFLEX develops a toolkit of digital tools for digitally ‘renovating’ the existing hydroelectric power plants by developing technologies based on sensors, digital twins, AI algorithms, hybridization modelling (power-to-hydrogen), cloud-edge computing and image processing. Focus is on 3 areas  optimized operation planning,  predictive maintenance and real-time monitoring, and  increased market participation, while ensuring the cyber resilience of the developed tools.

D-HYDROFLEX will validate the developed framework in operational hydro plants in 5 countries across Europe (i.e., Spain  , France , Poland , Romania , Greece ), facilitating common practice among plant operators and taking into consideration all involved hydro plant aspects (operation , maintenance, sustainability) empowering hydro plant operators to conclude on the optimal solutions portfolio according to the plant capabilities, local energy system needs and environmental specificities.

Name: GEOFLEXheat
Description: The GEOFLEXheat project aims to revolutionize the European geothermal energy sector by introducing an innovative suite of technologies to enhance the extraction, efficiency and application of geothermal heat across diverse industrial sectors. This initiative is driven by a consortium that synergizes leading research institutions, SMEs, and industry experts to tackle the challenges of scalability, integration, and social acceptance associated with geothermal systems. At the core of project lies the development of a Heat Pipe Heat Exchanger coupled with an advanced Scaling Reactor to improve heat recovery from geothermal brine while simultaneously providing valuable mineral byproducts. This is complemented by a novel High-Temperature Heat Pump that delivers cost-effective and high-temperature heat, crucial for a wide range of industrial processes and beyond. The project will also deliver a state-of-the-art Control Strategy and Digital Twin, optimizing system performance and enabling real-time management of geothermal plants. Through comprehensive simulation and modelling, the project will showcase the full potential of geothermal energy to provide stable, affordable, and sustainable heat supply. The ambitious goals include fostering Europe's global leadership in renewable technologies, ensuring reliable energy supply for industries and households, and accelerating the integration of Carbon Capture, Utilization, and Storage with geothermal systems. To ensure the project's outcomes have a lasting impact, GEOFLEXheat will execute robust commercialization strategy, including the establishment of a spin-off company, extensive environmental and economic assessments, and the creation of a Social Acceptance Guide to facilitate policy influence and community engagement. Embracing a future where geothermal energy is a cornerstone of Europe's renewable energy mix, GEOFLEXheat is poised to become a catalyst for energy sustainability, economic growth and environmental stewardship.

Name: CDIF-UPC
Description:
CDIF is a R&D center within the Polytechnic University of Catalonia (UPC) founded by Prof. Eduard Egusquiza.

Its research activities are developed by a group of Ph.Ds in industrial engineering, with over 30 years of experience in the field of turbomachinery vibrations, diagnosis and preventive maintenance, damage detection and fluid dynamics. Our goal is to provide technological support to industry worldwide in areas related to the field of power generation groups diagnosis, focusing on hydropower.

Our center offers technology transfer services to industry by means of consultancy and technological innovation projects in our areas of expertise: analysis and diagnosis of vibration problems in turbomachinery, remote on-line monitoring, predictive maintenance, fluid dynamics studies and on-site specialised training.

We are part of the UPC's Mechanical Engineering, Fluids and Aeronautics Ph.D. program. Our main research lines are: Structural Analysis, Diagnosis, Fluid Dynamics Simulation and Cavitation. We actively participate in leading scientifical societies/meetings/congresses in our area of expertise and our research results are published in top-tier scientific journals internationally.

Name: St. Kitts Electricity Company Ltd- SKELEC
Description:
The St. Kitts Electricity Company Limited (SKELEC), is a public utility that provides electric power generation, as well as transmission and distribution services to St. Kitts. SKELEC transitioned from a government department on August 1, 2011 acquiring the operations and assets of the St. Kitts Electricity Department (SKED).

SKELEC is the sole electricity provider in St. Kitts that seeks to supply reliable electricity at a competitive price in harmony with the local community and environment. The St. Kitts Electricity Company is owned by the Government of St. Kitts and Nevis and is ran by a board of directors.

SKELEC has an installed capacity of 48.9 MW with 15 diesel generators at its Needsmust Power Plant. Peak demand ranges from at 20-28 MW, with base load between 14.6-16.2 MW. SKELEC continues to improve its reliability by installing new generators to increase capacity or upgrading existing inventory.

St. Kitts and SKELEC is poised to be regional leader in renewable energy through the construction of the Caribbean’s Largest Solar Generation and Storage System which broke ground in December 2020. The landmark solar generation and storage project will provide between 30-35% of St. Kitts baseload energy needs for the next 20-25 years while reducing carbon dioxide emissions by more than 740,000 metric tons.

Name: SUSRUD
Description:
The SUSRUD (Sustainable Rural Development Supported by Biomass Energy) project aims to empower rural communities by promoting the use of biomass energy as a sustainable and cost-effective alternative to conventional energy sources. By integrating renewable energy education into vocational training, SUSRUD seeks to address rising energy costs, environmental concerns, and economic instability faced by farmers and rural populations across Europe.

The project focuses on utilizing agricultural residues as a source of biomass energy, reducing dependency on fossil fuels while creating new economic opportunities for farmers. By introducing practical and accessible training resources, SUSRUD ensures that rural communities gain the necessary knowledge, skills, and tools to adopt biomass energy solutions efficiently. A major objective of SUSRUD is to enhance vocational education and training (VET) programs by incorporating innovative and flexible learning materials tailored for farmers, VET educators, local policymakers, and rural communities. 

The project will develop a comprehensive practical guide, organize workshops and field visits, and create a digital media series (podcasts and videos) to provide hands-on knowledge and real-world applications of biomass energy.
Through collaboration with international partners from France, Bulgaria, Portugal, and Türkiye, SUSRUD facilitates knowledge exchange, capacity building, and policy engagement, ensuring that biomass energy becomes a viable, widely adopted solution in rural Europe.

By the end of the project, SUSRUD aims to train at least 200 farmers and 40 VET educators, produce 12 digital learning resources, and reach a minimum of 4,000 stakeholders, fostering a greener, more resilient, and economically sustainable future for rural communities.

 50+ projects executed across Argentina, Bolivia, Spain, Portugal, Ghana, Nigeria, Turkey and KSA.

Name: HPacC-WIND (FF4EUROHPC project)
Description:
Air Cooled Condensers (ACC) are prone to a substantial decay of efficiency and the onset of fan blade fluctuations in case of strong wind. Windscreens, designed with the support of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), are able to mitigate such detrimental effects. The experiment aims at implementing high-fidelity analysis to allow a more convincing definition of windscreen design guidelines, the development of a digital twin of the plant and the verification of the screening effectiveness in ancillary applications involving additional physics.

The experiment is implemented according to the following specific objectives:
Implement a high-fidelity CFD procedure based on the direct modelling of the fan blade and hybrid turbulence modelling for a reliable windscreen design.
Develop a digital twin of a real plant w/ and w/o windscreens, based on an extended database of CFD results.
Link the digital twin to a payback period calculator. Such a tool will provide a reliable estimate of the yearly savings thanks to the installation of the screens which can be exploited commercially as proof of the profitability of the investment.
Implement HPC methodologies for the analysis of non-conventional applications of windscreens into industrial plants.

Organisations involved:
End user: Galebreaker Ltd 
Technology Expert: Ergon Research s.r.l. 
HPC provider: CINECA

Name: Hippo Joint Industry Program Offshore Green Hydrogen Demo 1
Description:
TNO and Ventolines in 2023 launched a consortium of major energy companies in offshore wind and hydrogen for a Joint Industrial Program (JIP) for Dutch Demo 1 – Offshore Green Hydrogen (waterstof) Production. Today, Hippo (Hydrogen Industry Pilot Project Offshore) is an R&D JIP consortium for the major energy companies.

Demo 1 is a program to deliver learning objectives (TNO) for the sector through a 30 - 50 MW pilot to be installed in 2030. The program 100% funded by the Dutch government (380 Mio euro). An additional 150 Mio euro funding is provided for GasUnie and Tennet to deliver the infrastructure for DEMO1.

Hippo JIP DEMO1 Offshore Hydrogen R&D Program is working to deliver to the requirements of the government to start the workstreams of project in September 2025.

Contact: info@demo1.nl

Name: Rubabo Energy Ltd-REL
Description:
Rubabo Energy (U) Ltd is intending to construct a 4.0 MW hydropower project(of which 300KW shall be directed to boost the existing power plant which supports the Kisizi hospital through a containerized power house solution), which shall be referred to as the Rubabo Hydro Power Project. The Rubabo hydropower plant project, which is being proposed on the Kanyabaha River, would span across three villages. The villages of Ruhita, Kigarama, & Nyamitanga, sub
counties of Nyarushanje & Nyakishenyi, Rukungiri district. The project is located along river Kanyabaha in Western Uganda. Currently, Kisiizi hospital is supplied with energy from a micro hydro power plant which is located 10 km upstream of this project. However, as proposed Rubabo SHP develop downstream side of the Kisiizi micro hydro power plant, there is no negative impact to the existing power plant.
Generating electricity is the main purpose of this project, however it also seeks to provide positive outcomes for local communities through its community development initiatives.

Name: Green Petroleum
Description:
GREEN PETROLEUM SUSTAINABLE INDUSTRIAL MATERIALS

Marine biomass and sustainable industry
Seaweed can play a huge role in fighting climate change by absorbing carbon emissions, regenerating marine ecosystems, creating biofuel and renewable plastics as well as generating marine protein for human consumption.
We collaborate with regional government and are very much looking forward to success.

Sustainable industry, social and environmental benefits:
Seaweed can play a huge role in fighting climate change by absorbing carbon emissions, regenerating marine ecosystems, creating biofuel and renewable plastics as well as generating marine protein for human consumption.

We are collaborating with regional government institutions and are very much looking forward to successful projects that deliver significant social, economic, and environmental benefits.

Renewable Feedstock:
As Renewable Feedstock, seaweed and marine biomass offer a sustainable alternative to fossil fuels as a feedstock for petrochemical production. They can be grown rapidly and harvested without depleting natural resources.

Economic Opportunities: 
The development of a seaweed and marine biomass industry can create new economic opportunities, particularly in coastal areas. It can stimulate job growth and support sustainable local economies.

Opportunities for investment and Future Growth:
Overall, by harnessing the potential of seaweed and marine biomass, the petrochemical industry can move towards a more sustainable and environmentally friendly future.

Name: Delta Bioenergia
SOTE: Stowarzyszenie Odpowiedzialna Transformacja Energetyczna
Description:
SOTE (Stowarzyszenie Odpowiedzialna Transformacja Energetyczna) powstało w celu wspierania procesu transformacji energetycznej w Polsce. Naszym głównym celem jest promowanie zrównoważonego podejścia do modyfikacji istniejących sieci energetycznych, zarówno elektrycznych, jak i ciepłowniczych, aby działały one bardziej efektywnie. 

Transformacja energetyczna jest skomplikowanym procesem, który obejmuje wiele obszarów strategicznych dla funkcjonowania państwa i organizacji, takich jak obszar społeczny, gospodarczy, ekonomiczny, bezpieczeństwa i ochrony środowiska. Z tego powodu, sposób jej przeprowadzenia musi uwzględniać i równoważyć wszystkie dobra i wartości, na które oddziałuje.

Różnorodność klimatyczna poszczególnych krajów to kolejny ważny aspekt. Różne kraje mają odmienne potrzeby energetyczne, co wpływa na zapotrzebowanie na energię cieplną i możliwości wykorzystania odnawialnych źródeł energii (OZE). Transformacja musi brać pod uwagę te różnice, aby była skuteczna.

Name: Chhattisgarh State Power Distribution Company Limited
kemama GmbH CoKG
Description:
kemama hat ein vollkommen neues innovatives Stromversorgungssystem für Film- und Fernsehproduktionen entwickelt. Auf Basis eines reinen Elektrofahrzeugs ist ein Stromversorgungssystem entstanden, welches in einzigartiger Weise verschiedene Energieressourcen kombiniert und zur Stromversorgung aufbereitet.
Das zentrale Element ist die 110kWh große Batterie des Elektrofahrzeugs. Diese wird sowohl zum Fahren des Fahrzeugs, als auch zum Betrieb der Wechselrichter genutzt.
Die Wechselrichter haben eine Leistung von 60KW verteilt auf 3 Phasen a‘ 20KW (24kVA) und können Strom aus verschiedenen Quellen gleichzeitig nutzen. Über bidirektionale Ein-/Ausgänge kann jeder vorhandene externe Feststromanschluss in die Versorgung eingebunden werden. Damit können nun auch Feststromanschlüsse zur Stromversorgung genutzt werden, die unter bisherigen Umständen nicht gereicht hätten um z.B. größere Scheinwerfer zu versorgen. Auch Typ-2 Ladesäulen können in dieser Funkti- on genutzt werden.
Wofür steht das 30/60?
Der FH30/60 hat genügend Energie an Bord um einen 10-Stündigen Drehtag kontinuierlich mit 30KW zu versorgen. Kombiniert aus Batteriekapazität und C.A.R.E. Treibstoff sind das 300kWh (mit AC-Einspeisung natürlich entsprechend mehr). Die Spitzen-Dauerleistung ist 60KW.

Our custom formulated Power XP alkaline batteries were originated for use in high demand electronic door locks used for hotels and security applications, but other industries soon discovered that the Power XP lasted longer and cost less than national brands. Now these robust cells appear in secure doors, medical devices, industry, and hotel doors the world over.

Powerhouse Two clients have discovered new horizons of partnership working with PH2's creative team. When "off the shelf" solutions are not ideal, clients are pleasantly surprised to find a group well versed in developing custom products that meet the spec needs of the device. It opens design and performance doors that many thought were not available.

If it has to work, call on the professionals at Powerhouse Two. Your partners in power.

Description:
GOase Suncharging beschikt over binnenstedelijke snellaadpleinen waar u uw auto in no time heeft opgeladen. Kom je ook sunchargen?

𝗚𝗮 𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗼𝗼𝗿. 𝗠𝗲𝘁 𝗚𝗢𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝘀𝗻𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗽𝗹𝗲𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗻.

Het aantal elektrische voertuigen in Nederland stijgt enorm. 70%(!) heeft geen eigen laadstation. Heel veel eigenaren van elektrische auto’s zijn voor het laden dus aangewezen op plekken in de openbare ruimte. Snel laden is dan niet mogelijk.
 
Conclusie? Binnenstedelijk snel laden op aansprekende retail- en/of horecalocaties heeft de toekomst. Helemáál als deze snellaadstations zelfvoorzienend zijn.

Dus beste vastgoedbelegger, projectontwikkelaar of ondernemer: het moment is nu. Deze boot wil je niet missen. Doe daarom mee!

𝙎𝙪𝙣𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙜𝙚𝙣
GOase snellaadpleinen zijn zo goed als zelfvoorzienend. We wekken grote hoeveelheden elektriciteit op gebruikmakend van forse aantallen zonnepanelen. En slaan deze vervolgens ook met eigen batterijen op wanneer dat nodig is (innovatieve, zelf lerende batterij). Ideaal, want we voorkomen hiermee problemen door netcongestie.

GOase suncharget op grote schaal en levert daarmee 100% groene stroom. Ieder GOase snellaadplein biedt consumenten minimaal 8 snellaadplekken. 

𝙇𝙤𝙘𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙚𝙥𝙖𝙧𝙩𝙣𝙚𝙧 𝙬𝙤𝙧𝙙𝙚𝙣?
GOase snellaadpleinen zijn een duurzame en aantrekkelijke investering voor vastgoedbeleggers, projectontwikkelaars en (retail)ondernemers.

Getriggerd? Begrijp jij ook heel goed welke grote kansen er NU liggen? Zorg dat je bij de eerste 20 zit en profiteer van extra voordelen! Laten we dan snel en vrijblijvend om tafel gaan om de samenwerkingsmogelijkheden te bespreken.

En Electron Power, somos líderes en movilidad sostenible en Guatemala. Con la red de carga para vehículos eléctricos, estamos transformando la forma en que nos movemos, conectándonos con un futuro más limpio y respetuoso con el medio ambiente.

Ya sea para uso residencial, comercial o industrial, contamos con la experiencia y la tecnología necesarias para garantizar un rendimiento eficiente y confiable.

Nuestra experiencia nos convierte en los aliados ideales para empresas que buscan electrificar sus flotas, optimizar su logística y reducir su huella de carbono. Con más de 17 estaciones instaladas en puntos estratégicos, ofrecemos cobertura nacional y tranquilidad a nuestros usuarios.

Además, nuestras estaciones de carga no solo son funcionales, sino que también ofrecen una oportunidad única para las marcas que deseen conectar con audiencias de manera innovadora, utilizando nuestras pantallas digitales para fortalecer su comunicación y contar sus historias.

En Electron Power, no solo promovemos la movilidad eléctrica; somos los expertos que lideran el cambio hacia un futuro sostenible. Únete a nuestra misión y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a avanzar, mientras preservamos juntos nuestro planeta.

בר-דב הנדסה וניהול, חלק מקבוצת פז כלכלה והנדסה, הינה שחקנית מובילה
 בתחום ייעוץ וניהול פרויקטים בתחום האנרגיה, המתמחה בפתרונות אנרגיה מתחדשת, קוגנרציה, תחבורה חשמלית, תשתיות החשמל וייצור החשמל בישראל. עם למעלה מ-15 שנות ניסיון, צוות המומחים שלנו מציע שירותים מקיפים לאורך כל שלבי הפרויקטים, מבדיקת ההיתכנות והתכנון העקרוני ועד ניהול, פיקוח ובקרה על ההקמה. המומחיות שלנו כוללת תחנות כוח קונבנציונליות ומשולבות, תחנות קוגנרציה קטנות, תשתית רשת חשמל וטכנולוגיות אנרגיה מתחדשת כגון PV, תרמו-סולארי ורוח. כחלק מקבוצת פז, אנו מספקים פתרונות חדשניים וברי קיימא כדי לענות על הצרכים המתפתחים של תעשיית האנרגיה ולתרום לנוף האנרגיה העתידי של ישראל.

חברת בר דב הנדסה וניהול בע"מ נוסדה בשנת 2006 ע"י ד"ר אהרון בר-דב, לשעבר מנהל מחוז דן ומנהל אגף הביצוע בחברת החשמל, פעיל במשק החשמל והאנרגיה בישראל מעל ל40 שנה

This project not only reflects our commitment to sustainability but also positions Matriz Energy at the forefront of the global transition to renewable energies. With a special focus on developing solutions for hydrogen storage and production under high pressures, we are poised to lead the market with technologies that will define the energy future.

Furthermore, we have adopted a pioneering tokenization strategy that aims to democratize access to investment in clean and renewable energy. This innovative approach utilizes blockchain technology to offer tokens that represent a direct stake in our energy projects, providing investors with a transparent and efficient way of engaging with energy sustainability.

The expansion of our operations to Dubai marks a significant moment of growth and diversification. Benefiting from substantial tax incentives offered by developed countries, our presence in Dubai strengthens our global commitment and extends our impact into emerging sectors such as Sanitation, Smart Cities, Commodities, Oil and Gas, and Infrastructure.

At Matriz Energy, we combine strategic vision, advanced technology, and a firm commitment to sustainability to meet the challenges of tomorrow. We are determined to continue our mission of building a more resilient and prosperous future for all.

Name: Camp Associates, Inc.
Description:
Chris and BettyJo met while serving in the Marine Corps, they happened to be attending a mutual friends birthday party in Okinawa, Japan. After their time in the service, they relocated to Oklahoma where Chris began training as an apprentice lineman, while attending college in the evenings. Shortly after graduating, Chris began working for a major auxiliary equipment manufacturer for the gas turbine OEM’s, this equipment included air filtration houses, inlet systems and full exhaust systems as a Regional Aftermarket Sales Manager, covering the Southeast. 

Chris absolutely loves to hit the road and visit every power plant that he can. Together they enjoy helping customers with their needs, no need is too big, and it is never too small. The feeling Chris gets when walking back to his vehicle after a visit with one of their customers, is still as great of a feeling today as it was when they started in 2016. While Florida is home for Chris and Jo, they can be found from traveling to power plants all over the Southeast, keeping up with the great relationships while working as a regional aftermarket sales manager. 

The message that Chris and Jo would like everyone to know about them and Camp Associates, is that they are just two regular folks working hard to navigate the daily struggles of life and understand that their customers are doing the same thing, anything that they can do to help in that, both professional and personal, that is what they love to do, no thrills or gimmicks, just old fashioned helping one another because it is the right thing to do. 


Camp Associates partners are great organizations with many years of experience in Power Generation. These organizations have the same values as Camp Associates, and all are organizations where Chris can pick up the phone and talk to the correct person of each one to ensure their customer needs are meet; this is something that Camp Associates is proud of and will not compromise on.

Name: Hydro Power Pods Ltd
Description:
Many waterways remain significantly underutilised for the generation of clean, renewable energy. Against a backdrop of escalating energy prices and the disproportionately high energy bills faced by remote UK regions, there exists an untapped potential beyond the current 1.7% contribution from existing large hydrostatic-head schemes.

In response, HydroPowerPods is pioneering an innovative solution designed to fully harness the power of waterways with low hydrostatic heads (under 2.5 m) for electricity generation. The company’s groundbreaking technology is poised to elevate the efficiency of low-head hydroelectric generation by an impressive 140% (2.4 times), vastly expanding the range of viable sites for low-head hydroelectric power.

Importantly, this development is engineered to harmonize with the natural environment, ensuring the preservation of factors like fish migration, while simultaneously enhancing waterway ecology through increased water aeration.

HydroPowerPods envisions its solution as a means to decentralize electricity production, playing a pivotal role in lifting the poorest and most remote households out of energy poverty.

By ensuring access to a low-cost and reliable power supply, the company aims to contribute to sustainable and equitable development.
