Bis dahin hatten Hersel und Pilz bereits mehr als 24 Jahre Berufserfahrung im Bau von Wasserturbinen bei zwei Turbinenherstellern sowie als Planer und Berater bei einem großen internationalen Consultingunternehmen. 1997 wechselte Peter Marx nach einer 7-jährigen Berufstätigkeit bei einem führenden Energieversorgungsunternehmen aus dem Bereich Wasserkraftanlagen an Mosel und Saar und einem darauffolgenden Studium als Diplom-Ingenieur zu HSI und wurde ab 1999 geschäftsführender Gesellschafter.

Die Betriebsräume befinden sich im Trierer Hafen. Seit 2015 fügt sich das Unternehmen in die international tätige CETERUM-Holding GmbH ein.

Das Know-How der Firmeninhaber sowie die hohe Innovationsbereitschaft und ständige Weiterbildung der Mitarbeiter prägen das Unternehmen HSI und bilden damit die Basis für eine vertrauensvolle und professionelle Umsetzung Ihrer Projekte.
Zu den Kunden gehören Energieversorger, Kommunen oder private Wasserkraftbetreiber. Das Unternehmen ist weltweit tätig.

Name: Before Energy
Description:

Temsilcisi olmaktan gurur duyduğumuz Alimar Jeneratör  markası ile 1. yılına giren Before Enerji, başlangıç noktası olan Marmara Bölgesi dışında, ürün ve mühendislik çözümlerini Ülke dışında farklı kıtalara da taşımayı başarmıştır.
Alimar Jeneratör’ün üretimini yaptığı 3 ila 3000 kVA güç aralığında benzinli ve dizel jeneratör grupları, kaynak jeneratörleri, mobil aydınlatma setleri ile müşteri beklentileri en üst düzeyde karşılanmakta olup, uzman mühendislerinden oluşan AR-GE departmanı ile de son teknolojik gelişmeleri ürünlerinde uygulamakta, satışını ve servis organizasyonu gerçekleştirmektedir.
Kaliteli, hızlı ve verimli üretim ilkesini benimsemiş olan ALİMAR JENERATÖR sürdürülebilir büyüme stratejileri doğrultusunda müşterilerine en iyi çözümleri üretebilmek ve müşterilerinin ülke ekonomisine katkılarının artarak devam edebilmesi için çalışmalarını aralıksız sürdürmektedir.

Bunların yanı sıra; Enerji alanında, temsilciliklerini üstlendiği GES kurulumu ve UPS alanında hizmet vermeye en iyi şekilde devam etmektedir.

Kendi bünyesinde gerçekleştirdiği mühendislik, dizayn, tedarik, kurulum ve satış sonrası hizmetler ile Before; müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına bugün olduğu gibi yarın da aynı ciddiyet ve azimle hizmet vermeye devam edecektir.

Name: Ibom Power
Description:
Ibom Power Company Limited (IPC) is one of the first independent power plants in Nigeria. It was incorporated in 2001 as a private limited liability company under the Companies and Allied Matters Act (CAMA).

In May 2008, the company received a 191MW license from the Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission (NERC) to generate electricity. In November 2015, NERC amended the license to increase Ibom power’s generating capacity from 191Megawatts to 685Megawatts to accommodate both the 191megawatts Phase 1 and the proposed 500megawatts Phase 2. 

Ibom power receives gas from Accugas, a subsidiary of Savanah Energy, based on a 10-year Gas Sales and Purchase Agreement (GSPA) through a Gas Processing Facility (GPF) at Uquo in EsitEket LGA and a Gas Receiving Facility (GRF) in Ikot Abasi.

The plant output is evacuated to the national grid through a 49km 132kV transmission line from Ikot Abasi to Eket, 132/33kV substation. The Nigerian Bulk Electricity Trading Company Plc. (NBET) is the off-taker of the electricity produced by Ibom power plant.

From inception, Ibom Power Company Limited has had three different Managing Directors. The pioneer MD, Mr. Gareth Wilcox, a Briton, led the company’s management from 2001 to May 2014. He was replaced by Dr. Victor Udo who led the company from June 2014 to 31st July 2016. Dr. Udo was replaced by the current MD, Engr. Meyen Etukudo who has led the company from the 1st of August 2016 to date.

The highest decision making body at Ibom Power Company Limited is the Board of Directors. Engr. Etido Inyang is the Chairman of the Board of Directors while the Directors are Barr. Uwem Ekanem, Hon. Ayang Ayang, Hon. Emmanuel Ebe and Engr. Meyen Etukudo as the Managing Director/Chief Executive Officer.

Operiamo sia come IPP ("Independent Power Producer"), che come EPC+F ("Engineering Procurement Constructor + Financer") con associati contratti di LTO&M ("Long Term Operation & Maintenance"), per qualsiasi tipologia di impianto idroelettrico e range di potenza.

Operiamo anche come TSO, in qualità di titolare di porzioni di rete in alta tensione sia pubblica che privata, progettando, realizzando e successivamente gestendo linee e stazioni elettriche in alta e altissima tensione, sia per impianti e infrastrutture nuove da collegare alle Reti di Trasmissione Nazionale che per il potenziamento, rifacimento e riammodernamento di linee e stazioni esistenti.

L'energia elettrica è il principale strumento che ci permette di sostenere il nostro attuale modo di vivere, e quindi occorre migliorarne l’efficienza e l’efficacia per un sobrio utilizzo sottraendola alle logiche speculative, diminuendo le perdite di trasmissione e agevolando il progressivo abbandono dalle fonti fossili. Parimenti deve essere portata anche nei luoghi ove oggi non è presente, per agevolare lo sviluppo sostenibile a supporto della salute e della quotidianità della vita delle persone a cui oggi non possono avere accesso.

Per questo, quella di Brulli è "l’Energia, Giusta".

Name: The PJM Power Providers (P3) Group
Description:
P3 is a non-profit organization that supports the development of properly designed and well-functioning markets in the PJM region. P3 members own more than 67,000 megawatts of generation assets and produce enough power to supply more than 50 million homes in the PJM region covering 13 states and the D.C. Collectively, P3 members have invested tens of billions of dollars into facilities in the PJM market place without any regulatory guarantee of a return of or on that investment. Combined, P3 members own and operate virtually all forms of electricity generation, provide demand response services in certain markets and serve end use consumers through retail affiliates.
P3 members believe that properly designed and well-functioning competitive wholesale electricity markets are the most effective means of: 
ensuring a reliable supply of power to the PJM region,
facilitating the investment of at-risk capital in both new and existing technologies in order to deliver competitively priced power to consumers; and
complimenting state and federal environmental objectives.

The P3 Group promotes policies at the federal and state level to allow the PJM region to fulfill the promise of these competitive markets. P3 supports:
Transparent price signals to and from consumers so that they may be the ultimate drivers of the competitive market,
Effective and independent market monitoring coupled with well-defined rules to identify and prevent market power abuse or gaming and to promote confidence among state regulators and market participants,
Policies that support effective pricing mechanisms which would allow generation, transmission and demand response to compete on equal footing,
Capacity markets as a tool to encourage long term capital investments in existing as well as new generation resources,
For more: https://www.p3powergroup.com/sitecontent.cfm?page=about

To prove out our innovation, we developed the world's first commercially available 5-phase drive system, providing vehicles and systems with unparalleled power, torque, reliability, and scalability.

Name: AZURA Ocean Technology
Description:
Ocean energy is a powerful force of nature!  

Waves form as wind blows across the surface of water. As they rise and fall, waves move Azura’s specially designed devices that capture the motion and drive mechanical energy or hydraulics to produce electricity—just like wind turns a turbine.  It’s perpetual, renewable, and reliable—day and night—making it one of the most exciting frontiers in clean energy today.  

Azura wave devices can deliver low carbon electricity and/or fresh water at sea for a wide range of Blue Economy businesses and communities.   

It’s an exciting time for Azura, with a range of key projects underway—follow us to track our progress. 

Or, go to our website—www.azurawave.com—for more information.

Name: Execon - Engineering, Procurement & Construction
Description:
Execon è una società con sede legale a Milano e sede operativa a Forlì, che nasce con l’obiettivo di progettare e realizzare impianti per la produzione di energia, da fonti rinnovabili e tradizionali, operando come EPC Contractor di riferimento nel mercato italiano.

Parte del Gruppo Nexta Capital Partners, Execon rappresenta la competenza tecnica e operativa del gruppo, a supporto della transizione energetica di industrie, utility e fondi di investimento. La nostra missione è fornire soluzioni energetiche sostenibili, efficienti e durature, contribuendo attivamente alla decarbonizzazione e all’evoluzione del sistema energetico nazionale.

All’interno di un contesto in costante trasformazione, Execon adotta un approccio dinamico e personalizzato, capace di rispondere con efficacia ai rapidi cambiamenti dei mercati e ai trend finanziari globali. L’esperienza e la professionalità del nostro team garantiscono qualità e controllo in ogni fase del processo — dalla progettazione alla realizzazione e gestione degli asset energetici.

Grazie a un ampio portafoglio di impianti per la produzione di energia elettrica e termica, offriamo ai nostri clienti la massima flessibilità nella scelta e nell’integrazione delle soluzioni tecniche, individuando sempre l’opzione più adatta alle specifiche esigenze energetiche del committente.

Con competenza, collaborazione e visione, Execon si pone come partner tecnico di fiducia per chi vuole investire in un futuro energetico sostenibile, efficiente e affidabile nel tempo.

Description:
Elements Suomi Oy on uusiutuvan energian tuottaja, joka kehittää aurinko- ja tuulivoimahankkeita sekä energianvarastointiratkaisuja yhdessä kumppaneidensa kanssa. Olemme toimineet Suomessa vuodesta 2022 ja tavoitteenamme on kasvattaa hankeportfoliomme tuhanteen megawattiin vuoteen 2030 mennessä. Emoyhtiömme Elements S.A.S perustettiin Ranskassa vuonna 2015 ja sillä on jo yli tuhannen megawatin portfolio sekä laaja kokemus uusiutuvan energian projektien toteuttamisesta aina suunnittelusta rakentamiseen ja voimalaitosten hallintaan.

Työskentelyämme ohjaavat arvomme: yhteistyö, luovuus ja sitoutuneisuus. Uskomme, että parhaat ratkaisut syntyvät kuuntelemalla paikallisia näkökulmia sekä rakentamalla hankkeita, jotka tukevat sekä alueellista hyvinvointia että Suomen siirtymää kohti kestävää energiajärjestelmää.

***

Elements Suomi Oy is a renewable energy producer developing solar and wind power projects as well as energy storage solutions in collaboration with our partners. We have been operating in Finland since 2022 with the goal of growing our project portfolio to one thousand megawatts by 2030. Our parent company, Elements S.A.S, was founded in France in 2015 and already has a portfolio of over one thousand megawatts, with extensive experience across all stages of project development from planning and construction to plant management.

We are guided by collaboration, creativity, and commitment. We believe the best solutions are achieved by listening to local perspectives and building projects that support both regional well-being and Finland’s transition to a sustainable energy system.

Name: Flying Hire Limited
Description:
We guarantee you are in safe hands.

Forget what you have been told about generators being dirty, smelly, and not very good for the environment. Any machine with a Flying Hire stamp on it is regularly serviced (every time it is hired in-fact). This means that each generator is cleaned and in the best shape it can be.

We specialise in generator synchronisation which is great for several reasons. Firstly, you have the confidence that, should there be an electrical fault which is serious enough to trip the machine, the back-up generator will spring in to action. Secondly, a synchronised machine gives you the extra headroom. Finally – and we think this is great for the environment – you can pair a larger generator with a smaller machine so when you only need minimal power you can shut down the larger one, leaving the smaller generator running with minimum fuel consumption!

Whether you need us to provide a full service, or dry hire, tower lights or temporary power, we guarantee you are in safe hands.

Name: Fluid Renewables
Description:
Fluid Renewables was established to develop and drive environmentally friendly renewable energy sources. Our innovative products include supportive probiotic additives that increase organic waste to energy conversion within anaerobic digestion to optimise biogas production. We support our partners worldwide in advancing green energy projects to drive towards a carbon-neutral future.

Our flagship product, BIOGAS Catalyst is a powder additive designed to stimulate, bolster and improve the efficiency of the anaerobic digestion process by using both a unique mineral carrier and microbial bioaugmentation. BIOGAS Catalyst is specifically designed for your anaerobic digester and works by both breaking down biomass faster and releasing more stored energy from the feedstock. This means more gas harvested at a quicker rate from the same quantity of biomass, resulting in less costly waste to landfill. Simply put, BIOGAS Catalyst reduces sludge waste volume, increases Biogas yield and in turn, improves AD site profitability.

Name: HyperGen - Multi Fuel Micro Turbine Gensets
Description:
HyperGen has been founded around a simple question with a complex answer, "What product can be developed that people would want to buy for it's own sake, but which has a dramatically reduced environmental impact?"

We're half way through a 60 year period in which greenhouse gas emissions needed to be reduced to zero, but all that's happened is that they've increased and now, the talk is more around reducing the effects of climate change, rather than stopping it entirely. So far, top down emissions reduction has seen much more talk than walk, and bottom up action is asking people (who may not understand, care, or wish to accept the facts) to not have the things they had before, that they've grown up with and gotten used to, cars, international flights, meat, etc. 

The most successful model is the death of coal from renewable technologies, in which people have simply begun moving their investments because renewables are not only better for the environment, they're better products. Thus, we are developing replacement powertrain technologies based loosely on the Microturbine platform with a view to delivering a product that:
- Is at least the same as, if not a better experience for the user than existing powertrains
- Is readily scalable
- Requires as little infrastructure development as possible
- Must be cost competitive (in outright purchase and/or running costs)
- Must have greater efficiency than existing comparable fossil fuel engines and preferably a near comparable performance to fuel cells
- To as great an extent as possible be made from readily available, and easily workable designs and materials, such that it does not suffer from the issues currently being faced by battery electric and potentially an issue for large scale deployment of fuel cells.
- It must retain as much as possible the existing selling points of microturbines including simplicity, lifespan, power to weight ratio,  ease of maintenance, etc.

Name: REINFORCE Project
Description:
In the search for sustainable mobility and energy system transition solutions, batteries emerge as a fundamental technology for the advancement of electric cars, renewable energy storage, and the reduction of carbon emissions.

REINFORCE aims at creating a circular value chain for batteries, which promises to transform the life cycle of these products.

Used, defective, and unstable batteries pose new challenges along the supply chain and require new industrial processes, automated equipment, and tracking systems, as well as new strategies to prepare them for a second or third life, or even for the recycling of their components and materials.

Name: MOD Energy Solutions
Description:
MOD Energy Solutions provides interim power and mobile energy solutions for organizations operating under grid constraints, delayed interconnections and electrification timelines.

We support utilities, municipalities, ports, transportation systems, fleet operators and infrastructure stakeholders that need power continuity when permanent infrastructure is not ready or cannot be interrupted.

MOD Energy Solutions deploys mobile, off-grid energy assets to maintain uptime during maintenance events, restoration efforts, peak demand periods, electrified fleet operations and capacity-constrained projects. Our solutions are designed to integrate into complex operating environments without disrupting safety, service or public accountability.

What differentiates MOD Energy Solutions is operational alignment. We work alongside our clients to understand constraints, procurement realities and performance requirements before deploying solutions. That approach reduces risk, accelerates deployment and ensures systems perform under pressure.

MOD Energy Solutions exists to bridge the gap between planning and performance, supporting modernization and electrification without forcing organizations to wait on multi-year infrastructure upgrades.

Nuestro foco está en la actualización de parámetros mecánicos y eléctricos, con el objetivo de mantener o incluso mejorar la potencia de generación instalada.

Además, proponemos esquemas de leasing financiero que garantizan el suministro del equipamiento necesario. Esta solución incluye un período de gracia equivalente al tiempo requerido desde la instalación del equipo hasta su puesta en marcha, permitiendo que el nuevo equipo se autofinancie con su propia producción energética.

Somos energía en movimiento.

Name: Southeastern Power Administration SEPA
Description:
Southeastern Power Administration, also known as SEPA, is a Power Marketing Administration (PMA) established in 1950 by the Secretary of Interior to fulfill the functions assigned to the Secretary by the Flood Control Act of 1944. In 1977, the Department of Energy (DOE) was created, transferring SEPA and other agencies to its department. SEPA is headquartered in Elberton, GA, in the southeastern region of the United States. SEPA has the authority to market hydroelectric power and energy in Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Kentucky, Mississippi, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, Virginia, and West Virginia. The hydroelectric power marketed comes from reservoir projects operated by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (Corps). 

SEPA markets the power and energy generated by the Federal reservoir projects at the lowest possible cost to its consumers. SEPA encourages the widespread use of the power marketed as preference in the sale of power is given to public bodies and cooperatives, referred to as preference customers. Unlike other PMAs, SEPA does not own transmission lines. Therefore, SEPA contracts with other utilities to provide transmission services for the delivery of Federal Power.

SEPA has many responsibilities as a PMA, including negotiating, preparing, executing, and administering contracts for the sale of electric power. SEPA prepares wholesale rates and repayment studies for Corps’ reservoir projects, supporting deliveries made to serve contractual loads. SEPA schedules hydropower generation at the Corps’ facilities located within SEPA’s marketing area.

Name: Cavern Energy Storage
Description:
Focused on developing the long duration grid energy storage needed for the Texas, Louisiana, and Mississippi region. 

Underground Pumped Storage Hydroelectric uses the reliable pumped storage hydroelectric technology and combines that with proven salt dome caverns to create an 80% efficient energy storage for the region. Salt domes are found throughout eastern Texas, Louisiana, and southern Mississippi and provide an opportunity of energy storage. 

Department of Energy estimates that the region needs 75,000 MW capacity of energy storage to support increased renewables and to help the electrical grid operate more efficiently. 

Commercial units will store up to 3,750 megawatt-hours on a 90 acre underground salt dome location with most of the surface land available for farming, grazing, solar farms or wind turbines.

We are presently looking for investors to support the building of demonstration units.

Name: Attock Gen Limited (AGL)
Description:
Attock Gen Limited (AGL) is the first power sector venture of the Attock Group of Companies and is the first Independent Power Producer (IPP) commissioned under Government of Pakistan’s Policy for Power Generation Projects of 2002. Prime Minister of Islamic Republic of Pakistan inaugurated Attock Gen Limited’s power plant in an impressive ceremony at Morgah, Rawalpindi on April 07, 2009.

AGL plant, with a gross capacity of 165 MW, has been designed to achieve maximum efficiency. The Plant configuration consists of 9 reciprocating 16.5 MW furnace oil fired engine generator sets and 9 heat recovery steam generators (HRSG) to provide steam for one 11.6 MW condensing steam turbine. The concept of 9 engines plus one steam turbine in a combined cycle mode, improves the reliability as well as the efficiency. The project is sponsored by The Attock Oil Company and Attock Refinery Limited.

The unique feature of AGL’s power plant is its fuel which is environment friendly RFO which is extracted from the indigenous crude oil processed at the Attock Refinery in Rawalpindi.

Electricity is the engine for growth for our economy. Commissioning of AGL has not only provided a means for growth to our economy but has also set the benchmark of excellence for others to follow.

Name: CME AFRICA
Description:
CME est une filiale 100% du groupe VINCI CONCESSIONS depuis 2022, son activité principale est le développement, construction et exploitation de parcs éoliens, solaires, biomasses et hydrauliques au Maroc et dans le reste des pays de l’Afrique.
VINCI Concessions est un leader mondial des concessions des infrastructures et des services de transport. Grâce à son modèle intégré, VINCI Concessions conçoit, finance, construit, opère et maintient plus de 80 aéroports, autoroutes et projets ferroviaires dans 23 pays répartis entre 4 continents. Ses 20.000 collaborateurs sont engagés pour une croissance partagée avec les territoires, et agissent pour rendre la mobilité toujours plus durable, efficiente et innovante.

Avec l’acquisition de 100% de ses activités par VINCI Concessions, CME en Afrique aura la possibilité de concrétiser son portfolio actuel de projets éoliens, solaires et hydrauliques au Maroc et au Sénégal, d’une puissance totale de 1,5 GW. 
L‘expertise du groupe dans le développement, le financement, la construction et la gestion de projets d’infrastructure de grande envergure ainsi que ses moyens financiers, permettront en outre à CME Groupe de développer d’autres projets plus ambitieux et diversifiés dans d’autres pays d’Afrique, notamment en matière de production d’hydrogène vert. Cette étape importante franchie aujourd’hui permet ainsi à CME d’avancer dans son ambition d’être un acteur majeur de la transition énergétique en Afrique.

Durch die kombinierte Produktion von Wärme und Strom am Ort des Bedarfs erreichen unsere Energieanlagen Wirkungsgrade von mehr als 90% und ermöglichen damit sowohl eine effiziente, eine kostengünstige, als auch eine umweltschonende Energieproduktion.
 
Diese WKK-Anlagen können mit Erdgas und / oder erneuerbaren Energien wie Biogas, Klärgas, Holzgas, Deponiegas oder anderen brennbaren Sondergasen betrieben werden.

Die IWK vertreibt als Generalvertretung die Produkte des Weltmarktführers GE Jenbacher und hochwertige BHKW-Module mit Motoren von MAN, MWM und Liebherr. 

Die IWK plant und baut qualitativ und wirtschaftlich hochstehende WKK-Anlagen. Wir liefern dazu Blockheizkraftwerke (BHKW) bis zu einer elektrischen Leistung von 4 MW pro Aggregat. Das BHKW, als Modul oder als komplette Containeranlage, wird im Stammwerk entwickelt, gebaut und intensiv getestet. 
 
Sie können auch BHKW-Anlagen von uns mieten.

Die IWK ist Ihr Partner für die Planung, Lieferung, Vermietung, Inbetriebnahme, Instandhaltung und Entsorgung von BHKW-Anlagen - regional, national und auch international

Name: Renewability
Description:

EPQ, partner tecnico dell’iniziativa, svolge tutte le attività richieste: dallo sviluppo di nuovi impianti rinnovabili fino alla gestione della somministrazione dell’energia ai membri. Da consumatori, i membri diventano così “Prosumer”, proprietari attraverso Renewability di impianti rinnovabili, e ricevono l’energia prodotta dalla loro quota di impianti pagando solo i costi operativi, senza alcun legame con i prezzi di mercato dell’energia.

Un modello complementare ad altre forme di approvvigionamento di energia rinnovabile (es. PPA) e a eventuali investimenti diretti in rinnovabili da parte dei membri (es. impianto fotovoltaico a tetto).

Name: Marine Turbine Technologies, LLC
Description:
Marine Turbine Technologies, LLC designs and manufactures industrial equipment powered by gas turbine engines. The resulting equipment produces much higher horsepower in compact packages with lower emissions and maintenance. Primary product lines include gas turbine generators, pressure pumping equipment, fire-fighting (FiFi) pumping packages for offshore vessels and platforms, flood control pumping packages, Super Airboats, and the world's fastest production motorcycles. MTT has deep experience in the global oil and gas industry, serving customers in the U.S.A., Mexico, China, Azerbaijan, the Middle East, and elsewhere. 

MTT also produces custom equipment packages to support customer requirements, such as multi-fuel capabilities, mobility, reduced footprint, environmental benefits/low emissions, and high horsepower requirements. 

Our 100,000 sq. ft. facility houses MTT’s corporate offices, manufacturing, testing, and commissioning areas. The shop floor consists of turbine engine refurbishing, dynometer testing, package fabrication, machining, welding, production, carbon fiber molding, painting, finishing, electrical, electronics, digital controls, CAD engineering and testing for onshore and offshore use. MTT upholds quality control by handling all aspects of production, maintenance and field services.

Contact MTT for more information or a quote. Our website is http://www.marineturbine.com, telephone is 001-337-924-0298, or email directly to info@marineturbine.com.

Met inmiddels vijf jaar ervaring in de zakelijke markt ondersteunen wij aannemers, bouwbedrijven en corporaties bij zowel bestaande bouw, nieuwbouw als renovatieprojecten. Onze kracht ligt in het volledig ontzorgen van onze opdrachtgevers – van ontwerp en engineering tot uitvoering, nazorg en 24/7 service.

Als full-service partner voor woningcorporaties bieden wij niet alleen technische expertise, maar ook betrokkenheid bij bewonerscommunicatie, planning en procesoptimalisatie. Wij denken actief mee, leren van elk project en vertalen die kennis naar continue verbeteringen, waarbij de bewoner, de vakman en de klant altijd centraal staan.

Met ons eigen materieel, ervaren monteurs en korte communicatielijnen voeren wij projecten zelfstandig, efficiënt en tegen concurrerende tarieven uit – zonder concessies te doen aan kwaliteit of veiligheid.

Expro Enerji, küresel pazarda etkin rol oynayan ve sektörün önde gelen firmaları arasına girebilmeyi hedeflemiş olup bu hedef doğrultusunda müşteri ve partnerleri ile dürüstlük ve ticari ahlak çerçeveleri içerisinde sektöründe emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir.

Dünya birçok noktada  temsilcileri bulunan firmamızın ithalat, ihracat faaliyetlerini yürüttüğü yurt dışında 2 farklı noktada ofisleri mevcuttur. Çin Halk Cumhuriyeti , Güney Kore'de bulunan bu ofislerimizde elektrik  sektöründe hizmetlerimizi sunmaya devam etmekteyiz.

Yılların getirdiği deneyim ve bilgi birikimi ile her zaman rakiplerinden bir adım önde olmayı hedefleyen Expro Enerji çağdaş ve dinamik yapısıyla sektörün önde gelen firmalarının arasında yer almaktadır.

Name: Varanger Kraft
Description:
Vi er stolt av å kunne utvikle vår virksomhet basert på folk, ressurser og verdier som finnes her. 

Varanger Kraft er et energiselskap med røtter i Øst-Finnmark. Siden etableringen i 1938 har vi vært en leverandør av elektrisk kraft til hjem og bedrifter. Vi har hovedkontor i Vadsø, og er eid av kommunene i Øst-Finnmark. Vi jobber hver dag for å bidra til vekst og bærekraftig utvikling.

Varanger Kraft driver med produksjon, distribusjon og salg av elektrisk kraft, i tillegg leverer vi fiber og TV fra Altibox. Vi driver ett vindkraftverk og fire vannkraftverk, som er sentrale i vår satsing på fornybar energi. 

Som en viktig aktør i det lokale næringslivet, er vårt mål å bidra til positiv næringsutvikling og en grønnere fremtid. Vi tilbyr smarte løsninger som hjelper våre kunder med å få bedre kontroll over sitt energiforbruk og kostnader gjennom digitale tjenester.

Vi bryr oss om mer enn bare energi. Vi er engasjert i lokalsamfunnet, gjennom sponsing og samarbeidsprosjekter støtter vi kultur og idrett i kommunene i Øst-Finnmark.

Description:
Established in 2017, our primary objective is to deliver exceptional services in the realm of Power Plant process controls commissioning. A key distinction between SORT and typical staffing agencies lies in our technical focus and the fact that we either personally know, or have direct references for, the individuals we collaborate with.

We provide our services to EPC and OEM companies, acting as a bridge between them providing efficient controls engineering, commissioning and simplified operation. This dedication is represented by the letters of our logo, which are seamlessly connected, just like our commitment to delivering the best solutions to connect our EPC & OEM customers' objectives together and maximize their goals. 

We believe that by delivering best services, we can contribute to improve efficiency, reduce costs and minimize environmental impact, creating a better future for all. 

Our team is made up of experts who are passionate about this cause, and we work tirelessly to ensure that our clients receive the best possible service. 
Whether it's providing innovative solutions or sharing our knowledge to help them make informed decisions, we are always there to support our clients. 

Join the SORT Energy team and be part of a company that is committed to improving energy efficiency and making a positive impact on the world.

Name: GeoScientists Day - Geothermal Forum & Geologists Breakout Session
Description:
Following the tremendous success of the inaugural meetings in 2025, these two events will combine the similarities and the differences of their sciences. It will be a full day, open to ideas, experience and new recruits to the subjects, from explaining the origins to where we are now and where we go from here.

GEOTHERMAL FORUM: whether curious or informed, invested or developing, please join this event to learn, discuss and debate the future of geothermal energy.

GEOLOGISTS’ BREAKOUT: structured workshop sessions in collaboration with some of the regular consulting groups.
The events will facilitate connections between the mining, exploration and energy professionals to promote interdisciplinary collaboration, helping influence policy by providing a united front from all sectors.

The UKMC consistently attracts external investment and key members of government to the area, who are instrumental in driving the mining, exploration and geothermal sectors’ development.

Speaker sessions, networking lunch and 3 x refreshment breaks included.

Name: HDF Energy Deutschland
Description:
HDF Energy ist ein weltweit führender Akteur in der Wasserstoffbranche, Entwickler großer Wasserstoffinfrastrukturen und Hersteller von Multi-Megawatt-Brennstoffzellen. Der primäre Fokus liegt auf der Dekarbonisierung der Sektoren Energie, schwere Mobilität und Industrie durch innovative H2-Lösungen. 

Kontaktieren Sie uns in Deutschland unter germany@hdf-energy.com

Mit dem Vorzeige-Wasserstoffkraftwerk Renewstable liefert HDF Energy grünen, stabilen und grundlastfähigen Strom, indem intermittierende erneuerbare Energiequellen nahtlos mit einer umfangreichen Energiespeicherung vor Ort in Form von grünem Wasserstoff verbunden werden. Unterstützt von einem Team an Wasserstoffinfrastrukturexperten, die über ein Jahrzehnt praktischer technischer Erfahrung in der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette verfügen, hat sich HDF Energy bereits heute ein bedeutendes Portfolio von Projekten in fortgeschrittenen Entwicklungsstadien erschaffen.

Darüber hinaus zeichnet sich HDF Energy durch ein technologisches Know-how bei der Entwicklung von Multi-Megawatt-Brennstoffzellen aus. Im Jahr 2024 wird das Unternehmen im eigenen hochmodernen Werk in der Nähe von Bordeaux die Massenproduktion aufnehmen. Die leistungsstarken Brennstoffzellen von HDF Energy werden in Wasserstoffkraftwerken, Güterlokomotiven und Schiffen zum Einsatz kommen.

Neben dem Hauptsitz in Bordeaux, Frankreich, verfügt HDF Energy zudem über regionale Niederlassungen in Lateinamerika, der Karibik, Asien, Afrika und Ozeanien, mit mehr als 30 Nationalitäten unter den Mitarbeitern. 2023 wurde die deutsche Filiale gegründet, mit Niederlassung in der Hauptstadt Berlin. Seit 2021 ist das Unternehmen an der Pariser Börse Euronext notiert und gehört zum Segment der Euronext Tech Leaders.

Bienvenidos a nuestra empresa de suministro de energía para tu PYME y tu hogar! Somos un equipo apasionado que se enorgullece de ofrecer un servicio cercano y transparente para ayudar a impulsar el crecimiento de tu negocio.

Nuestro equipo está formado por expertos en el sector energético, dispuestos a responder a tus preguntas y brindarte el apoyo que necesitas en cualquier momento. Nos enorgullecemos de nuestro servicio al cliente de primera clase y siempre nos esforzamos por superar tus expectativas.

Name: Shasta-Sustainable Resource Management
Description:
The  Shasta facility is one of northern California’s largest wood-fired power plants. The facility provides dependable, environmentally safe disposal of wood waste and forest residue from Shasta County and surrounding areas, while generating clean electricity for sale to the local utility. Processing up to 1,250 tons per day, Shasta has the electric-generating capacity of 55 MW, the equivalent of supplying the electrical needs of thousands of California homes and businesses as well as its own operations.

Non-merchantable waste wood from Shasta-Trinity and Lassen National Forests, as well as from private lands, are selectively removed and processed in the facility to enhance remaining standing timber.

Shasta plays a key role in the State of California’s effort to safely manage forest residue in high hazard areas to reduce the risk of forest fires. Shasta also operates a Wood Waste Recycling Program year round, which is offered to members of the community at no charge.

É nesse ponto de convergência que decisões complexas precisam ser estruturadas com método, leitura fina de risco e visão de longo prazo.

Não somos comentaristas de mercado.
Não somos fabricantes de opinião genérica.
E definitivamente não somos vendedores de soluções prontas.

A Vector³ existe para organizar decisões.

Acreditamos que bons negócios em energia surgem quando:
a estratégia está clara,
o capital está bem direcionado,
os contratos são estruturados com rigor,
e a execução é tratada como parte da decisão — não como consequência.

Nossa atuação combina experiência prática em grandes ativos, profundidade técnica em energia e infraestrutura e disciplina analítica típica de boutiques globais de M&A e advisory.

Falamos quando temos algo a organizar.
Escrevemos quando há complexidade a ser esclarecida.
Participamos quando o custo da decisão errada é alto.

Nosso conteúdo reflete exatamente isso:
análises que ajudam a enxergar além do ruído,
reflexões que conectam mercado, estrutura e capital,
aprendizados extraídos da prática real — não de teoria.

A Vector³ Partners atua onde decisões importam.
Onde energia encontra capital.
Onde estratégia precisa virar execução.

Energia. Capital. Estratégia.

Ponadto oferujemy szeroką gamę zaawansowanych rozwiązań w zakresie zrównoważonego wytwarzania energii.

Jako niezależna firma rodzinna w piątym pokoleniu, od 150 lat stawiamy na niezawodne partnerstwo i ciągły rozwój. 

Nasza jednostka biznesowa Energy oferuje rozwiązania dla nowych elektrowni oraz szeroki zakres modernizacji, przemysłowe systemy odzyskiwania ciepła i urządzenia procesowe.

Nasza jednostka biznesowa Wood planuje i wdraża kompletne rozwiązania do produkcji płyt drewnopochodnych, takich jak płyty wiórowe, MDF, OSB i LVL.

Jednostka biznesowa Forming opracowuje procesy, prasy i w pełni zautomatyzowane linie produkcyjne do produkcji komponentów z tworzyw sztucznych wzmocnionych włóknami oraz rozwiązania systemowe do formowania metali.

Nasza jednostka biznesowa Recycling dostarcza instalacje do przetwarzania odpadów drzewnych oraz rozwiązania w zakresie przetwarzania odpadów na produkty.

Name: Power-to-X DAYS
Description:
Die Power-to-X-Days: 3 starke Partner laden ein zu 2 Tagen Vollstoff für die Energiezukunft der Schweiz: Entscheidungs- und Know-how-Träger aus Wissenschaft, Wirtschaft, Industrie, Politik und Zivilgesellschaft sind eingeladen, den aktiven Dialog zu suchen, um diese Technologien voranzutreiben, Expertisen und Netzwerke zusammenzubringen und Austausch von Wissen und Erfahrungen zu fördern.

Unter Power-to-X versteht man innovative Technologien, in den Bemühungen für neue Brenn- und Treibstoffe: Durch die Umwandlung von elektrischer Energie in chemische Energie (Power-to-X) kann Wasserstoff alle Sektoren der Energiewirtschaft miteinander koppeln. Die EU und unsere Nachbarländer arbeiten mit Hochdruck daran und gehen voran. 

Die Schweiz, als eine Nation die ökologische Verantwortung schätzt, droht bei diesen Technologien ins Hintertreffen zu geraten, obwohl wir die besten Voraussetzungen hätten, um in der Topliga bei Innovationen mitzuspielen und Power-to-X marktfähig zu machen. 

Wir müssen aufholen, um den Anschluss nicht zu verpassen. Deswegen haben Avenergy, Swissmem und SPIN gemeinsam die Power-to-X DAYS lanciert, um Power-to-X auf die Agenda zu bringen und diesen neuen Technologien Schub zu verleihen.

Name: Three and Three Consult Limited
Description:
Three and Three Consult Limited is primarily a Geoenergy and then a Geotourism firm that is registered and domiciled in Abuja, Nigeria. It is the first geothermal energy startup in West Africa founded in 2020. The firm's primary goal is to provide an alternative source of energy in baseload geothermal power, to bring to fruition the 2060 net-zero target of Africa's largest oil and gas producer.

Three and Three's general service portfolio include Geothermal R&D, Geoenergy advocacy via geo-themed tours and vacations, sustainable energy policy creation, etc. The firm has so far geophysically investigated Nigeria's flagship geothermal region (Ruwan-Zafi Hotspring region) and is currently investigating other potential areas to create a data bank for future Geothermal projects.

On realising possible reluctance of Nigeria as a whole towards a form of energy that spells doom to its main source of foreign exchange, and the gap between geotourism and the travel space in Nigeria; Three and Three Consult Limited decided to harness the touristic appeal of geothermal features to lobby customers - better dubbed as  investors/stakeholders - into the global fight against climate change. This is possible via organized geothermal-themed travel services in rare touristic destinations such as Iceland, New Zealand, Indonesia, etc; that in turn replaces the generic vacation trips of our elite clientele.

Three and Three ultimately looks to the future to become a major key player in the sustainable energy future of Nigeria by first taking advantage of geotourism as a cash-cow alongside external investments and funding.

We are currently looking to investment opportunities and partnerships, to grow and to meet our goals.

Name: Green Vigor Limited
Description:
There are many buildings all over the world. In a concrete city, buildings use substantial amounts of energy and about 21% of total greenhouse gas emissions worldwide.

Base on the above situation in urban area, it does not have suitable natural resources and large area for renewable energy harvesting but there are many buildings, what can we do? Utilize intelligent and innovations to saving and regenerate green energy, make the best use of building.

AI Water Quality, Data Science of water, Reducing Carbon, One system in a building.

After an accident, flooding in our office before, there much energy is neglected in the water supply system of building, and we also found that the water from our building is in brownness colour. Therefore, we innovate a Smart and Green Water management system called HydroPower- IntelliRecycle System (HPIRS) in building’s water tank. 

Once use water, we can recycle the energy, generate electricity and reduce carbon emission. It can help building to save energy. This is unprecedented innovation and application. There is no competitor in the market. Our innovation is suitable for all kind buildings in concrete city. In 2050, from UN, world bank and business insider forecast, there will be 6 billion buildings in the world, 60-70% are residential buildings, Asia will take 40-50% of total. China and India will have over 1 billion.

We create the following ESG impacts to our customers:
Quality education, 
Clean water and sanitation, 
Affordable and clean energy, 
Industrial, innovation and infrastructure, 
Take action to combat climate change, and 
Partnerships for the goals 

Our goal is to bring new elements to green buildings and energy recycling industry through efficient, sustainable and scalable business models.

Với đội ngũ nhân sự am hiểu thị trường, chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ cũng như luôn cam kết, đề cao tinh thần trách nhiệm trong các hoạt động cốt lõi nhằm mang lại sự hài lòng cho các nhà đầu tư & đối tác. Helio Energy luôn hướng tới phát triển bền vững và đi đầu trong lĩnh vực năng lượng tái tạo sạch. Since our inception in 2011, Vasavi Electro Systems Private Limited has been at the forefront of delivering high-quality electrical and instrumentation solutions. Name: WeHEAT Systems
Description:
WeHEAT-type systems
Wells for Heat Exchanger Advanced Technology

The WeHEAT technology developed by MS Energy Solutions Kft. is a deep heat producing system that can be implemented in deep wells. Its greatest advantage is that it generates geothermal energy WITHOUT extraction of underground water. It is a fully closed system. It allows direct heat use for users living in the vicinity of the well through the geothermal heat recovery.
 
This technology ensures the use of geothermal energy in a cost-effective way, by utilizing unused O&G and geothermal deep drills.
The outstanding geothermal potential of the Carpathian-Pannonian region are like a commonplace today. The petrothermal variants of geothermal energy production can be effective similarly to the production and use of thermal energy in this region. With the special well completion of deep drilling, the geothermal heat will become available in a clean way, and can be transferred to the surface facilities using the appropriate engineering applications.
This flexible technology may constitute a heat production system with a capacity of 300 and up to 900 kW, depending on the geological environment, and can be adapted especially effectively to surface heating systems.

Name: Powering Net Zero
Description:
The Powering Net Zero Consortium comprises Siemens Energy, Aker Solutions and Doosan Babcock. This partnership has been formed to provide Low Carbon Combined Cycle Gas Turbine Plant with Carbon and Storage.

To complement variable renewable generation, reliable, dispatchable and flexible abated CCGT power generation is vital to achieving a dependable zero carbon electricity network by 2035, ensuring demand is met during periods of low power generation from renewables. Flexibility and electricity security are increasingly important issues for power systems, particularly those that are integrating a growing share of variable renewable energy. CCUS-equipped power plants can provide this extra flexibility across broad timescales, ranging from the very short term (e.g. grid services, inertia, and frequency ancillary services) to the very long-term (e.g. seasonal variations).

Siemens Energy, is a leading energy technology company focused on driving decarbonization, offers an established UK track record in the delivery of CCGT power plants and strong operations and maintenance capabilities. 
www.siemens-energy.com/global/en/offerings/power-generation/gas-turbines.html  

Doosan Babcock is an engineering and construction company with a rich heritage in the construction, rehabilitation and retrofit of power plants, as well as experience in the refining, petrochemical and pharmaceutical industries. https://www.doosanbabcock.com/en/

Aker Solutions has worked on CO2 treatment solutions since the 1990s and has extensive experience of delivering end-to-end solutions for large complex projects across Europe. 
https://www.akersolutions.com/who-we-are/

The consortium is working in close collaboration with Aker Carbon Capture which provides high efficiency CO2 capture technology with low solvent degradation and low emissions.
https://akercarboncapture.com/

La planta, una idea de Grupo Riccillo diseñada por tecnólogos argentinos, fue construida y montada con mano de obra local a partir de mayo de 2019.

Misyonumuz

Akılcı, ergonomik ve güvenli çözümler için; uzman kadromuzla, güncel teknolojiyi de takip ederek, tüm projelerimize aynı hassasiyet ile yaklaşıp; iş ortaklarımıza sürekli katma değer sağlamaktır. Bir yandan çok maliyetli olan arızalı sistem onarımlarının, ülke içerisinde yapılarak çok daha düşük maliyetlerle yeniden çalışabilir duruma getirilmesini, diğer yandan artık geçerliliğini yitirmiş ya da ömrünü doldurmuş sistemlerin, modern teknolojiye uygun şekilde revize edilerek, doğa ile daha barışçıl çözümleri hedef kitlemiz ile buluşturmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Son yıllarda ülkemizde gelişen teknoloji ile birlikte, vermiş olduğumuz tüm hizmetlerde tamamen yerli kaynaklar kullanıp, dışa bağımlı ve pahalı revizyon maliyetlerini minimize ederek, doğaya saygılı, efektif ve yenilikçi çözümler üretmek ve geliştirmektir.

Com uma equipa altamente qualificada e dedicada, a HIMOINSA Portugal assegura um acompanhamento próximo em todas as fases dos projetos — desde o estudo técnico e seleção do equipamento, instalação, comissionamento e serviço pós-venda. Este compromisso traduz-se numa resposta rápida e personalizada às necessidades de cada cliente, seja em aplicações industriais, infraestruturas críticas, telecomunicações, construção, aluguer ou energias renováveis.

Enquanto parte integrante da rede internacional HIMOINSA, a operação portuguesa beneficia da força de uma estrutura global com 8 centros de produção e 11 filiais em todo o mundo, incluindo Espanha, França, Reino Unido, Brasil, China, Índia e EUA. Esta integração assegura o acesso a tecnologia de ponta, capacidade industrial própria e uma engenharia reconhecida pela sua fiabilidade e inovação.

A HIMOINSA é um fabricante vertical, capaz de produzir internamente todos os componentes essenciais — motores, alternadores, canopias, quadros de controlo, sistemas de paralelismo e comutação automática — garantindo total coerência entre design, fabrico e performance. Todos os equipamentos são testados e certificados antes da entrega, assegurando elevados padrões de qualidade e uma operação segura e eficiente em qualquer contexto.

Em Portugal, este ADN de engenharia e inovação traduz-se num objetivo claro: oferecer soluções energéticas completas, seguras e sustentáveis, com o compromisso de proximidade, excelência e confiança que caracteriza a HIMOINSA em todo o mundo.

Name: GreenStart Electrify
Description:
At GreenStart Electrify, our mission is to accelerate the transition to clean, electric living for the benefit of our customers, our communities, and the environment. We believe that electrification is not only the future of energy, but also a powerful tool for reducing carbon emissions, improving energy resilience, and empowering homeowners to take control of their utility costs and environmental impact.
We take a holistic, data-driven approach to home energy planning. Our process begins with a deep understanding of each customer’s unique energy profile—including both electric and gas usage—so we can assess total energy demand and identify the most impactful electrification strategies. From there, we design integrated solutions that may include rooftop solar, battery storage, main panel upgrades, heat pumps, EV charging infrastructure, induction cooking, and more. Every proposal is tailored to maximize long-term financial savings, increase comfort and safety, and reduce dependence on fossil fuels.
What sets us apart is our commitment to analysis and transparency. We don't just install equipment—we help our customers understand the "why" behind every recommendation. Using advanced modeling tools and historical utility data, we quantify the lifetime energy, financial, and emissions impact of each step in the electrification journey. Our goal is to make electrification not just possible, but practical, by showing how it fits into the real-world context of utility rates, grid programs, and available incentives.

Description:
Floyd BioEnergy is emerging as an innovative next-generation leader in sustainable bioenergy. Based in Austria, the company integrates cutting-edge technologies with the proven expertise of Floyd Holding and its subsidiary Biomass Engineering & Equipment (BE&E), a premier provider of biomass material handling systems.

At the core of its portfolio are advanced combined heat and power (CHP) plants that efficiently convert regional biomass—primarily natural wood chips or pellets—into electricity and heat via patented gasification technology. These systems deliver outstanding efficiency, minimal emissions, and reliable performance for up to 8,000 operating hours per year, ensuring stable, weather-independent energy supply. Modular design supports scalable applications across commercial, municipal, and industrial sectors.

The offering is enhanced by intelligent material handling solutions derived from the Floyd Group’s SMART-Conveyor technology, guaranteeing superior reliability and minimal downtime. Future developments include robust outdoor battery storage systems for greater energy flexibility.

Committed to the highest standards of quality, innovation, and regional value creation, Floyd BioEnergy Austria actively drives the energy transition, reduces reliance on fossil fuels, and positions itself as a trusted partner for a sustainable, independent energy future.

Name: Sies Enerji
Description:
SIES Enerji, yüksek verimli monokristal, polikristal ve esnek güneş panelleri ile yenilenebilir enerji çözümlerinde lider bir firmadır. Ürün yelpazemiz, bireysel ve ticari enerji ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için tasarlanmış geniş bir kullanım alanı sunar. Villalar, hobi bahçeleri, fabrika çatıları, güneş tarlaları, karavanlar, deniz araçları ve elektrikli araç şarj istasyonları gibi çeşitli alanlarda enerji verimliliğini artırmaya yönelik çözümler üretiyoruz.

Elektrikli araç şarj istasyonları konusunda, ihtiyaç duyulan lokasyonların tespiti ve analizini yaparak en uygun kurulum noktalarını belirliyoruz. Gelen kurulum taleplerini değerlendirip sitelere, alışveriş merkezlerine, iş merkezlerine, müstakil evlere ve diğer uygun lokasyonlara şarj istasyonu kurulum hizmeti sağlıyoruz. Bu süreçte alt yüklenici olarak hizmet sunarak, hızlı ve etkin çözümlerle elektrikli araç kullanıcılarına yüksek kaliteli şarj istasyonu altyapıları kuruyoruz.

SIES Enerji olarak müşterilerimize sadece tedarik ve kurulum hizmetleri sunmakla kalmıyor, aynı zamanda detaylı enerji analizi, proje planlama, teknik destek ve bakım hizmetleri sağlayarak, projelerinizin her aşamasında yanınızda oluyoruz. Yenilenebilir enerji alanında sunduğumuz çözümleri, kapsamlı eğitim ve bilgilendirme hizmetleri ile destekleyerek, müşterilerimizin sürdürülebilir enerji kullanımı konusunda bilinçlenmesini sağlıyoruz. Ayrıca, satış sonrası garanti ve servis hizmetlerimiz ile uzun ömürlü, güvenilir ve çevre dostu enerji çözümlerinin sorunsuz çalışmasını güvence altına alıyoruz.

Vizyonumuz, sürdürülebilir enerji çözümlerini en yüksek kalite standartları ile sunarak, hem çevreyi koruyan hem de enerji maliyetlerini azaltan projelere imza atmaktır. SIES Enerji olarak, müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutarak, enerjiye olan bakış açınızı dönüştürmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Name: GTO Technologies Inc.
Description:
GTO Technologies is committed to developing and commercializing innovations that unlock the full potential of carbon-free electricity. Our mission is to address critical technological challenges that hinder the economic growth of advanced geothermal, geologic hydrogen and critical minerals solutions. We aim to transform these technologies from concept to market, enabling the world to harness clean, carbon-free energy.

Our key technologies make Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS) cost-effective by first creating a massive subsurface heat exchanger with a matrix of fractures connecting horizontal wells but also provides the technology for controlling flow in those fractures. Our patented Generation 2 systems, developed with the lessons learned from a $5.3 million DOE FORGE grant and further development and testing using a $5 million seed round, fix EGS problems like short circuits and early cooling. We create underground heat exchangers by providing the access points for fracture stimulation and then control the flow rate in each fracture. The GTO Technologies system can triple EGS power output and boost project profits by $800 million per project.  This technology also can be used to create systems for geologic hydrogen and critical minerals recovery.

Name: FLEXHYBAT
Description:
Coordinated project between UPC and Universidad de Oviedo and granted by Ministerio de Ciencia e Innovación in Convocatoria 2022 "Proyectos de Generación de Conocimiento"

The main objective of this work is to develop a novel methodology to optimize the use and size of battery-based energy storage systems in future hybridization projects in hydropower. This will be relevant for operators and will also contribute to improving future hybridization projects in hydropower.

Our methodology will provide guidance in future hybridization projects considering the capacity of the unit, ancillary services to provide, grid scenarios (with massive entrance of new renewable effects) and negative effects of the climate change (extreme droughts that will cause extreme low water heads and flowrates) with the aim to optimize the following aspects:

 Remaining Useful Life of critical hydromechanical components of the unit
 Improve the overall efficiency of the unit and save water (in double regulated machines)
 Improve the quality of the ancillary services provided by the hybrid unit

Name: 5 Element Energy
Description:
Our Mission 
At 5 Element Energy we make cost-effective, Sustainable and Renewable Energy and Utility Systems, that make economic and environmental sense. Our innovative waste-to-value technologies limit harmful emissions, divert landfill waste, clean industrial processes, and provide profitable and sustainable solutions for industry. Our systems produce electricity and clean water from sewage, oil well production water, and gas, as well as assist in the production of synthetic SAF fuels. 


 Developing and Deploying Solutions for Today's Problems 
5E systems empower industry to take bio waste and convert it into electricity, clean water, or synthetic bio fuels without the creation of toxic emissions. Our SREUS units are maintenance-friendly, offer low operating costs, and provide a much needed alternative to current power and synthetic fuel options.


 Why 5E? 
“5E” or “Five Element Energy” takes its name from the ancient Greek conception of the five elements. We believe in an integrative and holistic approach to waste management. This approach recognizes the importance of thoughtful consideration of our relationship with the things we create. We use those five elements as a paradigm for understanding our technology; earth as a symbol for clean growth, fire as a symbol of the purification, water as the symbol of transformation, wind as a symbol of movement and agility, and lightning to symbolize the power we produce.

Name: POWER CENTRAL
Description:
Drawing on decades of practical experience in engine systems, power generation, and technology innovation, our platform was developed to directly address the challenges organizations face in equipment procurement, asset sales, and skilled workforce recruitment. 
Power Central is a digital sales channel built to solve the common issues that face us all today. We capture market demand and route qualified orders directly to OEMs, distributors, dealers, or resellers selected by the buyer. We don’t carry inventory, control pricing, or offer discounts. By remaining independent of inventory ownership, we’re able to provide objective application guidance that helps buyers clearly define their needs while ensuring all sellers compete on an equal footing. This structure allows us to remain vendor-neutral—because trust, in our view, is earned through fairness.
Our role is to support the full power generation ecosystem, serving both equipment end users and the sellers. To do that, we’ve built practical tools—from advanced search capabilities for pre-owned equipment to an online configurator for new equipment and rentals. The configurator will translate buyer needs into a clear specification that we will develop. We then provide all suppliers with this specification, ensuring all vendors are responding to the same requirements.
Beyond transactions, we believe education and connection matter. iCentral Magazine shares compelling stories from our partners, along with a few lighter pieces to brighten your day. Our Knowledge Base provides educational content across a wide range of power generation topics—because informed decisions benefit everyone.
Our Valued Partner Portal is designed for anyone providing rentals, selling products, or servicing power generation equipment. It allows us to quickly and accurately place customers with the right provider. We bring clarity to the customers' expectations, minimizing risk, and modernizing your inbound demand without disrupting your dealers.

Name: Minnova Renewables
Description: Minnova Renewable Energy Inc. (MRE) is a wholly owned subsidiary of Minnova Corp. (MCI.V)   At MRE our goal is to develop green hydrogen projects and seek out innovative new technologies that can reduce CO2 emissions.  Reducing carbon emission to mitigate climate change has become a global priority.  That will mean changing the way we power our industries and daily lives.   Current energy derived from fossil fuels and their incumbent carbon emissions must be reduced and replaced by renewable energy.  Green hydrogen produced from renewable energy resources is a key part of the solution.  At Minnova Renewable Energy we have embraced green hydrogen as a solution and believe Manitoba based green hydrogen has the potential to be a leader in the energy transition.  MRE is rapidly advancing green hydrogen production initiatives in Canada and around the world.  In Canada we are constructing a demonstration plant to test our innovative, 3rd generation biomass gasification technology designed to produce a high hydrogen content syngas that can be purified to green hydrogen, converted to ammonia (fertilizer), used directly for power generation, or further processed to produce biofuels.  In addition to our biomass gasification green hydrogen production strategy, we are also advancing a 100MW large scale green hydrogen production initiative via electrolysis in Flin Flon, Manitoba, Canada.  The City of Flin Flon has a highly skilled workforce and access to significant industrial infrastructure including rail and an international port.   Our development efforts will have a positive impact to regional economic development and could transform the local economy for the next century.  Globally we are advancing a pipeline of biomass gasification development projects designed to capitalize on abundant biomass waste to produce decentralized renewable power where it is needed.

Description:

Our fleet boasts power solutions covering 20 KVA up to 300 KVA (both Stage V & IIIA available) some of which can be quickly and easily synchronized to multiply and extend power production as/if needed. Our generators are predominantly trailer mounted for ease of access & rapid deployment across the UK. 

We use only the latest 2022 machines specialising in top brands such as JCB which ensures quality of build and robust technology, consistent reliability, fuel efficiency, the latest in engine technology, digital control management and telemetry & pollution reduction, whilst keeping noise levels to minimum.

We understand the importance of emissions and we are keen to help minimize harmful emissions where possible. Which is why over 50% of our fleet is ‘Stage V’ emission compliant – the ultra-quiet and most environmentally friendly generators available and we also use bio-fuels in all our generators. Our choice of fuel is ‘GTL’ (Gas to Liquid) which runs up to 90% better for the environment than standard diesel. Please see our fuel management page detailing information on GTL fuel.

Whether your operational power requirement is a planned outage requiring a small or large power solution, or as an emergency solution to an unexpected power outage or perhaps a more permanent static placement for instant emergency back-up ready to cut in should your business lose power, we have the solution and the latest and most reliable hardware to meet your needs.

Desde su fundación en 1982, el grupo de empresas RG Engineering, Inc. se ha centrado en actividades relacionadas con la operación, el mantenimiento y la modernización de sistemas de transmisión y distribución y centrales eléctricas.
Al principio, la empresa se concentró en la venta de piezas de repuesto para turbinas de gas y vapor en Puerto Rico, las Islas Vírgenes estadounidenses y la República Dominicana.
El éxito de estos esfuerzos llevó rápidamente a añadir líneas de productos para motores diésel, equipos de distribución y transmisión eléctrica, bombas, controles de procesos, instrumentación, válvulas, embragues, periféricos para calderas y servicios relacionados. Hoy en día, RG Engineering, inc. Representa a más de 30 empresas entre las que se encuentran Powerhouses de la industria como Siemens y Alstom (Areva) en Puerto Rico.
Para satisfacer las necesidades del mercado de servicios de instalación y mantenimiento de sus equipos suministrados, RG Engineering, inc. entró al mercado de instalaciones especializadas y modernización de equipos de transmisión, distribución y plantas de energía en 1989.
Actualmente RG Engineering, inc. dispone de la organización y los recursos humanos para administrar y gestionar eficazmente los proyectos de instalación y servicio más complejos.
Para atender las necesidades de un creciente volumen de negocios en la República Dominicana, la oficina de Santo Domingo se estableció en 1989. Esta oficina funciona como el centro de operaciones del grupo RG Engineering, inc. en el país.
En 1999 se creó MEC Engineering, psc para contratar y prestar servicios de ingeniería y servicios de diseño. La empresa opera como filial del grupo de empresas RG Engineering.
El grupo RG Engineering cuenta con más de 150 empleados en sus oficinas de San Juan, Puerto Rico y la República Dominicana y en los distintos proyectos.

Name: Efficiency Signal
Description:
We offer products and services under the brand eSentinel, leveraging artificial intelligence (“AI”) to improve the operating efficiency of thermal power generation plants (“TPGPs”).  Our systems collect data and automates the analysis of this data using computer logic built on industry standards.  eSentinel looks for anomalies that hurt operating efficiency, and our experts work with the plant operators to optimize efficiency.   
Plant operators use eSentinel to monitor the operation of condensers used in steam turbine systems using nuclear, gas, coal and biomass heat sources.  Using eSentinel, plant operators can more easily find and research anomalies, so that they can intervene to avoid anomalies that could cause an outage, increase fuel burn and reduce power generation.
We are a joint venture corporation whose founders are established companies in the markets we serve.  We are building on products and services we have long provided.  We are supported by a deep bench of engineers with technical and computational experience that informs the hardware and software components of our products and services. 
We have three (3) components to our product and service lines: (i) installation service for our eSentinel product; (ii) sales and licensing of our eSentinel product consisting of hardware and software components; and (iii) ongoing service providing support and maintenance to eSentinel.

Name: Máy Phát Điện Miền Nam
Description:
Công ty máy phát điện Miền Nam là một trong những công ty hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực cung cấp, lắp đặt và bảo trì máy phát điện tại khu vực miền Nam Việt Nam. Với hơn 10 năm kinh nghiệm phục vụ, chúng tôi cam kết mang đến cho khách hàng dịch vụ chất lượng cao, máy phát điện chính hãng và giá cả hợp lý.


Dịch vụ cung cấp máy phát điện của công ty chúng tôi bao gồm các loại máy phát điện cho gia đình, công nghiệp, các khu công nghiệp, nhà máy, chung cư cao cấp và các công trình xây dựng lớn. Chúng tôi có đội ngũ kỹ thuật viên chuyên nghiệp, tận tâm và am hiểu về lĩnh vực máy phát điện. Với đội ngũ nhân viên giàu kinh nghiệm và có trình độ tay nghề chất lượng, chúng tôi luôn đảm bảo mang đến sản phẩm chất lượng tốt nhất, bảo vệ thiết bị của khách hàng trong mọi điều kiện hoạt động.


Chúng tôi cũng có các gói bảo trì, bảo dưỡng cho máy phát điện để đảm bảo khả năng hoạt động liên tục và tránh các sự cố đột ngột. Ngoài ra, chúng tôi cũng cung cấp các dịch vụ sửa chữa nhanh chóng và hiệu quả để giảm thiểu thời gian yêu cầu sửa chữa máy phát điện của khách hàng.


Tại Công ty máy phát điện Miền Nam, chúng tôi cam kết đáp ứng mọi yêu cầu về máy phát điện của khách hàng với các sản phẩm chất lượng, giá cả hợp lý và dịch vụ hậu mãi tốt nhất. Hãy liên hệ ngay với chúng tôi để được tư vấn và hỗ trợ dịch vụ chất lượng nhất.

Kinh nghiệm có được trong suốt nhiều năm, đội ngũ chuyên gia kỹ thuật và Tool chuyên dụng là những yếu tố giúp Máy Phát Điện Miền Nam đưa ra các giải pháp bảo trì, sửa chữa máy phát điện đảm bảo nguồn điện dự phòng hoạt động hiệu quả, mang lại sự an tâm cho khách hàng và gia tăng độ tín nhiệm cho thương hiệu.

Name: Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto
Description:
Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto: Energía limpia y compromiso con el desarrollo sostenible de Ecuador

Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto es un proyecto ubicado en Santo Domingo de los Tsáchilas que está transformando el futuro energético de Ecuador. Diseñado para generar energía limpia y renovable, San Jacinto busca abastecer a millones de ecuatorianos mientras promueve el desarrollo económico, social y ambiental de las comunidades.

Desde su concepción, el proyecto ha sido una apuesta estratégica por la sostenibilidad. Con un diseño innovador que respeta los recursos naturales, San Jacinto opera sin embalses, permitiendo el paso del caudal ecológico del río Saloya y preservando la biodiversidad de la región. Este enfoque refleja nuestro compromiso con la protección ambiental y la adopción de prácticas responsables que aseguren un equilibrio entre progreso y sostenibilidad.

Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto también se distingue por su impacto social. Más allá de la generación de energía, trabajamos estrechamente con las comunidades locales para fomentar su desarrollo integral. A través de programas educativos, iniciativas de empleo y acciones de responsabilidad social, contribuimos a mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas que viven en nuestra área de influencia.

En el ámbito técnico, San Jacinto representa un ejemplo de innovación en el sector energético. Implementamos tecnología avanzada y prácticas eficientes para garantizar un suministro eléctrico confiable y de calidad, consolidándonos como un actor clave en el fortalecimiento del sistema energético nacional.

Nuestra visión trasciende la generación de electricidad. En Hidroeléctrica San Jacinto trabajamos para construir un Ecuador más sostenible, con un enfoque que combina excelencia operativa, responsabilidad social y respeto por el entorno natural. Creemos que cada acción cuenta para crear un impacto positivo, no solo en el presente, sino también en el futuro del país.
Location: Santo Domingo de los Tsáchilas, Santo Domingo de los Tsáchilas

Name: Ndoyenk Technology
Description:
Ndoyenk Technology (Pty) Ltd provides solutions to small/medium-sized plants that valorise end-of-life, biomass and polymeric resources for chemical, energy and materials recovery. Green innovative solutions span from biological, chemical and thermochemical conversion processes.

The biological processes entail the conversion of food waste and animal dung to biogas and fertiliser suitable for household and small and medium applications. Ndoyenk Technology has also developed mobile anaerobic digesters ideal for scientific research at various education and research institution. The designs are simplified to train the small starter farmers and conduct experiments for their waste management.

Chemical processes are mainly suitable for small informal traders from the townships. Since the main business of informal township traders is fast food, used cooking oil and other waste streams are generated at a high rate. Little is known about the environmental effects of illegal and improper waste stream disposal. Ndoyenk Technology has developed customised solutions for the township and rural community to valorise these waste streams for various valuable products, energy and materials.

Thermochemical conversion processes are currently in development. The notoriety of thermochemical processes as high energy input has rendered from their development and global acceptance. Ndoyenk Technology is currently developing alternative energy resources that can power thermochemical processes since they are suitable for non-biodegradable end-of-life polymers. The advantage of thermochemical conversion resources is the rapid production of three fractions and suitability for all types of materials.

Ndoyenk Technology has found a gap in developing innovative solutions for households and small/medium farms. The design and fabrication of plants are suitable for small to medium operations. That has not been the case before. Ndoyenk Technology innovations are affordable and straightforward.

Name: Organicum Biomass
Description:
Organicum Biomass supplies high-quality, sustainable green energy. We receive organic waste from private households, companies, and public institutions that we process to provide the highest possible content of methane gas and an absolute minimum of plastic residues. We see waste as a resource and rethink technology to contribute to a sustainable cycle.

Development in waste management and energy production knows only one direction: Regulations are constantly tightened. The ultimate goal is a sustainable society where all waste is utilized and where our climate impact is zero.

Organicum Biomass views organic waste as a resource that can be collected, processed, and turned into energy. Thanks to our innovative processes, we develop, operate, and market the best solution available for receiving organic waste and transforming it into high-energy biomass.

The biomass is delivered to plants that extract biogas for heat, electricity, and fuel. Afterward, the residual material is recycled by farmers to be used as fertilizer. This requires us to deliver biomass that is as clean of plastic and foreign bodies as possible. In this way, we can contribute sustainably to future generations.

Contact us today to learn more about how you can contribute to sustainable energy production.

Name: Wolumen
Description:
Dostarczamy rozwiązania eksperckie w branży energetycznej poprzez kompleksową strategię zakupu energii, optymalizacji kosztów i realizacji inwestycji w zieloną energię.

Wolumen Energy skupia się na realizacji oszczędności na kosztach energii dla przedsiębiorców. 

Wolumen Energy zaczynał od stworzenia porównywarki cen energii, www.wolumen.eu, która pozwala na wygodne i szybkie porównanie aktualnych stawek oraz zdalną rezerwację.

Rozbudowaliśmy naszą ofertę o monit cenowy i systemy alertów, które pozwalają przedsiębiorcom na zarezerwowanie wskazanej w alercie ceny idealnej w momencie, gdy taka pojawi się na giełdzie. 

Dodatkowo oferujemy usługę doradztwa, której wynikiem jest indywidualna strategia zakupowa i kompleksowy audyt określający oszczędności do uzyskania poprzez odpowiedni dobór taryfy i mocy zamówionej, kompensację energii biernej, wymianę oświetlenia oraz dołączenie do rynku mocy.

Wraz z rozwojem odnawialnych źródeł energii, poszerzyliśmy naszą usługę doradczą o wsparcie klientów w wyborze odpowiedniej mocy oraz wykonawcy instalacji. Pomagamy również w sfinansowaniu całej inwestycji OZE w niskich ratach rozłożonych na okres 15 lat.

W celu optymalizacji kosztów ogrzewania, poza ceną gazu czy instalacją pompy ciepła, zalecamy poprawę termoizolacji budynku. Dlatego też, poszukując najlepszych rozwiązań, trafiliśmy na przełomową technologię izolacji cienkowarstwowej na bazie mikrosfer polimerowych. 

Zapraszamy do kontaktu i podjęcia Współpracy w celu zmiany rynku energii na lepszy.

Name: PMSL ApS
Description:
PMSL ApS is a niche Project Management & Development Consultancy specialising in providing support services to global Independent Power Produces, Utilities & EPC Contractors.

Located in Denmark, PMSL has extensive international exposure in developing & implementing both Renewable & Thermal Power Generation & associated Oil & Gas projects having a combined capacity of c.1GW. This experience is extended to supporting the construction effort on presently Europe's largest (55,000tp/a) P2X e-methanol project.

PMSL's team applies a ‘whatever it takes’ and 'can do it' approach to make its customers projects a success & has a demonstrable record in its competency to manage the full project life cycle:

•	With an IPP - from identifying a specific project in which to invest, formulating a development plan & execution strategy, negotiating shareholder options with stakeholders, advancing the project through its early or mid stage development up to Financial Close & then maintaining the projects momentum by continuing with its implementation & managing both the construction & commissioning phases up to COD & handover to operations.

•	For EPC Contractors or OEM's - identification of pending projects, managing the preparation of tender submissions, presentation of the proposal to the employer & negotiating final contract terms. Post award, multi-discipline construction & commissioning management up to project close out & turnover to the employer, defect liability period management, operational support and training.

PMSL is able offer its services on a competitive & flexible arrangement that includes call-off, fixed term or temporary basis with tasks completed at either a customers global location, hybrid or PMSL's offices in Europe. Remuneration packages can be structured to suit a particular customers requirements. Similarly, PMSL's team can be augmented as required through known & trusted associates.

For more information call: +4527176613 or email: shaunmoore@ntlworld.com

Name: Veteran EV Charging
Description:
Veteran EV Charging LLC (VEVC) is a Detroit, Michigan-based company dedicated to expanding the reach of electric vehicle charging infrastructure across the United States. We strive to promote sustainable transportation and contribute to a cleaner environment by offering reliable, convenient charging solutions to EV drivers.

At VEVC, we are proud to be part of the veteran business community and are committed to supporting our fellow veterans, returning citizens, and members of the LGBTQ+ community. As a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB), we are dedicated to making a positive impact on the world.

We provide turnkey EV charging solutions for organizations of all sizes, specializing in B2B and B2G solutions. Our services include site selection, design, installation, and ongoing maintenance of EV charging stations, as well as off-grid Power on Demand (POD) to supplement aging infrastructure. We work closely with our clients to deliver customized solutions that meet their operational and budgetary needs.

PowerDisk EGS

 SeaDog Wave Pump arrays can be located offshore, at the shoreline and even deep inland! Multiple or stand-alone systems can also be attached to bridge pilings, piers, docks and even the sides of ships, features which provide unmatched versatility. Founded by Ron Damper, a renowned leader in the DAMRON Corporation, a major African-American Minority Business Enterprise (MBE). EV-Lution is poised to transform the region's EV infrastructure. We're committed to providing the best charging experience for your electric vehicle. 
MORE ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY.
EV-LUTION Charging aims to address the growing need for reliable and accessible charging infrastructure. Their primary focus lies in establishing charging locations strategically, starting with Illinois and spreading across neighboring states like Indiana, Ohio, and Michigan.  
LIGHTNING FAST CHARGING NETWORK.
We are proud to offer EV drivers the best charging experience possible. Our Level 1 chargers have an average charge time of 11-20 hours and provide 5 miles per hour, charged. They are perfect for charging overnight or when you have plenty of time to spare. Our Level 2 chargers are faster - charging in 3-8 hours, with an average of 12-80 miles per hour charged, and are ideal for drivers who want to recharge during the day. 
Our Level 3 chargers provide the quickest charging time, from empty, in just 30-60 minutes, with an average of 75-1200 miles per hour charged, helping you quickly get back on the road. With EV-LUTION Charging Stations, you'll always be powered up and ready to go.
 
 At EV-LUTION Charging, we believe in a sustainable future by providing electric vehicle charging solutions that help reduce your carbon footprint and play an active role in creating a cleaner environment.  We are passionate about being at the forefront of the EV charging industry and providing innovative charging technology to make the charging process as easy and user-friendly as possible.
