Name: GDF Latin America
Description:
The objective of the Facility (GDF) is to encourage public and/or private investment in geothermal power development in Latin America. Funding is available for the following activities:

Geoscientific surface studies to determine the optimal location of reservoir-confirmation wells at the most promising geothermal prospects.
Drilling and testing of reservoir-confirmation wells at the most promising geothermal prospects to assist developers in securing financing for subsequent development phases.
GDF will provide financial support to assist in mitigating geothermal exploration risk. The GDF is the first multi-donor climate initiative to promote geothermal energy within Latin America. It is expected to improve access to equity or other funding sources for geothermal developers in the region, and to play a catalytic role in establishing geothermal energy as a strategic option in power-expansion planning within the participating countries.

Description:
PAUWAY ENERGY is committed to providing reliable and efficient power through the rapid deployment of a full range of customized power solutions worldwide. With advanced generation technology, a full range of operation and maintenance services, and flexible commercial terms, PAUWAY ENERGY helps customers achieve temporary or long-term power that can be deployed quickly. Since 2003, it has provided power generation solutions to utility and industrial customers around the world in more than 80 countries with a focus on the African, South American, and Asian markets.

There is no standard power solution, and our engineers work with you to design a system that meets your various power needs. We customize the components and develop your system solution with accessories and performance options to meet your specific application needs and regional standards.
PAUWAY generator sets are manufactured according to world-class standards, with high efficiency and low energy consumption. The power range of light diesel series is 8kW-2600 kW, the power range of heavy diesel series is 1000kw-12000 kW, and the power range of gas series is 300kW-4500kW.  
Through ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO45001 system, our products meet the CE certification.   

In 2017, PAUWAY entered into an in-depth cooperation with MWM Germany to provide you with gas generator sets and delivery of combined heat and power (CHP)/Combined Heat and Cold (CCHP) applications based on German industrial manufacturing continuous power.
Founded in 1871 by Carl Benz and now operating under the name Caterpillar Energy Solutions, MWM has nearly 150 years of experience in developing and optimizing gas engines and generators for natural gas, biogas and other specialty gases.

Description:
Die SteRo mixing technologies GmbH ist ein Zusammenschluss zweier langjährig am Biogasmarkt agierenden Firmen, die Steverding Rührwerkstechnik und die PTM (geführt von Herrn
Rostalski), mit dem Ziel Neuheiten zu schaffen, die den Biogasmarkt revolutionieren und optimieren.

Wir haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht den Biogasmarkt durch Neuentwicklungen zu verbessern, die Biogasanlagen zu optimieren und die Gasausbeuten zu maximieren. Ohne das technische Zubehör ist dies nicht möglich.

Die Steverding Rührwerkstechnik GmbH ist Hersteller und Experte für große Paddelrührwerke in den härtesten Einsatzgebieten. Die hauseigene Abteilung für Forschung und Entwicklung hat bereits erfolgreich neue Konzepte auf den Markt gebracht und arbeitet stets an neuen Innovationen, die dem Biogasmarkt einen Mehrwert bieten.

Die PTM GmbH ist als spezialisierter Hersteller für hochwertige Tauchmotor- und Propellerrührwerke mit langjähriger Erfahrung in den verschiedensten Einsatzfällen. Durch diese Erfahrung sind die Anforderungen an ausgereifte Technik in der Anwendung Biogas im Detail bekannt und fließen in die Entwicklung neuer Produkte mit ein.

Gemeinsam bilden die Steverding Rührwerkstechnik und die PTM die SteRo mixing technologies. 
Ein Zentrum für Erfahrung, Know How und Ideen.

Name: ImaGEN, Inc.
Description:
We are pleased to announce the completion and initial testing of our new MH Series hydrogen generation system. 

The future is now!

This easily deployable, low energy, small footprint system is designed to parallel the growing electric vehicle supercharger network for battery powered vehicles (BEV) by creating green hydrogen for fuel cell electric vehicles (FCEV). Additionally, other initial market segments we will serve include material handling/forklifts, light/medium/heavy duty trucks, and other non-vehicle applications such as backup power for data centers and telecommunications towers.

Utilizing readily available chemicals as the primary feedstock to create hydrogen, ImaGEN solves numerous challenges that have previously prevented full-scale hydrogen adoption.

Additionally, the company is currently developing proprietary technology to "re-generate" its spent fuel which would enhance its green footprint.

Nasza oferta obejmuje:
 Agregaty prądotwórcze – nowoczesne generatory diesla o wysokiej wydajności, dostosowane do różnorodnych potrzeb klientów.
 Zasilacze bezprzerwowe UPS – rozwiązania chroniące przed nagłymi przerwami w dostawie energii oraz zapewniające wysoką jakość dostarczanej energii, dedykowane dla przedsiębiorstw, instytucji oraz infrastruktury krytycznej.

 Zabudowy kontenerowe – projektowanie i realizacja kompletnych systemów zasilania zamkniętych w modułowych konstrukcjach kontenerowych, dostosowanych do indywidualnych wymagań klientów.

Dzięki doświadczeniu, nowoczesnemu podejściu oraz współpracy z renomowanymi producentami zapewniamy niezawodne rozwiązania dla przemysłu, sektora IT, medycyny, infrastruktury krytycznej, obiektów użyteczności publicznej, energetyki zawodowej oraz wielu innych branż.

Jesteśmy liderem w naszym segmencie branży energetycznej i operatorem POB, który zmienia sposób, w jaki biznes korzysta z energii. Od ponad 20 lat wspieramy galerie handlowe, biurowce, obiekty przemysłowe i logistyczne, zapewniając im bezpieczeństwo, przewagę kosztową i rozwiązania szyte na miarę.

Działamy inaczej niż typowy sprzedawca energii – łączymy kompetencje operatora, doradcy i partnera biznesowego, dając naszym klientom coś więcej niż tylko prąd: spokój, przejrzystość i realne oszczędności.

Oferujemy sprzedaż i dystrybucję energii elektrycznej w modelu, który daje naszym klientom przewagę: konkurencyjne warunki, pełna przejrzystość rozliczeń i gwarancja zgodności z przepisami. Dzięki temu współpraca z nami to stabilność, bezpieczeństwo i kontrola kosztów.

Naszą specjalnością jest bilansowanie i optymalizacja zużycia energii. Analizujemy rzeczywiste potrzeby biznesu, dostosowujemy taryfy i kontrakty, wskazujemy obszary oszczędności i tworzymy rozwiązania, które realnie obniżają koszty operacyjne.

Zapewniamy również doradztwo strategiczne dla właścicieli i zarządców obiektów. Wspieramy w podejmowaniu kluczowych decyzji biznesowych, pomagamy poruszać się w dynamicznie zmieniającym się otoczeniu regulacyjnym i reprezentujemy interesy naszych klientów przed instytucjami.

Green Lights to nie tylko energia – to partnerstwo oparte na wiedzy, doświadczeniu i zaufaniu, które pozwala naszym klientom budować długoterminową przewagę rynkową.

Name: Martin Geothermal LLC

Headquartered in Reno, Nevada, USA, we specialize in low-temperature power generation, deep direct-use (DDU) and 5th Generation District Energy (5G DES) design in the Reno-Tahoe region of northern Nevada and California.


A dedicated proponent of shallow low-temperature power generation and direct-utilization of geothermal energy specifically applied to data centers and cryptocurrency centers, Martin Geothermal is currently involved with projects leading to industrial developments of low-temperature (50-130°C) applications in the Reno-Tahoe region, as described in papers published with the Geothermal Rising Conference (GRC; Martin; 2021, 2022; posted below). Working with local, state, and federal government officials and organizations, Martin Geothermal is working to expedite local direct-use projects with the goal of helping to reduce our carbon footprint, including converting natural gas systems to geothermal energy networks. 


Questions about an idea for a geothermal project? Interested in applying geothermal energy to a current or upcoming data center or cryptocurrency center project? Need consultation and/or professional study/assessment of the geothermal potential of an area?  Need a design/implementation of a geothermal geophysical survey? Please contact us.

The goal is to identify and address potential issues before they lead to equipment failure, ensuring the reliability and longevity of the generators.

2. Major Overhaul & General Repairs:

Kivi Empire conducts major overhauls, involving a thorough examination and refurbishment of generators. This process includes disassembly, inspection, replacement of worn parts, and reassembly.
General repairs cover a range of issues, from minor malfunctions to major faults. This comprehensive approach ensures that generators are restored to optimal working condition.

3. Installation:

Kivi Empire excels in the installation of generator systems. This encompasses the entire setup process, from determining the appropriate location for the generator to connecting it to the electrical system.
The installation services provided by Kivi Empire guarantee that generators are correctly configured and integrated into the client's infrastructure for seamless operation.

Name: Clear Energy Systems
Description:
Clear Energy Systems is developing a small, lightweight, yet high-horsepower, natural gas engine for distributed power generation. The project involves modernizing and industrializing the Curtiss-Wright R1820 radial aircraft engine—a reliable and versatile workhorse of mid-20th century aviation. The task is to apply 21st century engine technology and manufacturing methodology to the original radial platform, creating a robust new power plant for industrial applications. The new engine will be coupled with a 1000kW generator in a compact generator set capable of 1MW standby, 900kw prime, or 750kW continuous power.

Owing to the engine’s unique size and configuration, the resulting 1MW genset is remarkably small and lightweight—roughly one-third the size and weight of conventional offerings. It introduces unprecedented mobility and versatility in its power range. The unit is light enough to tow behind a pickup truck, airlift by helicopter or install on rooftops and platforms with minimal structural support. Other key performance and cost advantages are equally important: fuel agility, the clean emissions of natural gas, long service intervals, reduced maintenance and overhaul cost, lower fuel cost than diesel, and lower capital cost than comparable natural gas units. We anticipate introducing the product at two-thirds the price of competitive units.

StrongForce provides industry-leading, hassle free services geared toward improving plant performance and helping to keep your plant online.

StrongForce will help you find every megawatt, reduce air inleakage, reduce back pressure, reduce emissions, reduce dissolved oxygen, reduce operating and maintenance cost, and help you keep your plant running at optimal efficiency.

Name: Greenwell Energy (Canada) Ltd
Description:
Greenwell Energy (Canada) Ltd. is at the forefront of the global energy transition, dedicated to replacing coal with cleaner, more sustainable energy sources across the Asia-Pacific region. Headquartered in Canada, our mission is to deliver reliable and affordable energy to power generation facilities and grids, thereby driving significant reductions in carbon emissions, enhancing energy security, and supporting international climate goals.

We are committed to environmental sustainability and leverage innovative solutions by partnering with industry leaders on both sides of the Pacific. Together, we execute LNG-to-power projects in Asia-Pacific markets, directly displacing coal-fired power plants. Our comprehensive business model covers everything from upstream investment opportunities and long-term LNG contracts to downstream infrastructure, ensuring a robust and efficient supply chain from gas production to consumption.

Our team operates across strategic locations in Toronto, Hong Kong, Singapore, and Hanoi. This global presence enables us to combine local insights with our extensive international expertise, ensuring seamless project execution and maximizing stakeholder value.

At Greenwell Energy, we also champion international cooperation to achieve climate goals, advocating for the recognition of the carbon offsets of Canadian LNG and hydrogen blending in comparison to coal-fired power plants in the Asia-Pacific region. Our efforts focus on promoting Canadian energy as a cleaner alternative that aligns with Canada’s own energy transition from coal by leveraging natural gas, nuclear and renewables.

We are proud that major Canadian energy projects are partnered with and majority-owned by First Nations, emphasizing sustainability, respect, and community engagement. Together, we are shaping a cleaner energy future.

Name: Foundation Power
Description:
No one is building the power America needs. So we are.
Foundation Power develops, owns, and operates energy generation assets across the United States — delivering reliable, scalable power where it’s needed most. As demand for electricity surges and the grid strains under decades of underinvestment, we’re building long-term energy infrastructure that supports businesses, communities, and the nation’s future.
We work across the full energy spectrum — from natural gas to renewables, storage, nuclear, and advanced technologies. Our approach is simple:
Build today. Impact tomorrow.
We transform underutilized or contaminated land into productive power-generating assets that strengthen the grid, drive economic growth, and create local opportunity. Every project we build is designed for scale, efficiency, and long-term reliability.
As an Independent Power Producer (IPP), Foundation Power brings flexibility and competitiveness to an industry historically dominated by utilities. We create open and fair access to the transmission network, enabling more reliable power supply, healthier markets, and resilient infrastructure that lasts for generations.
At the center of our work is a partnership mindset. Successful power projects require alignment among investors, developers, utilities, local leaders, and the communities we serve. We bring all the right people to the table to get big things done.
Our mission: Build energy assets that will still matter 500 years from now.
Our promise: Reliable power. Stronger communities. A future where energy keeps up with ambition.

We are splitting water using atomic energy instead of boiling it.

Herl Tech is led by serial inventor and entrepreneur Michael McNeely, Ph.D., PMP (linkedin.com/in/michael-mcneely-macko/). Dr McNeely has over 40 patents covering various materials science and microfluidic technologies and fabrication methods, and has founded 3 companies.

Name: STORE Consortium
Description: STORE is advancing a subsea energy storage technology called Marine Pumped Hydro (MPH). MPH uses large hollow concrete spheres on the seafloor to store mechanical energy in the form of pressure. MPH charges when seawater is pumped out of the spheres and releases energy to the grid when high-pressure water flows back into the spheres through a turbine. MPH features a patent-pending multi-sphere pod to increase the amount of energy stored and uses efficient 3D concrete printing to reduce manufacturing costs.

Name: Advanced Energy Bridge, Inc
Description:
Advanced Energy Bridge (AEB) develops Energy Centers that provide firm, flexible, carbon-free electrical power and industrial thermal energy while strengthening existing grid assets.

AEB’s patent-pending facility architecture treats nuclear as a bounded subsystem within a configurable energy system. By deliberately separating nuclear and non-nuclear scopes, Energy Island configuration decisions do not propagate into the nuclear scope—avoiding forced redesign, licensing iteration, and execution risk as project needs evolve.

This architectural approach enables multiple synchronized energy services—electrical power, high- and low-temperature thermal energy, and energy storage—to be configured to specific grid and industrial requirements. The result is predictable delivery of required energy services with materially lower system-level cost, not simply lower electricity price.

AEB works with developers, utilities, data center operators, and investors to define, plan, and deploy Energy Centers using established regulatory frameworks and proven energy technologies.

Description:
Estamos muy emocionados de compartir con ustedes nuestra visión de renovar la antigua molienda de Estrella del Norte y transformarla en una fuente de energía renovable para beneficio de los agricultores de caña y la ciudad de Chepén.

Como todos sabemos, la producción de energía es uno de los motores fundamentales del desarrollo económico y social. En ese sentido, nuestro proyecto se enfoca en generar energía eléctrica a partir del bagazo de la caña de azúcar, una fuente renovable y amigable con el medio ambiente. Con esta iniciativa, no solo estamos contribuyendo a la lucha contra el cambio climático, sino también brindando beneficios económicos y sociales a la región.

Nuestro proyecto tiene como objetivo principal mejorar la calidad de vida de los agricultores de caña y de la ciudad de Chepén, a través de la creación de empleos y el aumento de los ingresos. Además, la generación de energía eléctrica a partir del bagazo de la caña reducirá la dependencia de los combustibles fósiles y contribuirá a la seguridad energética del Valle del Jequetepeque.

En resumen, la Sociedad Agrícola Pampa Grande tiene como visión renovar la antigua molienda de Estrella del Norte para convertirla en una fuente de energía renovable que beneficie a los agricultores de caña y la ciudad de Chepén. Estamos seguros de que este proyecto no solo generará beneficios económicos y sociales, sino que también contribuirá a la protección del medio ambiente y a la seguridad energética de la región.

Küldetésünk

Küldetésünk, hogy kiváló minőségű energia-megoldásokat biztosítsunk iparágak, vállalkozások és közösségek számára. Termékeink között megtalálhatóak ipari generátorok, energiatároló rendszerek, fénytornyok és szünetmentes tápegységek (UPS), amelyek lehetővé teszik az energiafüggetlenség elérését és a megbízható áramellátást.

Örökségünk

A Power Systems a Best Tools Company tulajdonában áll, Kelet-Európa egyik vezető energiaipari vállalata. A Best Tools 2006 óta Kohler Master Distributorként elkötelezett a csúcstechnológiai energia-megoldások mellett, amit mi is tovább viszünk Magyarországon.

Mivel foglalkozunk?

Széleskörű energia-megoldásokat kínálunk, ideértve:
- Ipari generátorok: Folyamatos áramellátás kritikus iparágak számára.
- Energiatároló rendszerek: Áramellátás optimalizálása és áramszünet esetén.
- Fénytornyok: Mobil világítási megoldások építkezésekhez és eseményekhez.
- Szünetmentes tápegységek (UPS): Megbízható védelem áramkimaradások ellen.
- Utószolgáltatások: Telepítés, karbantartás, javítás és képzés a hosszú távú teljesítmény érdekében.

Szakértelmünk

Bár új szereplők vagyunk, csapatunk mögött a Best Tools Company többéves tapasztalata áll. Magasan képzett szakértőink testreszabott megoldásokat nyújtanak az egyedi energiaigényekhez.

Jövőképünk

Célunk, hogy Magyarország vezető energia-szolgáltatójává váljunk, lehetővé téve ügyfeleink számára az energiafüggetlenséget, a hatékonyság növelését és a fenntarthatóságot.

Miért válassza a Power Systems-t?

Name: گروه سرمایهگذاری انرژی امید تابان هور
Description:
گروه سرمایهگذاری انرژی امید تابان هور (سهامی عام) به عنوان یکی از هلدینگهای سرمایهگذاری در حوزه انرژی و بهویژه برق، در تاريخ 7 آبان ماه 1390 فعالیت خود را آغاز نموده است.
این شرکت در زمره شرکتهای فرعی شركت گروه مدیریت سرمايه گذاري امید به شمار رفته و به عنوان یکی از بزرگترین هلدینگهای خصوصی صنعت برق کشور در زنجیره سرمایهگذاری و بهرهبرداری نیروگاهی فعالیت میکند.
این شرکت توانسته است با تکیه بر توانمندیهای مالی و استفاده از متخصصان و کارشناسان زبده، گام های بزرگ و موثری را در صنعت کشور بردارد.
در حال حاضر تولید 1.7 درصد از برق تولیدی کشور، 2.8 درصد از برق تولیدی بخش خصوصی، 30 درصد از تولید برق بادی و 10 درصد از تولید برق تجدیدپذیر کشور در اختیار مجموعه گروه سرمایهگذاری انرژی امید تابان هور بوده و بر اساس آخرین سند راهبردی، دست پیدا کردن به سهم 3 درصدی از تولید برق کشور در سال 1407به صورت پایدار به عنوان ماموریت و چشمانداز این شرکت تعیین گردیده است.
همچنین گروه سرمایهگذاری انرژی امید تابان هور در سال 1393 در بازار سرمایه مورد پذیرش گرفت و 10 درصد از سهام شرکت با نماد «وهور» در تاریخ 19 خرداد ماه 1395 در بازار اول فرابورس ایران عرضه عمومی شد که در این سالها به عنوان یکی از سهمهای ارزنده بازار شناخته شده است.

Name: Net Zero Technologies
Description:
We empower businesses to reach Net Zero and are removing the stigma that reaching Net Zero will be a financial burden. We’re providing an economical method of power generation that captures carbon and heat at the source to offset against the cost of power.
As electricity is generated at our power station, carbon dioxide and heat are created as a by-product, which we then capture and sell to industry. We call this innovation a tri-generation system. This unique system means that, unlike traditional power stations, we maximise the number of products generated whilst simultaneously producing clean energy. 
By working with Net Zero Technologies, you can purchase Zero Carbon energy, cheaper than traditional power generation methods, and accelerate your business growth with a flexible and economical source of electricity. You’ll become a pioneer of change in your sector, adopting a revolutionary way of using truly clean energy that will help save our planet.

There are many ways to store or produce energy but when it comes to guaranteeing prime, standby or emergency electrical power, in terms of cost, flexibility and responsiveness, there’s no better option than a generator set from FG Wilson. 

Over our long history, FG Wilson generator sets have been installed in more than 150 countries worldwide. You’ll ﬁnd our generator sets installed in many of the world’s most iconic buildings, in hospitals, banks, airports, data centres, factories, construction sites, hotels, oﬃces and telecommunications networks, quietly guaranteeing that they are never without electric power.

Nossa história é movida pela inovação e pelo compromisso com a geração de energia limpa e sustentável para o Brasil.
A trajetória da Usina Hidrelétrica Baixo Iguaçu (UHE) começou em julho de 2013, com o início das obras de construção. Após anos de empenho, dedicação e um investimento expressivo, a usina foi inaugurada em fevereiro de 2019, iniciando sua operação comercial plena.
Com potência instalada de 350 megawatts (MW), distribuída em três unidades geradoras, a UHE Baixo Iguaçu tem papel essencial no fornecimento de energia elétrica ao país. Nossa produção é suficiente para atender mais de um milhão de brasileiros, fortalecendo a segurança e a estabilidade do Sistema Interligado Nacional (SIN).
Operamos sob o regime a fio d’água, com um reservatório de área reduzida — uma característica que minimiza os impactos ambientais e assegura o aproveitamento eficiente do fluxo natural do rio Iguaçu.
A Usina Hidrelétrica Baixo Iguaçu passa a integrar o portfólio de um dos maiores e mais experientes investidores no setor hidrelétrico global: o Grupo ENERGO-PRO.

Name: IEEE PES UJSC
Description:

Members of the Power & Energy Society are leaders in this field, and they — and their employers — derive substantial benefits from involvement with this unique and outstanding association.
Our mission develops standards and empowers development of technology, software, and best practices in all areas of electric power and energy including generation, transmission, distribution and utilization to provide a reliable, resilient, safe, cost-effective and sustainable AC and DC electricity supply system to the end-user. PES focuses on current power system infrastructures and technological advancements in energy resources, smart grid and smart cities for the betterment of society. We are the University of Jordan branch in IEEE PES and our main aim is to provide a knowledgeable community able in the field of power and energy control.

Name: Seaweed Energy
Description:
The oceans are the world’s largest source of untapped energy. The UK is a global leader in the wave/tidal energy sector, both in terms of its natural resources and technical capabilities. Power Technology reported the UK has the potential to access £76bn of the future tidal/wave market with the resulting significant carbon emission reductions and green technology job creation.
However, wave energy is far behind in development compared to other renewable energies and is currently not on track to contribute to net zero by 2050. Barriers include high construction, installation and maintenance costs due to challenging conditions in offshore locations. 
Seaweed Energy Ltd has taken inspiration from seaweed’s motion and its ability to reduce carbon from the atmosphere. The Kelp System provides a game-changing affordable, sustainable and renewable source of electricity from nearshore sea waves, with the added potential to mitigate coastal erosion. Kelp system is a multi-unit array to provide utility-scale clean energy with zero visual impact.

Name: Equustock OPCO, LLC
Description:
Equustock is a company that specializes in the production and distribution of sustainable and eco-friendly products. With a focus on utilizing renewable resources, Equustock offers a wide range of high-quality solutions for various industries.

Equustock's core expertise lies in the manufacturing of absorbent and bedding materials for livestock, horses, poultry, and environmental remediation. These materials are developed using a self-sustaining multilevel manufacturing production system, ensuring maximum efficiency and minimal waste.

The company takes pride in its zero-waste approach, where every fragment of raw material is utilized to create superior products. By harnessing proprietary methods, Equustock produces absorbents and beddings that provide exceptional performance while minimizing environmental impact.

In addition to their core products, Equustock also produces clean and efficient high BTU wood fuel pellets. These pellets serve as a renewable energy source, delivering a sustainable alternative to traditional fossil fuels.

Equustock is committed to meeting the demands of both domestic and international markets. With a focus on research and development, the company continuously explores new opportunities for growth and expansion.

The company's dedication to sustainability is evident through their USDA 100% Bio-Based certification. Equustock's products not only meet the highest environmental standards but also excel in performance, debunking the perception that "green" products compromise on effectiveness.

By offering environmentally responsible and renewable solutions, Equustock contributes to the transition towards a more sustainable future. They strive to drive various industries, including energy, absorbents, livestock, and pet products, into the realm of sustainable and renewable practices.

Name: GEAP (Gerador de Energia em Água Parada)
Description:
Atualmente 80% da energia elétrica produzida e consumida em nosso planeta vem de fontes não renováveis e poluentes, por tanto a 20 anos venho a procura de desenvolver um gerador capaz de gerar 24 horas sem intermitência, utilizando os recursos naturais não danificando o meio ambiente, pois não podemos destruir nosso planeta porque não existe outro tão perfeito e equilibrado.

Prezado investidor devemos considerar que o projeto já evoluiu para versões mais atualizadas e desempenho aprimorado do que será apresentado a seguir.

Também em relação a custo poderemos reduzir dimensões.



- Para empresas que contribuem com altos valores de imposto de renda teriam CUSTO ZERO, pois o mesmo poderá ser deduzido pela Lei do Bem (Lei 11.196/05).

Projeto proposto é um gerador que irá retirar força motriz de 4 elementos físicos da natureza que nunca falham:

1 -  A gravidade que é obtida de uma roda desequilibrada de “movimento perpétuo”, desenvolvida a 850 anos atrás pelo matemático indiano Bhaskara Wheel, que a construiu usando mercúrio, então adaptei o sistema usando esferas de ferro para fazer fechamento e abertura de pistões, os quais enviarão ar comprimido para  reservatórios em profundidade, que após a expulsão da água pelo ar comprimido enviado, os reservatórios se tornarão boias.



2  - O Empuxo obtido dos “reservatórios boias” que estão posicionados na extremidade de uma "roda" parcialmente imersa em água parada.


3  - O efeito alavanca que será obtido multiplicando a força de empuxo dos reservatórios boia pela distancia ao eixo da roda.



4  - A geração de eletricidade em campo magnético que será obtida por um gerador, através da força motriz,  resultante da somatória das forças de empuxo, dos reservatórios boia, multiplicada por alavanca em relação ao eixo. As forças de atrito e manutenção de desequilíbrio da roda foram consideradas.

Para saber mais acesse: https://energiarenovavelgeap.com.br

Nordjylland er kendt for sin smukke natur, sine mange vindmøller og ikke mindst sin befolkning, der ikke ret gerne betaler mere, end de behøver for en vare. Det gælder naturligvis også strømmen, der kommer ud af hjemmets stikkontakter.

Hos Vedvarende tror vi på kraften i lokal forankring og grønne ambitioner. Vi er et stolt nordjysk elselskab, født og opvokset i Aalborgs dynamiske omgivelser, og vores mission er at bringe ærlig, bæredygtig og billig strøm ud til vores kunder.

Vores historie begyndte med en vision: At skabe et elselskab, der ikke kun handler om at få det største overskud, men om fællesskabet, værdierne og fremtiden i Nordjylland. Hver en kilowatt-time vi leverer, er forankret i lokal stolthed og passion.

Name: ICH2P: 13th International Conference on Hydrogen Production
Description: The 13th International Conference on Hydrogen Production (ICH2P-2022) edition will be focused on the scientific developments of the sustainable generation of hydrogen via electrolysis, solar, wind, biological, catalytic and photo-catalytic based systems, paying particular attention to the production of hydrogen from renewables. Furthermore, the conference will provide the opportunity to share the latest research on hydrogen utilization in transportation, fuel cells, for greenhouse gases mitigation, and industry, as well as on hydrogen storage (chemical carriers, hydrides, gas, and liquefaction) and other emerging applications for industrial hydrogen generation and purification including the contribution of membrane engineering and hydrogen opportunities in space missions. ICH2P-2022 will offer a virtual forum where latest advances, technical information and dissemination of research projects in the areas of hydrogen production, separation and utilization can be shared, favoring exciting debates on the future directions and priorities of the hydrogen economy for a greener and sustainable future.

Name: VegaGeo 3.0
Description:
VegaGeo 3.0 was founded to meet the surging global demand for a clean, dependable base load (24/7) power source for data centers worldwide, remote energy users as well as the US power grid. VegaGeo 3.0 is a geothermal power generation company that uses a proprietary Enhanced Geothermal Systems (“EGS”) technological application to produce baseload (24/7), grid-scale power using the only completely green renewable power source that can be harvested from the Earth’s most prevalent granitic rocks. VegaGeo 3.0 provides a 25 MW superstation design that offers the ability to hyper scale in 25 MW increments to generate hundreds of megawatts of capacity per location. We have compiled a top tier team of oil and gas professionals with decades of industry experience in all fields within the energy value chain. We are applying tried and true technological advancements that have been refined in US shale plays and elsewhere over the past two and a half decades, combined with what the renewable industry has learned from geothermal 1.0 (hydrothermal) and 2.0 (EGS) to come together to provide the future of geothermal power production, VegaGeo 3.0.
 
What excites us most about this technology is its ability to enable data centers and other remote energy users to be co-located directly at the source of power. The real game-changer is placing power plants right next to where the energy is consumed. Avoiding the need for long-distance transmission lines and costly substations dramatically reducing complexity, time, and expense.

Name: Perlis Power Plant (Teknologi Tenaga Perlis Consortium)
Description:
Teknologi Tenaga Perlis Consortium Sdn Bhd (TTPC): A Key Contributor to Malaysia's Energy Grid
Teknologi Tenaga Perlis Consortium Sdn Bhd (TTPC), established in 1996, was a crucial Independent Power Producer (IPP) under Malaysia's Privatisation Scheme. Granted a license to build, own, and operate a power plant, TTPC significantly bolstered the national electricity supply to Tenaga Nasional Berhad (TNB).
At its core was a 650 MW combined-cycle gas turbine (CCGT) power plant in Perlis, Malaysia, commissioned in March 2003. This state-of-the-art facility efficiently utilized exhaust heat from gas turbines to generate additional power via a steam turbine, ensuring high energy conversion.
For 21 years, under a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with TNB, TTPC sold its entire generating capacity and energy. This agreement featured a two-part tariff, covering both fixed operating/capital costs (Available Capacity Payment) and fuel/variable costs (Energy Payment). TTPC consistently operated as a "base-loaded plant" for TNB, underscoring its efficiency and position as one of Malaysia's lowest-cost electricity producers.
Reliable operations were underpinned by key agreements: a 21-year Gas Supply Agreement (GSA) with Petronas and a Backup Fuel Supply Agreement (BFSA) for distillate fuel oil, allowing dual-fuel operation during gas curtailment. TTPC's wholly-owned subsidiary, Global E-Technic Sdn Bhd, expertly managed the plant's operation and maintenance.
TTPC's proven track record reflected extensive expertise in financing, construction, and operation, demonstrating high reliability and operational excellence. While its PPA concluded in March 2024 and the plant was decommissioned, the Perlis site retains strategic value due to its robust energy infrastructure, presenting potential for future redevelopment to further secure Malaysia's energy needs.

Description:
La Esperanza, es un proyecto de Generación Distribuida con una visión ambientalmente responsable, que busca desarrollar un proyecto viable económicamente y con una sostenibilidad ambiental a nivel local para la generación de energía limpia y verde, considera dos mini centrales hidroeléctricas de pasada con una capacidad instalada de hasta 4,1 MW utilizando los recursos hídricos de los ríos Santa Inés y Curacalco, región de La Araucanía, Chile. Con una producción anual de 18 GWH de energía cero emisión que abastecerá a la línea de distribución domiciliaria. En su máxima operación, evitará la emisión de 9.300 TON/año de dióxido de carbono. 

Incorpora variables ambientales y sociales que forman parte de la evaluación económica, pone en práctica la ejecución responsable territorial y social que da coherencia a una sociedad que está aprendiendo adaptarse a una nueva forma de vida verde. Debido a su visión ambientalista, moderna, se caracteriza por ser un proyecto verde que entrega una respuesta funcional que permite actuar a nivel local ante el Calentamiento Global, a través de prácticas responsables enmarcados en acuerdos internacionales de medio ambiente.

Para lograr nuestro objetivo verde se han realizado acciones en el diseño del proyecto, en la conformación del equipo de trabajo, alianzas con participantes ambientalistas y comunidades. El resultado es un capital humano más verde y eficiente en el cumplimiento de nuestra misión.

Name: Planet Zamina Pty Ltd.
Description:
Planet Z is a new technology startup company which aims to create a step change in Australia’s energy transition and sustainability through the application of innovative processes and leading technologies.
Planet Z has developed a comprehensive strategy and series of projects which will apply its innovative process technologies to convert hydrocarbons into clean energy and valuable products through a zero-waste and zero-emission process. The PZ project (subject to this funding request and submission), will deliver a plant converting hydrocarbons on a regional scale, while being commercially sustainable. The replication of the regional project to other regions across Australia will be followed by the establishment of a full-scale plant designed to provide clean energy for capital cities or major industrial facilities.
These next stages of the PZ plan (a full-scale hydrocarbon conversion plant) can cut Australian emissions by 15~25% in one single plant. Through this strategy, PZ is capable of delivering Australia Emission reduction targets planned for 2050, by 2035. The replication of the Santos-PZ project will become the key for global climate change solutions and for humanity to meaningfully address and solve climate change issues globally.

Description:
Mombracco Energy Srl nasce nel 2010 con lo scopo di progettare, costruire e gestire una centrale di cogenerazione ecocompatibile, alimentata a biomassa, nel comune di Envie, in provincia di Cuneo.

Il nome Mombracco Energy esprime in sintesi la missione della Società: la produzione combinata di energia elettrica e di energia termica da biomassa, ottenute mediante lo sfruttamento sostenibile delle risorse naturali locali, provenienti dall’agricoltura e dal Monte Bracco.

La centrale, infatti:
• Brucia esclusivamente cippato di legna vergine, proveniente dal comprensorio del Saluzzese (il materiale sarà reperito nel raggio massimo di 20 Km).
• Produce:
     • energia elettrica da fonti rinnovabili, che sarà immessa nella rete elettrica
     nazionale
     • energia termica conveniente, in parte utilizzata per essiccare il
     combustibile cippato e in parte ceduta al comune di Envie (CN), tramite un
     circuito di teleriscaldamento


Attraverso la propria attività Mombracco Energy Srl mira:
• ad incentivare l'utilizzo di fonti rinnovabili di energia
• a ridurre la dipendenza da Paesi fornitori di fonti energetiche fossili
• a valorizzare le risorse locali, con conseguente sviluppo socio-economico del territorio
• a promuovere la cura e manutenzione dei boschi
• a diminuire l'inquinamento dell'aria e a mitigare gli effetti del cambiamento climatico, contribuendo al raggiungimento degli obiettivi imposti dal Protocollo di Kyoto

Name: KWKW Mühle AG
Description:
Die KWKW Mühle AG, ansässig in Berschis, ist ein etablierter Betreiber eines Wasserkraftwerks, das die Wasserkraft des Berschnerbachs zur Stromerzeugung nutzt. Seit mehr als zwei Jahrzehnten engagieren wir uns für die Nutzung erneuerbarer Energien und demonstrieren, wie traditionelle Wasserkraft effektiv für die heutigen Energiebedürfnisse genutzt werden kann.

Unsere Anlage baut auf der langen Geschichte der Wasserkraftnutzung auf, die nicht nur eine Mühle, sondern auch ein Sägewerk antrieb. Mit dem Ziel, dieses Erbe zu bewahren und gleichzeitig den Weg für die Nutzung nachhaltiger Energie zu ebnen, hat die KWKW Mühle AG die Wasserkraft des Berschnerbachs wiederbelebt. Heute steht unsere Anlage als Beispiel dafür, wie man Vergangenheit und Zukunft verbindet und sich für nachhaltige Entwicklung einsetzt.

Mit einer Spitzenleistung von 200 kWh und einer Jahresproduktion von über 900'000 kWh liefert die KWKW Mühle AG einen signifikanten Beitrag zur Energieversorgung in der Region. Unsere Jahresproduktion deckt mehr als 3% des Strombedarfs der Gemeinde Walenstadt, was unseren entscheidenden Beitrag zur lokalen nachhaltigen Energieversorgung unterstreicht.

Die KWKW Mühle AG ist ein wichtiges Beispiel dafür, wie erneuerbare Energiequellen in die lokale Infrastruktur integriert werden können. Wir setzen uns für den Schutz unserer natürlichen Umwelt ein und fördern den Einsatz von grünen Energiealternativen. Unsere Anstrengungen spiegeln das Bestreben wider, eine saubere, grüne Zukunft zu sichern und die Verantwortung, die wir gegenüber kommenden Generationen tragen.

Name: Stark Resilent
Description:
Our aim is to create alternative, clean, renewable, cheap, and powerful energy that will surpass traditional energy. The most important aspect of our invention is the environmental benefits as part of a world energy future. Alternative clean power works by producing power without having negative environmental impacts, such as the release of greenhouse gases like carbon dioxide. Thanks to Climate Change, and the fact that medium global temperatures continue to grow year after year, the drive to find forms of energy that will reduce people's trust in fossil fuels, oil, gas, coal, and other polluting methods has naturally intensified. And we will be working to create this. This will help every person to stay warm or cool with a flick of a switch with cheap, and clean energy for everyone around the world. This will change the quality of the air in the World, make our lifestyle more quality and safety, and will end the conflicts around the World. And of course, this will eradicate poverty all over the world.

The most important aspect of our purpose is the environmental benefits as part of a world energy future and also it is possible to create reliable power supplies to enhance the energy security of people in the world! Of course, the financial implications of clean energy are just part of the story, since the real incentive behind clean energy is creating a better future for the planet. Alternative power is not just good for the environment and climate but it is a forward move for the industry, business, work too. And of course, this will be good for the middle class around the world.

And also our purpose is to create new modern engines for cars, airplanes, ships, trucks, etc. that will work efficiently using our renewable energies and will be free from traditional energy. Our inventions will make the life of people in the World improve, wealthy, safe, protected and our future safe and confident.

#Stark #StarkResilent #ResilientFuture #EndPoverty #CleanEnergy #World

Name: Wholesale Diesel Generators
Description:
Powering What Matters Most — Anywhere, Anytime
At Wholesale Diesel Generators, we help businesses stay productive and profitable by delivering dependable, on-demand power when and where it’s needed most. Whether you're building in remote locations, powering ag operations miles from the grid, or keeping mission-critical systems running, we design and deliver heavy-duty diesel generator systems that work as hard as you do.

Some companies can plug in and go. Yours might not be one of them. From off-grid construction to farms, seasonal sites, and high-demand facilities, you need power that won’t slow you down. Our systems provide prime, supplemental, and standby power so your operation stays online — regardless of what the grid does.

With decades of field experience, our team understands the challenges power-driven operations face. We've supported job site managers, growers, engineers, and plant leaders across hundreds of deployments with the right equipment, sizing, and fuel strategy to match.

Here’s how it works:

Assess & Size – We evaluate your load needs, mobility, emissions, and future growth.

Configure & Install – You get a diesel generator system spec’d for your environment, whether portable, containerized, or permanent.

Support & Maintain – With robust service options, we help you avoid costly downtime and keep running strong.

Don’t let unreliable power delay your schedule or drain your bottom line. Let’s build a solution that powers your success — on the grid, off the grid, and everywhere in between.

La tecnologia BYE è di tipo scalabile e modulare cioè può essere utilizzata per la realizzazione di impianti per la produzione di energia elettrica da 400 kW a 10 kW e può essere collegata in più moduli per avere differenti soluzioni di potenze con un ridotto impatto al suolo. 
Per le sue caratteristiche peculiari tecnologia brevettata BYE potrà essere applicata anche alla valorizzazione del rifiuto urbano solido differenziato.

Ci rivolgiamo a tutte le società a livello nazionale ed internazionale che hanno un esigenza di smaltire la biomassa in modo ecologico ottenendo un immediato vantaggio nella produzione di energia direttamente utilizzabile.

Per approfondire ed avere una stima del vantaggio che potresti avere nella valorizzazione della tua biomassa, scrivi a info@bysrl.it

Name: OHR Energy (Otto H. Rosentreter Co)
Description:
Based in Southern California, OHR Energy is a full service distributed energy solutions provider. As an energy development company, we provide turnkey, distributed generation ("DG") systems for commercial, government, municipal and utility customers. Our mission is to reduce our customers' energy costs, alleviate our dependence on foreign energy sources, preserve our country's valuable resources and make our environment a cleaner place to live.
OHR Energy has been in business in California for 73 years, and serves a variety of different industries. Over the last three decades we’ve focused on providing alternatives to lower energy costs for our customers. Today, we evaluate our customers current energy needs and deliver turnkey power generation solutions, from financing and permitting to design, construction and installation.  We have extensive experience with electrical grid interconnections of DG systems utilizing a variety of different technologies including internal combustion engines, fuel cells, microturbines, battery storage, solar PV and solar thermal systems operating on a variety of different fuels such natural gas, renewable biogas, hydrogen and of course, the sun.  
We've completed distributed generation projects for data centers, universities, dairies, manufacturing plants, food processing plants, beverage facilities, hospitals, television/movie studios, hotels, electric utilities and local municipalities.  With over 75 systems interconnected to all three California Investor Owned Utilities and several local municipal electric utilities, totaling over 55MW of capacity, our experience is second to none.  
OHR Energy holds both A & B CSLB licenses and is a Minority Business Enterprise. We provide a variety of services to our customers, including: 
- Turnkey Design/Build Services
- Feasibility & Engineering Studies
- Project & Construction Management
- System Construction & Installation
- Project Financing Flexibility - PPAs, ESAs & Operating Leases

Name: ENERJAI BIOMASS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Enerjai Biomass Private Limited is a seed-stage company with a bold vision to revolutionize India’s biomass energy sector. By tackling critical challenges such as seasonal raw material shortages, Enerjai ensures a consistent, sustainable, and high-quality supply of biomass pellets throughout the year. Initially focused on meeting the demands of pre-determined clients, the company has ambitious plans to expand into biogas, green hydrogen, and carbon capture and storage projects, positioning itself at the forefront of India’s clean-energy future.
Enerjai is committed to driving innovation and sustainability. With a focus on Compressed Biogas (CBG), green hydrogen, cutting-edge research, patent development, and large-scale plantations, the company actively leverages government programs and financial support to create a resilient, future-ready biomass infrastructure. Unlike conventional suppliers, Enerjai caters not only to bulk buyers but also to commercial and household customers, building a nationwide distribution network to ensure reliable access to clean energy across India.
At the heart of Enerjai’s mission is women's empowerment. The company operates with a fully women-led workforce, engaging women at every stage—from field operations and raw-material collection to plant management, logistics, and administrative roles. By partnering with Self-Help Groups (SHGs), Enerjai creates meaningful employment, develops leadership skills, promotes financial independence, and builds technical expertise among rural women. This approach strengthens communities, amplifies women’s economic participation, and fosters a sustainable, women-driven ecosystem in renewable energy.
With its unique combination of innovation, sustainability, and social impact, Enerjai Biomass Private Limited is not just meeting India’s growing demand for renewable energy—it is reshaping the energy sector, empowering women, and driving inclusive growth for a cleaner, greener future.

Name: Generator & Power Systems LLC Hawaii
Description:
Generator & Power Systems, LLC
Part of The Solaray Corporation Family

Generator & Power Systems (GPS) has proudly been part of The Solaray Corporation since April 2021; a 100% employee-owned family of clean-energy companies that includes Inter-Island Solar Supply, SunEarth Inc., Alternate Energy Technologies (AET), and Pacific Panel Cleaners. Together, we provide the most complete portfolio of solar thermal, photovoltaic, and power generation solutions across Hawaiʻi and beyond.

From our origins in 1973 supporting off-grid solar installations, GPS has evolved into a full-service energy and backup-power provider. Today we deliver solar + storage systems, commercial PV projects, standby and prime generators, and large-scale pump and motor systems that keep essential operations running throughout the islands.

As Hawaiʻi’s only solar and generator distributor with the depth of inventory, technical expertise, and local knowledge to handle virtually any power-system need, GPS has become the trusted name in energy reliability. We are also the exclusive industrial dealer for Generac Power Systems across Hawaiʻi and the Pacific, offering turnkey design, installation, and 24/7/365 service support.

In April 2023, GPS expanded further with the creation of our Pumps & Motors Department, broadening our capability to deliver integrated power, pumping, and controls solutions for commercial, industrial, and municipal applications.

At Generator & Power Systems, we don’t just keep the lights on, we power resilience, reliability, and progress across island communities.

Name: Fortare Engenharia Elétrica
Description:
A Fortare Engenharia Elétrica é uma empresa especializada em manutenção preventiva, corretiva, preditiva, comissionamento e startups de subestações elétricas. Estamos empenhados em fornecer serviços abrangentes e de qualidade para garantir o desempenho e a confiabilidade dos seus equipamentos elétricos.

Nossa equipe altamente capacitada e experiente é especializada em todos os aspectos da manutenção de subestações elétricas. Reconhecemos a importância crítica dessas instalações para garantir o fornecimento de energia seguro e ininterrupto.

Nossos serviços de manutenção preventiva são projetados para identificar e corrigir problemas antes que se tornem falhas críticas. Realizamos inspeções regulares, testes de desempenho e manutenção programada, garantindo que as subestações estejam em pleno funcionamento e em conformidade com as normas e regulamentos aplicáveis.

Possuímos vasto conhecimento técnico e experiência, diagnosticamos e reparamos os componentes e sistemas defeituosos, restaurando o funcionamento adequado das subestações elétricas.

Além disso, oferecemos serviços de manutenção preditiva, utilizando tecnologias avançadas, como monitoramento remoto, análise de dados e diagnóstico de falhas. Essas abordagens permitem a identificação antecipada de problemas potenciais, possibilitando a tomada de medidas preventivas para evitar interrupções e garantir um desempenho confiável das subestações.

Nossa empresa também se destaca no comissionamento e startups de subestações elétricas. Com uma abordagem sistemática e metodológica, garantimos que todas as etapas de comissionamento, desde a instalação até a operação efetiva, sejam concluídas com precisão e em conformidade com os requisitos técnicos e regulamentares. Nosso objetivo é garantir que as subestações estejam prontas para operar de forma eficiente e segura desde o início.
Valorizamos a qualidade, a inovação e a segurança em todos os aspectos de nosso trabalho.

Name: Business Forum
Description:
Business Forum je společnost s dvacetiletými zkušenostmi v koncipování, organizování a pořádání kongresů, konferencí a seminářů k nejnovějším trendům a aktuálnímu dění v energetice.

Pořádáme výhradně své akce a zodpovídáme za jejich program. Naše konference reprezentují danou oblast nikoli jen určité zájmové skupiny či firmy. Usilujeme vždy o to, aby naše fóra byla nezávislá.

Rozhodující pro úspěch a konkurenceschopnost firmy je získávání nejnovějších odborných informací. Naším cílem je přinést Vám, našim zákazníkům, nejčerstvější trendy a informace o dění v energetice jak doma, tak i v zahraničí a rovněž zprostředkovat zkušenosti, které Vám přinesou praktický užitek při realizaci Vašich záměrů. Naše akce jsou určeny vyššímu a střednímu managementu a vedoucím pracovníkům, pro jejichž úspěch jsou nejnovější odborné informace nezbytností. Zkušení domácí i zahraniční experti Vám prostřednictvím mnoha příkladů z praxe, případových studií a diskusních fór přiblíží témata, která Vás zajímají. Podrobně zpracované konferenční materiály v digitální podobě Vám pomohou ve Vaší každodenní práci.

Věříme, že digitální věk nenahradí osobní lidský kontakt. Naše akce jsou známé jedinečnou atmosférou, pozitivní energií, jsou místem, kde získáte inspiraci. Výměna informací s řídícími pracovníky, poradci a experty, kteří řeší stejné nebo podobné problémy nebo tyto problémy již úspěšně vyřešili, může hrát zásadní roli pro rozhodnutí, která Vás přivedou k úspěchu.

Naše společnost patří dnes k nejrenomovanějším a nejúspěšnějším v koncipování programů energetických konferencí v České republice.

Name: Jade Energy System
Description:
JADE Energy is a project dedicated to the generation of sustainable, clean, and renewable energy through electromagnetic technology.  
We create energy generators that utilize electromagnetic principles, offering power outputs starting from 10 kW, without generating greenhouse gas emissions or other harmful pollutants to the environment. Our approach is based on sustainable production practices. We use environmentally friendly materials in the manufacturing of our generators and strive to minimize resource consumption and waste generation at all stages of the process.
Aligned with the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), our magnetic energy generator contributes to the promotion and access to sustainable energy (SDG 7), fosters innovation and sustainable infrastructure (SDG 9), contributes to climate change mitigation (SDG 13), and the protection of marine ecosystems by reducing dependence on unsustainable energy sources.
JADE Energía es un proyecto dedicado a la generación de energía sostenible, limpia y renovables a través de la tecnología del electromagnetismo.
En un mundo donde la necesidad de energía es creciente y los impactos ambientales se hacen cada vez más evidentes JADE tiene como propósito reducir la dependencia de fuentes de energía no renovables 
Creamos generadores de energía que utilizan los principios electromagnéticos ofreciendo potencias desde los 10 kw, 
Nos basamos en prácticas de producción sostenibles. Utilizamos materiales respetuosos con el medio ambiente en la fabricación de nuestros generadores y nos esforzamos por minimizar el consumo de recursos y la generación de residuos en todas las etapas del proceso.
Alineados con los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible (ODS) de las Naciones Unidas, Queremos contribuir a la lucha contra el cambio climático

Name: MnM Coast Power
Description:
Our Vision - Powering the Shift to Electric

Switching to electric vehicles is one of the biggest changes happening right now. At MnM Coast Power, we're making sure that change is smooth by building off-grid EV charging stations that are always reliable. By combining wind and solar power with smart battery storage, we're making sure that charging your EV is easy and hassle-free.

Our Goal

We want to create a network of the fastest, most reliable charging stations, starting here in Ontario. Whether it's for first responders, municipal fleets, or regular drivers, our stations are built to be dependable—with a focus on 98% uptime. Charging your EV should be something you never have to worry about.

Investment & Partnership Opportunities - Be Part of the Future of Energy

We're working to change how EV charging works with our hybrid renewable systems. If you're interested in helping us expand and innovate, we’re looking for investors to move our research and projects forward.

Partner With Us

We’re also looking for partners who share our passion for clean energy. Whether you’re a technology company, part of the government, or just someone who wants to collaborate, we’d love to hear from you.

از عمده فعالیت های دیزل نوآوران در زمینه واردات دیزل ژنراتور و ژنراتور گازسوز از کشورهای اروپایی، استرالیا و آمریکا است که از بهترین برندهای بازار کشورهای پیشرفته همانند کاترپیلار ،  کامینز ، ام تی یو ، پرکینز و . . . میباشد.

با توجه به قوانین سخت گیرانه در کشورهای فوق که مولدهای برق طی یک دوره کوتاه مدت از سیستم خارج میشوند و همچنین کیفیت بسیار بالای این دستگاها، واردات دیزل ژنراتور کم کارکرد عملکرد و کارایی بسیار بالایی در مقایسه با دیزل ژنراتور های برند چینی که به صورت طرح و کپی از روی سازنده های اصلی ساخته میشوند، دارند و با توجه به وجود قطعات یدکی پشتیبانی بسیار خوبی از آنها صورت میپذیرد.

تجربه کاری مدیران دیزل نوآوران و انجام خرید و واردات مستقیم کالاهای فوق در کنار زیر ساخت های موجود در مجموعه دیزل نوآوران باعث شده است تا بهترین برندهای دیزل ژنراتور از سوی این مجموعه برای تامین نیازهای شرکت ها، معادن، پروژه های ساختمانی و عمرانی، بنادر و کشتی ها  و . . . با قیمت های مناسب عرضه شوند.

برای مشاوره رایگان در زمینه تامین و خرید دیزل ژنراتور های کارکرده و نو از برندهای مطرح روز دنیا با کارشناسان ما در ارتباط باشید.

Name: Shahjahanullah Power Generation Co. Ltd. (Now Operating as United Energy Ltd. – UEL)
Description:
Shahjahanullah Power Generation Co. Ltd. (SPGCL), a subsidiary of Karimullah Group (later acquired by United Group and now operating as United Energy Ltd.), was established to address Bangladesh’s growing energy demands with a clear vision “to supply non-stop power across the country” and a mission “to set up new power plants where demand is high.”

Founded under the leadership of Md. Ataullah Shaker, SPGCL quickly emerged as a vital contributor to Sylhet’s industrial growth and regional development. A landmark milestone occurred on 2 February 2009, when SPGCL signed a strategic contract with MWM Asia Pacific Pvt. Ltd., Germany, at Kaltimex Energy Bangladesh Pvt. Ltd., formally initiating its Independent Power Plant (IPP) project and setting a benchmark for modern energy infrastructure in the region.

The 24 MW IPP, strategically planned in the proposed PDB, REB, and DESCO supply areas, was designed to alleviate acute power shortages affecting industries, businesses, and communities. With structured plans for expansion to 100 MW, SPGCL established itself as a long-term, sustainable contributor to Bangladesh’s energy sector.

Guided by a highly experienced Board of Directors, including Engr. Md. Hasanur Rashid (Managing Director) and Dr. Wali Tasar Uddin, MBE, JP, D.Litt, FRSA (Overseas Director), SPGCL leveraged combined expertise in engineering, entrepreneurship, and international business to strengthen operational excellence, strategic planning, and stakeholder engagement.

In June 2015, Shahjahanullah Power Generation Co. Ltd. (SPGCL) was officially acquired by United Group, one of Bangladesh’s leading conglomerates in power generation, infrastructure, and industrial solutions. Its assets and operations were integrated into United Energy Ltd., ensuring uninterrupted contribution to the national grid and reinforcing United Group’s commitment to delivering reliable, high-capacity, efficient, and sustainable energy solutions across the country.

Name: Nature Bio Works
Description:
Nature Bio Works Pvt. Ltd. is a sustainability engineering company that converts municipal, agricultural, and industrial waste into clean energy and bio-based fuel solutions. We transform food waste, crop residue, and post-consumer plastics into high-efficiency biomass fuels and integrated waste-to-energy systems.

Our portfolio includes biomass pellets, Refuse-Derived Fuel (RDF), and torrefied biomass, supported by turnkey solutions like industrial boiler retrofits, pollution control systems, and waste processing technologies—including pellet presses, shredders, biogas units, and plastic-to-fuel systems.

Our flagship initiative, the Eco Balance Project, tackles large-scale stubble (parali) burning by converting crop residue into clean-burning biofuel—reducing open-air pollution and cutting CO₂ emissions at the source. In FY 2023–24 alone, we diverted over 15,000 metric tonnes of agri-waste from open burning and landfills.

We drive measurable socio-environmental outcomes: generating 5,000+ rural jobs annually, uplifting farmer incomes through residue procurement, and enabling substantial carbon offset through circular economy pathways.

Nature Bio Works operates in alignment with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and key Indian government missions like SATAT, Swachh Bharat, and Waste to Wealth. Our systems are scalable, technically robust, and environmentally responsible.

We are a trusted partner to industry leaders including Coca-Cola, NTPC, PepsiCo, and Carlsberg, with a growing pipeline of climate-aligned collaborations across India and abroad.

At Nature Bio Works, we're accelerating India’s clean energy transition—scaling innovative waste-to-energy infrastructure to power a net zero, circular economy future for the world.

Description:
We are a Green Electricity Generation Company.

Our goal is to build a network of small scale Bio-digestors, at multiple farm and food-waste production sites, to attain a scale that is competitive with much larger power plants that use fossil fuels.

Our hosts benefit in multiple ways, with very little extra required of them beyond their current daily tasks. You simply dispose of waste in a different way, and gain from it. Instead of spreading animal slurry on fields, you now spread digestate. The digestate has no nasty microbes, but retains all the fertilizer value of slurry.
The other by-products are also very useful. Our system produces more heat than electricity. This means fixed low-cost hot water and heating for farm buildings, greenhouses, homes etc.. The CO2 produced is clean and can be used in greenhouses to speed plant growth. As a host you also receive a fixed payment for labour and rent. 
 
We remotely monitor the operation of the Bio-digestor, and provide all the technical know-how required. Our team undertake call-out repairs and annual servicing as required. 

Get in touch if you think our solution could work for you.

Name: XYZ Group Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Jesteśmy dynamicznie rozwijającą się firmą specjalizującą się w produkcji i dystrybucji biomasy na potrzeby sektora energetycznego.
Naszym celem jest wspieranie zrównoważonego rozwoju poprzez dostarczanie ekologicznych i efektywnych źródeł energii zarówno na rynki krajowe, jak i międzynarodowe.

Działamy kompleksowo – od pozyskiwania surowców, przez przetwarzanie i produkcję, aż po logistykę i dostawę biomasy do odbiorców końcowych. 
Nasza oferta obejmuje m.in.:
- pellet drzewny
- pellet ze słomy
- pellet z łuski słonecznika
- brykiet

inne biopaliwa stałe

Nasza firma wyróżnia się nowoczesnym podejściem do produkcji, wysoką jakością oferowanych produktów oraz elastycznością w dostosowywaniu się do potrzeb klientów.
Dysponujemy zaawansowanym zapleczem technologicznym i rozwiniętą siecią dystrybucyjną, co pozwala nam na terminowe i niezawodne realizacje dostaw.

Współpracujemy zarówno z producentami energii, jak i partnerami przemysłowymi w całej Europie.
Naszymi atutami są:

- zgodność z europejskimi normami jakości i certyfikacjami (np. ENplus, SURE, RED2, RED3, GiG)

- transparentność i odpowiedzialność w relacjach biznesowych

- doświadczenie w międzynarodowym obrocie surowcami energetycznymi

Dążymy do tego, aby biomasa stała się realną alternatywą dla tradycyjnych źródeł energii – przyjazną dla środowiska i ekonomicznie uzasadnioną.

Jeśli poszukujesz rzetelnego dostawcy biomasy, który łączy wiedzę branżową, profesjonalizm i zrównoważone podejście do energii – skontaktuj się z nami.

Razem możemy budować przyszłość opartą na zielonej energii.

Name: Ignovis
Description:
Ignovis is transforming the future of geothermal energy and rare earth element recovery through an innovative approach that is scalable, cost-effective, and sustainable.  Our purpose-built systems are designed to overcome longstanding technical barriers and enable commercially viable resource development.

Ignovis Geo Systems (IGS) are ‘redefining’ the approach for enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) and in situ recovery (ISR) of rare earth elements (REE) by: 
•	Mitigates critical technical challenges and operational risks
•	Provides unparallelled system control 
•	Reduces the levelized cost of electricity (LCOE)
•	Enables long-term commercial viability.

The name Ignovis (pronounced IG-no-vis) blends the Latin words Ignis (Fire) and Novus (New), reflecting our mission to ignite a new era of renewable energy and critical mineral recovery.

Ready to change the world?
Contact us at info@ignovis.com
